zh.tag: AI 驱动的全球实时态势感知仪表盘
zh.what: World Monitor 是一个实时全球情报仪表盘，利用 AI 聚合新闻、监控地缘政治事件和基础设施状态，提供统一的态势感知界面。它支持多个垂直领域（科技、金融、大宗商品、能源等）的定制化视图。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Web 应用源码、CLI 工具和 npm 包，提供多种主题变体（科技、金融、大宗商品、能源等），以及 MCP 服务器集成。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 开发，使用 npm 包管理，支持 Web 应用和 CLI 两种形态，集成了 MCP 服务器。
zh.hot: 凭借 AI 驱动的实时全球情报聚合和多个垂直领域定制视图，上线后迅速获得 6.5 万+ Star，日增近 1300，登顶 GitHub 日榜。
uses: 地缘政治分析师 —— 实时监控全球事件与基础设施状态
金融投资者 —— 跟踪大宗商品、能源等市场动态
科技从业者 —— 获取科技领域新闻与趋势
普通用户 —— 通过 Happy 变体关注积极新闻

en.tag: AI-powered real-time global intelligence dashboard for situational awareness
en.what: World Monitor is a real-time global intelligence dashboard that uses AI to aggregate news, monitor geopolitical events, and track infrastructure status in a unified situational awareness interface. It offers customized views for various verticals like tech, finance, commodities, and energy.
en.content: The repository contains full web application source code, CLI tools, and npm packages, offering multiple theme variants (tech, finance, commodities, energy, etc.), along with MCP server integration.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, managed via npm, supports both web app and CLI, and integrates MCP server.
en.hot: With AI-powered real-time global intelligence aggregation and multiple vertical-specific views, it quickly gained over 65K stars, adding nearly 1,300 daily, topping GitHub's daily trending chart.
uses: Geopolitical analysts — monitor global events and infrastructure in real time
Financial investors — track commodities, energy, and market movements
Tech professionals — stay updated with tech news and trends
General users — follow positive news via the Happy variant

zh.tag: AI Agent 原理与工程实战开源书
zh.what: 这是一本系统讲解 AI Agent 设计原理与工程实践的开源书籍，围绕核心公式 Agent = LLM + 上下文 + 工具展开。全书共10章，从基础概念到生产级应用，覆盖上下文工程、工具使用、评估、多模态等主题。
zh.content: 仓库包含全书正文（Markdown 源码）、编译好的 PDF（中/英/泰/越四种语言）、以及88个配套实验项目（70+可独立运行）。
zh.stack: 正文使用 Markdown 编写，PDF 编译依赖 pandoc、xelatex 和 ElegantBook 模板；代码示例主要使用 Python。
zh.hot: 今日新增 4434 星，总星数破万，登顶 GitHub Trending 日榜。AI Agent 是当前最热的技术方向之一，而本书提供了系统、开源、可动手实践的学习资源，填补了从理论到工程的空白。
uses: AI 开发者/工程师 —— 系统学习 AI Agent 设计与实现
学生/研究者 —— 获取从原理到代码的完整知识体系
技术团队 —— 作为内部培训或项目参考的权威资料
自学者 —— 通过 88 个实验项目动手实践

en.tag: Open-source book on AI Agent design & engineering
en.what: An open-source book systematically covering AI Agent design principles and engineering practices, centered on the formula Agent = LLM + Context + Tools. It includes 10 chapters from basics to production, covering context engineering, tool use, evaluation, multimodality, etc.
en.content: The repo contains full book text (Markdown source), compiled PDFs in 4 languages (Chinese, English, Tamil, Vietnamese), and 88 accompanying projects (70+ runnable independently).
en.stack: Book text is in Markdown; PDF compilation uses pandoc, xelatex, and ElegantBook template; code examples are primarily in Python.
en.hot: Gained 4434 stars today, surpassing 10k total and topping GitHub Trending daily. AI Agent is a hot topic, and this book provides a systematic, open-source, hands-on resource bridging theory and engineering.
uses: AI developers/engineers — systematically learn AI Agent design and implementation
Students/researchers — get a complete knowledge system from theory to code
Tech teams — use as authoritative reference for internal training or projects
Self-learners — practice with 88 hands-on projects

zh.tag: 面向 MCP 的本地代码智能图谱，让 AI 编码工具只读关键上下文
zh.what: code-review-graph 通过 Tree-sitter 解析代码库，构建持久的结构化代码地图并增量追踪变更。它作为 MCP 服务器运行，让 AI 编码助手在代码审阅或处理大型仓库时只获取真正相关的上下文，从而显著减少 token 消耗。
zh.content: 仓库包含 CLI 工具与 MCP 服务器实现，提供 build、install 等命令，并附带 benchmark 数据、GitHub Action 集成文档及多语言 README。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 3.10+ 开发，使用 Tree-sitter 进行代码解析，通过 MCP 协议与 AI 工具通信，支持 pip/pipx 安装。
zh.hot: 项目精准击中 AI 编程“token 燃烧”痛点，宣称在真实仓库中实现 38 倍至 528 倍的上下文压缩；凭借近 2 万星标与单日 74 星增速登上 Trending 前十，反映出开发者对低成本、高精度 AI 代码审阅的强烈需求。
uses: 使用 AI 编码助手（如 Cursor、Claude Code）的开发者 —— 降低代码审阅时的 token 消耗与等待时间
大型代码库维护者 —— 在 monorepo 或遗留项目中为 AI 提供精准、增量更新的代码上下文
追求数据隐私的团队 —— 通过 Local-first 架构在本地构建代码图谱，避免上传源码至云端
CI/CD 集成场景 —— 借助 GitHub Action 在自动化流程中嵌入智能代码审查

en.tag: Local-first code intelligence graph feeding AI tools precise context via MCP to cut tokens
en.what: It parses your codebase with Tree-sitter to build a persistent, structural code map and tracks changes incrementally. Serving as an MCP server, it feeds AI coding assistants only the relevant context during reviews or large-repo workflows, dramatically cutting token usage.
en.content: The repo ships a CLI tool and MCP server implementation with commands like build and install, plus benchmark data, GitHub Action integration docs, and multi-language READMEs.
en.stack: Built on Python 3.10+, it uses Tree-sitter for parsing and speaks to AI tools via the MCP protocol, installable through pip or pipx.
en.hot: It directly tackles the “token burn” pain point in AI coding, claiming 38×–528× context reduction on real repos; its nearly 20k stars and 74-star daily growth landed it on Trending Top 10, showing strong demand for low-cost, high-precision AI code reviews.
uses: Developers using AI coding assistants (e.g., Cursor, Claude Code) — slash token costs and wait times during code reviews
Large codebase maintainers — serve AI precise, incrementally-updated context in monorepos or legacy projects
Privacy-conscious teams — keep code intelligence local and avoid uploading source code to the cloud
CI/CD integrators — embed smart code reviews into automation pipelines via the provided GitHub Action

zh.tag: 为编程助手注入ADHD友好输出，直击答案
zh.what: 这是一个让编程助手（如Claude Code、Codex）输出更简洁、直接、可操作回答的技能。它强制助手以行动为先、步骤编号、避免冗长铺垫和客套话，特别适合注意力易分散的用户。
zh.content: 仓库包含安装指南（支持Claude Code、Codex等）、核心规则文件SKILL.md（10条规则）、以及对比示例（展示前后输出差异）。
zh.stack: 无特定技术栈，作为插件/技能集成到Claude Code和Codex中，依赖其插件系统。
zh.hot: 今日新增1866星，总星数6854，排名日榜第4。直击开发者痛点——冗长AI回复浪费注意力，简洁输出需求强烈。
uses: ADHD或注意力易分散的开发者 —— 减少阅读负担，快速获取可执行步骤
追求效率的开发者 —— 跳过客套话，直接获得操作指令
编程助手用户 —— 优化Claude Code/Codex的输出风格

en.tag: ADHD-friendly output for coding agents: action first, no fluff
en.what: A skill for coding assistants (e.g., Claude Code, Codex) that forces concise, actionable outputs: action first, numbered steps, no preamble or closers. Designed for users who struggle with attention.
en.content: Contains install instructions for multiple coding agents, a SKILL.md file with 10 rules, and before/after examples showing output transformation.
en.stack: No specific tech stack; integrates as a plugin/skill into Claude Code and Codex via their plugin systems.
en.hot: Gained 1866 stars today, total 6854, #4 on daily trending. Addresses a common pain point: verbose AI responses waste attention, demand for concise output is high.
uses: Developers with ADHD or attention issues — reduce reading load, get actionable steps fast
Efficiency-focused developers — skip pleasantries, get straight to the point
Coding agent users — optimize output style of Claude Code/Codex

zh.tag: 为AI代理打造的CAD与机器人设计技能库
zh.what: Text-to-CAD 是一个为AI代理提供CAD、机器人和硬件设计技能的库。它允许代理通过自然语言或图像生成、编辑CAD模型，并导出为STEP、STL、3MF等格式，同时支持机器人描述文件（URDF、SDF、SRDF）的生成。
zh.content: 仓库包含多个技能模块：CAD建模、CAD预览、标准件查找、切片、机器人描述文件生成等，每个技能都有独立的文档和实现。
zh.stack: 主要使用Python 3.11+，依赖CAD内核（如CadQuery）和机器人描述库，前端预览基于Web浏览器。
zh.hot: 将大语言模型与CAD/机器人设计结合，极大降低了硬件设计门槛，今日新增297星，总星数8649，登顶JavaScript日榜。
uses: AI代理开发者：为代理集成CAD和机器人设计能力
硬件工程师：通过自然语言快速生成3D模型
机器人爱好者：自动生成URDF等机器人描述文件
创客与教育：降低CAD学习曲线，快速原型设计

en.tag: A skill library for AI agents to generate CAD, robotics, and hardware designs
en.what: Text-to-CAD is a library of agent skills for CAD, robotics, and hardware design. It enables agents to generate and edit CAD models from plain language or images, export to STEP, STL, 3MF, and produce robot description files (URDF, SDF, SRDF).
en.content: The repo contains multiple skill modules: CAD modeling, CAD viewer, off-the-shelf parts sourcing, slicing, and robot description file generation, each with its own documentation and implementation.
en.stack: Primarily uses Python 3.11+, with CAD kernel (e.g., CadQuery) and robot description libraries; frontend preview is web-based.
en.hot: Combining LLMs with CAD and robotics design dramatically lowers the barrier to hardware design. Gained 297 stars today, total 8649, topping the JavaScript daily trending list.
uses: AI agent developers: integrate CAD and robotics design skills into agents
Hardware engineers: quickly generate 3D models from natural language
Robotics enthusiasts: auto-generate robot description files like URDF
Makers and educators: lower CAD learning curve for rapid prototyping

zh.tag: Rust 编写的下一代 Coding Agent Harness，极致性能与多会话支持
zh.what: jcode 是一款基于 Rust 的下一代 Coding Agent Harness，旨在提升 AI 编程助手的技能上限。它专为多会话工作流、无限可定制性与极致性能而设计，能够在本地以极低资源消耗运行复杂编程任务。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 核心运行时、跨平台 CLI 安装脚本（Linux/macOS/Windows），以及展示内存与启动速度优势的基准测试数据。
zh.stack: 以 Rust 为主语言，强调零成本抽象与资源效率；支持可选本地嵌入模型，通过 Bash/PowerShell 脚本实现一键跨平台安装。
zh.hot: 在 AI 编程工具同质化严重的背景下，jcode 凭借 8421 Star 和 Rust 日榜第 11 名的热度，以单会话 27.8 MB 的超低内存占用和多会话架构，精准击中开发者对高性能本地 Agent 的需求。
uses: 追求本地低内存、高性能 AI 编程体验的核心开发者
需要长期运行多会话复杂工作流的高级用户
希望深度定制 Coding Agent 行为与工具链的极客与团队

en.tag: Next-gen coding agent harness in Rust for multi-session, low-RAM workflows
en.what: jcode is a next-generation coding agent harness built in Rust to raise the skill ceiling of AI coding assistants. It is designed for multi-session workflows, infinite customizability, and extreme performance, allowing complex coding tasks to run locally with minimal resource usage.
en.content: The repo includes a Rust core runtime, cross-platform CLI installers for Linux/macOS/Windows, and benchmark data highlighting its memory and boot-up speed advantages.
en.stack: Primarily Rust with zero-cost abstraction and resource efficiency in mind; supports optional local embeddings and one-click cross-platform installation via Bash/PowerShell scripts.
en.hot: With 8,421 stars and a spot at #11 on GitHub's Rust daily trending list, jcode stands out in the crowded AI coding space by delivering an ultra-low 27.8 MB RAM footprint per session and a multi-session architecture that meets developers' demand for high-performance local agents.
uses: Core developers seeking local, low-memory, high-performance AI coding experiences
Power users running long-term, complex multi-session workflows
Hackers and teams wanting infinite customizability of their coding agent behavior and toolchain

zh.tag: 自托管部署平台，内置 CI/CD，零配置部署
zh.what: Openship 是一个开源、可自托管的部署平台，内置 CI/CD 流水线。它让你只需推送代码，就能自动构建、配置并部署应用，同时管理数据库、域名、SSL、CDN、邮件和备份等基础设施。
zh.content: 仓库包含桌面应用、Web 仪表盘和 CLI 三种界面，以及完整的 Docker Compose 部署栈。提供快速安装脚本和 npm 包，支持一键启动后台服务。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 开发，依赖 Node.js 和 Docker。支持通过 npm 全局安装或 Docker Compose 部署。
zh.hot: 今日新增 1641 星，总星数近 5000。开发者对零配置、自托管的部署方案需求强烈，Openship 提供了类似 Vercel/Heroku 的体验但完全自主可控。
uses: 独立开发者 —— 快速部署个人项目，无需管理服务器
小团队 —— 自托管生产环境，内置 CI/CD 和基础设施管理
DevOps 工程师 —— 作为轻量级替代方案，替代复杂的 Kubernetes 或 Jenkins

en.tag: Self-hosted deployment platform with built-in CI/CD, zero-config deploys
en.what: Openship is an open-source, self-hostable deployment platform with built-in CI/CD. Push code, and it automatically builds, configures, and deploys your app, while managing databases, domains, SSL, CDN, email, and backups.
en.content: The repo includes three interfaces: a desktop app, web dashboard, and CLI, plus a full Docker Compose stack. It provides a quick install script and npm package for one-command background service setup.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, depends on Node.js and Docker. Can be installed via npm globally or deployed with Docker Compose.
en.hot: Gained 1641 stars today, nearing 5000 total. Developers crave zero-config, self-hosted deployment; Openship offers a Vercel/Heroku-like experience with full control.
uses: Solo developers — quickly deploy personal projects without server management
Small teams — self-host production environments with built-in CI/CD and infrastructure management
DevOps engineers — as a lightweight alternative to complex Kubernetes or Jenkins setups

zh.tag: 多平台 AI 代理助手与开发框架
zh.what: AstrBot 是一个集成了多种即时通讯平台、大语言模型、插件和 AI 功能的 AI 代理助手与开发框架。它可以作为 OpenClaw 的替代品，帮助用户构建和管理 AI 驱动的自动化工作流。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的源代码、文档、多语言 README（中、英、日、法、西、俄）、Docker 部署配置以及丰富的插件示例。项目采用模块化架构，支持快速扩展。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 3.12+ 开发，依赖主流 LLM API（如 OpenAI、Claude）、IM 平台 SDK（如 QQ、Telegram、Discord）以及插件系统。
zh.hot: 凭借 37K+ Stars 和每日 300+ 新增，AstrBot 因提供一站式多平台 AI 代理解决方案而备受关注，尤其作为 OpenClaw 的替代品吸引了大量开发者。
uses: 开发者 —— 快速搭建跨平台 AI 聊天机器人或自动化助手
AI 爱好者 —— 集成多种 LLM 和插件，探索 AI 代理能力
企业团队 —— 利用 AstrBot 构建内部 AI 工作流，替代商业工具

en.tag: Multi-platform AI agent assistant & dev framework
en.what: AstrBot is an AI agent assistant and development framework that integrates multiple IM platforms, LLMs, plugins, and AI features. It can serve as an alternative to OpenClaw, helping users build and manage AI-driven automation workflows.
en.content: The repository includes full source code, documentation, multilingual READMEs (Chinese, English, Japanese, French, Spanish, Russian), Docker deployment configs, and rich plugin examples. The project uses a modular architecture for easy extensibility.
en.stack: Built with Python 3.12+, relies on mainstream LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Claude), IM platform SDKs (e.g., QQ, Telegram, Discord), and a plugin system.
en.hot: With 37K+ stars and 300+ daily additions, AstrBot gains attention for its all-in-one multi-platform AI agent solution, especially as an OpenClaw alternative, attracting many developers.
uses: Developers — quickly build cross-platform AI chatbots or automation assistants
AI enthusiasts — integrate multiple LLMs and plugins to explore agent capabilities
Enterprise teams — leverage AstrBot to build internal AI workflows, replacing commercial tools

zh.tag: 开源 SEO 分析平台，支持 AI Agent 与 MCP 工具链集成
zh.what: OpenSEO 是 Semrush 和 Ahrefs 的开源替代品，提供关键词研究、排名追踪、竞品洞察、外链审计与站点诊断等核心 SEO 工作流。它采用按量付费模式，用户只需接入自己的 DataForSEO API 密钥即可使用，无需订阅。同时，它内置 MCP 服务器和可复用的 Agent Skills，让 Claude Code、OpenClaw 等 AI 代理直接调用 SEO 数据完成自动化任务。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的前后端应用代码与现代化 UI，支持 Docker 和 Cloudflare 自托管，内置 MCP 服务器以及预设的 Agent Skills（如 keyword-research、competitor-analysis、link-prospecting）。文档涵盖 API 密钥配置、Google Search Console 接入、SEO 成本参考及本地开发指南。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 构建，前端采用现代 UI 框架，后端依赖 DataForSEO API 获取 SEO 数据，并通过 MCP 协议与外部 AI Agent 通信；支持 Docker 容器化部署与 Cloudflare 边缘托管。
zh.hot: 在 SEO 工具普遍昂贵且功能臃肿的背景下，它以开源、按量付费、可自托管的定位迅速获得关注；4,405 Stars 中本月新增 2,187 颗，登上 GitHub TypeScript 月榜第 17 名，其对 MCP 与 AI Agent 的原生集成进一步放大了开发者与增长团队的兴趣。
uses: 独立开发者 / 小团队 —— 无需订阅高价 SaaS，用自有 API 密钥低成本完成 SEO 监控与关键词研究。
AI 工程师 / Agent 开发者 —— 通过 MCP 将实时 SEO 数据接入 Claude Code、OpenClaw 等智能体，实现自动化内容策略。
增长与营销团队 —— 利用预设 Agent Skills 快速完成竞品分析、外链挖掘和排名追踪。
隐私敏感企业 —— 支持 Docker/Cloudflare 自托管，完全掌控数据与成本。

en.tag: Open-source SEO suite with AI agent & MCP integration for self-hosting
en.what: OpenSEO is an open-source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs, offering keyword research, rank tracking, competitor insights, backlink audits, and site audits. It uses a pay-as-you-go model with your own DataForSEO API key instead of expensive subscriptions. It also exposes an MCP server and reusable Agent Skills so AI agents like Claude Code and OpenClaw can interact directly with SEO data.
en.content: The repository contains a full-stack application with a modern UI, supporting Docker and Cloudflare self-hosting, along with a built-in MCP server and pre-built Agent Skills (e.g., keyword-research, competitor-analysis, link-prospecting). Documentation covers API key setup, Google Search Console integration, SEO cost references, and local development guides.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, it features a modern frontend UI, relies on the DataForSEO API for search data, and communicates with external AI agents via the MCP protocol. It supports Docker containerization and Cloudflare edge hosting.
en.hot: It gained rapid traction as a free, pay-as-you-go, self-hostable alternative to expensive and bloated SEO suites; with 4,405 stars and 2,187 added this month alone—ranking 17th on GitHub's monthly TypeScript trending list—its native MCP and AI Agent support has further driven interest from developers and growth teams.
uses: Indie developers and small teams —— Avoid expensive subscriptions by using your own API key for low-cost SEO monitoring and keyword research.
AI engineers and agent builders —— Feed real-time SEO data into Claude Code, OpenClaw, or other agents via MCP for automated content strategy.
Growth and marketing teams —— Use pre-built Agent Skills to quickly run competitor analysis, link prospecting, and rank tracking.
Privacy-conscious organizations —— Self-host via Docker or Cloudflare to maintain full control over data and costs.

zh.tag: 用 Claude 操控 TradingView 图表的 AI 助手桥
zh.what: 这是一个 MCP 服务器，通过 Chrome DevTools 协议将 Claude Code 连接到本地运行的 TradingView 桌面应用，实现 AI 辅助的图表分析、Pine Script 开发和流程自动化。所有数据处理均在本地完成，不传输外部。
zh.content: 包含 MCP 服务器实现、CDP 通信模块、Pine Script 辅助工具和示例配置。提供工具让 LLM 读取图表状态、执行脚本并获取反馈。
zh.stack: 基于 Node.js，使用 Chrome DevTools Protocol 与 Electron 应用通信，MCP 协议与 Claude Code 集成。
zh.hot: 将 LLM 代理与专业交易工具结合，满足交易者自动化分析需求，4543 Stars 日增 28，登顶 JavaScript 日榜第 3。
uses: 交易者：用自然语言分析图表、编写 Pine Script 策略
开发者：研究 LLM 代理与桌面金融应用的交互模式
量化研究员：自动化回测与指标提取

en.tag: AI bridge connecting Claude Code to TradingView Desktop for chart analysis & automation
en.what: An MCP server that connects Claude Code to your locally running TradingView Desktop via Chrome DevTools Protocol, enabling AI-assisted chart analysis, Pine Script development, and workflow automation. All data processing stays local.
en.content: Includes MCP server implementation, CDP communication module, Pine Script helpers, and example configs. Provides tools for LLM to read chart state, execute scripts, and get feedback.
en.stack: Node.js-based, uses Chrome DevTools Protocol to communicate with Electron apps, integrates with Claude Code via MCP protocol.
en.hot: Combines LLM agents with professional trading tools, meeting traders' automation needs. 4543 stars (+28/day), #3 on JavaScript daily trending.
uses: Traders: analyze charts and write Pine Script strategies via natural language
Developers: study LLM agent interaction with desktop financial apps
Quant researchers: automate backtesting and indicator extraction

zh.tag: 一键检测硬件，推荐可运行的LLM模型
zh.what: llmfit 是一个终端工具，能自动检测你的硬件（RAM、CPU、GPU），从数百个模型和提供商中筛选出最适合你设备的模型。它通过质量、速度、适配度和上下文等维度打分，并支持交互式 TUI 和传统 CLI 两种模式。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 编写的核心引擎、TUI 界面、CLI 接口，以及基准测试和共享功能。支持多 GPU、MoE 架构、动态量化选择、速度估算，并集成 Ollama、llama.cpp、MLX 等本地运行时。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 开发，依赖终端 UI 库（如 ratatui）和 LLM 运行时（Ollama、llama.cpp、MLX、Docker Model Runner、LM Studio）。
zh.hot: 近 3 万星标，今日新增 247，因其解决了 LLM 本地部署的硬件适配痛点，一键推荐可运行模型，大幅降低试错成本。
uses: AI 开发者：快速找到适合本地硬件的 LLM 模型，避免下载后无法运行
硬件评测者：使用内置基准测试测量真实 tok/s，并贡献结果到社区
普通用户：通过 TUI 轻松浏览和选择模型，无需手动配置

en.tag: One command to find which LLM models run on your hardware
en.what: llmfit is a terminal tool that automatically detects your hardware (RAM, CPU, GPU) and scores hundreds of models from various providers to find the best fit for your machine. It evaluates models across quality, speed, fit, and context dimensions, offering both an interactive TUI and a classic CLI mode.
en.content: The repo contains a Rust core engine, TUI interface, CLI interface, and benchmarking & sharing features. It supports multi-GPU, MoE architectures, dynamic quantization selection, speed estimation, and integrates local runtimes like Ollama, llama.cpp, MLX, etc.
en.stack: Built with Rust, leveraging terminal UI libraries (e.g., ratatui) and LLM runtimes (Ollama, llama.cpp, MLX, Docker Model Runner, LM Studio).
en.hot: With nearly 30k stars and 247 new today, llmfit solves the pain point of hardware compatibility for local LLM deployment, recommending runnable models with one command and significantly reducing trial-and-error costs.
uses: AI developers: quickly find LLM models compatible with local hardware, avoiding download failures
Hardware reviewers: use built-in benchmarks to measure real tok/s and contribute results to the community
General users: easily browse and select models via TUI without manual configuration

zh.tag: 极致美观的动态平铺 Wayland 合成器
zh.what: Hyprland 是一个独立、高度可定制、动态平铺的 Wayland 合成器，注重外观而不牺牲功能。它提供最新的 Wayland 特性、丰富的视觉效果（渐变边框、模糊、动画、阴影等）、强大的插件系统、内置插件管理器、撕裂支持（提升游戏性能）等。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Hyprland 合成器的完整源代码、文档链接、安装指南、配置示例和画廊展示。代码库以 C++ 编写，易于扩展和阅读。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 开发，不依赖 wlroots、libweston、kwin 或 mutter，完全独立实现。依赖 Wayland 协议和相关库。
zh.hot: 凭借出色的视觉效果和高度可定制性，Hyprland 在 Linux 桌面用户中广受欢迎，Star 数达 36,817，今日新增 24，持续活跃开发。
uses: Linux 桌面用户 —— 追求美观、高效、可定制的平铺窗口管理体验
Wayland 爱好者 —— 希望体验最新 Wayland 特性的用户
开发者 —— 对合成器实现感兴趣，或希望为其开发插件的开发者

en.tag: A highly customizable dynamic tiling Wayland compositor with stunning visuals
en.what: Hyprland is an independent, highly customizable, dynamic tiling Wayland compositor that doesn't sacrifice on its looks. It offers the latest Wayland features, extensive eye candy (gradient borders, blur, animations, shadows), a powerful plugin system, built-in plugin manager, tearing support for better gaming performance, and more.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of the Hyprland compositor, documentation links, installation guides, configuration examples, and a gallery. The codebase is written in C++ and is designed to be easily expandable and readable.
en.stack: Developed primarily in C++, Hyprland is fully independent and does not rely on wlroots, libweston, kwin, or mutter. It depends on Wayland protocols and related libraries.
en.hot: With its stunning visuals and high customizability, Hyprland has gained immense popularity among Linux desktop users, amassing 36,817 stars (24 new today) and maintaining active development.
uses: Linux desktop users — seeking a beautiful, efficient, and customizable tiling window management experience
Wayland enthusiasts — users wanting to experience the latest Wayland features
Developers — interested in compositor implementation or developing plugins for Hyprland

zh.tag: 阿波罗11号制导计算机原始源码
zh.what: 这是阿波罗11号指令舱和登月舱制导计算机（AGC）的原始汇编源码。由Virtual AGC和MIT博物馆数字化，旨在提供最准确的转录版本。
zh.content: 包含指令舱的Comanche055和登月舱的Luminary099两个程序版本，以及多语言翻译的README文件。
zh.stack: 纯汇编语言，无现代依赖；编译需使用Virtual AGC模拟器。
zh.hot: 作为人类登月历史的重要代码遗产，今日新增1235星，总星数近7万，持续吸引科技史爱好者和程序员。
uses: 科技史研究者 —— 研究阿波罗计划软件工程
复古计算爱好者 —— 探索AGC架构与汇编编程
教育场景 —— 作为计算机历史教学案例

en.tag: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer source code
en.what: This is the original assembly source code for the Apollo Guidance Computer (AGC) used in the Command Module and Lunar Module of Apollo 11. Digitized by Virtual AGC and MIT Museum, it aims to provide an accurate transcription.
en.content: Contains two program versions: Comanche055 for the Command Module and Luminary099 for the Lunar Module, along with multilingual README translations.
en.stack: Pure assembly language with no modern dependencies; compilation requires the Virtual AGC simulator.
en.hot: As a historic code artifact from the moon landing, it gained 1,235 stars today, nearing 70k total, attracting tech history enthusiasts and programmers.
uses: Tech historians — study Apollo software engineering
Retro computing enthusiasts — explore AGC architecture and assembly
Education — as a case study in computer history

zh.tag: Rust 全栈跨平台 UI 框架，一套代码覆盖 Web、桌面与移动端
zh.what: Dioxus 是一个基于 Rust 的全栈应用框架，开发者只需维护一套代码库即可构建 Web、桌面和移动应用。它提供了类似 React 的组件化开发体验，并内置基于 Signals 的状态管理、热重载与零配置启动能力。通过 Server Functions 还能直接在同一代码库中编写后端逻辑，实现真正的全栈开发。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 UI 库、跨平台渲染器（Web/桌面/移动端）、CLI 打包工具以及 Server Functions 全栈运行时。此外还提供了丰富的官方示例、文档站点和多语言 README，方便开发者快速上手。
zh.stack: 完全基于 Rust 生态，核心使用自研的 Virtual DOM 与 Signals 响应式系统，编译目标涵盖 WebAssembly、桌面端（基于 Winit/Tao）及移动端原生渲染。
zh.hot: 凭借 36.8K Star 的热度和本周 Rust 趋势榜第 18 名的成绩，Dioxus 吸引了大量希望用 Rust 替代 JavaScript 技术栈的开发者。其“一套代码、多端运行”的全栈能力，加上对热重载和零配置体验的重视，精准击中了 Rust 社区对高性能跨平台 UI 方案的强烈需求。
uses: Rust 开发者 —— 希望用单一代码库同时覆盖前端页面与桌面/移动原生应用的项目。
全栈工程师 —— 想在前端组件中直接调用 Server Functions，减少前后端语言切换成本的团队。
跨平台应用团队 —— 需要高性能、内存安全且拒绝 Electron 厚重方案的产品组。

en.tag: Rust fullstack cross-platform UI framework for web, desktop, and mobile
en.what: Dioxus is a Rust-based fullstack framework that lets developers build for the web, desktop, and mobile from a single codebase. It offers a React-like component model with zero-config setup, integrated hot-reloading, and signals-based state management. Server Functions enable backend logic to live alongside the UI, streamlining fullstack development in Rust.
en.content: The repo contains the core UI library, cross-platform renderers for web, desktop, and mobile, a CLI bundler, and a fullstack runtime for Server Functions. It also ships with extensive examples, documentation, and multilingual READMEs.
en.stack: Built entirely on Rust, featuring a custom Virtual DOM and signals-based reactivity, compiling to WebAssembly, desktop (via Winit/Tao), and mobile native targets.
en.hot: With 36.8K stars and ranking 18th on this week's GitHub Rust Trending, Dioxus is drawing developers eager to replace JavaScript stacks with Rust. Its promise of a single codebase spanning web, desktop, and mobile—backed by hot-reload and zero-config DX—directly addresses the Rust community's demand for high-performance cross-platform UI solutions.
uses: Rust developers —— teams wanting a single codebase for web, desktop, and mobile apps without sacrificing performance.
Fullstack engineers —— those looking to colocate Server Functions with UI components to cut language-switching overhead.
Cross-platform product teams —— groups that need memory-safe, high-performance alternatives to heavy Electron-style solutions.

zh.tag: 开源深度研究代理，支持多模型与搜索工具
zh.what: Open Deep Research 是一个简单、可配置、完全开源的深度研究代理，能够跨多种模型提供商、搜索工具和 MCP 服务器工作。其性能与许多流行的深度研究代理相当，在 Deep Research Bench 排行榜上排名第 6。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的代理实现代码、配置文件（.env.example）、快速启动指南以及 LangGraph 服务器集成。提供多种 LLM 配置和搜索工具选项，支持通过 LangGraph Studio UI 进行交互。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 和 LangGraph 框架，使用 LangChain 的 init_chat_model() API 支持多种 LLM，依赖 uv 包管理器。
zh.hot: 作为 LangChain 官方推出的深度研究代理，凭借开源、可配置、性能强劲的特点，在 GitHub 上获得 12k+ 星标，日增 23 星，位列 Trending 第 15 名。
uses: 研究人员和开发者 —— 快速搭建定制化的深度研究代理
AI 应用开发者 —— 集成多模型和搜索工具进行复杂信息检索
LangChain 用户 —— 学习如何使用 LangGraph 构建代理工作流

en.tag: Open-source deep research agent with multi-model and search tool support
en.what: Open Deep Research is a simple, configurable, fully open-source deep research agent that works across many model providers, search tools, and MCP servers. Its performance is on par with popular deep research agents, ranking #6 on the Deep Research Bench leaderboard.
en.content: The repository includes the full agent implementation code, configuration files (.env.example), quickstart guide, and LangGraph server integration. It offers multiple LLM configurations and search tool options, with interaction via LangGraph Studio UI.
en.stack: Built with Python and the LangGraph framework, uses LangChain's init_chat_model() API for multi-LLM support, and relies on the uv package manager.
en.hot: As LangChain's official deep research agent, it has gained 12k+ stars on GitHub with 23 daily additions, ranking #15 on Trending, thanks to its open-source, configurable, and high-performance features.
uses: Researchers and developers — quickly build customized deep research agents
AI application developers — integrate multiple models and search tools for complex information retrieval
LangChain users — learn how to build agent workflows with LangGraph

zh.tag: 开源免费AI网关，单端点聚合264家模型提供商并智能压缩省token
zh.what: OmniRoute 是一个开源的免费 AI 网关，通过单一 API 端点聚合了 264+ 家模型提供商（含 90+ 免费 tier），让你能把 Claude Code、Cursor、Copilot 等主流编程工具无缝接入免费的 Claude、GPT 或 Gemini。它内置 RTK+Caveman 双层压缩算法，可自动减少 15%–95% 的 token 消耗，并支持智能故障自动回退、MCP/A2A 协议以及多模态接口。
zh.content: 仓库包含可直接部署的网关核心、Web 管理后台（Dashboard）、PWA 与桌面端应用，以及详细的路由策略配置、免费额度文档和 Provider 接入模板。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 全栈构建，网关层采用 Node.js 高并发架构，前端提供 React 驱动的 Dashboard 与 PWA，并支持 Desktop 端封装。
zh.hot: 本周新增 3,605 Star、总星数突破 1.8 万并登上 GitHub 周榜第 16 名，反映出开发者对「零成本调用多模型」的强烈需求——聚合 90+ 免费提供商与高达 95% 的 token 压缩能力，直接切中了 AI 应用落地时的成本焦虑。
uses: 独立开发者 / 小型团队 —— 想用 Claude/GPT/Gemini 但预算有限，通过免费 tier 聚合实现零成本调用。
AI 编程工具重度用户 —— 将 Cursor、Cline、Claude Code 等 IDE 插件的底层模型切换到免费提供商。
网关/中间件自建者 —— 需要统一端点管理多模型路由、自动容灾和 token 压缩的企业内部 AI 基础设施。

en.tag: Open-source AI gateway aggregating 264 providers with token compression and auto-fallback
en.what: OmniRoute is an open-source free AI gateway that aggregates 264+ providers—including 90+ free tiers—behind a single API endpoint, letting you plug Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot and other tools into free Claude, GPT or Gemini instances. It features RTK+Caveman stacked compression to cut token usage by 15–95%, alongside smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A support, and multimodal APIs.
en.content: The repo ships with a deployable gateway core, a web admin dashboard, PWA and desktop apps, plus routing strategy configs, free-tier documentation, and provider integration templates.
en.stack: Built entirely in TypeScript on a Node.js backend for high-concurrency gateway operations, with a React-based web dashboard and PWA, plus desktop packaging.
en.hot: It gained 3,605 stars this week, reaching 18.4k total and hitting #16 on GitHub Trending, as developers rush to cut AI costs—aggregating 90+ free providers and slashing token usage by up to 95% directly addresses the biggest barrier to shipping AI apps.
uses: Indie devs & small teams —— Access Claude/GPT/Gemini at zero cost by pooling 90+ free tiers instead of paid APIs.
Power users of AI coding tools —— Redirect Cursor, Cline, Claude Code and Copilot to free model backends via one endpoint.
Platform builders —— Those needing a unified gateway with auto-fallback, routing strategies, and token compression for internal AI infra.

zh.tag: 为 pi 编码代理打造的本地 Web 界面
zh.what: Pi Web 是一个为 pi 编码代理设计的本地 Web 用户界面。它读取本地的 pi 会话文件，提供浏览器工作区，支持会话浏览、实时聊天、模型配置、技能管理和项目文件预览。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Web 应用源码，支持通过 npx 或 npm 全局安装运行，提供会话管理、模型配置、文件预览等功能，并附带中文文档。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 开发，使用 Node.js 运行时，依赖 pi 编码代理的会话文件格式。
zh.hot: 今日新增 298 星，总星数 1723，位列 GitHub 日榜第 17。作为 pi 代理的官方 Web UI，填补了 CLI 代理缺乏图形界面的空白，受到开发者欢迎。
uses: 使用 pi 编码代理的开发者 —— 通过浏览器管理会话和配置
需要可视化浏览代理会话记录的用户 —— 按项目浏览历史对话
希望从终端切换到图形界面的用户 —— 在 Web UI 中配置模型和技能

en.tag: Local web UI for the pi coding agent
en.what: Pi Web is a local web UI for the pi coding agent. It reads local pi session files and provides a browser workspace for session browsing, real-time chat, model configuration, skill management, and project file preview.
en.content: The repository contains the full web app source code, can be run via npx or npm global install, offering session management, model configuration, file preview, and includes Chinese documentation.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, runs on Node.js, depends on pi coding agent session file format.
en.hot: Gained 298 stars today, total 1723, ranked #17 on GitHub Daily Trending. As the official web UI for the pi agent, it fills the gap of missing GUI for CLI agents and is well received by developers.
uses: Developers using pi coding agent — manage sessions and config via browser
Users who need to visually browse agent session logs — browse past conversations by project
Users who want to switch from terminal to GUI — configure models and skills in web UI

zh.tag: 跨平台安全文件传输工具，支持端到端加密与断点续传
zh.what: croc 是一款命令行工具，可在任意两台计算机之间简单、安全地传输文件与文件夹。它基于 PAKE 协议实现端到端加密，无需配置本地服务器或端口转发，通过中继即可完成跨平台传输。支持断点续传、多文件传输、IPv6-first 及代理（如 Tor）等功能。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Go 源码、CLI 主程序、中继服务器实现，以及多平台安装脚本和 CI 配置。README 提供了详细的安装指南（涵盖 Homebrew、Scoop、Nix 等主流包管理器）和动态演示 GIF。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言开发，使用 PAKE 算法实现密钥交换，通过自定义中继协议传输数据，支持 IPv6/IPv4 双栈及 SOCKS5 代理（如 Tor）。
zh.hot: 凭借「开箱即用、安全无痛」的跨设备传输体验，croc 在开发者社区积累了 35.6K Star，本周再增 167 星并冲入 GitHub Go 周榜第 20 名。它填补了传统 scp/rsync 配置繁琐与即时传输工具缺乏加密之间的空白。
uses: 开发运维人员 —— 在不同服务器或本地与远程之间快速安全地传输配置文件与日志
跨平台协作团队 —— 在 Windows、macOS、Linux 同事之间即开即用地分享大文件或项目目录
隐私敏感用户 —— 借助端到端加密和 Tor 代理，在不信任网络中安全收发文件
命令行爱好者 —— 替代 scp/rsync，无需配置 SSH 或端口转发即可点对点传输

en.tag: Secure CLI tool for effortless cross-platform file transfers with encryption
en.what: croc is a CLI tool that lets any two computers simply and securely transfer files and folders. It uses PAKE for end-to-end encryption and works through a relay, eliminating the need for local servers or port forwarding. It supports resumable transfers, multiple files, IPv6-first with IPv4 fallback, and proxies like Tor.
en.content: The repository contains the full Go source code, CLI entry point, relay server implementation, and cross-platform install scripts with CI configs. The README includes detailed installation guides for Homebrew, Scoop, Nix, and more, plus a demo GIF.
en.stack: Written in Go, it uses PAKE for key exchange, a custom relay protocol for data transfer, and supports IPv6/IPv4 dual-stack with SOCKS5 proxy support (e.g., Tor).
en.hot: With an out-of-the-box, pain-free cross-device transfer experience, croc has earned 35.6K stars, gaining 167 this week and hitting #20 on GitHub's Go Trending chart. It fills the gap between tedious scp/rsync setup and instant tools that lack encryption.
uses: DevOps/Developers —— quickly and securely transfer configs and logs between servers or local and remote machines
Cross-platform teams —— instantly share large files or project folders across Windows, macOS, and Linux colleagues
Privacy-conscious users —— send files securely over untrusted networks using end-to-end encryption and Tor proxy support
CLI power users —— replace scp/rsync without needing SSH setup or port forwarding for ad-hoc transfers

zh.tag: 零后端本体学习与可视化编辑器
zh.what: 一个免费开源的本体论学习与设计 Web 应用，支持浏览预建本体、可视化编辑、导出 RDF/XML 并分享交互式图表。完全静态，无需后端。
zh.content: 包含交互式图谱浏览器、本体目录、可视化设计器、RDF 导入导出、一键提交 PR 的社区目录、可嵌入的 Widget 以及 9 门课程的学习中心。
zh.stack: 基于 React 19、TypeScript 5、Cytoscape.js，完全静态部署，无后端依赖。
zh.hot: 今日新增 464 星，GitHub Trending 日榜第 19 名。微软出品，零门槛学习本体论，结合 Fabric IQ 生态，功能全面且设计精美。
uses: 本体论初学者 —— 通过交互式图谱和学习课程快速入门
数据架构师 —— 可视化设计并导出 RDF/XML 本体
Fabric IQ 用户 —— 创建与 Microsoft Fabric 兼容的本体
教育工作者 —— 嵌入交互式本体到教学材料中

en.tag: Zero-backend ontology learning & visual editor
en.what: A free, open-source web app for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. It lets you explore pre-built ontologies, design your own visually, export as RDF/XML, and share interactive diagrams — all from a fully static site with zero backend.
en.content: Includes an interactive graph explorer, ontology catalogue, visual designer, RDF import/export, one-click PR submission to community catalogue, an embeddable widget, and a learning hub with 9 courses.
en.stack: Built with React 19, TypeScript 5, and Cytoscape.js. Fully static, no backend dependencies.
en.hot: Gained 464 stars today, ranked #19 on GitHub Trending daily. Microsoft-backed, zero-barrier ontology learning tied to Fabric IQ ecosystem, feature-rich and beautifully designed.
uses: Ontology beginners — quick start with interactive graph and learning courses
Data architects — visually design and export RDF/XML ontologies
Fabric IQ users — create ontologies compatible with Microsoft Fabric
Educators — embed interactive ontologies into teaching materials

zh.tag: LLM 结构化输出生成框架
zh.what: Outlines 是一个用于保证大语言模型输出结构化结果的库。它允许开发者通过简单的 API 指定输出类型（如 JSON、Pydantic 模型、正则等），并在生成过程中强制约束，避免事后解析的脆弱性。支持多种模型后端，提供统一的接口。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心库代码、文档、示例（客户支持分类、电商产品分类、事件解析、文档分类、函数调用、动态提示模板等），以及模型集成（OpenAI、Ollama、vLLM 等）。
zh.stack: Python 为主，依赖 PyTorch、Transformers、Pydantic、正则表达式等。支持多种推理后端。
zh.hot: 解决了 LLM 输出不可预测的痛点，提供保证结构化输出的方案，被 NVIDIA、Cohere、HuggingFace 等采用，Star 数近 1.5 万，日增 65。
uses: 需要从 LLM 获取可靠 JSON 或结构化数据的开发者

en.tag: Structured output generation framework for LLMs
en.what: Outlines is a library that guarantees structured outputs from large language models. It allows developers to specify output types (e.g., JSON, Pydantic models, regex) via a simple API and enforces constraints during generation, avoiding fragile post-hoc parsing. It supports multiple model backends with a unified interface.
en.content: The repository contains core library code, documentation, examples (customer support triage, e-commerce categorization, event parsing, document classification, function calling, dynamic prompt templates), and model integrations (OpenAI, Ollama, vLLM, etc.).
en.stack: Primarily Python, with dependencies on PyTorch, Transformers, Pydantic, regex, etc. Supports multiple inference backends.
en.hot: Solves the pain point of unpredictable LLM outputs by providing guaranteed structured output generation. Adopted by NVIDIA, Cohere, HuggingFace, etc. Nearly 15K stars, +65 today.
uses: Developers needing reliable JSON or structured data from LLMs
Teams building AI agents or toolchains to reduce output parsing errors
Applications requiring consistent output formats across different models

自托管代理用户——通过 MCP 或 REST 集成到 LangChain、CrewAI 等框架

zh.what: Cognee 是专为 AI Agent 打造的开源记忆平台，解决跨会话失忆问题。它通过自托管的知识图谱引擎，让 Agent 能够保存、检索和关联长期记忆，确保每次交互都基于完整上下文。平台支持多格式数据摄入，使 Agent 可以像人类一样积累经验并持续进化。

zh.hot: 本月新增 10,292 Star，总星数突破 2.8 万并登上 GitHub Python 月榜第 5 名，反映出 AI Agent 浪潮下业界对记忆基础设施的迫切需求。其开源、自托管与知识图谱方案精准切中了开发者对数据主权和 Agent 长期记忆能力的双重痛点。

en.tag: Open-source AI memory platform giving agents persistent long-term memory via self-hosted knowledge graphs
en.what: Cognee is an open-source AI memory platform built for agents to solve cross-session amnesia. It enables agents to retain, retrieve, and connect long-term memories through a self-hosted knowledge graph engine, grounding every interaction in full context. The platform supports multi-format data ingestion so agents can accumulate experience and evolve continuously.
en.content: The repository houses a Python core SDK, a knowledge graph engine, multi-modal data ingestion pipelines, memory storage and retrieval modules, along with comprehensive docs and examples. It also links to a separate community plugins repo (cognee-community) for add-ons and external system integrations.
en.stack: Built primarily in Python with a knowledge graph as the core for memory storage and relationship mapping, it supports self-hosted deployment and flexibly integrates with various LLMs and vector databases to form a complete memory infrastructure.
en.hot: With 10,292 new stars this month and over 28K total to hit #5 on GitHub's Python monthly trending list, it reflects the industry's urgent demand for memory infrastructure amid the AI agent boom. Its open-source, self-hosted knowledge graph approach precisely addresses developer pain points around data sovereignty and persistent agent memory.
uses: AI agent developers —— adding cross-session long-term memory to chatbots or autonomous agents
Enterprise knowledge teams —— self-hosting private knowledge graphs for a secure, controllable AI memory hub
LLM application architects —— needing an interpretable and traceable memory layer beyond simple vector search
Privacy-conscious teams —— requiring on-premise or private-cloud deployment to keep data within their own infrastructure

en.tag: Open-source AI engineering bootcamp: 503 lessons across 20 phases in 4 languages
en.what: It is a comprehensive open-source curriculum for AI engineering with 503 lessons across 20 phases (~320 hours total). The course spans from foundational linear algebra and backpropagation to attention mechanisms, agent loops, and autonomous swarms, requiring learners to implement every core component from scratch before touching high-level frameworks. Each lesson ships a reusable artifact—prompt, skill, agent, or MCP server—bridging theory and production-ready engineering.
en.content: The repository is organized into 20 progressive phases containing 503 self-contained lessons with code implementations in Python, TypeScript, Rust, and Julia, accompanied by a website, roadmap, local test runners, and build scripts.
en.stack: Python is the primary language, with additional implementations in TypeScript, Rust, and Julia; the curriculum starts from raw math and gradually introduces frameworks like PyTorch, designed to run entirely on a local laptop.
en.hot: With over 38.8k stars and 232 new stars today, hitting #8 on GitHub Trending, its "build from scratch" philosophy and 503-lesson structure directly address the gap where 84% of students use AI tools but only 18% feel professionally prepared.
uses: Career switchers and students seeking to build systematic AI engineering skills from the ground up rather than just calling APIs.
Full-stack developers who need deep, first-principles understanding of transformers, attention, and agent internals.
AI product managers and tech leads who want end-to-end technical literacy to assess algorithm feasibility without pure research backgrounds.
Self-learners and interview candidates looking for a structured, locally runnable long-form curriculum to replace scattered tutorials.

zh.hot: 11.7k Stars，日增 46，因其在复杂文档 OCR 上的突破性表现，尤其是表格、手写和布局还原能力，吸引大量开发者。
uses: 文档数字化与自动化处理 —— 将扫描件/PDF 转为可编辑格式
数据提取与分析 —— 从复杂表格和表单中提取结构化数据
多语言文档识别 —— 支持 90+ 语言，适合国际化场景
手写识别 —— 处理手写笔记、签名等非印刷体内容

en.tag: State-of-the-art OCR for complex tables, forms, handwriting, and full layout
en.what: Chandra OCR 2 is a state-of-the-art OCR model that converts images and PDFs into structured HTML/Markdown/JSON while preserving full layout information. It excels at complex tables, handwriting, forms, and multilingual documents.
en.content: The repo contains model weights, inference code, CLI tools (chandra_vllm / chandra_hf), and examples. Supports local (HuggingFace) and remote (vLLM) inference modes.
en.stack: Python-based, leveraging vLLM or HuggingFace Transformers with PyTorch.
en.hot: 11.7k stars (+46 daily) due to its breakthrough performance on complex document OCR, especially tables, handwriting, and layout preservation, drawing massive developer interest.
uses: Document digitization and automation — convert scans/PDFs to editable formats
Data extraction and analysis — extract structured data from complex tables and forms
Multilingual document recognition — supports 90+ languages for global use cases
Handwriting recognition — process handwritten notes, signatures, and non-print content

zh.tag: NVIDIA Cosmos 世界模型的训练与推理框架
zh.what: Cosmos-Framework 是 NVIDIA Cosmos 项目家族的一部分，提供端到端的训练和推理框架，用于世界模型（包括 Cosmos3 模型家族）。它支持分布式训练（FSDP/TP/CP/PP）和多后端推理（Diffusers/Transformers/vLLM），并包含数据集适配器（JSONL/WebDataset/LeRobot）。
zh.content: 仓库包含一个顶级 Python 包 cosmos_framework/，内含训练、推理脚本及文档；另有 packages/ 目录存放面向下游项目的轻量封装库。
zh.stack: 基于 PyTorch，使用 FSDP/TP/CP/PP 分布式训练策略，推理支持 Diffusers、Transformers 和 vLLM 后端，数据集适配 JSONL、WebDataset 和 LeRobot 格式。
zh.hot: 作为 NVIDIA 官方 Cosmos 世界模型的核心框架，结合 Cosmos3 多模态模型家族（统一语言、图像、视频、音频和动作序列），吸引了 395 星，今日新增 9 星，位列 GitHub Trending Python 日榜第 15 名。
uses: AI 研究人员和工程师 —— 训练和微调世界模型，如 Cosmos3
物理 AI 开发者 —— 构建统一处理多模态输入输出的世界模拟器
机器人领域从业者 —— 使用 LeRobot 数据集适配器进行动作策略训练
NVIDIA Cosmos 生态用户 —— 在 Cosmos 模型上进行推理和部署

en.tag: Training and serving framework for NVIDIA Cosmos world models
en.what: Cosmos-Framework is part of the NVIDIA Cosmos project family, providing an end-to-end framework for training and serving world models, including the Cosmos3 model family. It supports distributed training (FSDP/TP/CP/PP) and multi-backend inference (Diffusers/Transformers/vLLM), with dataset adapters (JSONL/WebDataset/LeRobot).
en.content: The repo contains a top-level Python package cosmos_framework/ with training and inference scripts and documentation; plus a packages/ directory for lightweight wrapper libraries for downstream projects.
en.stack: Built on PyTorch with FSDP/TP/CP/PP distributed training strategies; inference supports Diffusers, Transformers, and vLLM backends; dataset adapters for JSONL, WebDataset, and LeRobot.
en.hot: As the core framework for NVIDIA's official Cosmos world models, combined with the Cosmos3 omnimodal model family (unifying language, images, video, audio, and action sequences), it has garnered 395 stars with 9 new stars today, ranking #15 on GitHub Trending Python daily.
uses: AI researchers and engineers — train and fine-tune world models like Cosmos3
Physical AI developers — build world simulators that unify multimodal input and output
Robotics practitioners — use LeRobot dataset adapter for action policy training
NVIDIA Cosmos ecosystem users — perform inference and deployment on Cosmos models

zh.tag: 多 AI 编程代理并行编排的桌面与移动工作平台
zh.what: Orca 是一款 Agent Development Environment（ADE），让用户能够并行运行多种主流 AI 编程代理（如 Codex、Claude Code、OpenCode 等），各自在隔离的 git worktree 中执行任务。同时提供移动端伴侣应用，方便用户随时随地监控、接收通知并追加指令。
zh.content: 仓库包含跨平台桌面端应用源码（支持 macOS/Windows/Linux）、移动端配套应用（iOS/Android），以及用于多代理并行执行、git worktree 管理与结果对比合并的核心模块。
zh.stack: 主要基于 TypeScript 构建，提供跨平台桌面客户端与移动端配套应用，通过集成多家第三方 AI 编程代理的 API 实现统一调度。
zh.hot: 在 AI 编程代理百花齐放的背景下，Orca 以「并行工作树 + 移动端遥控」解决了多代理对比与随时监控的痛点；一周内新增 5,409 Star 并以 21.3k 总星数冲上 GitHub 周榜第 7，足见开发者对统一代理调度界面的强烈需求。
uses: 需要同时对比多个 AI 编程代理输出的开发者——在独立 git worktree 中并行运行多个代理，择优合并结果
追求随时随地掌控编码任务的技术团队——通过移动端伴侣应用远程监控代理状态并追加指令
希望统一调度自有 AI 订阅工具的高级用户——将 Codex、Claude Code 等集中在一套桌面环境中管理
需要保持代码库隔离的谨慎工程师——每个代理在独立工作树中操作，避免污染主分支

en.tag: Parallel AI coding agent orchestrator for desktop and mobile
en.what: Orca is an Agent Development Environment (ADE) that lets developers run a fleet of popular coding agents—such as Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode—in parallel within isolated git worktrees. It also offers a mobile companion app to monitor progress, receive notifications, and send follow-up instructions from anywhere.
en.content: The repository houses the cross-platform desktop application source (macOS/Windows/Linux), a mobile companion app (iOS and Android), and core modules for parallel agent execution, git worktree management, and result comparison/merging.
en.stack: Built primarily in TypeScript, it provides cross-platform desktop clients and mobile companion apps, integrating third-party AI coding agent APIs for unified orchestration.
en.hot: As AI coding agents proliferate, Orca's parallel worktrees and mobile companion solve the pain of comparing multiple agents and monitoring them on the go; the project gained 5,409 stars this week, hitting #7 on GitHub Trending with 21.3k total stars, reflecting strong demand for a unified agent orchestration interface.
uses: Developers who want to benchmark multiple AI agents side-by-side—run several agents in isolated git worktrees and merge the best result
Teams needing on-the-go oversight—monitor and steer agents from the mobile companion app anywhere
Power users with multiple AI subscriptions—unify Codex, Claude Code, and others under one desktop orchestrator
Engineers prioritizing code safety—each agent operates in its own git worktree to avoid polluting the main branch

zh.tag: AI 智能体工具链：统一 LLM API、代理循环、TUI 与编程代理 CLI
zh.what: 提供模块化 AI 代理开发框架，整合多厂商 LLM API、代理运行时与终端交互界面。内置可自扩展的编程代理 CLI，支持工具调用、状态管理与交互式编码任务。
zh.content: 仓库采用 monorepo 结构，包含 pi-ai（统一 LLM 接口）、pi-agent-core（代理运行时）、pi-coding-agent（交互式编码 CLI）和 pi-tui（差分渲染终端 UI）四个核心包。README 还提供了容器化与沙箱隔离方案，以及面向人类和代理的协作规范。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 构建，使用 npm 管理 monorepo 依赖与生命周期脚本。支持 OpenAI、Anthropic、Google 等主流 LLM 提供商，并可通过 Docker 或 Gondolin micro-VM 进行容器化隔离。
zh.hot: 一周内新增 2,741 Star 使其冲上 TypeScript 周榜第 17 名，目前总 Star 数已突破 7.2 万。开发者对统一 LLM 接口与自扩展编程代理的结合表现出强烈兴趣。
uses: 需要构建多模型 AI 代理的开发者——统一接口降低集成成本
追求终端原生体验的 CLI 用户——内置 TUI 与差分渲染提升交互效率
关注代码安全隔离的团队——提供 Docker、micro-VM 等多种沙箱方案
希望人机与 AI 代理协作的项目维护者——贡献指南同时面向人类与 Agent

en.tag: AI agent toolkit with unified LLM API, agent loop, TUI and coding agent CLI
en.what: A modular AI agent development framework that unifies multi-provider LLM APIs, agent runtime, and terminal UI. It features a self-extensible coding agent CLI with tool calling, state management, and interactive coding capabilities.
en.content: The monorepo houses four core packages: pi-ai (unified LLM API), pi-agent-core (agent runtime), pi-coding-agent (interactive CLI), and pi-tui (diff-rendered terminal UI). It also includes containerization guides and contribution rules for both humans and agents.
en.stack: Built on TypeScript with npm-based monorepo tooling and lifecycle scripts. Supports major LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) and offers containerization via Docker or Gondolin micro-VM.
en.hot: It gained 2,741 stars this week, landing at #17 on GitHub's TypeScript Weekly Trending with over 72.2k total stars. The combination of a unified LLM API and a self-extensible coding agent has drawn strong developer interest.
uses: Developers building multi-model AI agents — unified API reduces integration overhead
CLI users preferring terminal-native experiences — built-in TUI with diff rendering
Teams requiring secure isolation — supports Docker, micro-VM, and sandbox patterns
Project maintainers enabling human and AI co-contribution — guidelines cover both humans and agents

zh.tag: AI 驱动的代码安全扫描工具
zh.what: Deepsec 是一个基于 AI 代理的代码安全扫描工具，能够在你的基础设施中运行，专门用于发现大型代码库中隐藏的漏洞。它利用最强模型进行深度分析，支持并行扫描和断点续扫，帮助团队快速修复长期存在的安全问题。
zh.content: 仓库包含 CLI 工具（npx deepsec init/scan/process/export）、配置文件（deepsec.config.ts）、匹配器（matchers）和插件系统，以及详细的文档（入门、PR 审查、支持技术栈、编写匹配器等）。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript，依赖 Node.js 和 pnpm，使用 AI 模型（如 Claude、GPT）进行代码分析，支持 AI Gateway 和 Vercel 集成。
zh.hot: 今日新增 249 星，总星数 6061，位列 TypeScript 日榜第 8。它解决了大型代码库安全扫描的痛点，AI 驱动的深度分析和断点续扫功能吸引了大量开发者。
uses: 安全工程师 — 自动化发现代码库中的隐藏漏洞
开发团队 — 在 CI/CD 流程中集成 PR 安全审查
开源维护者 — 扫描大型项目中的遗留安全问题

en.tag: Agent-powered vulnerability scanner for large codebases
en.what: Deepsec is an agent-powered vulnerability scanner that runs in your own infrastructure, designed to surface hard-to-find issues in large-scale repos. It uses top-tier models with maximum thinking levels, supports parallel scanning across worker machines, and can resume interrupted runs.
en.content: The repo includes a CLI tool (npx deepsec init/scan/process/export), configuration file (deepsec.config.ts), matchers and plugin system, along with comprehensive docs (getting-started, PR review, supported tech, writing matchers, etc.).
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, requires Node.js and pnpm, leverages AI models (e.g., Claude, GPT) for code analysis, integrates with AI Gateway and Vercel.
en.hot: Gained 249 stars today, total 6061, ranked #8 on TypeScript daily trending. It addresses the pain point of security scanning in large codebases, with AI-powered deep analysis and resume capability attracting many developers.
uses: Security engineers — automate discovery of hidden vulnerabilities in codebases
Development teams — integrate PR security review in CI/CD pipelines
Open-source maintainers — scan large projects for lingering security issues

zh.tag: 一站式 AI 应用开发平台，支持工作流、RAG 与多模型
zh.what: Dify 是一个开源的 LLM 应用开发平台，提供从原型到生产的完整工具链。它集成了智能体工作流、RAG 管道、模型管理和工具插件，支持团队协作与多种部署方式。
zh.content: 仓库包含前端（TypeScript/React）、后端（Python/Flask）及部署配置，提供可视化工作流编辑器、RAG 引擎、模型接入和插件市场。
zh.stack: 前端使用 TypeScript 和 React，后端基于 Python 和 Flask，支持 PostgreSQL、Redis 等数据库，可部署于 Docker、Kubernetes 或云服务。
zh.hot: 凭借 149k+ Stars 和持续活跃的社区，Dify 成为构建 AI 应用的首选开源方案，今日新增 157 Stars，排名 TypeScript 日榜第 11。
uses: 开发者快速搭建 AI 聊天机器人、智能客服或知识库应用
企业构建内部 RAG 系统，集成私有数据与 LLM
团队协作开发复杂 AI 工作流，支持多模型编排

en.tag: All-in-one AI app dev platform with workflows, RAG, and multi-model support
en.what: Dify is an open-source LLM app development platform that provides a complete toolchain from prototype to production. It integrates agentic workflows, RAG pipelines, model management, and tool plugins, supporting team collaboration and multiple deployment options.
en.content: The repo includes frontend (TypeScript/React), backend (Python/Flask), and deployment configs, offering a visual workflow editor, RAG engine, model integration, and plugin marketplace.
en.stack: Frontend uses TypeScript and React, backend is Python with Flask, supports PostgreSQL, Redis, etc., and can be deployed via Docker, Kubernetes, or cloud services.
en.hot: With 149k+ Stars and an active community, Dify is the go-to open-source solution for building AI apps, gaining 157 stars today and ranking #11 on TypeScript daily trending.
uses: Developers quickly build AI chatbots, customer service bots, or knowledge base apps
Enterprises build internal RAG systems integrating private data with LLMs
Teams collaborate on complex AI workflows with multi-model orchestration

zh.tag: 代码驱动、实时更新的软件架构可视化工具
zh.what: LikeC4 是一种建模语言和工具集，用于从代码描述生成软件架构图。它受 C4 模型启发，但允许自定义符号、元素类型和嵌套层级，使架构图始终与实际代码同步。
zh.content: 仓库包含 LikeC4 语言规范、CLI 工具、VS Code 扩展以及示例模板。核心是 `likec4` 包，提供 `start` 命令启动本地预览服务器，并支持导出为静态站点。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 开发，依赖 Node.js 运行时。前端使用 React 渲染交互式图表，支持 VS Code 和 Open VSX 扩展。
zh.hot: 今日新增 58 星，总星数 4019，位列 TypeScript 日榜第 12。开发者对“代码即架构”的自动化、可视化需求强烈，LikeC4 提供了比传统 UML 更灵活、更现代的替代方案。
uses: 软件架构师 —— 用代码定义并维护系统架构图，确保文档与实现一致
开发团队 —— 在 CI/CD 中自动生成架构图，用于代码审查和文档
技术写作者 —— 为开源项目或内部系统创建可交互的架构文档

en.tag: Code-driven, always up-to-date software architecture visualization
en.what: LikeC4 is a modeling language and toolset that generates software architecture diagrams from code descriptions. Inspired by the C4 model, it allows custom notation, element types, and nested levels, keeping diagrams always in sync with the actual code.
en.content: The repository includes the LikeC4 language specification, CLI tool, VS Code extension, and example templates. The core `likec4` package provides a `start` command to launch a local preview server and supports exporting to static sites.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, runs on Node.js. The frontend uses React for interactive diagram rendering, with extensions for VS Code and Open VSX.
en.hot: Gained 58 stars today, total 4019, ranked #12 on TypeScript daily trending. Developers have a strong demand for automated, code-driven architecture visualization, and LikeC4 offers a more flexible, modern alternative to traditional UML.
uses: Software architects — define and maintain system architecture diagrams in code, ensuring docs match implementation
Development teams — auto-generate architecture diagrams in CI/CD for code reviews and documentation
Technical writers — create interactive architecture docs for open-source or internal systems

zh.tag: AI 编码代理的持久记忆层，告别重复上下文
zh.what: 为 Claude Code、Cursor、Copilot CLI 等 AI 编码代理提供持久化记忆功能。基于真实基准测试，实现 95.2% 的检索召回率并减少 92% 的 token 消耗。
zh.content: 包含核心记忆库 npm 包、CLI 工具、MCP 服务器以及与多种 AI 代理的集成示例。支持置信度评分、生命周期管理、知识图谱和混合搜索。
zh.stack: TypeScript 编写，基于 iii 引擎，依赖 Node.js 和 npm。支持多种后端存储（内存、文件、数据库等）。
zh.hot: 解决 AI 编码代理的上下文遗忘痛点，star 数 2.5 万+，设计文档 Gist 获 1.3k star，社区反响热烈。
uses: AI 编码代理开发者 —— 为代理添加持久记忆，减少重复上下文
使用 Claude Code、Cursor 等工具的开发者 —— 提升编码效率，避免重复解释项目背景
MCP 客户端用户 —— 通过标准协议集成持久记忆功能

en.tag: Persistent memory for AI coding agents, no more re-explaining
en.what: Provides persistent memory for AI coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, and Copilot CLI. Achieves 95.2% retrieval recall and reduces token usage by 92% based on real-world benchmarks.
en.content: Includes core memory library npm package, CLI tool, MCP server, and integration examples for various AI agents. Features confidence scoring, lifecycle management, knowledge graphs, and hybrid search.
en.stack: Written in TypeScript, built on the iii engine, requires Node.js and npm. Supports multiple backends (in-memory, file, database, etc.).
en.hot: Addresses the pain point of context forgetting in AI coding agents, with 25k+ stars. The design doc Gist received 1.3k stars, showing strong community interest.
uses: AI coding agent developers — add persistent memory to agents, reducing repeated context
Developers using Claude Code, Cursor, etc. — boost coding efficiency by avoiding re-explaining project context
MCP client users — integrate persistent memory via standard protocol

zh.tag: AI 代理编排中枢，统一上下文与多模型协作
zh.what: Traycer 是一个开源 AI 编排应用，用于高级代理编排。它允许用户自带现有提供商订阅，并行运行多个代理而不丢失上下文，通过共享内存在所有模型和提供商之间保持一致性。支持常规模式和史诗模式来组织工作，在同一聊天中即时切换模型，编排代理间通信，并实时协作。
zh.content: 仓库包含桌面应用安装包（macOS/Windows/Linux）、核心编排引擎、多代理通信模块、共享上下文内存系统、协作功能（共享看板、实时编辑、工单分配）以及跨设备同步支持。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 构建，使用 Electron 作为桌面框架，集成多种 AI 模型提供商 API，支持本地推理和云端订阅。
zh.hot: 今日新增 59 星，总星数 668，位列 TypeScript 日榜第 12。其“自带代理”模式和统一上下文功能解决了多模型协作的痛点，吸引开发者关注。
uses: AI 开发者：需要同时使用多个模型（如 GPT-4、Claude、本地模型）并保持上下文一致的场景
团队协作：通过共享看板和实时编辑进行 AI 辅助代码审查和架构讨论
复杂工作流：使用史诗模式进行多步骤编码任务，如自动生成、审查、重构

en.tag: Nerve center for agentic coding with unified context and multi-model orchestration
en.what: Traycer is an open-source AI orchestration app for advanced agent orchestration. It lets you bring your own provider subscriptions, run multiple agents in parallel without losing context via shared memory across all models and providers. Structure work with Regular and Epic modes, switch models instantly in the same chat, orchestrate agent-to-agent communication, and collaborate in real time.
en.content: The repo contains desktop app installers (macOS/Windows/Linux), core orchestration engine, multi-agent communication module, shared context memory system, collaboration features (shareable boards, real-time editing, ticket assignment), and cross-device sync support.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, uses Electron for desktop framework, integrates multiple AI model provider APIs, supports local inference and cloud subscriptions.
en.hot: Gained 59 stars today, total 668, ranked #12 on TypeScript daily trending. Its 'Bring Your Own Agent' model and unified context feature solve multi-model collaboration pain points, attracting developer interest.
uses: AI developers needing to use multiple models (e.g., GPT-4, Claude, local models) with consistent context
Team collaboration: AI-assisted code review and architecture discussion via shared boards and real-time editing
Complex workflows: multi-step coding tasks using Epic mode, such as auto-generation, review, and refactoring

zh.tag: 终端里的开源 AI 编程代理
zh.what: Qwen Code 是一个开源的 AI 编程代理，直接运行在终端中。它具备开箱即用的智能体能力，如自动记忆、自动技能、子代理、代理团队和多协议支持，可动态编排工作流，无需手动配置。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Qwen Code 的完整源代码、安装脚本（curl/powershell/npm/homebrew）、文档站点链接以及多语言支持（中文、德语、法语等）。核心是一个基于 TypeScript 的终端交互式 UI，支持多种 AI 提供商和本地模型。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript，需要 Node.js 22+。支持 OpenAI、Anthropic、Gemini、Qwen 等 API，以及 Ollama/vLLM 等本地模型。
zh.hot: 拥有 26K+ 星标，今日新增 52 星，位列 GitHub Trending TypeScript 日榜第 11 名。其开箱即用的智能体能力和开源透明性吸引了大量开发者，尤其是对终端编程代理感兴趣的用户。
uses: 开发者 —— 在终端中通过 AI 代理辅助编程，自动完成代码生成、调试和重构
团队协作 —— 利用子代理和代理团队功能，实现多人协作的自动化工作流
多模型用户 —— 需要灵活切换不同 AI 提供商或本地模型的编程场景

en.tag: Open-source AI coding agent that lives in your terminal
en.what: Qwen Code is an open-source AI coding agent that operates directly in your terminal. It offers out-of-the-box agentic capabilities including auto-memory, auto-skills, sub-agents, agent teams, and multi-protocol support, enabling dynamic workflow orchestration with zero setup.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of Qwen Code, installation scripts (curl/powershell/npm/homebrew), documentation site links, and multi-language support (Chinese, German, French, etc.). The core is a TypeScript-based interactive terminal UI that supports multiple AI providers and local models.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, requires Node.js 22+. Supports APIs from OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Qwen, and local models via Ollama/vLLM.
en.hot: With 26K+ stars and 52 new stars today, it ranks #11 on GitHub Trending TypeScript daily. Its out-of-the-box agentic capabilities and open-source transparency attract developers interested in terminal-based coding agents.
uses: Developers — use AI agents in the terminal for code generation, debugging, and refactoring
Teams — leverage sub-agents and agent teams for collaborative automated workflows
Multi-model users — scenarios requiring flexible switching between AI providers or local models

zh.tag: 开源体验管理平台，替代 Qualtrics
zh.what: Formbricks 是一个开源的调查与体验管理平台，提供应用内、网站、链接和邮件等多种调查方式，帮助团队在用户旅程的每个节点收集反馈。它既可以作为独立平台使用，也支持嵌入到现有产品中。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的调查平台代码，包括前端界面、后端 API、数据分析模块以及自托管部署配置。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 构建，使用 Next.js 前端、Node.js 后端，依赖 PostgreSQL 数据库，支持 Docker 部署。
zh.hot: 作为 Qualtrics 的开源替代，Formbricks 吸引了大量寻求隐私优先、可自托管的体验管理方案的用户，目前拥有 12616 颗星，且持续增长。
uses: 产品团队 —— 在应用内收集用户反馈以优化体验
市场研究人员 —— 通过网站和邮件调查获取用户洞察
开发者 —— 将调查功能嵌入到自己的产品中，或自托管整个平台

en.tag: Open source experience management platform, a Qualtrics alternative
en.what: Formbricks is an open-source survey and experience management platform that offers in-app, website, link, and email surveys to collect feedback at every point in the user journey. It can be used as a standalone platform or embedded into existing products.
en.content: The repository contains the complete survey platform code, including frontend UI, backend API, data analysis modules, and self-hosting deployment configurations.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, using Next.js for frontend, Node.js for backend, PostgreSQL for database, and supports Docker deployment.
en.hot: As an open-source alternative to Qualtrics, Formbricks attracts users seeking privacy-first, self-hostable experience management solutions, with 12,616 stars and growing.
uses: Product teams — collect in-app user feedback to improve experience
Market researchers — gather user insights via website and email surveys
Developers — embed survey functionality into their own products or self-host the platform

zh.tag: 开源 Vercel/Heroku 替代，自托管 PaaS 平台
zh.what: Dokploy 是一个免费、可自托管的平台即服务（PaaS），简化应用和数据库的部署与管理。它支持多种编程语言、数据库和 Docker Compose，并提供实时监控、备份、多节点扩展等功能。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 PaaS 系统代码，包括应用部署、数据库管理、备份、监控、CLI/API 和模板等模块。提供一键安装脚本和 Docker 镜像。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 开发，使用 Docker Swarm 管理多节点集群，集成 Traefik 进行路由和负载均衡。
zh.hot: 作为 Vercel/Heroku 的开源替代，吸引了大量自托管用户，Star 数已达 35,948，今日新增 64，持续受到开发者社区关注。
uses: 开发者 —— 自托管应用和数据库，替代商业 PaaS
团队/企业 —— 内部部署多节点应用，实现私有云
DevOps 工程师 —— 自动化部署、备份和监控基础设施

en.tag: Open-source self-hosted PaaS alternative to Vercel, Netlify and Heroku
en.what: Dokploy is a free, self-hostable Platform as a Service (PaaS) that simplifies deployment and management of applications and databases. It supports multiple languages, databases, Docker Compose, real-time monitoring, backups, and multi-node scaling.
en.content: The repository contains the full PaaS system code, including modules for application deployment, database management, backups, monitoring, CLI/API, and templates. It provides a one-line install script and Docker images.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, uses Docker Swarm for multi-node cluster management, and integrates Traefik for routing and load balancing.
en.hot: As an open-source alternative to Vercel/Heroku, it attracts many self-hosting users, reaching 35,948 stars with 64 new stars today, continuing to gain attention from the developer community.
uses: Developers — self-host applications and databases as a commercial PaaS alternative
Teams/Enterprises — deploy multi-node applications internally for private cloud
DevOps engineers — automate deployment, backup, and monitoring infrastructure

zh.tag: AI 网站克隆模板：一键让 AI 代理把任意网站转成 Next.js 代码
zh.what: 这是一个可复用的项目模板，能驱动 AI 编码代理（如 Claude Code）通过一条命令反向工程任意网站。它会自动检查目标站点、提取设计令牌与资源、编写组件规范，并并行重建页面各个区块，最终生成干净、现代的 Next.js 代码库。
zh.content: 仓库主体是一个 Next.js 项目模板，附带 AI 代理指令文件（AGENTS.md）、设计参考文档与对比截图，以及驱动 Claude Code、Codex CLI 和 OpenCode 等代理执行 `/clone-website` 技能的自动化工作流。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 与 Next.js 构建，使用 npm 管理 Node.js 依赖；核心能力依赖外部 AI 编码代理，官方推荐 Claude Code（Opus 4.8），同时兼容 Codex CLI 与 OpenCode。
zh.hot: 仓库在一个月内新增 1.17 万 Star，总数达 2.86 万并跻身 GitHub TypeScript 月榜第 7，反映出开发者对「用 AI 代理一键复刻网站并输出可维护代码」的需求极为旺盛。
uses: 前端开发者与设计师 —— 快速获取参考网站的现代化组件与布局实现，用于学习与二次开发。
独立开发者与创业者 —— 低成本、高效率地复刻竞品落地页或快速启动 MVP。
AI 工具链爱好者 —— 探索 Claude Code 等代理在复杂前端工程中的自动化与并行构建能力。

en.tag: AI-powered template that clones any website into a clean Next.js codebase via one command
en.what: A reusable template that leverages AI coding agents to reverse-engineer any website into a clean, modern Next.js codebase via a single command. It automatically inspects the target site, extracts design tokens and assets, writes component specs, and dispatches parallel builders to reconstruct every section.
en.content: The repo is centered around a Next.js project template, bundled with AI agent instruction files (AGENTS.md), design reference docs and comparison screenshots, plus automated workflows that power the `/clone-website` skill across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and OpenCode.
en.stack: Built on TypeScript and Next.js within the Node.js ecosystem, managed via npm. Its core capabilities rely on external AI coding agents, with Claude Code (Opus 4.8) officially recommended, while also supporting Codex CLI and OpenCode.
en.hot: With 11,751 new stars this month and 28,591 total, landing at #7 on the GitHub Trending TypeScript monthly chart, it signals explosive demand for one-command, AI-driven website replication that produces maintainable code.
uses: Front-end developers and designers — quickly extract modern component and layout implementations from reference sites for learning and reuse.
Indie hackers and entrepreneurs — replicate competitor landing pages or bootstrap MVPs with minimal cost and effort.
AI tooling enthusiasts — explore automation and parallel builder capabilities of agents like Claude Code in complex front-end engineering.

zh.tag: Atlassian 官方 MCP 服务器，打通 Jira/Confluence 与 Claude/Cursor 等 AI 工具
zh.what: 这是 Atlassian 官方推出的远程 MCP 服务器，作为云托管桥梁让 AI 工具能够安全、实时地访问 Jira、Confluence、Bitbucket 等套件数据。它支持 OAuth 2.1 和 API 令牌两种认证方式，使 Claude、ChatGPT、Cursor、VS Code 等主流 AI 客户端可以直接查询和操作 Atlassian 产品内容。
zh.content: 仓库包含服务端实现、MCP 协议兼容层、Atlassian 各产品（Jira/Confluence/JSM/Bitbucket/Compass）的连接器配置，以及 OAuth 2.1 与 API Token 的安全认证模块。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript/Node.js 构建，采用 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 标准协议，依托 Atlassian Cloud 托管，并集成 OAuth 2.1 身份验证流程。
zh.hot: 作为 Atlassian 官方 GA 产品，它凭借 869 Stars 冲上 GitHub JavaScript 日榜第 4，反映出企业级工具链与 AI 助手深度集成的迫切需求。官方背书加上对主流 AI 编辑器和聊天工具的全面支持，使其成为企业 MCP 集成的标杆方案。
uses: 企业开发团队 —— 让 AI 助手直接读取 Jira 工单、Confluence 文档与 Bitbucket 代码库，提升研发协作效率。
IT 运维与技术支持 —— 通过 Jira Service Management 对接 AI，实现故障单自动查询与智能客服。
产品经理与知识管理者 —— 借助 Compass 和 Confluence 连接，让 AI 快速汇总项目状态与知识库内容。
AI 工具集成商 —— 基于官方 MCP 协议，将 Atlassian 全家桶安全接入自研或第三方 AI 应用。

en.tag: Official Atlassian MCP server bridging Jira, Confluence and Compass to Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT
en.what: This is Atlassian's official remote MCP server that acts as a cloud-hosted bridge, giving AI tools secure, real-time access to Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, and other suite data. It supports both OAuth 2.1 and API token authentication, enabling mainstream AI clients like Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and VS Code to directly query and manipulate Atlassian product content.
en.content: The repo contains the server-side implementation, MCP protocol compatibility layer, connector configurations for Atlassian products (Jira, Confluence, JSM, Bitbucket, Compass), and security authentication modules for OAuth 2.1 and API tokens.
en.stack: Built with JavaScript/Node.js, it adopts the Model Context Protocol (MCP) standard, is hosted on Atlassian Cloud, and integrates OAuth 2.1 authentication flows.
en.hot: As an official Atlassian GA product, it hit GitHub's JavaScript daily trending at #4 with 869 stars, reflecting urgent enterprise demand for deep AI-toolchain integration. Official backing plus comprehensive support for mainstream AI editors and chat tools makes it a benchmark for enterprise MCP adoption.
uses: Enterprise dev teams — Let AI assistants read Jira tickets, Confluence docs and Bitbucket repos to boost R&D collaboration.
IT ops and support — Connect Jira Service Management to AI for automated ticket queries and intelligent helpdesk.
Product managers and knowledge workers — Use Compass and Confluence integration to let AI summarize project status and wiki content.
AI tool integrators — Securely plug the Atlassian suite into custom or third-party AI apps via the official MCP protocol.

zh.tag: Expo 官方 AI 代理技能集，赋能智能开发
zh.what: 这是 Expo 团队官方发布的 AI 代理技能集合，旨在让 AI 编码助手（如 Claude Code、Cursor 等）拥有专业的 Expo 开发知识。它帮助 AI 正确使用 Expo API、构建工作流，并理解 Expo、EAS、React Native 等平台的约束。
zh.content: 仓库包含多个 SKILL.md 技能文件，涵盖 Expo 路由、EAS 构建、升级、调试等场景。提供插件安装（Claude Code、Codex）和 skills CLI 安装两种方式，支持 Cursor、OpenCode、GitHub Copilot 等多种 AI 代理。
zh.stack: 基于 Shell 脚本和 Markdown 技能文件，依赖 skills CLI 工具（npx skills）和 Expo 官方插件市场。
zh.hot: 作为 Expo 官方推出的 AI 代理技能包，精准对接当前 AI 编码助手热潮，上线即获 2294 Star，日增 42，位列 JavaScript 日榜第 4。
uses: Expo 开发者 —— 让 AI 助手更懂 Expo，提升开发效率
AI 编码工具用户 —— 为 Claude Code、Cursor 等注入专业 Expo 知识
团队协作 —— 统一 AI 对 Expo 项目的理解，减少错误

en.tag: Official AI agent skills for Expo development
en.what: A collection of official AI agent skills from the Expo team, designed to equip AI coding assistants with expert Expo knowledge. It helps agents correctly use Expo APIs, structure workflows, and understand platform constraints.
en.content: Contains multiple SKILL.md files covering Expo Router, EAS builds, upgrades, debugging, etc. Supports plugin installation for Claude Code/Codex and skills CLI for Cursor, OpenCode, GitHub Copilot, and more.
en.stack: Built with Shell scripts and Markdown skill files, relying on the skills CLI (npx skills) and Expo's official plugin marketplace.
en.hot: As Expo's official AI agent skill pack, it taps into the AI coding assistant trend, quickly gaining 2294 stars (+42 today) and ranking #4 on JavaScript daily trending.
uses: Expo developers — empower AI assistants with Expo expertise
AI coding tool users — inject professional Expo knowledge into Claude Code, Cursor, etc.
Team collaboration — standardize AI understanding of Expo projects, reduce errors

zh.tag: AI 代理的通用性能优化与安全系统
zh.what: ECC 是一个为 AI 代理（如 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等）提供性能优化、安全防护和技能增强的通用系统。它通过技能、直觉、记忆、安全机制和以研究为先的开发方法，提升代理的效率和可靠性。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心引擎、多语言 SDK（TypeScript、Python、Go、Java 等）、CLI 工具、GitHub App 以及丰富的文档和指南。提供 npm 包 ecc-universal 和 ecc-agentshield，支持多种代理平台。
zh.stack: 主要使用 JavaScript/TypeScript，同时提供 Python、Go、Java、Perl 等多语言支持。依赖 npm 生态，集成 GitHub App 和 Discord 社区。
zh.hot: 拥有 23 万+ Star，日增近 400，因其填补了 AI 代理性能优化和安全领域的空白，且支持多种主流代理平台，吸引了大量开发者和 AI 爱好者。
uses: AI 代理开发者 —— 优化代理性能并增强安全性
使用 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等工具的开发者 —— 提升编码助手效率
AI 安全研究人员 —— 研究代理安全机制与防护

en.tag: Universal performance optimization and security system for AI agents
en.what: ECC is a universal system that provides performance optimization, security, and skill enhancement for AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. It improves agent efficiency and reliability through skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development.
en.content: The repository includes the core engine, multi-language SDKs (TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, etc.), CLI tools, a GitHub App, and extensive documentation and guides. It offers npm packages ecc-universal and ecc-agentshield, supporting multiple agent platforms.
en.stack: Primarily JavaScript/TypeScript, with multi-language support including Python, Go, Java, Perl. Relies on npm ecosystem, integrates with GitHub App and Discord community.
en.hot: With over 230k stars and nearly 400 daily additions, it fills a gap in AI agent performance optimization and security, supporting multiple mainstream agent platforms, attracting developers and AI enthusiasts.
uses: AI agent developers — optimize agent performance and enhance security
Developers using Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc. — boost coding assistant efficiency
AI security researchers — study agent security mechanisms and protection

zh.tag: 本地 AI 短剧与漫剧生成工具，一站式离线创作
zh.what: 这是一个完全开源的本地 AI 短剧与漫剧生成工具，支持从故事到成片的一站式创作。用户可以在本地离线运行，数据不上云，保护隐私。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的桌面应用，基于 Vue3 + Node.js + Electron 构建，提供剧本编辑、角色/场景管理、分镜制作、视频合成等功能，并支持画布工作流可视化编排。
zh.stack: 技术栈：Vue3 + Node.js + Electron，前端使用 Vite 构建，后端集成 SQLite 本地数据库，支持通义、火山、可灵、Gemini 等多种 AI 模型 API。
zh.hot: 该项目解决了 AI 短剧工具无法本地离线运行的痛点，完全开源且数据隐私友好，近期新增画布模式和 Agnes AI 接入，功能迭代活跃，今日新增 33 星，登上 JavaScript 日榜第 14 名。
uses: 短视频创作者 —— 快速生成 AI 短剧或漫剧，无需云端依赖
隐私敏感用户 —— 希望数据完全本地处理，不上传云端
AI 应用开发者 —— 作为本地 AI 视频生成工作流的参考实现或二次开发基础

en.tag: Open-source local AI short drama & comic drama maker, fully offline
en.what: An open-source local AI short drama and comic drama generator that supports end-to-end creation from story to final video. It runs fully offline, keeping all data on your machine for privacy.
en.content: The repository contains a full desktop application built with Vue3, Node.js, and Electron, offering script editing, character/scene management, storyboard creation, video synthesis, and a canvas workflow for visual orchestration.
en.stack: Tech stack: Vue3 + Node.js + Electron, frontend built with Vite, backend uses SQLite for local storage, supports multiple AI model APIs including Tongyi, Volcano, Kling, Gemini, etc.
en.hot: This project addresses the pain point of AI drama tools not running locally offline; it's fully open-source and privacy-friendly. Recent additions like canvas mode and Agnes AI integration show active development, gaining 33 stars today and ranking #14 on the JavaScript daily trending list.
uses: Short video creators — quickly generate AI short dramas or comic dramas without cloud dependency
Privacy-conscious users — want all data processed locally, no upload to cloud
AI application developers — as a reference implementation or base for secondary development of local AI video generation workflows

zh.tag: 用 SQL 和 Markdown 写 BI 报表的开源框架
zh.what: Evidence 是一个开源、基于代码的商业智能工具，替代传统拖拽式 BI。它允许用户用 SQL 查询数据，用 Markdown 编写报告，并自动生成交互式数据可视化网站。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Evidence 核心库、VSCode 扩展、CLI 工具、文档站点和示例项目。核心功能是解析 Markdown 文件中的 SQL 语句，执行查询并渲染图表和组件。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript/Node.js，使用 VSCode 扩展提供开发体验，支持多种数据源（如 PostgreSQL、MySQL、Snowflake），生成静态网站可部署到 Netlify、Vercel 等。
zh.hot: 作为开源 BI 的新范式，Evidence 以代码驱动替代拖拽，吸引数据团队。今日新增 51 星，总星数 6735，位列 JavaScript 日榜第 4。
uses: 数据分析师 —— 用 SQL 和 Markdown 快速创建可复用的数据报告
数据工程师 —— 将 BI 报告纳入 CI/CD 流程，实现版本控制
产品团队 —— 构建交互式数据产品，嵌入到应用或文档中

en.tag: Open-source BI framework to build reports with SQL and Markdown
en.what: Evidence is an open-source, code-based alternative to drag-and-drop BI tools. It lets users write SQL queries and Markdown reports, then automatically generates an interactive data visualization website.
en.content: The repo includes the Evidence core library, VSCode extension, CLI tools, documentation site, and example projects. It parses SQL in Markdown files, runs queries, and renders charts and components.
en.stack: Built on JavaScript/Node.js, with a VSCode extension for development. Supports multiple data sources (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Snowflake) and generates static sites deployable to Netlify, Vercel, etc.
en.hot: As a new paradigm for open-source BI, Evidence replaces drag-and-drop with code, attracting data teams. Gained 51 stars today, total 6735, ranking #4 on JavaScript daily trending.
uses: Data analysts — quickly create reusable data reports with SQL and Markdown
Data engineers — integrate BI reports into CI/CD pipelines for version control
Product teams — build interactive data products to embed in apps or docs

zh.tag: Cursor AI 编辑器规则配置精选集
zh.what: 这是一个汇集了各种 Cursor AI 编辑器项目规则（.mdc 文件）的仓库，帮助开发者针对不同项目、框架和工作流定制 AI 行为。通过应用这些规则，Cursor 能更好地理解项目上下文，生成更准确的代码建议。
zh.content: 仓库包含按类别（前端、后端、移动端、测试等）组织的规则文件，每个规则都是 Markdown 格式的 .mdc 文件，存放在 .cursor/rules/ 目录下。
zh.stack: 纯 Markdown 配置文件，无需任何依赖，与 Cursor AI 编辑器配合使用。
zh.hot: 拥有 40388 颗星，今日新增 17 颗，位列 JavaScript 日榜第 8。Cursor 编辑器用户群体庞大，且规则能显著提升 AI 辅助编程效率，因此备受关注。
uses: Cursor AI 编辑器用户 —— 通过规则定制 AI 行为，提升代码生成质量
前端/后端/全栈开发者 —— 为不同技术栈（React、Node、Python 等）预设规则
团队协作 —— 统一项目级 AI 行为规范，确保代码一致性

en.tag: Curated collection of Cursor AI editor rule configs
en.what: A curated collection of Cursor AI editor project rules (.mdc files) that help developers customize AI behavior for different projects, frameworks, and workflows. By applying these rules, Cursor can better understand project context and generate more accurate code suggestions.
en.content: The repo contains rule files organized by category (frontend, backend, mobile, testing, etc.), each in Markdown .mdc format, meant to be placed in the .cursor/rules/ directory.
en.stack: Pure Markdown configuration files, no dependencies, used with the Cursor AI editor.
en.hot: With 40,388 stars and 17 new stars today, ranking 8th on JavaScript daily trending. The large user base of Cursor editor and the significant boost in AI-assisted coding efficiency drive its popularity.
uses: Cursor AI editor users — customize AI behavior to improve code generation quality
Frontend/backend/full-stack developers — preset rules for different tech stacks (React, Node, Python, etc.)
Team collaboration — unify project-level AI behavior norms for code consistency

zh.tag: 为AI编程助手注入专家级WordPress知识
zh.what: Agent Skills 是一套便携的指令、清单和脚本包，帮助 AI 编程助手（如 Claude、Copilot、Cursor 等）正确构建 WordPress 项目，避免常见错误并遵循最佳实践。它覆盖块开发、主题、插件、REST API、性能优化等核心领域。
zh.content: 仓库包含多个技能文件夹，每个文件夹内有 SKILL.md 指令文件、参考文档和可选脚本。目前已提供 17 个技能，如 wp-block-development、wp-plugin-development、wp-performance 等。
zh.stack: 基于 Markdown 指令文件，无特定技术栈依赖，但技能内容涉及 WordPress 生态（PHP、JavaScript、Gutenberg、REST API、WP-CLI 等）。
zh.hot: AI 编程助手在 WordPress 开发中常生成过时或有安全问题的代码，Agent Skills 精准解决了这一痛点。仓库由 WordPress 官方维护，上线即获 1903 Star，日增 5，位列 JavaScript 日榜第 9。
uses: WordPress 开发者 —— 使用 AI 助手时获得专家级指导，避免常见错误
AI 编程工具用户 —— 在 Claude、Copilot、Cursor 中加载技能以提升代码质量
WordPress 插件/主题作者 —— 学习并遵循官方最佳实践

en.tag: Expert-level WordPress knowledge for AI coding assistants
en.what: Agent Skills are portable bundles of instructions, checklists, and scripts that help AI coding assistants (Claude, Copilot, Cursor, etc.) build WordPress the right way, avoiding common mistakes and following best practices. It covers blocks, themes, plugins, REST API, performance, and more.
en.content: The repo contains multiple skill folders, each with a SKILL.md instruction file, references, and optional scripts. Currently 17 skills are available, such as wp-block-development, wp-plugin-development, and wp-performance.
en.stack: Based on Markdown instruction files with no specific tech stack dependency, but skills cover WordPress ecosystem (PHP, JavaScript, Gutenberg, REST API, WP-CLI, etc.).
en.hot: AI coding assistants often generate outdated or insecure WordPress code; Agent Skills precisely address this pain point. Maintained by WordPress, it gained 1903 stars with 5 daily additions, ranking #9 on JavaScript daily trending.
uses: WordPress developers — get expert guidance when using AI assistants to avoid common mistakes
AI coding tool users — load skills into Claude, Copilot, Cursor to improve code quality
WordPress plugin/theme authors — learn and follow official best practices

zh.tag: AI 编码代理的生产级工程技能包

Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf 等代理的重度使用者 —— 通过简短回复提升效率

en.stack: Built with JavaScript, relies on configuration systems of various AI agents (e.g., Claude Code CLI config, Cursor rules).
en.hot: With its humorous caveman concept and impressive 65% token savings, it quickly garnered 90K+ stars as developers seek to reduce AI usage costs.

zh.tag: Rust 全栈框架，开箱即用
zh.what: Topcoat 是一个模块化、开箱即用的 Rust 全栈 Web 框架，注重简洁与生产力。它允许在服务器端渲染组件，同时通过翻译为 JavaScript 实现客户端交互，无需 WebAssembly 或额外构建步骤。

zh.hot: 今日新增 371 星，总星数 1595，位列 GitHub Trending 日榜第 16。作为 Tokio 生态下的全栈框架，它简化了 Rust Web 开发流程，吸引了大量关注。
uses: Rust 开发者构建全栈 Web 应用，希望避免前后端分离的复杂性
需要快速原型开发或构建高性能、低延迟的交互式网站
对 Tokio 生态熟悉的团队，希望统一技术栈

en.tag: Batteries-included full-stack framework for Rust
en.what: Topcoat is a modular, batteries-included Rust framework for building full-stack web apps, prioritizing simplicity and productivity. It renders all markup on the server but translates interactive expressions to JavaScript for instant client-side reactivity, eliminating the need for WebAssembly or a separate build step.
en.content: The repository contains the core framework library, router, view macros, component system, and example code. It is early-stage and experimental, with breaking changes expected.
en.stack: Built on Rust and the Tokio async runtime, uses a custom view! macro for template rendering, and supports signal-driven reactive updates.
en.hot: Gained 371 stars today, reaching 1595 total, ranking #16 on GitHub Trending daily. As a full-stack framework under the Tokio ecosystem, it simplifies Rust web development, drawing significant attention.
uses: Rust developers building full-stack web apps who want to avoid frontend-backend separation complexity
Those needing rapid prototyping or high-performance, low-latency interactive websites
Teams familiar with the Tokio ecosystem seeking a unified tech stack

zh.tag: 用WiFi信号实现穿墙感知的空间智能平台

en.what: RuView is a WiFi sensing platform that uses Channel State Information (CSI) from commodity routers to detect people, measure breathing and heart rate, and track movement through walls. It integrates with major smart home ecosystems via Matter, HomeKit, and MQTT.
