zh.tag: 面向多智能体协作的 Lakehouse 原生图引擎，支持 Git 式分支工作流
zh.what: Omnigraph 是为大规模智能体集群设计的操作状态与协调层，支持数百个智能体在并行隔离分支上对图数据进行增删改查，并通过类 Git 的审查合并机制安全地收敛变更。它提供多模态检索能力，将图遍历、向量近似近邻搜索、全文检索与倒数排名融合整合到统一查询运行时中，用于为智能体组装上下文。
zh.content: 仓库包含基于 Rust 编写的 omnigraph-server 服务端、omnigraph-cli 命令行工具，以及用于声明图结构、Schema、存储查询、嵌入模型提供方和策略的 cluster.yaml 配置体系；底层采用 Lance 列式格式实现可分支、可时间旅行的版本化对象存储，并内置基于 Cedar 的服务端安全策略引擎。
zh.stack: 核心以 Rust 构建，采用 Lance 列式存储格式持久化数据，兼容任意 S3 兼容对象存储（如 MinIO、AWS S3、Cloudflare R2、GCS）；嵌入查询运行时整合向量 ANN 与全文检索，服务端使用 Cedar 策略语言实现细粒度权限控制。
zh.hot: 该仓库在一个月内狂揽 683 颗 Star，总数达到 890，并跻身 GitHub Rust 语言月榜第 13 名；其「Git 式分支 + Lakehouse 架构 + 多智能体协调」的组合切中了当前 AI Agent 基础设施的核心痛点，吸引了大量关注。
uses: 构建企业级「公司大脑」的工程师与架构师——将组织知识统一为可供智能体查询的图
开发多智能体系统的 AI 工程师——需要持久化、版本化的共享记忆与任务分支隔离
重视数据主权的私有化部署团队——支持本地 MinIO/RustFS 或混合云对象存储
构建复杂上下文检索系统的开发者——需要图、向量与全文多模态融合的单一查询层

en.tag: Lakehouse-native graph engine for multi-agent fleets with Git-style branching
en.what: Omnigraph serves as the operational state and coordination layer for fleets of agents, enabling hundreds of agents to enrich graph data on parallel isolated branches with Git-style review and merge workflows. It unifies graph traversal, vector ANN, full-text search, and Reciprocal Rank Fusion into a single query runtime for multimodal context assembly.
en.content: The repository includes the Rust-based omnigraph-server, omnigraph-cli, and a declarative cluster.yaml configuration system for graphs, schemas, stored queries, embedding providers, and policies. Under the hood it uses the Lance columnar format for branchable, time-travelable versioned object storage, along with a Cedar-based server-side policy engine.
en.stack: Built primarily in Rust, it persists data using the Lance columnar format atop any S3-compatible object store such as MinIO, AWS S3, R2, or GCS. The query runtime integrates vector ANN and full-text search, while Cedar policy language enforces server-side authorization.
en.hot: The project surged by 683 stars in just one month to reach 890 total, ranking 13th on GitHub's monthly Rust Trending list. Its unique blend of Git-style branching, lakehouse architecture, and multi-agent coordination directly addresses critical infrastructure pain points in the AI agent boom, driving significant attention.
uses: Engineers and architects building enterprise 'company brain' systems that unify organizational knowledge into an agent-queryable graph
AI developers building multi-agent systems requiring durable, versioned shared memory with branch isolation per task or agent
Teams prioritizing data sovereignty and private deployment via on-prem MinIO/RustFS or hybrid-cloud S3-compatible object stores
Developers building complex context-retrieval systems that need a unified query layer fusing graph, vector, and full-text search

The project aims to break the wall of closed formats, enabling everyone to freely read and write HWP files.
en.content: The repository contains a Rust core library (parser, renderer, editor logic), WASM bindings, a web demo page, VS Code extension, browser extensions (Chrome/Edge/Firefox), and an NPM package. en.stack: Tech stack: Rust (core logic), WebAssembly (browser runtime), JavaScript/TypeScript (extensions and frontend), HTML/CSS (UI). Dependencies include wasm-bindgen, web-sys, js-sys, and other WASM ecosystem libraries.
en.hot: The project has gained attention in the Rust community and among Korean users, with 3 new stars today and a total of 3572 stars, ranking 15th on the Rust daily trending list. Its cross-platform capability and breaking of the closed format attract many users, especially Korean users and developers who need to handle HWP files.

Developers — sync skill configs across Cursor, Copilot, etc.

zh.tag: 追踪仓库中 AI 生成代码的 Git 扩展
zh.what: Git AI 是一个开源的 Git 扩展，用于追踪仓库中由 AI 生成的每一行代码。安装后，每次提交都会自动记录代码是由哪个 AI 代理、模型和提示生成的，并在 git blame 中清晰标注。它兼容 Claude Code、Cursor、GitHub Copilot 等主流 AI 编码工具。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 实现的 Git 扩展二进制文件、安装脚本（curl/powershell）、Git AI 标准规范文档，以及支持的主流 AI 代理图标列表。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 语言开发，依赖 Git 命令行接口，无额外运行时或数据库。
zh.hot: 随着 AI 编码工具普及，开发者急需区分人工与 AI 代码，Git AI 填补了这一空白。2322 颗星且持续增长，反映了社区对代码溯源和透明度的强烈需求。
uses: 开发者——在团队协作中清晰标注 AI 生成代码，便于代码审查和责任追溯
技术管理者——量化团队中 AI 辅助编程的使用比例和效果
AI 工具用户——追踪不同 AI 代理和模型的代码贡献，优化工作流

en.tag: A Git extension to track AI-generated code in your repos
en.what: Git AI is an open-source Git extension that tracks every line of AI-generated code in your repositories. After installation, each commit automatically records which AI agent, model, and prompts generated the code, and displays attribution in git blame. It works with major AI coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot.
en.content: The repo contains a Rust-based Git extension binary, installation scripts (curl/powershell), the Git AI standard specification, and a list of supported AI agent icons.
en.stack: Built with Rust, depends on Git CLI, no extra runtime or database required.
en.hot: As AI coding tools proliferate, developers urgently need to distinguish human-written from AI-generated code. Git AI fills this gap, with 2322 stars and growing, reflecting strong demand for code provenance and transparency.
uses: Developers — clearly mark AI-generated code in team collaboration for code review and accountability
Tech leads — quantify the usage and impact of AI-assisted programming in their teams
AI tool users — track code contributions from different AI agents and models to optimize workflows

zh.tag: Rust 编写的高性能 CLI 代理，减少 LLM 调用 60-90% token 消耗
zh.what: RTK 是一个 CLI 代理，在将命令输出传递给 LLM 上下文之前进行过滤和压缩，从而大幅降低 token 消耗。它支持 100+ 常用命令，如 ls、cat、git、cargo test 等，平均节省 80% 的 token，且额外延迟小于 10ms。
zh.content: 仓库包含一个用 Rust 编写的单一二进制文件，零外部依赖。提供安装脚本、Homebrew 公式、Cargo 安装方式以及预构建二进制文件。
zh.stack: 纯 Rust 实现，无外部依赖。支持 Homebrew、Cargo 和 curl 安装。
zh.hot: RTK 通过大幅降低 LLM 调用成本（节省 60-90% token）吸引了大量关注，72k+ stars 表明开发者对优化 AI 使用成本的强烈需求。
uses: 使用 Claude Code、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手的开发者，减少 token 消耗
频繁在终端执行命令并与 LLM 交互的工程师
希望降低 AI API 调用成本的企业团队

en.tag: High-performance CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands
en.what: RTK is a CLI proxy that filters and compresses command outputs before they reach your LLM context, significantly reducing token consumption. It supports 100+ common commands like ls, cat, git, cargo test, etc., achieving average token savings of 80% with less than 10ms overhead.
en.content: The repository contains a single Rust binary with zero external dependencies. It provides installation scripts, Homebrew formula, Cargo installation, and pre-built binaries.
en.stack: Pure Rust implementation with zero dependencies. Supports installation via Homebrew, Cargo, and curl.
en.hot: RTK has gained massive attention by drastically reducing LLM token costs (60-90% savings). With 72k+ stars, it reflects developers' strong demand for optimizing AI usage costs.
uses: Developers using AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Cursor to reduce token consumption
Engineers who frequently run terminal commands and interact with LLMs
Enterprise teams looking to lower AI API call costs

zh.tag: 为AI打造的轻量安全Python解释器
zh.what: Monty是一个用Rust编写的最小化、安全的Python解释器，专为AI代理设计。它允许安全运行LLM生成的Python代码，启动时间仅需微秒级，避免了容器沙箱的复杂性和延迟。
zh.content: 仓库包含Monty解释器的Rust源代码、Python绑定（通过PyPI发布）、JavaScript绑定以及文档。支持类型检查、资源控制和状态快照。
zh.stack: 技术栈：Rust（核心解释器），通过PyO3提供Python绑定，通过wasm-pack提供JavaScript绑定。依赖ty进行类型检查。
zh.hot: Monty解决了AI代理安全运行LLM生成代码的痛点，启动速度极快（<1μs），且无需容器。7.9k Stars反映了开发者对轻量级、高性能沙箱解决方案的强烈需求。
uses: AI代理开发者 —— 安全执行LLM生成的Python代码，无需容器
需要快速代码沙箱的Rust/Python/JS开发者 —— 微秒级启动，低延迟
研究LLM安全与代码执行的学者 —— 探索轻量级隔离方案

en.tag: A minimal, secure Python interpreter in Rust for AI agents
en.what: Monty is a minimal, secure Python interpreter written in Rust, designed for AI agents. It enables safe execution of LLM-generated Python code with microsecond startup times, avoiding the complexity and latency of container-based sandboxes.
en.content: The repository contains the Rust source code for the Monty interpreter, Python bindings (via PyPI), JavaScript bindings, and documentation. It supports type checking, resource control, and state snapshots.
en.stack: Tech stack: Rust (core interpreter), PyO3 for Python bindings, wasm-pack for JavaScript bindings. Uses ty for type checking.
en.hot: Monty addresses the pain point of safely running LLM-generated code in AI agents with ultra-fast startup (<1μs) and no container overhead. Its 7.9k stars reflect strong demand for lightweight, high-performance sandbox solutions.
uses: AI agent developers — safely execute LLM-generated Python code without containers
Rust/Python/JS developers needing fast code sandbox — microsecond startup, low latency
Researchers in LLM safety and code execution — exploring lightweight isolation approaches

zh.tag: Go 编译期自动注入 OpenTelemetry 探针，零代码改动
zh.what: 这是一个在编译阶段自动为 Go 应用注入 OpenTelemetry 观测代码的工具，无需修改源码。它通过修改 Go 构建流程，将探针直接编译进二进制文件，实现零运行时开销和完全解耦。
zh.content: 仓库包含一个名为 otelc 的 CLI 工具、演示应用、详细的文档（入门指南、UX 设计、实现细节、API 设计等）以及测试用例。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 1.25+ 构建，依赖 OpenTelemetry Go SDK，使用编译期代码注入技术。
zh.hot: 作为 OpenTelemetry 官方项目，它解决了 Go 应用观测的痛点——无需手动埋点，且零运行时开销。今日新增 20 星，登上 Go 日榜第 8 名，开发者社区高度关注。
uses: Go 应用开发者——希望快速接入 OpenTelemetry 观测，无需修改业务代码
运维/平台团队——在 CI/CD 中自动为所有 Go 服务注入探针，统一观测标准
微服务架构团队——对第三方库和自身代码无侵入式添加追踪、指标和日志

en.tag: Compile-time OpenTelemetry instrumentation for Go, zero code changes
en.what: A tool that automatically instruments Go applications with OpenTelemetry at compile time, requiring no source code changes. It modifies the Go build process to embed instrumentation directly into the binary, achieving zero runtime overhead and complete decoupling.
en.content: The repository includes the otelc CLI tool, demo applications, comprehensive documentation (getting started, UX design, implementation details, API design, etc.), and test cases.
en.stack: Built with Go 1.25+, depends on OpenTelemetry Go SDK, and uses compile-time code injection techniques.
en.hot: As an official OpenTelemetry project, it addresses a key pain point in Go observability—no manual instrumentation needed and zero runtime overhead. With 20 new stars today, it ranks #8 on the Go daily trending list, drawing significant developer attention.
uses: Go application developers — quickly add OpenTelemetry observability without modifying business code
Operations/platform teams — automatically instrument all Go services in CI/CD for unified observability
Microservice teams — non-invasively add tracing, metrics, and logging to third-party libraries and own code

zh.tag: 开源实时基础设施监控平台，秒级粒度
zh.what: Netdata 是一个开源的、实时的、AI 驱动的全栈可观测性平台，专为基础设施监控设计。它能够收集数千个指标，并以每秒一次的频率展示，帮助团队快速发现和诊断问题。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Netdata 的核心监控代理、仪表盘、告警引擎以及 AI/ML 异常检测模块。支持 Docker、Kubernetes、Linux 等多种部署方式。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 C 语言插件和 Node.js 前端。支持多种数据采集插件（如 Prometheus、StatsD）和存储后端。
zh.hot: 拥有近 8 万 Star，是监控领域最受欢迎的开源项目之一。今日新增 51 Star，位列 Go 语言日榜第 3，因其零配置、秒级粒度和 AI 增强的异常检测能力持续吸引用户。
uses: 运维工程师 —— 实时监控服务器、容器和云基础设施性能
DevOps 团队 —— 集成到 CI/CD 流水线，快速定位性能瓶颈
SRE —— 利用 AI 异常检测减少告警噪音，提升可观测性

en.tag: Open-source real-time infrastructure monitoring platform with per-second granularity
en.what: Netdata is an open-source, real-time, AI-powered full-stack observability platform designed for infrastructure monitoring. It collects thousands of metrics and displays them at per-second granularity, enabling teams to quickly detect and diagnose issues.
en.content: The repository contains the core monitoring agent, dashboard, alerting engine, and AI/ML anomaly detection module. Supports deployment via Docker, Kubernetes, Linux, and more.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, with C plugins and a Node.js frontend. Supports various data collection plugins (e.g., Prometheus, StatsD) and storage backends.
en.hot: With nearly 80K stars, it's one of the most popular open-source monitoring projects. Gaining 51 stars today, ranking #3 on Go daily trending, its zero-config, per-second granularity, and AI-enhanced anomaly detection continue to attract users.
uses: Ops engineers — real-time monitoring of servers, containers, and cloud infrastructure
DevOps teams — integrate into CI/CD pipelines for quick performance bottleneck identification
SREs — leverage AI anomaly detection to reduce alert noise and improve observability

zh.tag: 微信视频号视频下载工具
zh.what: 这是一个微信视频号下载器，支持通过分享链接在线解析或PC端代理抓取两种方式下载视频。用户只需以管理员身份运行程序，安装证书后即可在微信PC端看到下载按钮，轻松保存视频。

uses: 微信视频号内容创作者 —— 备份自己的视频素材
普通用户 —— 下载喜欢的视频到本地离线观看
技术爱好者 —— 学习微信视频号解密与代理抓取技术

en.tag: WeChat Channels video downloader tool
en.what: A WeChat Channels video downloader that supports online link parsing and PC proxy capture. Run as admin, install certificate, and a download button appears in WeChat PC client to save videos.
en.content: Includes Go backend, frontend online parsing page, and build scripts. Pre-compiled binaries for macOS and Windows with video quality selection.
en.stack: Written in Go, relies on WeChat Channels frontend and backend decryption libraries, uses Cloudflare Workers for online parsing.
en.hot: Gained 381 stars today, total 7813, ranked #4 on Go daily trending. Strong demand for WeChat Channels downloading, simple and easy to use.
uses: WeChat Channels content creators — backup their own videos
Regular users — download favorite videos for offline viewing
Tech enthusiasts — learn WeChat Channels decryption and proxy capture

zh.tag: 像构建API一样构建AI代理，像微服务一样运行
zh.what: AgentField 是一个 AI 后端平台，允许开发者像构建 API 一样构建 AI 代理，并像微服务一样大规模运行。它提供了控制平面来排队、重试和追踪每个代理分支的执行。
zh.content: 仓库包含 AgentField 的核心 Go 实现，以及 Python、Go、TypeScript SDK 和 REST API 文档。还提供了示例和集成指南。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖队列、重试和追踪机制。提供多语言 SDK（Python、Go、TypeScript）和 REST API。
zh.hot: AgentField 将 AI 代理开发标准化为 API 和微服务模式，降低了大规模部署门槛。今日新增 20 星，总星数 2399，位居 Go 语言日榜第一。
uses: AI 应用开发者 —— 快速构建和部署可扩展的 AI 代理
微服务架构团队 —— 将 AI 代理作为微服务集成到现有系统中
需要高并发代理编排的场景 —— 如自动化客服、数据分析管道

en.tag: Build AI agents like APIs, run them like microservices
en.what: AgentField is an AI backend platform that lets developers build AI agents like APIs and run thousands of them like microservices. It provides a control plane for queuing, retrying, and tracing every branch of agent execution.
en.content: The repo contains the core Go implementation of AgentField, along with Python, Go, TypeScript SDKs and REST API docs. Examples and integration guides are also included.
en.stack: Primarily built with Go, relying on queuing, retry, and tracing mechanisms. Offers multi-language SDKs (Python, Go, TypeScript) and REST API.
en.hot: AgentField standardizes AI agent development into API and microservice patterns, lowering the barrier for large-scale deployment. With 20 new stars today and 2399 total, it tops the Go daily trending list.
uses: AI application developers — quickly build and deploy scalable AI agents
Microservice architecture teams — integrate AI agents as microservices into existing systems
Scenarios requiring high-concurrency agent orchestration — e.g., automated customer service, data analysis pipelines

zh.tag: Grafana 出品的可编程管道 OpenTelemetry Collector 发行版
zh.what: Grafana Alloy 是一个开源的 OpenTelemetry Collector 发行版，内置 Prometheus 管道，支持指标、日志、追踪和性能分析。它提供丰富的基于表达式的语法来配置可观测性管道，并支持与多种遥测生态系统集成。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Alloy 的源代码、文档、示例配置和内置 UI。核心是一个可编程管道引擎，支持 OpenTelemetry Collector 组件、Prometheus、Loki、Pyroscope 等集成，以及集群和远程配置管理。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 OpenTelemetry Collector、Prometheus、Loki 等组件，支持 Kubernetes 原生集成。
zh.hot: 作为 Grafana 官方推出的统一可观测性数据采集器，Alloy 简化了多信号采集和管道配置，今日新增 4 星，总星数 3355，在 Go 语言日榜排名第 6。
uses: 运维工程师 —— 统一采集指标、日志、追踪和性能分析数据
平台团队 —— 构建可编程的可观测性管道，集成多种后端
Kubernetes 用户 —— 原生支持 K8s 资源发现和自动工作负载分发

en.tag: Grafana's programmable pipeline OpenTelemetry Collector distribution
en.what: Grafana Alloy is an open-source OpenTelemetry Collector distribution with built-in Prometheus pipelines, supporting metrics, logs, traces, and profiles. It offers a rich expression-based syntax for configuring observability pipelines and integrates with multiple telemetry ecosystems.
en.content: The repository contains Alloy's source code, documentation, example configurations, and a built-in UI. The core is a programmable pipeline engine supporting OpenTelemetry Collector components, integrations with Prometheus, Loki, Pyroscope, etc., along with clustering and remote configuration management.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, depends on OpenTelemetry Collector, Prometheus, Loki, etc., with native Kubernetes integration.
en.hot: As Grafana's official unified observability data collector, Alloy simplifies multi-signal collection and pipeline configuration. It gained 4 stars today, with 3355 total stars, ranking 6th on the Go daily trending list.
uses: SREs — Collect metrics, logs, traces, and profiles uniformly
Platform teams — Build programmable observability pipelines integrating multiple backends
Kubernetes users — Native support for K8s resource discovery and automatic workload distribution

zh.tag: 持久化执行平台，构建可靠分布式应用
zh.what: Temporal 是一个持久化执行平台，帮助开发者构建可扩展且高可靠的应用。它通过 Workflow 自动处理间歇性故障和重试，确保业务逻辑的弹性执行。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Temporal 服务端核心代码，包括 Workflow 引擎、任务调度、持久化存储等组件。提供 CLI、Web UI 和多种语言 SDK 用于交互。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 Cassandra、MySQL、PostgreSQL 等数据库作为持久化存储，支持 gRPC 通信。
zh.hot: Temporal 作为 Uber Cadence 的继承者，已成为分布式工作流编排的事实标准，拥有活跃社区和 21K+ Stars。
uses: 后端开发者 —— 构建可靠微服务编排与长时运行工作流
SRE/DevOps —— 实现自动化运维任务与故障恢复
数据工程师 —— 管理数据管道与 ETL 流程

en.tag: Durable execution platform for building reliable distributed applications
en.what: Temporal is a durable execution platform that enables developers to build scalable and reliable applications. It automatically handles intermittent failures and retries for Workflow executions, ensuring resilient business logic.
en.content: This repository contains the core Temporal server code, including the Workflow engine, task scheduling, and persistence storage. It also provides CLI, Web UI, and SDKs for multiple languages.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, with dependencies on Cassandra, MySQL, PostgreSQL for persistence, and gRPC for communication.
en.hot: As the successor to Uber's Cadence, Temporal has become the de facto standard for distributed workflow orchestration, with an active community and 21K+ stars.
uses: Backend developers — building reliable microservice orchestration and long-running workflows
SRE/DevOps — automating operational tasks and failure recovery
Data engineers — managing data pipelines and ETL processes

zh.tag: 云存储的 rsync：统一命令行同步工具
zh.what: Rclone 是一个命令行程序，用于在本地文件系统和多种云存储服务之间同步文件和目录。它支持超过 40 种云存储提供商，如 Google Drive、S3、Dropbox 等，并提供加密、缓存、挂载等高级功能。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rclone 的完整源代码、文档、安装脚本和示例配置。主要目录包括 cmd（命令行入口）、fs（文件系统抽象）、backend（各存储后端实现）等。
zh.stack: 使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 Go 标准库及多个第三方包，如 google-api-go-client、aws-sdk-go 等。
zh.hot: 作为云存储同步的标杆工具，Rclone 拥有 58k+ Star，今日新增 99，持续活跃。其广泛的提供商支持和强大的功能使其成为 DevOps 和数据备份的首选。
uses: DevOps 工程师 —— 自动化云存储备份与迁移
个人用户 —— 跨云盘文件同步与加密
数据管理员 —— 大规模数据归档与恢复
开发者 —— 集成到 CI/CD 流程中管理存储

en.tag: rsync for cloud storage: unified CLI sync tool
en.what: Rclone is a command-line program to sync files and directories between local filesystem and various cloud storage providers. It supports over 40 providers like Google Drive, S3, Dropbox, and offers advanced features such as encryption, caching, and mounting.
en.content: The repository contains full source code, documentation, installation scripts, and example configurations. Key directories include cmd (CLI entry), fs (filesystem abstraction), and backend (storage provider implementations).
en.stack: Developed in Go, relying on Go standard library and third-party packages like google-api-go-client and aws-sdk-go.
en.hot: As the benchmark tool for cloud storage sync, Rclone has 58k+ stars with 99 new today, remaining highly active. Its extensive provider support and powerful features make it a top choice for DevOps and data backup.
uses: DevOps engineers — automate cloud storage backup and migration
Individual users — sync and encrypt files across cloud drives
Data administrators — large-scale data archiving and recovery
Developers — integrate into CI/CD pipelines for storage management

zh.tag: 并行AI编码代理的IDE与编排中枢
zh.what: Agent Orchestrator 是一款面向开发者的 Agent IDE，用于统一管理并调度多个 AI 编码代理并行工作。它通过隔离的 Git 工作树为每个代理创建独立会话，自动收集 CI 失败、代码审查意见和合并冲突等反馈，并精准路由给对应代理处理，实现从任务规划到代码合并的全闭环自动化。
zh.content: 包含桌面端应用与 CLI 的双模态入口、基于 Go 构建的本地守护进程（daemon）与后端编排核心，以及用于展示并行会话状态的仪表盘界面。代码围绕“项目管理-会话隔离-代理运行-反馈闭环”四大模块组织。
zh.stack: 以 Go 为主语言构建后端编排引擎与本地守护进程，利用 Git worktree 实现工作区隔离；前端提供桌面可视化仪表盘，并对接 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Kimi Code 等主流终端型编码代理 CLI。
zh.hot: 随着 AI 编码代理从“单兵作战”走向“多代理并行”，开发者急需一个调度中枢来避免分支混乱与终端失控。该项目凭借精准的 CI/Review/冲突自动回环机制，在 Go 领域迅速获得 8.3k+ Stars，单日新增 30 Stars 并跻身 GitHub Trending 日榜前 20，成为多代理协同赛道的早期标杆。
uses: 大型项目维护者 —— 需要同时派发多个独立编码任务给不同 AI 代理并统一收口
高频迭代团队 —— 希望将 CI 失败、Code Review 意见自动回流给对应代理自我修复
AI 工具链集成者 —— 需要在一个面板中调度 Claude Code、Cursor、Kimi 等多种终端代理
全栈开发者 —— 寻求替代手动多终端管理，实现并行开发工作流的自动化编排

en.tag: IDE and orchestration hub for parallel AI coding agents
en.what: Agent Orchestrator is an IDE that lets developers supervise fleets of parallel AI coding agents from a single interface. It spawns each agent in an isolated git worktree, monitors their sessions, and automatically routes CI failures, review comments, and merge conflicts back to the correct agent, turning chaotic multi-agent coding into a managed workflow.
en.content: The repository includes a desktop app and CLI, a local Go daemon and backend orchestration engine, plus a dashboard for tracking parallel agent sessions. It is organized around four modules: project management, session isolation, agent runtime, and feedback loops.
en.stack: Built primarily in Go for the backend orchestration engine and local daemon, using Git worktrees for workspace isolation. It features a desktop frontend dashboard and integrates with terminal-based coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Kimi Code.
en.hot: As AI coding agents shift from solo to parallel execution, developers urgently need a central supervisor to prevent branch chaos and lost terminals. With its tight feedback loops for CI, reviews, and merge conflicts, the project has earned 8.3k+ Stars, adding 30 today and hitting GitHub's Go Daily Trending Top 20 as an early leader in multi-agent orchestration.
uses: Engineering leads running large codebases who need to dispatch isolated coding tasks to multiple AI agents from one hub
Fast-moving teams that want CI failures and review comments automatically routed back to the right agent for self-healing
AI tooling integrators looking to supervise Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Kimi Code agents through a single unified dashboard
Full-stack developers seeking to replace manual multi-terminal management with automated parallel agent orchestration

zh.tag: 轻量自托管个人记账应用
zh.what: ezBookkeeping 是一款轻量级、自托管的个人记账应用，提供友好的界面和强大的记账功能。它支持记录日常交易、从多种来源导入数据，并通过内置图表或自定义查询分析财务趋势。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的后端（Go 语言）和前端（响应式 UI），支持 Docker 一键部署，提供移动端和桌面端优化界面，并集成 AI 功能（收据识别、MCP 协议等）。
zh.stack: 后端使用 Go 语言，支持 SQLite/MySQL/PostgreSQL 数据库，前端为响应式 Web 界面，支持 PWA 和 Docker 部署。
zh.hot: 自托管记账需求旺盛，ezBookkeeping 以轻量、易部署和 AI 功能吸引用户，GitHub 星标 5269，今日新增 12 星，位列 Go 语言日榜第 10。
uses: 个人用户 —— 自托管记账，保护隐私，支持多设备访问
家庭记账 —— 多账户、分类管理，支持图片附件和位置标记
开发者 —— 学习 Go 后端开发或自托管应用架构，可二次开发

en.tag: Lightweight self-hosted personal finance app
en.what: ezBookkeeping is a lightweight, self-hosted personal finance app with a user-friendly interface and powerful bookkeeping features. It helps record daily transactions, import data from various sources, and analyze spending patterns with built-in charts or custom queries.
en.content: The repository contains a complete backend (Go) and responsive frontend, supports one-click Docker deployment, offers mobile and desktop optimized interfaces, and integrates AI features like receipt recognition and MCP protocol.
en.stack: Backend in Go, supports SQLite/MySQL/PostgreSQL, responsive web frontend with PWA support, Docker deployment.
en.hot: Self-hosted bookkeeping is in high demand; ezBookkeeping attracts users with its lightweight design, easy deployment, and AI features. It has 5269 stars, 12 new today, ranking #10 on Go daily trending.
uses: Individual users — self-hosted bookkeeping with privacy and multi-device access
Family budgeting — multi-account, category management with image attachments and location tagging
Developers — learn Go backend development or self-hosted app architecture, customizable

zh.tag: 基于Matrix房间的协作式多智能体运行时平台
zh.what: AgentTeams 是一个开源的多智能体协作运行时平台，基于 Manager-Workers 架构，通过 Matrix 房间实现可控、可审计的智能体协作，全程支持人类可见与干预。它不实现智能体逻辑，而是编排和管理多个智能体容器。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心运行时、Manager 与 Workers 的编排逻辑、Matrix 房间集成、MinIO 共享文件系统，以及 OpenClaw、QwenPaw、Hermes 等多种 Worker 运行时。
zh.stack: 主要语言为 Go，依赖 Matrix 协议、MinIO 文件系统，支持多种 Agent 运行时（OpenClaw、QwenPaw、Hermes）。
zh.hot: 5.1k Stars 且登上 Go 语言日榜，因其创新的 Manager-Workers 架构和人类在环的协作模式，解决了多智能体协调的透明度和可控性痛点。
uses: 企业级多智能体协作场景，需要人类监督和干预
开发者在 Matrix 房间中编排不同运行时（如代码执行、对话）的智能体
研究多智能体系统架构和人类在环协作模式的研究人员

en.tag: Collaborative multi-agent runtime with human-in-the-loop via Matrix rooms
en.what: AgentTeams is an open-source collaborative multi-agent runtime platform. It uses a Manager-Workers architecture to orchestrate multiple agents in Matrix rooms, providing full human visibility and intervention. It does not implement agent logic itself but manages agent containers.
en.content: The repo includes the core runtime, Manager-Workers orchestration, Matrix room integration, MinIO shared file system, and multiple worker runtimes like OpenClaw, QwenPaw, and Hermes.
en.stack: Primarily written in Go, relies on Matrix protocol and MinIO file system, supports multiple agent runtimes (OpenClaw, QwenPaw, Hermes).
en.hot: 5.1k stars and trending on Go daily, driven by its innovative Manager-Workers architecture and human-in-the-loop collaboration, addressing transparency and controllability in multi-agent coordination.
uses: Enterprise multi-agent collaboration requiring human oversight
Developers orchestrating agents of different runtimes (e.g., code execution, dialogue) in Matrix rooms
Researchers studying multi-agent system architecture and human-in-the-loop collaboration

zh.tag: 灵活高效的 Kubernetes 节点自动扩缩容工具
zh.what: Karpenter 是一个开源的 Kubernetes 节点自动扩缩容工具，旨在提高集群运行工作负载的效率和成本效益。它通过监控不可调度的 Pod，自动评估调度约束并快速配置或移除节点，从而优化资源利用。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Karpenter 的核心代码，支持多云提供商（AWS、Azure、GCP 等），提供灵活的节点配置和生命周期管理。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 Kubernetes API 和云提供商 SDK。
zh.hot: Karpenter 因其灵活性和性能在 Kubernetes 社区广受欢迎，拥有 2047 颗星，今日新增 2 颗，位列 Go 语言日榜第 12 名。
uses: Kubernetes 集群管理员 —— 自动化节点扩缩容，降低运维成本
云原生开发者 —— 快速部署和测试工作负载，无需手动管理节点
多云环境用户 —— 通过统一接口管理不同云提供商的节点

en.tag: Flexible, high-performance Kubernetes node autoscaler
en.what: Karpenter is an open-source Kubernetes node autoscaler designed to improve efficiency and cost of running workloads on Kubernetes clusters. It watches for unschedulable pods, evaluates scheduling constraints, and automatically provisions or removes nodes to optimize resource utilization.
en.content: The repository contains core Karpenter code, supporting multiple cloud providers (AWS, Azure, GCP, etc.), with flexible node configuration and lifecycle management.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, relying on Kubernetes API and cloud provider SDKs.
en.hot: Karpenter is popular in the Kubernetes community for its flexibility and performance, with 2047 stars and 2 new stars today, ranking 12th on the Go daily trending list.
uses: Kubernetes cluster administrators — automate node scaling to reduce operational costs
Cloud-native developers — quickly deploy and test workloads without manual node management
Multi-cloud users — manage nodes across different cloud providers via a unified interface

zh.tag: 开源LLM知识平台，集RAG检索、Agent推理与自动Wiki于一体
zh.what: WeKnora 是腾讯开源的面向企业级文档理解与语义检索的 LLM 知识框架。它能将原始文档转化为可查询的 RAG 知识库、自主编排检索与工具调用的推理 Agent，以及可自动维护的互联 Wiki 知识图谱。
zh.content: 仓库以 Go 语言服务端为核心，包含多数据源接入模块、ReAct Agent 引擎、Wiki 自动构建与知识图谱组件，以及可嵌入外部站点的发布部件、Chrome 扩展、运行时任务队列看板与多工作空间 RBAC 企业级管理后台。
zh.stack: 主语言为 Go，后端兼容 20 余种 LLM 提供商，接入 Langfuse 实现全链路可观测，并支持多实例存储后端与飞书、Notion、语雀等企业数据源。
zh.hot: 凭借「RAG + Agent + 自动 Wiki」三位一体的独特定位，WeKnora 在 GitHub 已斩获 18.5k Stars，单日新增 49 Star 并跻身 Go 语言 Trending 日榜第 20 位，成为企业知识管理赛道的瞩目新星。
uses: 企业知识管理团队 —— 需要将飞书/Notion 等分散文档统一为可检索、可推理的中央知识库。
AI 应用开发者 —— 希望快速集成带 RBAC、多租户和可观测性的 RAG 与 Agent 能力。
社区与开源项目维护者 —— 想通过自动 Wiki 与知识图谱降低文档维护成本。
网站运营者 —— 意图通过嵌入部件将智能问答 Agent 发布到外部站点。

en.tag: Open-source LLM knowledge platform unifying RAG, Agent reasoning, and auto-Wiki
en.what: WeKnora is a Tencent open-source, LLM-powered knowledge framework for enterprise-grade document understanding and semantic retrieval. It turns raw documents into a queryable RAG system, an autonomous ReAct agent that orchestrates retrieval and tools, and a self-maintaining interlinked Wiki with an interactive knowledge graph.
en.content: The repository centers on a Go-based server core, featuring multi-source ingestion adapters, a ReAct Agent engine, auto-Wiki and knowledge graph components, plus embeddable site widgets, a Chrome extension, a runtime task-queue dashboard, and enterprise multi-workspace RBAC controls.
en.stack: Primarily written in Go, it integrates with 20+ LLM providers, leverages Langfuse for full observability, and supports multi-instance storage backends alongside enterprise data sources such as Feishu, Notion, and Yuque.
en.hot: Driven by its unique trio of RAG, Agent, and auto-Wiki, WeKnora has earned 18.5k stars on GitHub, adding 49 stars in a single day and hitting 20th place on the Go Trending daily list, making it a rising star in enterprise knowledge management.
uses: Enterprise knowledge teams seeking to unify scattered docs from Feishu/Notion into a centralized, searchable, and reasoning-ready knowledge base.
AI application developers looking to quickly integrate RAG and Agent capabilities with RBAC, multi-tenancy, and observability.
Open-source maintainers and communities wanting to reduce documentation overhead via auto-generated Wiki and knowledge graphs.
Website operators aiming to publish intelligent Q&A agents to external sites through embeddable widgets.

zh.tag: 企业级密钥管理与访问控制平台
zh.what: Vault 是一个用于安全访问密钥（如 API 密钥、密码、证书）的工具，提供统一的密钥管理接口、严格的访问控制和详细的审计日志。它支持静态密钥存储、动态密钥生成、加密即服务和特权访问管理。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Vault 的完整源代码、文档、教程链接以及构建和 CI 配置文件。主要目录包括核心引擎、存储后端、认证方法、审计设备等组件。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 Consul 等存储后端，支持多种认证和审计插件。
zh.hot: 作为 HashiCorp 的核心产品之一，Vault 是云原生安全领域的标杆，拥有 35k+ Stars，本周新增 50 Stars，位列 Go 周榜第 9，持续受到 DevOps 和安全团队的关注。
uses: DevOps 工程师：管理 CI/CD 流水线中的密钥和凭证
安全团队：实现最小权限原则和审计合规
云原生应用：动态生成数据库或云服务凭证
企业 IT：集中管理跨环境的敏感配置

en.tag: Enterprise-grade secrets management, encryption, and privileged access control
en.what: Vault is a tool for securely accessing secrets (e.g., API keys, passwords, certificates), providing a unified interface for secrets management with tight access control and detailed audit logging. It supports static secret storage, dynamic secret generation, encryption as a service, and privileged access management.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of Vault, documentation, tutorial links, and build/CI configuration files. Key directories include core engine, storage backends, auth methods, audit devices, etc.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, relies on storage backends like Consul, and supports various authentication and audit plugins.
en.hot: As a flagship HashiCorp product, Vault is a benchmark in cloud-native security, with 35k+ Stars and 50 new Stars this week, ranking #9 on Go weekly trending. It remains highly relevant for DevOps and security teams.
uses: DevOps engineers: manage secrets and credentials in CI/CD pipelines
Security teams: enforce least-privilege access and audit compliance
Cloud-native apps: dynamically generate database or cloud service credentials
Enterprise IT: centrally manage sensitive configurations across environments

zh.tag: 为AI代理打造终极CLI的元工具
zh.what: CLI Printing Press 是一个元工具，能自动分析任意API的官方文档、社区CLI和未公开接口，融合最佳实践后生成专为AI代理优化的Go CLI、Claude Code技能和MCP服务器。它通过本地SQLite、复合命令和代理原生标志，让代理以最少token消耗高效执行任务。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心生成引擎、已打印的CLI示例（如ESPN、flight-goat、linear-pp-cli）、安装脚本、文档（CODEX.md、CURSOR.md）以及指向完整CLI库的链接。
zh.stack: Go语言开发，依赖SQLite本地存储，支持生成Go CLI、Claude Code技能和MCP服务器。
zh.hot: 今日新增114星，总星数4188，位列Go日榜第5。它解决了AI代理工具链中CLI效率低下的痛点，通过自动融合多源API和最佳实践，大幅降低token消耗，吸引了大量开发者关注。
uses: AI代理开发者：为代理生成高效CLI，减少token浪费
API集成者：快速为任意API创建CLI、MCP服务器或Claude Code技能
效率工具爱好者：使用预打印CLI（如ESPN、flight-goat）快速获取复合查询结果

en.tag: Meta-tool to print the ultimate CLI for AI agents
en.what: CLI Printing Press is a meta-tool that analyzes official API docs, community CLIs, and unpublished endpoints, then fuses best practices to generate a token-efficient Go CLI, Claude Code skill, and MCP server designed for AI agents. It leverages local SQLite, compound commands, and agent-native flags for minimal token spend.
en.content: The repo contains the core generation engine, printed CLI examples (ESPN, flight-goat, linear-pp-cli), installation scripts, documentation (CODEX.md, CURSOR.md), and links to the full CLI library.
en.stack: Built with Go, uses SQLite for local storage, and generates Go CLIs, Claude Code skills, and MCP servers.
en.hot: Gained 114 stars today, total 4188, ranking #5 on Go daily trending. It addresses the inefficiency of CLIs in AI agent toolchains by automatically fusing multiple API sources and best practices, drastically reducing token spend, drawing significant developer interest.
uses: AI agent developers: generate efficient CLIs for agents to minimize token waste
API integrators: quickly create CLIs, MCP servers, or Claude Code skills for any API
Efficiency tool enthusiasts: use pre-printed CLIs (e.g., ESPN, flight-goat) for compound queries

zh.tag: 持续性能分析平台，定位代码级性能瓶颈
zh.what: Grafana Pyroscope 是一个持续性能分析平台，帮助开发者主动或被动地发现应用中的性能瓶颈，如 CPU、内存和 I/O 问题。它能够将性能问题定位到具体代码行，支持快速排查和优化。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Pyroscope 服务器（负责存储和处理 profiling 数据）、多种语言 SDK（用于采集数据）以及 Grafana 集成插件。v2 架构默认将数据直接写入对象存储，简化运维并降低资源消耗。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖对象存储（如 S3、GCS）作为后端，支持多种语言 SDK（如 Go、Java、Python、Ruby 等），与 Grafana 深度集成。
zh.hot: Pyroscope 2.0 发布，采用全新 v2 架构，简化运维并降低大规模使用时的资源消耗，吸引了大量关注。当前 11564 Stars，日增 6，在 Go 语言日榜排名第 16。
uses: 后端开发人员 —— 主动优化应用 CPU、内存等资源消耗，提升性能
SRE/运维工程师 —— 快速定位生产环境中的性能瓶颈，缩短故障排查时间
技术管理者 —— 通过持续性能分析降低基础设施成本，提升系统稳定性

en.tag: Continuous profiling platform to pinpoint code-level performance issues
en.what: Grafana Pyroscope is a continuous profiling platform that helps developers proactively and reactively identify performance bottlenecks in applications, such as CPU, memory, and I/O issues. It pinpoints performance problems down to specific lines of code, enabling rapid debugging and optimization.
en.content: The repository includes the Pyroscope server (for storing and processing profiling data), SDKs for multiple languages, and Grafana integration plugins. The v2 architecture writes data directly to object storage by default, simplifying operations and reducing resource usage.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, relies on object storage (e.g., S3, GCS) as backend, supports SDKs for multiple languages (Go, Java, Python, Ruby, etc.), and deeply integrates with Grafana.
en.hot: The release of Pyroscope 2.0 with a new v2 architecture simplifies operations and reduces resource usage at scale, drawing significant attention. Currently 11,564 stars (+6 today), ranked #16 on Go daily trending.
uses: Backend developers — proactively optimize CPU, memory, and other resource usage to improve application performance
SRE/ops engineers — quickly pinpoint performance bottlenecks in production, reducing troubleshooting time
Tech leads — leverage continuous profiling to reduce infrastructure costs and improve system stability

zh.tag: 自托管虚拟浏览器，支持多人实时协作与观看派对
zh.what: Neko 是一个基于 Docker 的自托管虚拟浏览器，通过 WebRTC 实现低延迟的远程浏览体验。它允许多个用户同时访问同一个浏览器环境，适合安全浏览、团队协作、观看派对等场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Docker 镜像、WebRTC 信令服务器、基于 Go 的后端以及可定制的 Web 客户端界面。支持文件上传下载、剪贴板共享、音频/视频流等特性。
zh.stack: 后端使用 Go 语言，前端基于 React，通信采用 WebRTC 和 WebSocket。依赖 Docker 运行，支持 x86_64 和 arm64 架构。
zh.hot: 自托管虚拟浏览器需求旺盛，尤其适合隐私敏感用户和团队协作场景。21k+ Stars 和持续增长的趋势表明其解决了远程浏览与共享的痛点。
uses: 隐私安全浏览 —— 在隔离环境中访问互联网，避免本地追踪
团队协作 —— 多人共享同一浏览器，用于演示、测试或共同浏览
观看派对 —— 同步观看视频或直播，支持实时互动
远程工作 —— 从任何设备访问统一的浏览器工作环境

en.tag: Self-hosted virtual browser with WebRTC, multi-user collaboration & watch parties
en.what: Neko is a self-hosted virtual browser running in Docker, leveraging WebRTC for low-latency remote browsing. It enables multiple users to simultaneously access the same browser environment, ideal for secure browsing, team collaboration, and watch parties.
en.content: The repository includes Docker images, a WebRTC signaling server, a Go backend, and a customizable web client. Features include file upload/download, clipboard sharing, and audio/video streaming.
en.stack: Backend in Go, frontend in React, communication via WebRTC and WebSocket. Runs on Docker, supports x86_64 and arm64.
en.hot: High demand for self-hosted virtual browsers, especially for privacy-conscious users and team collaboration. 21k+ stars and trending growth show it addresses remote browsing and sharing pain points.
uses: Privacy-focused browsing — access the internet in an isolated environment to avoid local tracking
Team collaboration — share a browser session for demos, testing, or co-browsing
Watch parties — synchronize video or live streaming with real-time interaction
Remote work — access a unified browser workspace from any device

zh.tag: 托管控制平面的 OpenShift 集群管理中间件
zh.what: HyperShift 是一个用于大规模托管 OpenShift 控制平面的中间件，解决成本、部署时间和跨云可移植性问题。它实现管理与工作负载的强分离，集群完全兼容 OpenShift Container Platform。
zh.content: 仓库包含 HyperShift 的源代码、文档和示例，包括控制平面托管、集群生命周期管理等功能模块。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 Kubernetes 和 OpenShift 生态。
zh.hot: 虽然今日新增 0 星，但总星数 536 且进入 Go 语言日榜，说明其作为 OpenShift 核心组件持续受到关注。
uses: OpenShift 平台管理员 —— 大规模管理集群控制平面，降低成本与部署时间
云原生架构师 —— 实现跨云集群可移植性与管理/工作负载分离
Kubernetes 高级用户 —— 探索托管控制平面模式

en.tag: Middleware for hosting OpenShift control planes at scale
en.what: HyperShift is a middleware for hosting OpenShift control planes at scale, addressing cost, provisioning time, and cross-cloud portability. It provides strong separation between management and workloads, and clusters are fully compliant with OpenShift Container Platform.
en.content: The repository contains source code, documentation, and examples for HyperShift, including control plane hosting and cluster lifecycle management.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, relying on Kubernetes and OpenShift ecosystem.
en.hot: Despite 0 stars today, 536 total stars and ranking on Go daily trending indicate sustained interest as a core OpenShift component.
uses: OpenShift platform administrators — manage cluster control planes at scale, reducing cost and provisioning time
Cloud-native architects — achieve cross-cloud portability and separation of management/workloads
Advanced Kubernetes users — explore hosted control plane patterns

zh.tag: 多协议代理面板，Xray 管理利器
zh.what: 3X-UI 是一个开源的 Xray 核心 Web 控制面板，支持部署、配置和监控多种代理与 VPN 协议。它提供多语言界面、客户端流量统计、到期日限制、IP 限制等功能，适合个人或小规模部署。
zh.content: 仓库包含面板的完整源代码、多语言文档、Docker 部署脚本、Telegram 机器人集成以及 RESTful API 文档。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言开发，使用 Xray-core 作为代理引擎，前端采用 Vue.js，数据库支持 SQLite 和 MySQL。
zh.hot: 拥有 43k+ Star，今日新增 70，因其丰富的协议支持、易用的 Web 界面和活跃的社区维护而广受欢迎。
uses: 个人或小团队搭建代理服务器，管理多用户和流量
需要多协议支持（如 VLESS、Trojan、WireGuard）的 VPN 服务
通过 Telegram 机器人远程监控和管理代理节点

en.tag: Multi-protocol proxy panel for Xray management
en.what: 3X-UI is an open-source web control panel for Xray-core, enabling deployment, configuration, and monitoring of multiple proxy and VPN protocols. It offers a multi-language interface, per-client traffic statistics, expiry and IP limits, suitable for personal or small-scale deployments.
en.content: The repository includes full panel source code, multi-language documentation, Docker deployment scripts, Telegram bot integration, and RESTful API documentation.
en.stack: Developed in Go, powered by Xray-core, with a Vue.js frontend and support for SQLite and MySQL databases.
en.hot: With 43k+ stars and 70 new today, it's popular for its extensive protocol support, user-friendly web interface, and active community maintenance.
uses: Individuals or small teams setting up proxy servers with multi-user and traffic management
VPN services requiring multi-protocol support (e.g., VLESS, Trojan, WireGuard)
Remote monitoring and management of proxy nodes via Telegram bot

zh.tag: C/C++ 语音转文字推理库，支持 16+ 模型家族
zh.what: transcribe.cpp 是一个基于 ggml 的 C/C++ 语音转文字推理库，支持 16 个模型家族、60 多种变体，包括 Parakeet、Whisper、Canary、Qwen3-ASR 等。它提供 Metal、Vulkan、CUDA 后端加速 GPU 推理，以及 tinyBLAS 加速的 CPU 路径，支持流式和批量处理。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心推理库、每个模型的文档（含 WER 验证）、示例代码和模型转换工具。所有模型均经过数值验证和 WER 测试，发布在 handy-computer 的 Hugging Face 组织下。
zh.stack: 技术栈：C/C++、ggml（运行时）、GGUF（模型格式）、Metal/Vulkan/CUDA（GPU 后端）、tinyBLAS（CPU 加速）。依赖：CMake、可选 GPU SDK。
zh.hot: 今日新增 395 星，总星数 1292，位列 GitHub Trending 日榜第 20 名。它填补了 ggml 生态中语音转文字推理的空白，支持大量模型且性能优异，吸引了 STT 开发者和 ggml 社区关注。
uses: 语音转文字应用开发者 —— 快速集成多种 STT 模型到 C/C++ 项目
边缘设备部署 —— 利用 ggml 的轻量特性在 CPU/GPU 上运行
模型研究者 —— 对比不同 STT 模型的 WER 和性能
ggml 生态用户 —— 扩展 ggml 到语音领域

en.tag: C/C++ speech-to-text inference library supporting 16+ model families via GGUF/ggml
en.what: transcribe.cpp is a C/C++ speech-to-text inference library built on ggml, supporting 16 model families and 60+ variants including Parakeet, Whisper, Canary, Qwen3-ASR, and more. It offers Metal, Vulkan, and CUDA backends for fast GPU inference plus a tinyBLAS-accelerated CPU path, with streaming and batch processing.
en.content: The repo includes the core inference library, per-model documentation with WER verification, example code, and model conversion tools. All models are numerically verified and WER-tested, published under the handy-computer Hugging Face organization.
en.stack: Tech stack: C/C++, ggml (runtime), GGUF (model format), Metal/Vulkan/CUDA (GPU backends), tinyBLAS (CPU acceleration). Dependencies: CMake, optional GPU SDKs.
en.hot: Gained 395 stars today, total 1292, ranked #20 on GitHub Trending daily. It fills a gap in the ggml ecosystem for speech-to-text inference, supporting a wide range of models with excellent performance, attracting STT developers and the ggml community.
uses: STT application developers — quickly integrate diverse STT models into C/C++ projects
Edge device deployment — leverage ggml's lightweight nature on CPU/GPU
Model researchers — compare WER and performance across STT models
ggml ecosystem users — extend ggml to the speech domain

zh.tag: 用树莓派 DIY 无线 Android Auto 适配器
zh.what: 该项目利用树莓派制作一个无线 Android Auto 适配器，让仅支持有线 Android Auto 的汽车实现无线连接。无需在手机上安装额外应用，启动快，连接稳定。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Buildroot 配置和脚本，用于生成 SD 卡镜像；还提供预编译镜像下载、配置文件和安装指南。
zh.stack: 基于 Buildroot 构建，支持多种树莓派板（Zero W/2W/3A+/4），依赖 USB OTG、WiFi 和蓝牙。
zh.hot: 解决了有线 Android Auto 用户的痛点，提供低成本 DIY 方案，今日新增 17 星，在 C++ 日榜排名第 3。
uses: 汽车爱好者 —— 想为爱车增加无线 Android Auto 功能
树莓派玩家 —— 喜欢 DIY 和嵌入式项目
Android Auto 用户 —— 厌倦了每次上车插线

en.tag: DIY Wireless Android Auto adapter using Raspberry Pi
en.what: This project turns a Raspberry Pi into a wireless Android Auto adapter, enabling wireless Android Auto in cars that only support wired connections. No extra app needed on the phone, fast bootup, and stable connection.
en.content: The repository contains Buildroot setup and scripts to generate an SD card image, along with pre-built images, configuration files, and installation instructions.
en.stack: Built with Buildroot, supports multiple Raspberry Pi boards (Zero W/2W/3A+/4), relies on USB OTG, WiFi, and Bluetooth.
en.hot: Solves a pain point for wired Android Auto users with a low-cost DIY solution, gaining 17 stars today and ranking 3rd in C++ daily trending.
uses: Car enthusiasts — want to add wireless Android Auto to their vehicle
Raspberry Pi hobbyists — enjoy DIY and embedded projects
Android Auto users — tired of plugging in every time

zh.tag: 实时分析型列式数据库管理系统
zh.what: ClickHouse 是一个开源的列式数据库管理系统，专为实时生成分析数据报告而设计。它支持高性能的 SQL 查询，适用于大规模数据的在线分析处理（OLAP）场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含 ClickHouse 数据库的完整源代码，包括核心引擎、SQL 解析器、存储和计算组件，以及安装脚本、文档和示例。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 开发，依赖 LLVM、libcxx、zlib-ng 等高性能库，支持 Linux、macOS 和 FreeBSD。
zh.hot: ClickHouse 是实时分析领域的标杆项目，拥有 48,764 星，今日新增 16 星，位列 C++ 日榜第 4。其高性能和易用性持续吸引大量开发者。
uses: 数据分析师和工程师 —— 用于构建实时数据仓库和报表系统
SaaS 和互联网公司 —— 处理海量用户行为日志和业务指标
DevOps 和 SRE —— 监控和可观测性数据的存储与查询
学术研究 —— 探索列式存储和查询优化技术

en.tag: Real-time analytics column-oriented DBMS
en.what: ClickHouse is an open-source column-oriented database management system designed for real-time analytical data reporting. It supports high-performance SQL queries and is ideal for online analytical processing (OLAP) on large-scale data.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of ClickHouse, including core engine, SQL parser, storage and compute components, along with installation scripts, documentation, and examples.
en.stack: Primarily developed in C++, with dependencies on high-performance libraries like LLVM, libcxx, zlib-ng, supporting Linux, macOS, and FreeBSD.
en.hot: ClickHouse is a benchmark project in real-time analytics, with 48,764 stars and 16 new stars today, ranking 4th on the C++ daily trending list. Its high performance and ease of use continue to attract a large number of developers.
uses: Data analysts and engineers — for building real-time data warehouses and reporting systems
SaaS and internet companies — processing massive user behavior logs and business metrics
DevOps and SRE — storing and querying monitoring and observability data
Academic research — exploring columnar storage and query optimization techniques

zh.tag: 比特币官方核心客户端与全节点验证软件
zh.what: Bitcoin Core 是比特币网络的官方参考实现，负责连接 P2P 网络、下载并完整验证所有区块与交易。它还内置了钱包功能与可选的图形界面，为用户提供完整的比特币交互能力。作为集成与 staging 仓库，它承载了比特币协议最新的开发与稳定代码。
zh.content: 仓库包含比特币协议的核心源码（共识、网络、验证、钱包、GUI），以及构建脚本、测试套件（C++ 单元测试与 Python 功能/回归测试）和开发文档。master 分支为日常开发主线，release 分支与标签用于标记稳定版本，GUI 开发曾在独立仓库进行。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 编写，依赖 Boost、Qt（可选 GUI）、SQLite/Berkeley DB（钱包）、libsecp256k1 等密码学与网络库。构建系统采用 Autotools，并支持跨平台编译（Windows、Linux、macOS），测试依赖 Python 框架。
zh.hot: 作为比特币网络的官方参考实现，它是区块链领域最具权威性的开源项目之一，拥有近 9 万 Star 的庞大社区认可。本月新增 550 Star 并跻身 GitHub C++ 月榜第 14 名，反映出市场对比特币底层技术持续的高关注度与开发者对协议改进的活跃参与。
uses: 区块链开发者——研究比特币协议共识、网络通信与验证逻辑的参考实现。
节点运维者——部署全节点以独立验证交易、增强网络去中心化与安全性。
安全研究人员——审计核心代码、测试升级补丁或进行密码学相关实验。
加密货币从业者——集成钱包功能或构建基于比特币网络的衍生应用。

en.tag: Bitcoin's official core client and full-node validation software
en.what: Bitcoin Core is the reference implementation of the Bitcoin protocol, connecting to the peer-to-peer network to download and fully validate blocks and transactions. It also includes an integrated wallet and an optional graphical user interface for end-user interaction. As the integration and staging tree, it hosts both the latest development and stable release code for the Bitcoin network.
en.content: The repository contains the core protocol source (consensus, networking, validation, wallet, GUI), build scripts, test suites (C++ unit tests and Python functional/regression tests), and extensive developer documentation. The master branch serves as the daily integration branch, while release branches and tags mark stable versions, with GUI development maintained in a separate repository.
en.stack: Primarily written in C++, it depends on Boost, Qt (optional GUI), SQLite/Berkeley DB (wallet), libsecp256k1, and other cryptographic/networking libraries. It uses Autotools for building, supports cross-platform compilation on Windows, Linux, and macOS, and leverages Python frameworks for functional testing.
en.hot: As the authoritative reference implementation of the Bitcoin network, it commands nearly 90k stars, reflecting massive community trust. Its addition of 550 stars this month and rank at #14 on GitHub's monthly C++ Trending list signal sustained mainstream interest and active developer engagement in protocol-level improvements.
uses: Blockchain developers — studying the reference implementation of Bitcoin consensus, networking, and validation logic.
Node operators — running full nodes to independently verify transactions and strengthen network decentralization.
Security researchers — auditing core code, testing upgrade patches, and conducting cryptographic experiments.
Crypto builders — integrating wallet functionality or developing applications atop the Bitcoin network.

zh.tag: 在 Windows 上原生运行 Linux 工具和应用的兼容层
zh.what: WSL 允许用户在 Windows 上直接运行未经修改的 Linux 命令行工具、实用程序和应用程序，无需传统虚拟机或双系统启动的开销。它提供了一个兼容层，使 Linux 二进制文件能在 Windows 上原生执行。
zh.content: 仓库包含 WSL 的源代码、构建脚本、文档和贡献指南。主要组件包括内核接口、系统调用映射和与 Windows 的集成层。
zh.stack: 主要用 C++ 开发，依赖 Linux 内核（在 WSL2 中）和 Windows 系统 API。构建需要 Visual Studio 和 Windows SDK。
zh.hot: WSL 是微软推动 Windows 成为开发者友好平台的核心项目，拥有 33k+ 星标，持续活跃。它消除了 Windows 和 Linux 之间的壁垒，深受开发者喜爱。
uses: Windows 开发者 —— 在 Windows 上使用 Linux 命令行工具和脚本
跨平台开发 —— 无需虚拟机即可构建和测试 Linux 应用
DevOps 工程师 —— 在 Windows 上运行 Linux 容器和 CI/CD 工具
学生和爱好者 —— 学习 Linux 环境而不离开 Windows

en.tag: Run Linux command-line tools and apps directly on Windows, without a VM
en.what: WSL lets you run unmodified Linux command-line tools, utilities, and applications directly on Windows, without the overhead of a traditional VM or dual boot. It provides a compatibility layer for native execution of Linux binaries.
en.content: The repository contains WSL source code, build scripts, documentation, and contribution guidelines. Key components include kernel interface, syscall mapping, and Windows integration layer.
en.stack: Primarily developed in C++, relies on the Linux kernel (in WSL2) and Windows system APIs. Building requires Visual Studio and Windows SDK.
en.hot: WSL is Microsoft's flagship project to make Windows developer-friendly, with 33k+ stars and ongoing activity. It removes barriers between Windows and Linux, beloved by developers.
uses: Windows developers — use Linux command-line tools and scripts on Windows
Cross-platform developers — build and test Linux apps without a VM
DevOps engineers — run Linux containers and CI/CD tools on Windows
Students and enthusiasts — learn Linux environment without leaving Windows

zh.tag: 低延迟语音 AI 工具包，构建实时语音代理
zh.what: Moonshine Voice 是一个开源 AI 工具包，用于构建实时语音代理和界面。它提供语音转文本、意图识别和文本转语音功能，所有处理均在设备端完成，确保低延迟和隐私保护。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心库、预训练模型、跨平台示例应用（iOS、Android、macOS、Windows、Raspberry Pi 等）以及微控制器部署支持。提供高级 API 用于转录、TTS、语音克隆、说话人识别和对话代理。
zh.stack: 主要语言为 C++，支持 Python、iOS、Android、macOS、Linux、Windows 等多平台。模型基于 PyTorch 训练，推理使用 ONNX Runtime 或自定义引擎。
zh.hot: 凭借极低延迟（优于 Whisper）和完全本地运行的特点，吸引了近万 Star，今日新增 282，适合隐私敏感和实时场景。
uses: 语音助手开发者 —— 快速集成低延迟 STT/TTS 到应用中
边缘设备开发者 —— 在 Raspberry Pi、微控制器上部署语音 AI
隐私敏感场景 —— 医疗、金融等需要本地处理的语音应用
多语言语音应用 —— 支持中英西日韩等多语种 STT 和 TTS

en.tag: Low-latency speech AI toolkit for building real-time voice agents
en.what: Moonshine Voice is an open-source AI toolkit for building real-time voice agents and interfaces. It offers speech-to-text, intent recognition, and text-to-speech, all running on-device for low latency and privacy.
en.content: The repo includes the core library, pre-trained models, cross-platform example apps (iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, Raspberry Pi, etc.), and microcontroller deployment support. High-level APIs for transcription, TTS, voice cloning, speaker diarization, and conversational agents.
en.stack: Primarily C++, with bindings for Python, iOS, Android, macOS, Linux, Windows. Models trained with PyTorch, inference via ONNX Runtime or custom engine.
en.hot: With ultra-low latency (outperforming Whisper) and fully on-device processing, it has gained nearly 10K stars (+282 today), appealing to privacy-conscious and real-time applications.
uses: Voice assistant developers — integrate low-latency STT/TTS into apps
Edge device developers — deploy voice AI on Raspberry Pi, microcontrollers
Privacy-sensitive scenarios — medical, finance requiring on-device processing
Multilingual voice apps — STT/TTS supporting English, Chinese, Spanish, Japanese, etc.

zh.tag: 开源、快速、容错的模糊搜索引擎，Algolia 替代品
zh.what: Typesense 是一个开源的内存模糊搜索引擎，专为构建出色的搜索体验而设计。它提供比 Elasticsearch 更易用的 API，同时作为 Algolia 的替代方案，支持全文搜索、容错、排序和过滤等功能。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Typesense 搜索引擎的 C++ 源码、Docker 镜像、文档和多个大型数据集的实时演示（如 3200 万首歌曲、2800 万本书籍）。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 开发，依赖内存存储实现高速搜索，支持 Docker 部署，提供 RESTful API。
zh.hot: 作为 Algolia 和 Elasticsearch 的开源替代，Typesense 凭借其易用性和高性能吸引了大量关注，目前在 GitHub 上拥有 26342 颗星，日增 8 星，位列 C++ 日榜第 8 名。
uses: 开发者：需要为网站或应用添加快速、容错的全文搜索功能
SaaS 产品：希望自建搜索服务，避免依赖第三方付费 API
数据密集型应用：需要处理百万级到亿级数据集的搜索场景

en.tag: Open-source, fast, typo-tolerant fuzzy search engine, an alternative to Algolia and Elasticsearch
en.what: Typesense is an open-source, in-memory fuzzy search engine designed for building delightful search experiences. It offers an easier-to-use API than Elasticsearch and serves as an alternative to Algolia, supporting full-text search, typo tolerance, sorting, and filtering.
en.content: The repository contains the C++ source code of the Typesense search engine, Docker images, documentation, and live demos on large datasets (e.g., 32M songs, 28M books).
en.stack: Primarily developed in C++, relies on in-memory storage for high-speed search, supports Docker deployment, and provides a RESTful API.
en.hot: As an open-source alternative to Algolia and Elasticsearch, Typesense has gained significant traction for its ease of use and high performance, with 26,342 stars on GitHub and 8 new stars today, ranking 8th on the C++ daily trending list.
uses: Developers: need to add fast, typo-tolerant full-text search to websites or apps
SaaS products: want to self-host search services to avoid third-party paid APIs
Data-intensive applications: need to handle search on datasets ranging from millions to billions of records

zh.tag: 高效梯度提升框架，轻量级分布式机器学习
zh.what: LightGBM 是一个基于决策树的高性能梯度提升框架，支持 GBT、GBDT、GBRT 等算法，用于排序、分类、回归等任务。它以其高效性和低内存占用著称，特别适合大规模数据场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含 C++ 核心实现、Python/R/CUDA 等语言包、SWIG 封装、文档及示例。提供完整的构建脚本、测试套件和持续集成配置。
zh.stack: 核心使用 C++ 实现，支持 Python、R、Java、C# 等接口，依赖 CUDA 进行 GPU 加速。构建系统支持 CMake，包管理使用 pip/conda。
zh.hot: LightGBM 是业界广泛使用的经典框架，今日新增 17 星，位列 C++ 日榜第 3。近期仓库从 Microsoft 迁移至 lightgbm-org，引发社区关注。
uses: 数据科学家和机器学习工程师用于快速构建高精度模型
处理大规模表格数据，如点击率预测、广告排序
竞赛选手用于 Kaggle 等比赛，因其高效和易用性
企业用于生产环境中的实时推理和批量预测

en.tag: Fast, distributed gradient boosting framework for ML
en.what: LightGBM is a high-performance gradient boosting framework based on decision tree algorithms, supporting GBT, GBDT, GBRT, etc., for ranking, classification, regression, and other ML tasks. It is known for its efficiency and low memory usage, especially for large-scale data.
en.content: The repo includes C++ core implementation, Python/R/CUDA packages, SWIG wrappers, documentation, and examples. It provides build scripts, test suites, and CI configurations.
en.stack: Core implemented in C++, with interfaces for Python, R, Java, C#, etc. Supports GPU acceleration via CUDA. Build system uses CMake, package management via pip/conda.
en.hot: LightGBM is a widely-used classic framework, gaining 17 stars today and ranking #3 on C++ daily trending. Recent repo migration from Microsoft to lightgbm-org attracted community attention.
uses: Data scientists and ML engineers for rapid high-accuracy model building
Large-scale tabular data tasks like CTR prediction and ad ranking
Competition participants for Kaggle due to efficiency and ease of use
Enterprises for real-time inference and batch prediction in production

zh.tag: 微软开源的新版 Windows 终端与控制台主机
zh.what: Windows Terminal 是一个现代、快速、高效、强大且高效的终端应用程序，适用于命令行工具和 shell（如命令提示符、PowerShell 和 WSL）。它同时包含原始的 Windows 控制台主机 conhost.exe。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Windows Terminal、Windows Terminal Preview、控制台主机 conhost.exe 以及两者共享的组件，还有 ColorTool 和示例项目。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 开发，依赖 Windows 10 2004 及以上版本，支持通过 Microsoft Store、GitHub、winget、Chocolatey 和 Scoop 安装。
zh.hot: 作为微软官方开源项目，拥有超过 10 万 Star，今日新增 232，持续受到开发者关注，因为它提供了现代化的终端体验并替代了旧版控制台。
uses: Windows 开发者 —— 需要一个功能丰富的现代终端来运行命令行工具和 shell
系统管理员 —— 管理多个命令行环境，如 PowerShell、CMD 和 WSL
开源贡献者 —— 希望参与 Windows 终端或控制台主机的开发

en.tag: Microsoft's open-source new Windows Terminal and console host
en.what: Windows Terminal is a modern, fast, efficient, powerful, and productive terminal application for users of command-line tools and shells like Command Prompt, PowerShell, and WSL. It also includes the original Windows console host (conhost.exe).
en.content: The repo contains Windows Terminal, Windows Terminal Preview, the console host conhost.exe, shared components, ColorTool, and sample projects.
en.stack: Primarily developed in C++, requires Windows 10 2004 or later, and can be installed via Microsoft Store, GitHub, winget, Chocolatey, and Scoop.
en.hot: As an official Microsoft open-source project with over 100k stars and 232 new stars today, it remains popular for providing a modern terminal experience and replacing the legacy console.
uses: Windows developers — need a feature-rich modern terminal for command-line tools and shells
System administrators — manage multiple command-line environments like PowerShell, CMD, and WSL
Open-source contributors — want to contribute to Windows Terminal or console host development

zh.tag: Google 开源的端到端机器学习框架与生态平台
zh.what: TensorFlow 是 Google 开发的端到端开源机器学习平台，提供从研究到生产部署的完整工具链与库生态。它让研究者能够推进机器学习前沿，也让开发者轻松构建和部署 AI 驱动的应用。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 C++ 运行时、Python 与 C++ API、Keras 高级接口，以及 TensorFlow Lite、TensorFlow.js 等跨平台推理部署工具和丰富的官方示例。
zh.stack: 以 C++ 构建高性能计算后端，通过 Python 提供主要前端接口；支持 CUDA GPU 加速、Bazel 构建系统及 Docker 部署，并提供多语言绑定。
zh.hot: 作为深度学习领域最具影响力的基础框架之一，TensorFlow 凭借 196,329 星（本周新增 365 颗）和工业级稳定性，持续获得学术界与工业界的广泛采用。
uses: 机器学习研究者 —— 需要灵活底层接口进行模型创新与算法实验
AI 应用开发者 —— 希望借助 Keras 和 TF Lite 快速训练并部署到端侧或服务器
工程团队 —— 寻求从训练到推理的规模化、可移植生产流水线
高校学生 —— 学习深度学习原理与工程实践的首选框架之一

en.tag: Google's end-to-end open-source ML framework and ecosystem
en.what: TensorFlow is an end-to-end open-source machine learning platform developed by Google, offering a comprehensive toolchain and library ecosystem from research to production. It enables researchers to push the state-of-the-art in ML while allowing developers to easily build and deploy AI-powered applications.
en.content: The repository contains the core C++ runtime, Python and C++ APIs, the Keras high-level interface, plus cross-platform deployment tools like TensorFlow Lite and TensorFlow.js along with extensive official examples.
en.stack: Built on C++ for a high-performance compute backend with Python as the primary frontend; it supports CUDA GPU acceleration, Bazel builds, Docker deployment, and multi-language bindings.
en.hot: As one of the most influential foundational deep-learning frameworks, TensorFlow maintains strong momentum with 196,329 stars and 365 new stars this week, reflecting broad academic and industrial adoption for its production-grade stability.
uses: ML researchers —— who need flexible low-level APIs for model innovation and algorithmic experiments
AI application developers —— looking to quickly train and deploy models to mobile, edge, or server via Keras and TF Lite
Engineering teams —— seeking scalable, portable production pipelines from training to inference
Students and educators —— using it as a primary framework to learn deep-learning concepts and engineering practices

zh.tag: 为逆向工程师和程序员打造的现代化十六进制编辑器
zh.what: ImHex 是一款功能强大的十六进制编辑器，专为逆向工程、编程和数据分析设计。它提供了丰富的特性，如模式搜索、数据可视化、脚本支持等，帮助用户高效地分析和编辑二进制文件。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 ImHex 源代码、构建脚本、文档和插件系统。支持多种平台（Windows、macOS、Linux）以及 Web 版本，并提供了丰富的主题和自定义选项。
zh.stack: 使用 C++ 开发，依赖 Capstone、nlohmann/json、yara 等库，支持通过插件扩展功能。
zh.hot: ImHex 凭借其现代化的界面和强大的功能，在逆向工程社区中广受欢迎，拥有超过 5.4 万颗星标。今日新增 20 星，持续活跃。
uses: 逆向工程师 —— 分析二进制文件、固件和恶意软件
程序员 —— 调试和检查二进制数据
安全研究人员 —— 漏洞分析和数据取证

en.tag: A modern hex editor for reverse engineers and programmers
en.what: ImHex is a powerful hex editor designed for reverse engineering, programming, and data analysis. It offers features like pattern searching, data visualization, and scripting support to help users efficiently analyze and edit binary files.
en.content: The repository contains the full ImHex source code, build scripts, documentation, and a plugin system. It supports multiple platforms (Windows, macOS, Linux) and a web version, with extensive theming and customization options.
en.stack: Developed in C++, with dependencies on Capstone, nlohmann/json, yara, and others. Supports extensibility via plugins.
en.hot: With its modern interface and powerful features, ImHex has gained popularity in the reverse engineering community, amassing over 54,000 stars. It continues to be actively developed with 20 new stars today.
uses: Reverse engineers — analyze binaries, firmware, and malware
Programmers — debug and inspect binary data
Security researchers — vulnerability analysis and digital forensics

zh.tag: 明日方舟全自动日常助手，一键长草
zh.what: 基于图像识别的明日方舟游戏小助手，能自动完成理智作战、基建换班、公招、访问好友等全部日常任务。支持多客户端（官服、B服、国际服等）和多平台（Windows/Linux/macOS）。
zh.content: 仓库包含 C++ 核心引擎、GUI 界面、文档及多语言支持。提供预编译二进制包，支持通过 C/Python/Java/Rust/Golang 等接口集成。
zh.stack: C++20 核心，依赖 OpenCV 进行图像识别，支持 Windows/Linux/macOS 跨平台。
zh.hot: 拥有 2.2 万 Star，长期活跃更新，是明日方舟玩家社区最知名的自动化工具，每日新增 Star 稳定。
uses: 明日方舟玩家：自动完成日常任务，节省时间
脚本开发者：通过多语言接口集成到自己的工具链
游戏效率党：利用智能基建换班和掉落统计优化资源

en.tag: One-click Arknights daily assistant for auto-farming and base management
en.what: An image-recognition-based assistant for Arknights that automates daily tasks including auto-battle, base management, recruitment, friend visits, and more. Supports multiple clients (CN, Global, etc.) and platforms (Windows/Linux/macOS).
en.content: Repository includes C++ core engine, GUI, documentation, and multilingual support. Pre-built binaries available, with integration APIs for C, Python, Java, Rust, Golang, etc.
en.stack: C++20 core with OpenCV for image recognition, cross-platform support for Windows/Linux/macOS.
en.hot: With 22K stars and consistent daily growth, it's the most popular automation tool in the Arknights community, known for active updates and reliability.
uses: Arknights players: Automate daily tasks to save time
Script developers: Integrate via multi-language APIs into custom workflows
Efficiency enthusiasts: Optimize resource management with smart base scheduling and drop tracking

zh.tag: 跨平台机器学习解决方案，用于实时媒体处理
zh.what: MediaPipe 是 Google 开源的跨平台机器学习解决方案框架，专为实时和流媒体场景设计。它提供了一系列预训练模型和工具，帮助开发者轻松将 AI/ML 功能集成到移动端、Web、桌面及边缘设备中。
zh.content: 仓库包含 MediaPipe Tasks（跨平台 API）、预训练模型、Model Maker（模型定制工具）和 Studio（浏览器内可视化评估工具）。支持视觉、文本、音频等多种任务。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 实现核心框架，提供 Python、JavaScript、Android 和 iOS 的 API 接口。依赖 TensorFlow Lite 等推理引擎。
zh.hot: MediaPipe 是 Google 官方维护的成熟项目，拥有 36k+ Stars，长期活跃。其易用性和跨平台能力使其成为移动端和边缘设备上部署 ML 的首选方案之一。
uses: 移动端开发者：在 Android/iOS 应用中快速集成人脸检测、手势识别等 ML 功能
Web 开发者：通过 JavaScript API 在浏览器中运行实时 ML 模型
边缘计算工程师：在 IoT 设备上部署轻量级 ML 解决方案
AI 研究者：使用 Model Maker 定制模型，并通过 Studio 进行可视化评估

en.tag: Cross-platform ML solutions for live and streaming media
en.what: MediaPipe is an open-source cross-platform ML solutions framework by Google, designed for live and streaming media. It offers pre-trained models and tools to easily integrate AI/ML capabilities into mobile, web, desktop, and edge devices.
en.content: The repo includes MediaPipe Tasks (cross-platform APIs), pre-trained models, Model Maker (customization tool), and Studio (in-browser visualization). Supports vision, text, and audio tasks.
en.stack: Core framework in C++, with APIs for Python, JavaScript, Android, and iOS. Relies on TensorFlow Lite and other inference engines.
en.hot: MediaPipe is a mature Google-maintained project with 36k+ Stars and long-term activity. Its ease of use and cross-platform capability make it a top choice for deploying ML on mobile and edge devices.
uses: Mobile developers: quickly integrate face detection, gesture recognition, etc. into Android/iOS apps
Web developers: run real-time ML models in browsers via JavaScript API
Edge computing engineers: deploy lightweight ML solutions on IoT devices
AI researchers: customize models with Model Maker and evaluate via Studio

zh.tag: 跨平台自动四边形网格重构工具
zh.what: AutoRemesher 是一个跨平台的自动四边形网格重构工具，能将高多边形网格转换为干净的四边形拓扑结构。它基于 Geogram、libigl 等库构建，提供 GUI 和 CLI 两种使用方式。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 C++ 源代码、构建脚本（支持 Linux/Windows/macOS）、示例模型及依赖库。提供 Qt 图形界面和命令行接口。
zh.stack: 技术栈：C++14、Qt 5.15.2、TBB、OpenGL；依赖 Geogram、libigl 等几何处理库。
zh.hot: 今日新增 120 星，总星数 2976，位列 C++ 日榜第 15。作为实用的网格重拓扑工具，填补了开源领域高质量四边形网格生成的空白。
uses: 3D 建模师与艺术家 —— 快速将高模重拓扑为低面数四边形网格
游戏开发者 —— 优化游戏资产的多边形拓扑
计算机图形学研究者 —— 研究四边形网格生成算法
数字孪生与仿真工程师 —— 生成高质量仿真网格

en.tag: Cross-platform automatic quad remeshing tool
en.what: AutoRemesher is a cross-platform automatic quad remeshing tool that converts high-polygon meshes into clean quad-based topology. It is built on top of libraries like Geogram and libigl, and offers both GUI and CLI modes.
en.content: The repository contains full C++ source code, build scripts for Linux/Windows/macOS, example models, and bundled dependencies. It provides a Qt-based GUI and a CLI interface.
en.stack: Tech stack: C++14, Qt 5.15.2, TBB, OpenGL; depends on Geogram, libigl, and other geometry libraries.
en.hot: Gained 120 stars today, total 2976, ranked #15 in C++ daily trending. As a practical mesh retopology tool, it fills a gap in open-source high-quality quad mesh generation.
uses: 3D modelers and artists — quickly retopologize high-poly models into low-poly quad meshes
Game developers — optimize polygon topology for game assets
Computer graphics researchers — study quad mesh generation algorithms
Digital twin and simulation engineers — generate high-quality simulation meshes

zh.tag: OpenAI Whisper 的 C/C++ 高性能移植，支持端侧与多硬件加速
zh.what: whisper.cpp 是 OpenAI Whisper 自动语音识别（ASR）模型的纯 C/C++ 实现，专注于高性能推理与零依赖部署。它支持从移动端到服务器的全场景运行，可在本地完成语音转文字而无需联网。
zh.content: 仓库核心仅包含 whisper.h 与 whisper.cpp，其余依赖 ggml 机器学习库；提供面向 iOS、Android、WebAssembly、Java 等平台的示例与绑定，以及 Docker 镜像和 C 风格 API。
zh.stack: 基于纯 C/C++ 与 ggml 张量库，无外部依赖；通过 ARM NEON、Metal、Core ML、Vulkan、CUDA、ROCm 等后端实现跨平台硬件加速，并支持 INT8/INT4 量化。
zh.hot: 凭借 51.8k Stars 和本周 238 新增热度，whisper.cpp 以极致轻量化和「苹果芯片优先」策略成为端侧 AI 语音标杆，几乎覆盖了从手机到 NPU 的所有推理场景。
uses: 移动端开发者 —— 需在 iOS/Android 实现离线语音输入与实时字幕
嵌入式与 IoT 工程师 —— 在树莓派等低功耗设备上部署无网 ASR
跨平台桌面应用开发者 —— 通过 C API 或 WebAssembly 集成转写功能
AI 基础设施团队 —— 构建支持多硬件（NVIDIA/AMD/昇腾）的后端推理服务

en.tag: C/C++ Whisper port optimized for edge & multi-hardware inference
en.what: whisper.cpp is a pure C/C++ implementation of OpenAI's Whisper ASR model, optimized for high-performance inference and zero-dependency deployment. It enables on-device speech-to-text across the full spectrum from mobile to server, all without requiring a network connection.
en.content: The repo centers on whisper.h and whisper.cpp, leveraging the ggml library for ML primitives; it ships with platform examples and bindings for iOS, Android, WebAssembly, Java, plus Docker images and a C-style API.
en.stack: Built on pure C/C++ and the ggml tensor library with zero external dependencies; it accelerates inference across hardware via ARM NEON, Metal, Core ML, Vulkan, CUDA, and ROCm, with support for INT8/INT4 quantization.
en.hot: With 51.8k stars and 238 new stars this week, whisper.cpp has become the go-to edge-AI voice benchmark by pairing extreme lightweight design with an Apple Silicon-first strategy, covering nearly every inference scenario from phones to NPUs.
uses: Mobile developers needing offline speech input and real-time captions on iOS/Android.
Embedded and IoT engineers deploying network-free ASR on Raspberry Pi and low-power devices.
Cross-platform desktop developers integrating transcription via C API or WebAssembly.
AI infrastructure teams building backend inference services across NVIDIA, AMD, and Ascend hardware.

zh.tag: Apple Silicon 上的机器学习数组框架
zh.what: MLX 是苹果机器学习研究团队推出的针对 Apple Silicon 的数组框架，提供类似 NumPy 的 Python API 以及 C++、C、Swift 接口。它支持自动微分、自动向量化、惰性计算和动态图构建，并采用统一内存模型，可在 CPU 和 GPU 上无缝运行。
zh.content: 仓库包含 MLX 核心库的 C++ 实现，以及 Python 绑定和高级包（如 mlx.nn、mlx.optimizers）。另有独立的示例仓库展示 Transformer、LLaMA、Stable Diffusion 等模型的应用。
zh.stack: 核心使用 C++ 实现，提供 Python、C、Swift 绑定。依赖 Metal 后端以利用 Apple GPU，并借鉴 NumPy、PyTorch、Jax 等框架的设计理念。
zh.hot: 作为苹果官方出品的机器学习框架，MLX 针对 Apple Silicon 深度优化，统一内存模型和易用的 API 吸引了大量开发者。27.6k Stars 反映了其在苹果生态中的高关注度。
uses: 苹果生态的机器学习研究者——在 Mac 上快速实验和训练模型
iOS/macOS 开发者——将 ML 模型集成到应用中
PyTorch/NumPy 用户——迁移到 Apple Silicon 平台进行高效计算

en.tag: Array framework for machine learning on Apple silicon
en.what: MLX is an array framework for machine learning on Apple silicon, developed by Apple's ML research team. It offers NumPy-like Python APIs along with C++, C, and Swift interfaces, supporting automatic differentiation, vectorization, lazy computation, and dynamic graph construction with a unified memory model for seamless CPU/GPU execution.
en.content: The repo contains the core C++ implementation of MLX, along with Python bindings and high-level packages (e.g., mlx.nn, mlx.optimizers). A separate examples repo demonstrates applications like Transformer, LLaMA, and Stable Diffusion.
en.stack: Core implemented in C++ with Python, C, and Swift bindings. Relies on Metal backend for Apple GPU acceleration, inspired by NumPy, PyTorch, and Jax.
en.hot: As Apple's official ML framework optimized for Apple Silicon, MLX's unified memory and user-friendly APIs attract many developers. Its 27.6k stars reflect high interest in the Apple ecosystem.
uses: ML researchers in Apple ecosystem — rapid prototyping and training on Mac
iOS/macOS developers — integrating ML models into apps
PyTorch/NumPy users — migrating to Apple Silicon for efficient computation

zh.tag: 现代 C++ 格式化库，安全快速替代 printf 和 iostream
zh.what: {fmt} 是一个开源 C++ 格式化库，提供类似 Python 的格式化语法，支持位置参数、Unicode 和用户自定义类型。它实现了 C++20 的 std::format 和 C++23 的 std::print，旨在成为 C stdio 和 C++ iostreams 的快速安全替代品。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心头文件（base.h、format.h）、文档、示例和测试。提供简单的格式化 API、printf 实现、高性能浮点数格式化（Dragonbox 算法）以及编译时格式检查。
zh.stack: 纯 C++ 实现，无外部依赖。支持 C++11 及以上标准，兼容主流编译器（GCC、Clang、MSVC）。
zh.hot: 作为 C++20/23 标准格式化功能的事实标准实现，{fmt} 拥有 23,676+ 星标。其高性能、安全性和易用性使其成为 C++ 生态中不可或缺的库。
uses: C++ 开发者 —— 替代 printf/iostreams 进行安全快速的格式化输出
库作者 —— 为用户自定义类型提供格式化支持
性能敏感应用 —— 需要高效整数/浮点数转字符串的场景

en.tag: Modern C++ formatting library, fast and safe alternative to printf and iostreams
en.what: {fmt} is an open-source C++ formatting library offering Python-like format syntax with positional arguments, Unicode support, and extensibility for user-defined types. It implements C++20's std::format and C++23's std::print, aiming to be a fast and safe alternative to C stdio and C++ iostreams.
en.content: The repository includes core headers (base.h, format.h), documentation, examples, and tests. It offers a simple format API, printf implementation, high-performance floating-point formatting (Dragonbox algorithm), and compile-time format checking.
en.stack: Pure C++ implementation with no external dependencies. Supports C++11 and later, compatible with major compilers (GCC, Clang, MSVC).
en.hot: As the de facto implementation of C++20/23 standard formatting, {fmt} has over 23,676 stars. Its high performance, safety, and ease of use make it an indispensable library in the C++ ecosystem.
uses: C++ developers — replace printf/iostreams with safe and fast formatting
Library authors — provide formatting support for custom types
Performance-critical applications — need efficient integer/float to string conversion

zh.tag: 高性能、灵活的自动驾驶开源平台
zh.what: Apollo 是一个开源的自动驾驶平台，提供高性能、灵活的架构，加速自动驾驶汽车的开发、测试和部署。它包含从感知、规划到控制的完整模块。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的自动驾驶软件栈，包括感知、定位、规划、控制等模块，以及硬件参考设计和仿真工具。提供详细的文档和快速入门指南。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++，依赖 CUDA、LibTorch、Docker、NVIDIA Container Toolkit 等，支持 Ubuntu 系统。
zh.hot: 作为百度开源的明星自动驾驶项目，Apollo 拥有 26,742 颗星，持续获得开发者关注。虽然今日新增不多，但长期热度不减，是自动驾驶领域最受欢迎的开源平台之一。
uses: 自动驾驶研究人员和工程师 —— 用于研究和开发自动驾驶算法
汽车制造商和供应商 —— 评估和集成自动驾驶技术
高校学生和教育者 —— 学习自动驾驶系统架构和实现
开源贡献者 —— 参与自动驾驶技术的开发和改进

en.tag: High-performance, flexible open autonomous driving platform
en.what: Apollo is an open-source autonomous driving platform with a high-performance, flexible architecture that accelerates the development, testing, and deployment of autonomous vehicles. It includes complete modules from perception, planning to control.
en.content: The repository contains a full autonomous driving software stack including perception, localization, planning, control modules, as well as hardware reference designs and simulation tools. Detailed documentation and quick start guides are provided.
en.stack: Primarily C++, with dependencies on CUDA, LibTorch, Docker, NVIDIA Container Toolkit, and supports Ubuntu systems.
en.hot: As Baidu's flagship open-source autonomous driving project, Apollo has 26,742 stars and continues to attract developer attention. Despite modest daily growth, its long-term popularity remains high, making it one of the most popular open-source platforms in autonomous driving.
uses: Autonomous driving researchers and engineers — for research and development of autonomous driving algorithms
Automakers and suppliers — to evaluate and integrate autonomous driving technology
University students and educators — to learn autonomous driving system architecture and implementation
Open-source contributors — to participate in the development and improvement of autonomous driving technology

zh.tag: C++ 微基准测试库，类似单元测试
zh.what: Google Benchmark 是一个用于对代码片段进行性能基准测试的库，类似于单元测试。它提供简单易用的 API，帮助开发者测量函数或代码块的执行时间，并生成统计报告。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心库源码、CMake 构建系统、用户指南、示例代码以及 Python 绑定等工具。
zh.stack: C++11 可用，但需要 C++17 构建；依赖 CMake 和 git。
zh.hot: 作为 Google 官方出品的 C++ 基准测试库，拥有超过 10k 星标，是 C++ 性能测试的事实标准之一。
uses: C++ 开发者 —— 对代码片段进行微基准测试，优化性能
库作者 —— 确保代码变更不引入性能退化
性能工程师 —— 对比不同实现或算法的性能

en.tag: A microbenchmark support library for C++, similar to unit tests
en.what: Google Benchmark is a library to benchmark code snippets, similar to unit tests. It provides a simple API to measure execution time of functions or code blocks and generate statistical reports.
en.content: The repository contains core library source code, CMake build system, user guide, example code, and Python bindings.
en.stack: Usable with C++11, requires C++17 to build; depends on CMake and git.
en.hot: As Google's official C++ benchmarking library, it has over 10k stars and is a de facto standard for C++ performance testing.
uses: C++ developers — microbenchmark code snippets to optimize performance
Library authors — ensure code changes don't introduce performance regressions
Performance engineers — compare performance of different implementations or algorithms

zh.tag: 高效、灵活、可移植的分布式梯度提升库
zh.what: XGBoost 是一个优化的分布式梯度提升库，旨在高效、灵活且可移植地实现机器学习算法。它提供并行树提升（GBDT、GBM），能够快速准确地解决许多数据科学问题。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 C++ 库以及 Python、R、Java、Scala、C++ 等多语言接口，支持单机、Hadoop、Spark、Dask、Flink 和 DataFlow 等分布式环境。
zh.stack: 核心用 C++ 实现，提供 Python、R、Java、Scala、C++ 等语言绑定，依赖 CUDA 进行 GPU 加速，支持 Dask、Spark 等分布式框架。
zh.hot: XGBoost 是机器学习竞赛和工业界的经典工具，拥有 28.5k+ Stars，长期稳定维护，社区活跃，是梯度提升领域的事实标准。
uses: 数据科学家和机器学习工程师进行分类、回归、排序等任务
竞赛选手（如 Kaggle）快速构建高性能模型
需要可解释性和特征重要性的业务场景
大规模分布式训练场景，如广告点击率预测

en.tag: Optimized distributed gradient boosting library for efficient, flexible, and portable ML
en.what: XGBoost is an optimized distributed gradient boosting library designed to be highly efficient, flexible, and portable. It implements parallel tree boosting (GBDT, GBM) to solve data science problems quickly and accurately.
en.content: The repo contains the core C++ library and multi-language interfaces for Python, R, Java, Scala, C++, etc., supporting single machine and distributed environments like Hadoop, Spark, Dask, Flink, and DataFlow.
en.stack: Core implemented in C++, with bindings for Python, R, Java, Scala, C++, etc. Depends on CUDA for GPU acceleration, and integrates with Dask, Spark, and other distributed frameworks.
en.hot: XGBoost is a classic tool in ML competitions and industry, with 28.5k+ Stars. It is long-term maintained with an active community, serving as the de facto standard for gradient boosting.
uses: Data scientists and ML engineers for classification, regression, ranking tasks
Competition participants (e.g., Kaggle) to quickly build high-performance models
Business scenarios requiring interpretability and feature importance
Large-scale distributed training, e.g., ad click-through rate prediction

zh.tag: 每秒解析数GB JSON的极速解析库
zh.what: simdjson 是一个利用 SIMD 指令和微并行算法实现超高速 JSON 解析的 C++ 库。它比 RapidJSON 快 4 倍以上，比 JSON for Modern C++ 快 25 倍，同时提供完整的 JSON 和 UTF-8 验证。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心解析器、API 文档、性能基准测试以及多种语言的绑定。提供头文件库，支持自动选择 CPU 优化的解析器。
zh.stack: C++，依赖 SIMD 指令集（如 SSE、AVX、NEON），支持 CMake 构建。
zh.hot: 被 Node.js、ClickHouse、Meta Velox 等重量级项目采用，性能卓越且稳定，star 数近 2.4 万，持续活跃。
uses: 高性能后端服务：需要快速解析大量 JSON 数据的服务器端应用
数据库与数据仓库：如 ClickHouse、Apache Doris、StarRocks 等集成以加速 JSON 处理
运行时与引擎：Node.js、WasmEdge 等使用 simdjson 提升 JSON 解析性能
嵌入式与移动端：WatermelonDB 等利用其高效解析能力

en.tag: Parsing gigabytes of JSON per second
en.what: simdjson is a C++ library that leverages SIMD instructions and microparallel algorithms for ultra-fast JSON parsing. It is over 4x faster than RapidJSON and 25x faster than JSON for Modern C++, with full JSON and UTF-8 validation.
en.content: The repository includes the core parser, API documentation, performance benchmarks, and bindings for multiple languages. It is a header-only library that automatically selects a CPU-tailored parser at runtime.
en.stack: C++, relies on SIMD instruction sets (e.g., SSE, AVX, NEON), built with CMake.
en.hot: Adopted by major projects like Node.js, ClickHouse, and Meta Velox, it offers exceptional performance and reliability, with nearly 24k stars and ongoing activity.
uses: High-performance backend services: server-side apps needing fast JSON parsing
Databases and data warehouses: integrated into ClickHouse, Apache Doris, StarRocks for accelerated JSON processing
Runtimes and engines: Node.js, WasmEdge use simdjson for better JSON parsing performance
Embedded and mobile: WatermelonDB leverages its efficient parsing

zh.tag: 实时纳秒级帧分析器，支持CPU/GPU/内存全链路性能剖析
zh.what: Tracy 是一款面向游戏及其他高性能应用的实时遥测分析器，提供纳秒级精度的 CPU、GPU、内存与锁性能剖析。它采用混合帧分析与采样分析模式，支持远程性能数据捕获与可视化，并可自动将截图关联到对应帧。
zh.content: 仓库包含探针客户端库（多语言绑定）、跨平台图形化分析器 GUI、服务器端捕获工具，以及编译好的 Windows x64 二进制文件和完整 PDF 文档。配套提供交互式在线 Demo、各版本功能介绍视频与详细构建说明。
zh.stack: 核心以 C++ 编写，客户端提供 C/C++、Lua、Python、Fortran 等原生支持，并扩展至 Rust、Zig、C# 等第三方绑定；图形后端覆盖 OpenGL、Vulkan、Direct3D 11/12、Metal、CUDA、WebGPU 等主流 GPU API。
zh.hot: 凭借纳秒级精度和对 CPU/GPU/内存的全方位覆盖，Tracy 已成为游戏与实时应用性能调优的利器；目前收获 16.4K Star，本月新增 341 颗并跻身 GitHub C++ 月榜第 10，持续攀升的热度反映了开发者对极致性能剖析工具的强烈需求。
uses: 游戏引擎开发者 —— 需要精确到纳秒的帧时间与 GPU 负载分析
高性能应用工程师 —— 对 C++/Rust 等服务端程序进行 CPU 与内存热点剖析
图形/Compute 程序员 —— 调优 Vulkan、Direct3D 12、CUDA 等渲染与计算管线
跨平台团队 —— 统一在 Windows、Linux 等系统上进行远程遥测与性能监控

en.tag: Real-time nanosecond-resolution frame profiler for CPU/GPU/memory
en.what: Tracy is a real-time, nanosecond-resolution telemetry profiler for games and high-performance applications, offering hybrid frame and sampling profiling. It captures and visualizes CPU, GPU, memory, lock, and context-switch data remotely, with automatic screenshot attribution to specific frames.
en.content: The repository contains instrumentation client libraries with multi-language bindings, a cross-platform profiler GUI, server-side capture tools, pre-built Windows x64 binaries, and comprehensive PDF documentation. It also includes an interactive online demo, versioned feature videos, and detailed build instructions.
en.stack: The core is written in C++, with native client instrumentation for C, C++, Lua, Python, and Fortran plus third-party bindings for Rust, Zig, C#, and others. It supports all major graphics/compute APIs including OpenGL, Vulkan, Direct3D 11/12, Metal, CUDA, and WebGPU.
en.hot: With nanosecond precision and comprehensive CPU/GPU/memory coverage, Tracy has become essential for game and real-time app optimization. It has amassed 16.4K stars, gaining 341 this month and ranking 10th on GitHub's C++ monthly trending list, reflecting strong demand for extreme-performance profiling tools.
uses: Game engine developers — profiling frame times and GPU loads down to the nanosecond
High-performance application engineers — analyzing CPU and memory hotspots in C++/Rust services
Graphics/Compute programmers — optimizing rendering and compute pipelines across Vulkan, Direct3D 12, and CUDA
Cross-platform teams — conducting remote telemetry and performance monitoring on Windows, Linux, and beyond

zh.tag: 专治「AI 味」网页的设计 skill，让 AI 生成的 UI 不像模板货
