zh.what: Together AI 出品的设计 skill 包：装进 Claude Code、Cursor 或 Codex 后，AI 生成网页 UI 时会从 20 套主题里选宏观结构，并跑 57 项「anti-slop」检查加自我批判，拒绝 LLM 默认那套千篇一律的渐变卡片风。提供生成、hallmark audit（给现有代码打分）、hallmark redesign（换结构重写）、hallmark study（从截图/URL 提取设计 DNA）四个动词。
zh.content: 核心是 skills/hallmark/ 下的 SKILL.md + references/ 规则文件；docs/ 有 recipes 和示例，site/ 是官网及大量自包含 HTML+CSS 示例页（语言占比因此显示为 CSS）。
zh.stack: Markdown 规则 + 参考文档的 skill 包（符合 Agent Skills 规范），示例为纯 HTML/CSS，MIT，无运行时依赖，一行 npx skills add nutlope/hallmark 安装。
zh.hot: 它直指 AI 生成网站同质化这一普遍痛点，并用在线 Demo 降低验证门槛，定位清晰且易于传播。
uses: 独立开发者 / 小团队 —— 没有设计师，也能让 AI 生成不撞脸的官网和落地页
设计师 —— 用 hallmark study 从优秀网站提取设计 DNA 做参考
前端工程师 —— 用 audit 给存量项目打分，找出「AI 味」重灾区

en.tag: The anti-'AI-slop' design skill — AI-built UIs that don't look like templates
en.what: A design skill pack from Together AI: once installed in Claude Code, Cursor or Codex, your agent picks a macro-structure from 20 themes when generating web UIs, then runs 57 'anti-slop' checks plus self-critique — rejecting the default LLM look of identical gradient cards. Four verbs: generate, hallmark audit (score existing code), hallmark redesign (rewrite with a new structure), hallmark study (extract design DNA from a screenshot or URL).
en.content: The core is SKILL.md plus rule files under skills/hallmark/ and references/; docs/ holds recipes and examples; site/ contains the homepage and many self-contained HTML+CSS example pages (which is why the language stat reads CSS).
en.stack: A Markdown-rules skill pack (Agent Skills compliant) with pure HTML/CSS examples; MIT, zero runtime dependencies; install via npx skills add nutlope/hallmark.
en.hot: Its anti-slop positioning addresses a common complaint about AI-generated websites, while the live demo makes the claim easy to evaluate.
uses: Indie devs & small teams — generate distinctive sites and landing pages without a designer
Designers — extract design DNA from great sites with hallmark study
Frontend engineers — audit existing projects to find the worst 'AI-slop' offenders

zh.tag: 开源版 CapCut（剪映），免费跨平台视频编辑器
zh.what: 免费开源视频编辑器，对标 CapCut，目标覆盖 Web、桌面和移动端。项目正在从零重写：Editor API、插件优先架构、Rust 核心（一套代码跑桌面/移动/浏览器）、供 AI agent 调用的 MCP server、无头批量渲染模式和编辑器内置脚本页。旧版代码已迁至 opencut-classic 继续维护。
zh.content: monorepo：apps/web、apps/desktop、apps/api 三个应用，根目录 Cargo.toml（Rust 核心）；用 moonrepo + proto 管理工具链，moon run web:dev 即可起本地开发。
zh.stack: TypeScript（Web 前端）+ Rust 核心，Bun 包管理，MIT；重写期间暂不接受外部代码贡献。
zh.hot: 「开源视频剪辑工具」满足了广泛需求，Rust 重写与基于 MCP 的 AI 剪辑能力又形成了清晰的技术差异。
uses: 自媒体创作者 —— 免费替代剪映专业版，无水印跨平台剪片
开发者 / 自动化团队 —— 通过 MCP server 让 AI agent 批量剪视频
企业 —— 基于 Editor API 和插件架构搭建内部视频流水线

en.tag: The open-source CapCut alternative — free, cross-platform video editing
en.what: A free, open-source video editor rivaling CapCut, targeting web, desktop and mobile. The project is being rewritten from scratch: an Editor API, plugin-first architecture, a Rust core (one codebase for desktop/mobile/browser), an MCP server so AI agents can edit video, a headless mode for automated batch rendering, and built-in editor scripting. Legacy code lives on in opencut-classic.
en.content: A monorepo: apps/web, apps/desktop and apps/api, with a root Cargo.toml for the Rust core; toolchain managed by moonrepo + proto — `moon run web:dev` starts local dev.
en.stack: TypeScript (web frontend) + Rust core, Bun for packages, MIT; external code contributions are paused during the rewrite.
en.hot: The open-source alternative to CapCut addresses broad latent demand, while the Rust rewrite and MCP-based AI editing story give the project a distinct technical direction.
uses: Content creators — a free, watermark-free CapCut Pro alternative across platforms
Dev & automation teams — batch-edit video via AI agents over the MCP server
Companies — build internal video pipelines on the Editor API and plugin architecture

zh.tag: 港大出品的 AI 私人家教：个性化终身学习工作区
zh.what: 香港大学 HKUDS 实验室的「agent 原生」学习平台：聊天辅导、刷题测验、深度研究、可视化、解题、Mastery Path 掌握度练习跑在同一套 agent 循环上。支持多引擎 RAG 知识库（LlamaIndex、PageIndex、GraphRAG、LightRAG，可挂 Obsidian 库），可从任意对话呼叫 Claude Code / Codex 等子 agent；带三层可检查记忆（L1 trace / L2 摘要 / L3 综合）和 Memory Graph 溯源。
zh.content: 完整 Web 应用（Python 后端 + Next.js 16 前端），附 11 种语言 README、Docker 部署、CLI/agent-native 接口、EduHub 社区 skills 生态；发版极勤。
zh.stack: Python 3.11+ + Next.js 16，RAG 多引擎 + MCP 工具 + FAISS 向量库，Apache-2.0；2025 年 12 月底创建，有 arXiv 论文背书。
zh.hot: 它把 AI 教育与 Agent 原生工作流结合，并由高校实验室持续维护，概念清晰、可体验性强。
uses: 学生 / 自学者 —— 把教材和论文喂进去，得到 24 小时私人家教
考研 / 考证党 —— 用刷题测验 + 掌握度路径系统备考
知识管理玩家 —— 直接挂 Obsidian 库做 RAG 问答

en.tag: An AI personal tutor from HKU: a lifelong, personalized learning workspace
en.what: An 'agent-native' learning platform from HKU's HKUDS lab: chat tutoring, quizzes, deep research, visualization, problem solving and Mastery-Path practice all run on one agent loop. It supports multi-engine RAG knowledge bases (LlamaIndex, PageIndex, GraphRAG, LightRAG — even your Obsidian vault), lets you call Claude Code / Codex sub-agents from any conversation, and ships three-layer inspectable memory (L1 trace / L2 summary / L3 synthesis) with a Memory Graph for provenance.
en.content: A full web app (Python backend + Next.js 16 frontend) with READMEs in 11 languages, Docker deployment, CLI/agent-native interfaces and the EduHub community skills ecosystem; releases ship very frequently.
en.stack: Python 3.11+ + Next.js 16, multi-engine RAG + MCP tools + FAISS; Apache-2.0; created late December 2025 with an arXiv paper behind it.
en.hot: It combines AI education with an agent-native workflow and carries the credibility of a university research lab, making the concept easy to evaluate and share.
uses: Students & self-learners — feed in textbooks and papers, get a 24/7 personal tutor
Exam candidates — prepare systematically with quizzes and the mastery path
PKM enthusiasts — plug your Obsidian vault straight in for RAG Q&A

zh.tag: 100+ 个能直接跑起来的 AI Agent 和 RAG 应用合集
zh.what: 超大号 LLM 应用模板库：收录 100 多个亲手构建并端到端测试过的 AI agent、agent skill 和 RAG 应用，全部 Apache-2.0 可商用。兼容 Claude、Gemini、GPT、DeepSeek、Llama、Qwen 等主流模型，克隆下来装依赖就能跑，口号「clone, customize, ship」。
zh.content: 按难度和形态分目录：agent_skills/（npx 一键装技能）、starter_ai_agents/（单文件入门）、advanced_ai_agents/（多智能体团队）、voice_ai_agents/、always_on_agents/、RAG 教程等；每个模板配 README 和依赖清单，场景覆盖旅行规划、金融分析、播客生成、房屋装修等。
zh.stack: Python 为主，常见 Streamlit 前端 + 各家模型 SDK，部分用 CrewAI/AG2 等多智能体框架。
zh.hot: 它用大量可运行示例降低 LLM 应用试验成本，并通过 Agent Skill 模板与教程保持对实践者的持续价值。
uses: AI 入门开发者 —— 克隆单文件模板，一天跑通第一个 LLM 应用
创业团队 —— 基于成熟模板二开（旅行规划 / 金融分析 / 播客生成）快速验证 idea
企业技术选型 —— 横向对比 CrewAI / AG2 等框架的真实代码

en.tag: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run
en.what: A giant library of LLM app templates: 100+ hand-built, end-to-end-tested AI agents, agent skills and RAG apps, all Apache-2.0 (commercial use OK). Works with Claude, Gemini, GPT, DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen and more — clone, install deps, run. The motto: 'clone, customize, ship'.
en.content: Organized by difficulty and form: agent_skills/ (one-line npx installs), starter_ai_agents/ (single-file starters), advanced_ai_agents/ (multi-agent teams), voice_ai_agents/, always_on_agents/, RAG tutorials and more; each template ships a README and requirements, covering travel planning, financial analysis, podcast generation, home renovation…
en.stack: Mostly Python, usually a Streamlit frontend over OpenAI/Gemini/Anthropic SDKs, some CrewAI/AG2 multi-agent frameworks.
en.hot: Its broad, example-led catalog lowers the cost of trying LLM applications, while agent-skill templates and tutorials keep the collection useful to practitioners.
uses: AI beginners — clone a single-file template and ship your first LLM app in a day
Startup teams — fork mature templates (travel planning, finance analysis, podcast generation) to validate ideas fast
Enterprise evaluators — compare CrewAI / AG2 and other frameworks on real code

zh.tag: 给设计工程师准备的一套 UI 类 Agent Skills
zh.what: 知名设计工程师 ibelick 出品的 UI 技能包集合：让 AI 编码 agent 按任务自动走对应的 UI 技能流程，跑一行 npx ui-skills start 就能把 agent 路由到合适的技能集。
zh.content: skills/ 目录下 6 个技能：baseline-ui、improve-ui、fixing-accessibility、fixing-metadata、fixing-motion-performance、ui-skills-root；另有 bin/（CLI 入口）和配套网站（Astro + Cloudflare Workers）。
zh.stack: TypeScript，CLI 走 npx 分发，MIT；2026 年 1 月创建，官网 ui-skills.com。
zh.hot: 把设计判断封装成 AI Agent 可复用技能，这一思路对设计工程师直观易懂，也便于立刻试用。
uses: 前端开发者 —— 让 agent 按设计规范生成和改进 UI，告别「能跑但丑」
设计工程师 —— 把无障碍、metadata、动效性能检查自动化
独立开发者 —— 一人兼顾开发和设计时的品味兜底

en.tag: A set of UI Agent Skills for design engineers
en.what: A UI skill-pack collection from well-known design engineer ibelick: routes your AI coding agent through the right UI skill workflow per task — run npx ui-skills start and the agent picks the appropriate skill set.
en.content: Six skills under skills/: baseline-ui, improve-ui, fixing-accessibility, fixing-metadata, fixing-motion-performance and ui-skills-root; plus bin/ (the CLI entry) and the companion site (Astro on Cloudflare Workers).
en.stack: TypeScript, CLI distributed via npx, MIT; created January 2026, site at ui-skills.com.
en.hot: The idea of packaging design judgment as reusable skills for AI agents is easy for design engineers to understand and immediately test.
uses: Frontend developers — let agents generate and improve UI to design standards, no more 'works but ugly'
Design engineers — automate accessibility, metadata and motion-performance checks
Indie hackers — a taste safety net when you cover both dev and design

zh.tag: 将书籍、长视频与播客蒸馏为可执行 AI Agent Skill 的方法论流水线
zh.what: cangjie-skill 通过 RIA-TV++ 七阶段流水线，将书籍、长视频、播客等高价值长内容中可迁移的方法论抽取并结构化为可独立调用的 AI Skill。不同于简单摘要，它面向 Agent 执行产出包含技能地图、术语词典、压力测试用例及可直接安装到 Claude Code / Cursor 的 Skill 工具包，解决“看过却用不起来”的痛点。
zh.content: 仓库核心是 RIA-TV++ 的实现脚本与规范，涵盖 Adler 分析、五路并行提取、三重验证筛选、RIA++ 结构化、Zettelkasten 索引、压力测试等七个阶段的工具链。交付物模板包括 BOOK_OVERVIEW.md、INDEX.md、DIGEST.md、GLOSSARY.md、各 SKILL.md 模块及 test-prompts.json，形成完整的多 Skill 仓库结构。
zh.stack: 主语言为 Python，基于 Mortimer Adler 分析阅读法与赵周 RIA 拆书法设计，依赖大语言模型进行并行提取与验证，最终输出适配 Claude Code 与 Cursor 的 Skill 格式；视频处理需配合独立的 video-downloader skill 进行字幕/音频转写。
zh.hot: 在 GitHub Trending 周榜位列第 15，一周内新增 1,158 Star，总星数达 3,558，反映出开发者对“从被动阅读到可执行 Agent 技能”这一范式的高度关注。其精准切中了知识工作者“收藏即落灰”的痛点，将长内容蒸馏为 Agent 可调用的工具包，契合当前 AI 代理工程化落地的热潮。
uses: 希望把书籍、课程、长视频里的方法论转化为 AI 可调用工具的知识工作者
使用 Claude Code / Cursor 开发，需要为项目团队沉淀可复用 Skill 的工程师
追求结构化学习、拒绝“收藏即落灰”的高效阅读者与内容创作者
需要批量处理播客、访谈、演讲并生成可验证技能库的 AI 应用开发者

en.tag: A methodology pipeline to distill books, videos and podcasts into executable AI agent skills
en.what: cangjie-skill is a RIA-TV++ pipeline that extracts actionable methodologies from long-form content—books, videos, podcasts—and structures them into reusable AI agent skills. Instead of generating simple summaries, it produces executable skill kits including skill maps, glossaries, stress tests, and installable modules for Claude Code and Cursor, bridging the gap between passive consumption and active execution.
en.content: The repo provides the RIA-TV++ implementation scripts and specifications across seven stages: Adler analysis, parallel extraction, triple verification, RIA++ structuring, Zettelkasten indexing, and stress testing. It ships with deliverable templates including BOOK_OVERVIEW.md, INDEX.md, DIGEST.md, GLOSSARY.md, individual SKILL.md modules, and test-prompts.json, forming a complete multi-skill repository.
en.stack: Built primarily in Python, it combines Mortimer Adler's analytical reading and the RIA note-taking method, relying on LLMs for parallel extraction and verification to produce skills compatible with Claude Code and Cursor; video workflows require the companion video-downloader skill for subtitle and audio transcription.
en.hot: Ranked #15 on GitHub Trending with 1,158 new stars this week and 3,558 total, it signals strong developer interest in moving from passive reading to executable agent skills. It directly addresses the "read-later graveyard" pain point by turning long-form content into callable agent toolkits, aligning with the current wave of AI agent engineering.
uses: Knowledge workers who want to convert methodologies from books, courses, and videos into callable AI tools
Engineers using Claude Code or Cursor who need to build reusable skill libraries for their teams
Active learners and content creators seeking structured knowledge instead of endless "read-later" lists
AI application developers looking to batch-process podcasts, interviews, and speeches into verified skill repositories

zh.tag: 个人 AI 交易代理，一条命令赋予全栈交易能力
zh.what: Vibe-Trading 是一个个人化的 AI 交易代理框架，只需一条命令即可部署具备完整市场分析、策略执行与风险管理能力的交易 Agent。它支持通过 API 和 MCP 协议与外部工具链集成，并配备 Shadow Account 模拟环境用于策略验证。项目由香港大学数据科学研究院（HKUDS）维护，提供从后端到前端的一站式解决方案。
zh.content: 仓库包含基于 FastAPI 的 Python 后端、React 19 构建的可视化前端，以及支持 PyPI 一键安装的 CLI 工具。同时提供示例代码、API/MCP 接口文档和 Shadow Account 模拟交易模块。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 3.11+ 开发，后端采用 FastAPI，前端使用 React 19，通过 PyPI 包 `vibe-trading-ai` 分发。支持 API 与 MCP 协议扩展，便于接入外部数据源和交易工具。
zh.hot: 仓库已积累 24.7k Star，本周激增 5,616 并冲上 GitHub Trending 周榜第 4，反映出 AI Agent 与量化金融结合的巨大关注度。其「一键启动个人交易代理」的极低门槛和 HKUDS 的学术背书，持续吸引开发者与交易者涌入。
uses: 量化交易者 —— 希望用 AI Agent 自动化策略执行与风险监控。
AI Agent 开发者 —— 需要基于 MCP 协议扩展金融交易能力的工具链。
金融科技爱好者 —— 想通过 Shadow Account 零成本验证和迭代交易策略。
全栈开发者 —— 寻求基于 FastAPI + React 的开源交易系统参考架构。

en.tag: Personal AI trading agent empowering comprehensive capabilities with one command
en.what: Vibe-Trading is a personal AI trading agent framework that can be deployed with a single command to deliver comprehensive market analysis, strategy execution, and risk management. It supports integration with external toolchains via API and MCP protocols, and includes a Shadow Account simulation environment for strategy backtesting. Maintained by HKUDS, it provides an end-to-end solution from FastAPI backend to React frontend.
en.content: The repository includes a FastAPI-based Python backend, a React 19 visualization frontend, and a CLI tool installable via PyPI. It also ships with example code, API/MCP interface documentation, and a Shadow Account simulation module.
en.stack: Built on Python 3.11+ with a FastAPI backend and React 19 frontend, distributed via the PyPI package `vibe-trading-ai`. Supports API and MCP protocol extensions for easy integration with external data sources and trading tools.
en.hot: With 24.7k stars and a weekly surge of 5,616 to rank #4 on GitHub Trending, it reflects massive interest in the intersection of AI agents and quantitative finance. Its extremely low barrier to entry via "one command" deployment, backed by HKUDS's academic credibility, continues to attract developers and traders.
uses: Quantitative traders — looking to automate strategy execution and risk monitoring via AI agents.
AI agent developers — who need a toolchain for extending financial trading capabilities through MCP protocols.
Fintech enthusiasts — wanting to validate and iterate trading strategies at zero cost using the Shadow Account.
Full-stack developers — seeking an open-source trading system reference architecture based on FastAPI and React.

zh.tag: 面向真实工程师的 AI 代理技能集
zh.what: 这是一套由资深工程师设计的 AI 代理技能集合，包含日常工程任务中使用的可组合、易适配的小型技能。它旨在帮助工程师在真实应用开发中保持控制力，避免被全流程框架束缚。
zh.content: 仓库包含多个 Shell 脚本形式的技能（如 /triage、/setup-matt-pocock-skills），可通过 npx 快速安装到 Cursor、Claude Code 等代理中，也支持作为 Claude Code 插件使用。
zh.stack: 技术栈：Shell 脚本，依赖 npx 和 Node.js 运行时，可选集成 GitHub、Linear 等工单系统。
zh.hot: 本周新增 10872 星，总星数达 17.9 万，因其直击 AI 辅助编程中“失去控制”的痛点，提供轻量、可定制的替代方案，受到真实工程师的追捧。
uses: 使用 Cursor、Claude Code 等 AI 编码代理的工程师，希望获得更可控的工程流程
对全流程框架（如 GSD、BMAD）感到束缚，想要轻量可组合技能的用户
希望快速搭建自定义 AI 代理工作流的开发者

en.tag: AI agent skills for real engineers, not vibe coders
en.what: A collection of composable, adaptable AI agent skills designed by a seasoned engineer for real-world development. It helps engineers maintain control over their workflow, avoiding the rigidity of full-process frameworks.
en.content: Contains multiple skills as Shell scripts (e.g., /triage, /setup-matt-pocock-skills), installable via npx into agents like Cursor or Claude Code, also available as a Claude Code plugin.
en.stack: Tech stack: Shell scripts, requires npx and Node.js runtime, optionally integrates with issue trackers like GitHub and Linear.
en.hot: Gained 10,872 stars this week, reaching 179k total, because it addresses the pain point of losing control in AI-assisted coding, offering a lightweight, customizable alternative that resonates with real engineers.
uses: Engineers using AI coding agents like Cursor or Claude Code who want more control over their workflow
Users feeling constrained by full-process frameworks (e.g., GSD, BMAD) and seeking lightweight, composable skills
Developers looking to quickly set up custom AI agent workflows

zh.tag: 让 AI 一键操控 Office 文档的开源命令行套件
zh.what: OfficeCLI 是专为 AI 智能体设计的 Office 办公套件，让 AI 能够通过一行代码读取、编辑和自动化生成 Word、Excel、PowerPoint 文件。它内置高保真 HTML 渲染引擎，可将文档转为 HTML 或 PNG，使 AI 具备可视化审阅与修正的能力。无需安装 Microsoft Office，单个二进制文件即可跨平台运行。
zh.content: 仓库包含 OfficeCLI 的核心源码、单一可执行二进制发布文件，以及丰富的示例资源（GIF 展示、文档模板等）和多语言 README。其核心是一个内置 HTML 渲染引擎的 C# 命令行工具，支持 .docx/.xlsx/.pptx 的高保真解析与渲染。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C# 开发，以单一二进制文件形式发布，不依赖 Microsoft Office 或任何外部运行时，支持跨平台运行。内置自研 HTML 渲染引擎负责将 Office 文档转换为 HTML/PNG 供 AI 视觉闭环使用。
zh.hot: 作为首个专为 AI 智能体打造的 Office 自动化工具，它精准切中了 Agent 时代 AI 处理办公文档的刚需；凭借「一行代码 + 无需 Office」的极简体验，一周内激增 4,611 Star，总星数逼近 1.9 万，强势登上 GitHub 周榜第 10。
uses: AI 智能体开发者 —— 需要让 Agent 具备读写 Office 文档能力的工程师
自动化办公场景 —— 批量生成报告、幻灯片、数据表格的无代码/低代码工作流
RAG / 企业知识库建设者 —— 需要高精度解析 Word/Excel/PPT 内容并供 AI 理解的团队
跨平台运维人员 —— 在无 Office 环境的 Linux/服务器上处理 Office 文件

en.tag: Open-source CLI suite that gives AI agents full control over Office documents
en.what: OfficeCLI is an open-source Office suite purpose-built for AI agents, enabling them to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files through a single command. It features a built-in high-fidelity HTML rendering engine that converts documents to HTML or PNG, giving AI agents visual 'eyes' for review and correction. It runs as a single binary without requiring any Microsoft Office installation or dependencies.
en.content: The repository contains the core C# source code, single-binary releases, and rich showcase assets including GIF demos and multi-language documentation. Its centerpiece is a CLI tool with a built-in HTML rendering engine that faithfully parses and renders .docx, .xlsx, and .pptx files.
en.stack: Built primarily in C# and distributed as a single, self-contained binary with zero external dependencies and no Microsoft Office installation required. It includes a custom-built HTML rendering engine that converts Office documents into HTML or PNG for AI visual feedback loops.
en.hot: As the world's first Office suite built specifically for AI agents, it directly addresses the urgent need for automated document processing in the Agent era. Its 'one-line command, zero Office install' experience fueled a surge of 4,611 stars this week, bringing the total to nearly 19,000 and landing it at #10 on GitHub Trending.
uses: AI agent developers who need to equip agents with the ability to read and write Office documents
Automation workflows that batch-generate reports, presentations, and spreadsheets with minimal setup
RAG and enterprise knowledge-base builders requiring high-fidelity parsing of Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files
Cross-platform DevOps users who need to process Office files on Linux or servers without Microsoft Office installed

zh.tag: AI 编码助手安全护栏，拦截高危 git 与 shell 命令
zh.what: 这是一个为 AI 编码代理设计的高性能安全钩子，能够在 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等工具执行破坏性 git 或 shell 命令前将其拦截。它旨在防止 AI 助手因误解或幻觉而意外删除代码、重置仓库或覆盖重要文件，保护开发者的工作成果。
zh.content: 仓库主体为 Rust 编写的跨平台二进制，附带一键安装脚本（Linux/macOS 的 install.sh 与 Windows 的 install.ps1），并内置针对 Claude Code、Codex CLI、Gemini CLI、GitHub Copilot、Cursor、Grok 等十余种主流 AI 客户端的钩子配置。
zh.stack: 采用 Rust 构建以保证高性能与低延迟，依赖系统级 shell 钩子机制，支持通过 PowerShell/Bash 脚本在 Linux、macOS 及 Windows（含 WSL 与原生）上一键安装和自动配置。
zh.hot: 在 AI 编程工具爆发式普及的背景下，本月激增近 4000 Star 达到 5086 Star，并跻身 GitHub Rust 月榜第 19 名；它精准击中了开发者对 AI 代理误执行高危命令的普遍焦虑，且几乎兼容了市面上所有主流 AI 编码客户端。
uses: 使用 Claude Code、Cursor、Copilot、Codex 等 AI 客户端进行日常编码的开发者
担心 AI 代理误执行 rm -rf、git reset --hard 等命令导致数据丢失的个人或团队
需要为 AI 工作流增设安全合规闸门的工程团队与企业
在 Linux、macOS、Windows 多平台环境下寻求零配置一键部署的工程师

en.tag: AI coding agent safety guard that blocks destructive git and shell commands
en.what: A high-performance safety hook for AI coding agents that intercepts destructive git and shell commands before execution across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and more. It protects developers from accidental code deletion, repo resets, or file overwrites caused by AI misinterpretation or hallucination.
en.content: The repo contains a Rust-based cross-platform binary with one-click installers (install.sh for Unix and install.ps1 for Windows), plus built-in hook configurations for Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Grok, and other popular AI agents.
en.stack: Built in Rust for high performance and low latency, relying on system-level shell hooks and supporting one-click installation via PowerShell and Bash scripts across Linux, macOS, and Windows (including WSL and native).
en.hot: Amid the explosive adoption of AI coding tools, it surged nearly 4,000 stars this month to reach 5,086 and hit #19 on GitHub's monthly Rust trending list; it directly addresses widespread developer anxiety about AI agents accidentally executing dangerous commands, while supporting nearly every major AI coding client on the market.
uses: Developers using Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, and other AI coding agents daily
Individuals or teams worried about AI agents accidentally running rm -rf or git reset --hard
Engineering teams and enterprises seeking safety compliance gates for AI workflows
Engineers looking for zero-config, one-click deployment across Linux, macOS, and Windows

zh.tag: OpenAI 官方轻量级终端 AI 编码代理
zh.what: Codex CLI 是 OpenAI 推出的终端原生 AI 编码代理，可在本地计算机上直接运行。它能理解自然语言指令，协助完成代码编写、重构、调试等任务。用户可通过 ChatGPT 账户或 API 密钥接入，无需离开终端即可进行智能开发。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Codex CLI 的 Rust 源码、跨平台编译构建脚本，以及支持 macOS/Linux/Windows 的预编译二进制发布。除终端版外，项目还指向 IDE 插件和云端 Codex Web 的入口。
zh.stack: 核心采用 Rust 开发，保证高性能与低资源占用；提供 curl、npm、Homebrew 等多种安装方式，支持通过 ChatGPT 账号或 OpenAI API 密钥进行身份验证。
zh.hot: 作为 OpenAI 官方出品的终端编码工具，凭借 99.2k Stars 的超高人气和单日新增 328 Stars 的强劲势头，成功登顶 Rust 日榜第二。它将 AI 编程能力直接嵌入开发者最熟悉的终端环境，轻量且开源。
uses: 终端重度使用者 —— 希望在命令行中直接调用 AI 辅助编程的开发者
全栈工程师 —— 需要快速完成代码生成、重构与调试的敏捷开发场景
开源贡献者 —— 希望基于 Apache-2.0 协议研究或扩展 AI Agent 能力的工程师
ChatGPT 订阅用户 —— 想将现有 Plus/Pro/Edu 等计划权益延伸至本地开发环境

en.tag: OpenAI's official lightweight coding agent for your terminal
en.what: Codex CLI is a terminal-native AI coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally on your machine. It interprets natural language instructions to help write, refactor, and debug code without leaving your terminal. Users can authenticate via their ChatGPT plan or an OpenAI API key.
en.content: The repository contains the Rust source code for Codex CLI, cross-platform build scripts, and precompiled binaries for macOS, Linux, and Windows. It also points to IDE extensions and the cloud-based Codex Web agent.
en.stack: Core is built in Rust for high performance and low resource usage. It supports multiple installation methods including curl, npm, and Homebrew, and authenticates via ChatGPT accounts or OpenAI API keys.
en.hot: As an official OpenAI terminal coding tool, it commands massive attention with 99.2k Stars and 328 new Stars today, ranking second on the Rust daily trending list. It brings AI coding directly into the familiar terminal environment in a lightweight, open-source package.
uses: Terminal power users — developers who want AI assistance directly in their command line
Full-stack engineers — those needing rapid code generation, refactoring, and debugging
Open-source contributors — engineers looking to study or extend an Apache-2.0 AI agent
ChatGPT subscribers — users wanting to extend their Plus/Pro/Edu benefits to local development

zh.tag: AI 代理技能：一句话生成架构图，支持主题切换与多格式导出
zh.what: Archify 是一个 AI 代理技能，让 Claude、Codex CLI 等代理根据自然语言描述自动生成架构图、技术流程图、时序图、数据流图等。支持深色/浅色主题一键切换，并可将图表导出为 PNG、JPEG、WebP、SVG 等格式。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Archify 技能的定义文件、文档和示例，以及一个用于生成自包含 HTML 图表的渲染器。生成的 HTML 文件零依赖，可离线打开并切换主题。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript，作为 AI 代理的技能（skill）运行，依赖代理的对话能力。图表渲染使用 HTML/CSS/SVG，无外部图标库，通过语义标签映射视觉类别。
zh.hot: 本周新增 2102 星，总星数 6269，位列 GitHub Trending 周榜第 15。Archify 解决了开发者快速绘制技术图表的痛点，无需设计工具，纯文本描述即可生成高质量图表，且支持多种导出格式和主题切换，极大提升了文档效率。
uses: 软件架构师 —— 快速绘制系统架构图并嵌入文档
技术写作者 —— 为文章或报告生成流程图、时序图
DevOps 工程师 —— 可视化 CI/CD 流程、数据管道
AI 代理开发者 —— 集成到自定义代理中增强图表生成能力

en.tag: Agent skill: generate architecture diagrams from plain English, with theme toggle and multi-format export
en.what: Archify is an agent skill that lets Claude, Codex CLI, and other agents automatically generate architecture diagrams, technical workflows, sequence diagrams, data-flow diagrams, etc. from natural language descriptions. It supports one-click dark/light theme toggle and exports to PNG, JPEG, WebP, SVG.
en.content: The repo contains the Archify skill definition, documentation, examples, and a renderer that produces self-contained HTML diagrams. The generated HTML has zero dependencies and can be opened offline with theme toggle.
en.stack: Built with JavaScript, runs as an agent skill, leveraging the agent's conversational ability. Diagrams are rendered with HTML/CSS/SVG, no external icon library, using semantic labels for visual categorization.
en.hot: Gained 2102 stars this week, total 6269, ranked #15 on GitHub Trending weekly. Archify solves the pain point of quickly creating technical diagrams without design tools; plain text descriptions yield high-quality diagrams with multiple export formats and theme toggle, greatly boosting documentation efficiency.
uses: Software architects — quickly create system architecture diagrams for documentation
Technical writers — generate flowcharts and sequence diagrams for articles or reports
DevOps engineers — visualize CI/CD pipelines and data flows
AI agent developers — integrate into custom agents to enhance diagram generation

zh.tag: 终端里的编程 agent，专为便宜小模型优化
zh.what: 跑在终端里的 AI 编程助手（OpenAI Codex 的 fork），核心思路「换 harness 不换模型」：内置 claude-code、kimi-cli、qwen-code、deepseek-tui 等多种 agent 运行框架，让低成本开源模型也打出好表现。自带 QA 技能，可驱动真实浏览器或原生 App 做界面测试，支持 macOS/Linux/Windows 原生沙箱执行。
zh.content: 完整 Rust 工程：终端 TUI、文档站（openinterpreter.com/docs）、安装脚本；配置与会话存本地 ~/.openinterpreter，支持 /model 切模型、/harness 切框架、MCP、hooks、AGENTS.md。
zh.stack: Rust（2023 年创建的老牌项目，刚从 Python 重写），Apache-2.0；支持 ACP 协议接入编辑器，可接多家模型 provider。
zh.hot: Rust 重写与「低成本模型运行框架」定位，正好契合开发者对更高效编程 Agent 基础设施的需求。
uses: 预算有限的开发者 —— 用 DeepSeek / Qwen 等便宜模型跑编程 agent，成本降一个量级
多工具用户 —— 一套终端切换 claude-code、kimi-cli 等不同框架
QA 团队 —— 让 agent 驱动真实浏览器做界面自动化测试

en.tag: A coding agent in your terminal, tuned for low-cost models
en.what: An AI coding assistant in your terminal (a fork of OpenAI Codex) built on the idea of 'swap the harness, not the model': it bundles multiple agent runtimes — claude-code, kimi-cli, qwen-code, deepseek-tui — so cheap open models still perform well. It ships a QA skill that drives real browsers or native apps for UI testing, with native sandboxing on macOS/Linux/Windows.
en.content: A full Rust project: the terminal TUI, a docs site (openinterpreter.com/docs) and install scripts; config and sessions live in ~/.openinterpreter, with /model to switch models, /harness to switch runtimes, plus MCP, hooks and AGENTS.md support.
en.stack: Rust (a 2023 veteran, freshly rewritten from Python), Apache-2.0; supports ACP (Agent Client Protocol) for editors and multiple model providers.
en.hot: The Rust rewrite and focus on serving as a harness for lower-cost models align with demand for efficient coding-agent infrastructure.
uses: Budget-conscious devs — run coding agents on cheap models like DeepSeek / Qwen, an order of magnitude cheaper
Multi-tool users — swap between claude-code, kimi-cli and other harnesses in one terminal
QA teams — let agents drive real browsers for UI automation testing

zh.tag: 港大团队开源的超轻量个人 AI 代理，整合工具、对话与自动化工作流
zh.what: nanobot 是一个开源的超轻量级个人 AI 代理，能够连接用户的日常工具、处理多轮对话并自动化执行工作流。它支持通过插件或 API 集成多种外部服务，让个人用户以低门槛方式拥有自己的智能助手。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 Python 源码、多语言官方文档（含中英日韩等）、PyPI 发行配置及社区交流指南，整体结构清晰，便于二次开发。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 3.11+ 构建，采用 MIT 开源协议，可通过 PyPI 直接安装，依赖现代 Python 异步生态与 LLM API 进行交互。
zh.hot: 仓库已斩获 45.8K+ Stars，本周新增 635 星并跻身 GitHub Python 周榜第 8 名，反映出社区对个人化、低门槛 AI Agent 方案的高度认可。
uses: 个人开发者——希望快速搭建私有 AI 助手，整合日常工具与自动化任务
效率爱好者——需要轻量化代理来统一聊天、日历、搜索等工作流入口
AI 应用学习者——通过阅读源码和文档，深入理解 Agent 架构与工具链设计
开源贡献者——参与多语言文档与插件生态的共建

en.tag: Ultra-lightweight open-source personal AI agent for tools, chats, and workflows
en.what: nanobot is an open-source, ultra-lightweight personal AI agent that connects your everyday tools, handles multi-turn conversations, and automates workflows. It supports integrating external services via plugins or APIs, enabling individuals to own a powerful smart assistant with minimal setup.
en.content: The repository houses core Python source code, multilingual official docs (including Chinese, English, Japanese, and Korean), PyPI release configurations, and community communication guides, all organized for easy customization.
en.stack: Built on Python 3.11+ under the MIT license, installable via PyPI, leveraging modern Python async ecosystems and LLM APIs for interaction.
en.hot: With 45.8K+ stars and 635 new stars this week, ranking 8th on GitHub's Python Weekly Trending, the project reflects strong community demand for lightweight, personalized AI agent solutions.
uses: Individual developers looking to quickly build a private AI assistant that integrates daily tools and automations
Productivity enthusiasts seeking a lightweight agent to unify chat, calendar, and search workflows
AI learners studying agent architecture and tool-chain design through clean source code and docs
Open-source contributors interested in multilingual docs and plugin ecosystem development

zh.tag: 流式3D重建的几何上下文Transformer基础模型
zh.what: LingBot-Map 是一个前馈式 3D 基础模型，能够从流式数据中实时重建三维场景。它通过几何上下文 Transformer 架构，在单一流式框架内统一了坐标定位、密集几何线索编码与长程漂移校正。
zh.content: 仓库提供交互式演示脚本 demo.py、离线批量渲染管线，以及 KITTI 和 Oxford Spires 评估基准；预训练模型权重已同步发布在 HuggingFace 与 ModelScope。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 与 PyTorch 构建，核心采用 Transformer 架构，支持 SDPA 与 FlashInfer 双后端以加速超长序列的流式推理。
zh.hot: 该模型可在 518×378 分辨率下以约 20 FPS 稳定处理超 10,000 帧的长序列，月增 4,765 Star，总星数突破 12,000，跻身 GitHub Python 月榜第 18 名。
uses: 自动驾驶与机器人感知 —— 需要实时从连续视频流构建大规模 3D 场景地图。
AR/VR 内容生成 —— 为沉浸式应用提供高效的长序列几何重建与离线渲染能力。
计算机视觉研究者 —— 探索流式 3D 基础模型、几何 Transformer 与长程漂移校正的前沿方向。

en.tag: Geometric Context Transformer for real-time streaming 3D reconstruction
en.what: LingBot-Map is a feed-forward 3D foundation model that reconstructs scenes from streaming data in real time. It unifies coordinate grounding, dense geometric cues, and long-range drift correction within a single streaming framework via its Geometric Context Transformer architecture.
en.content: The repo ships an interactive demo script (`demo.py`), an offline rendering pipeline, and evaluation benchmarks for KITTI and Oxford Spires, with pretrained weights hosted on both HuggingFace and ModelScope.
en.stack: Built in Python on PyTorch with a Transformer core, supporting both SDPA and FlashInfer backends to accelerate inference over extremely long sequences.
en.hot: Delivering stable ~20 FPS inference at 518×378 across sequences exceeding 10,000 frames, the project gained 4,765 stars this month, surpassing 12,000 total and hitting #18 on GitHub’s monthly Python Trending list.
uses: Autonomous driving & robotics teams — for real-time large-scale 3D mapping from continuous video streams.
AR/VR content creators — seeking efficient long-sequence geometric reconstruction and offline rendering for immersive experiences.
Computer-vision researchers — exploring streaming 3D foundation models, geometric Transformers, and long-range drift correction.

zh.tag: CPU-GPU异构大模型推理与微调框架
zh.what: KTransformers 是一个专注于通过 CPU-GPU 异构计算实现大语言模型高效推理与微调的研究项目。它提供高性能的 kt-kernel 内核，支持多种前沿模型（如 DeepSeek-V4、MiniMax-M3、GLM-5.2 等）的快速部署和定制化微调。
zh.content: 仓库包含 kt-kernel 推理引擎、SFT 微调脚本、多模型教程（如 MiniMax-M3、GLM-5.2、DeepSeek-V4 等），以及 CPU-GPU 专家调度、BF16/FP8 精度支持等优化模块。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 和 C++/CUDA 内核，依赖 PyTorch、Transformers 等深度学习框架，支持 AVX2 及更高指令集的 CPU 后端。
zh.hot: 凭借对最新模型（如 MiniMax-M3、GLM-5.2）的 Day0 支持以及 CPU-GPU 异构推理的显著性能优势，KTransformers 在 GitHub 上迅速获得 18755 星，日增 458 星，位列日榜第 7。
uses: AI 研究员和开发者 —— 在消费级硬件上高效推理和微调最新大模型
需要快速部署前沿模型（如 DeepSeek-V4、MiniMax-M3）的团队
对 CPU-GPU 异构计算优化感兴趣的系统工程师
希望低成本进行大模型 SFT 微调的个人或小团队

en.tag: A flexible framework for heterogeneous LLM inference and fine-tuning
en.what: KTransformers is a research project focused on efficient inference and fine-tuning of large language models through CPU-GPU heterogeneous computing. It provides a high-performance kt-kernel that supports rapid deployment and customized fine-tuning of cutting-edge models like DeepSeek-V4, MiniMax-M3, GLM-5.2, etc.
en.content: The repo includes the kt-kernel inference engine, SFT fine-tuning scripts, tutorials for multiple models (e.g., MiniMax-M3, GLM-5.2, DeepSeek-V4), and optimization modules like CPU-GPU expert scheduling, BF16/FP8 precision support.
en.stack: Built with Python and C++/CUDA kernels, leveraging PyTorch, Transformers, and other deep learning frameworks; supports CPU backends with AVX2 or higher instruction sets.
en.hot: With Day0 support for the latest models (e.g., MiniMax-M3, GLM-5.2) and significant performance advantages in CPU-GPU heterogeneous inference, KTransformers has rapidly gained 18,755 stars on GitHub, adding 458 stars daily and ranking 7th on the daily trending list.
uses: AI researchers and developers — efficiently infer and fine-tune the latest LLMs on consumer hardware
Teams needing rapid deployment of cutting-edge models like DeepSeek-V4, MiniMax-M3
System engineers interested in CPU-GPU heterogeneous computing optimizations
Individuals or small teams looking for low-cost SFT fine-tuning of large models

zh.tag: 把整个项目文件夹变成可查询知识图谱的 AI 技能
zh.what: 给 Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode、Cursor、Gemini CLI 等 AI 编码助手用的 skill：输入 /graphify，它就把整个项目（代码、SQL schema、文档、PDF、图片、视频）映射成一张可查询的知识图谱，代替 grep 翻文件。代码解析走 tree-sitter AST —— 确定性、不用 LLM、完全本地；文档类内容才走模型做语义处理。不是向量索引，是真图谱，每条边标注 EXTRACTED（直接读到）还是 INFERRED（推断出来）。
zh.content: 以 CLI 形式分发（PyPI 包 graphifyy，uv tool install 或 pipx 安装），仓库含 docs/（30 多种语言 README 翻译）和交互式 graph.html 可视化产物；默认分支 v8，迭代很快。
zh.stack: Python + tree-sitter 代码解析，产出力导向 HTML 图；挂到各家 CLI 助手上当 skill 用。
zh.hot: 它用知识图谱补足纯向量检索的局限，直接回应团队构建上下文型 AI 助手时遇到的 RAG 难题。
uses: 接手中大型老项目的开发者 —— 一条命令生成知识图谱，快速搞清代码结构
AI 重度用户 —— 给 agent 换图谱上下文，替代检索不准的向量 RAG
技术文档团队 —— 把文档 / PDF / 图纸一起纳入可查询图谱

en.tag: An AI skill that turns a whole project folder into a queryable knowledge graph
en.what: A skill for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI and more: type /graphify and your entire project — code, SQL schemas, docs, PDFs, images, videos — is mapped into a queryable knowledge graph, replacing grep-and-scroll. Code parsing uses tree-sitter AST: deterministic, no LLM, fully local; only document content goes through a model. Not a vector index — a real graph, with every edge labeled EXTRACTED (read directly) or INFERRED.
en.content: Distributed as a CLI (PyPI package graphifyy, install via uv tool install or pipx); the repo holds docs/ (README translations in 30+ languages) and interactive graph.html visualizations; default branch v8, iterating fast.
en.stack: Python + tree-sitter, outputting force-directed HTML graphs; hooks into each CLI assistant as a skill.
en.hot: Its knowledge-graph alternative to vector-only retrieval speaks directly to limitations teams encounter when building contextual AI assistants.
uses: Developers inheriting large legacy projects — one command maps the codebase into a knowledge graph
Heavy AI users — swap vector RAG for graph context that retrieves the right thing
Docs teams — fold docs, PDFs and diagrams into one queryable graph

zh.tag: 开源一体化产品数据平台：分析、回放、实验、LLM 观测全包
zh.what: 知名开源产品数据平台：产品分析、Web 分析、session 回放、feature flag、A/B 实验、错误追踪、日志、问卷、数据仓库、CDP、LLM 可观测性全部集成在一个系统。最新定位「构建自驱动产品（self-driving products）」：把错误、rage click 等产品信号自动转成分析报告和 PR 供你 review 合并，可从 Slack、Web、桌面端或 MCP 操作，支持 Docker 自托管。
zh.content: 超大型 monorepo：posthog/（Django 后端）、frontend/、products/（各产品线）、rust/、services/、ee/（企业版，单独授权），大量 docker-compose 部署文件与全平台 SDK。
zh.stack: Python/Django + TypeScript/React + Rust 服务，底层 ClickHouse；MIT（ee/ 目录除外）。
zh.hot: 它把完整的产品分析套件与面向 Agent 的自动化能力结合，既有成熟开发者用户，也有清晰的新使用场景。
uses: 产品团队 —— 一个平台替代 GA + 回放 + 实验工具的组合订阅
注重数据合规的公司 —— 自托管部署，用户数据不出机房
AI 产品团队 —— 用 LLM 可观测性追踪自家 agent 的成本与质量

en.tag: The open-source all-in-one product data platform
en.what: The well-known open-source product data platform: product analytics, web analytics, session replay, feature flags, A/B experiments, error tracking, logs, surveys, a data warehouse, CDP pipelines and LLM observability in one system. Its latest positioning is 'self-driving products': product signals like errors and rage clicks are automatically turned into analysis reports and PRs for you to review and merge — operable from Slack, web, desktop or MCP, and self-hostable via Docker.
en.content: A huge monorepo: posthog/ (Django backend), frontend/, products/ (each product line), rust/, services/, ee/ (enterprise code, separately licensed), lots of docker-compose files and SDKs for every platform.
en.stack: Python/Django + TypeScript/React + Rust services over ClickHouse; MIT (except ee/).
en.hot: The project combines a broad product-analytics suite with an agent-facing automation narrative, giving an established developer audience a clear reason to revisit it.
uses: Product teams — replace the GA + replay + experimentation stack with one platform
Compliance-sensitive companies — self-host so user data never leaves your infra
AI product teams — track your agents' cost and quality with LLM observability

zh.tag: 一键部署本地 AI 服务器，集成推理、对话、Agent 与 RAG
zh.what: ODS 是一个本地 AI 服务器部署系统，能将你的 PC、Mac 或 Linux 设备变成功能齐全的私有 AI 服务器。它集成了大模型推理、类 ChatGPT 聊天界面、语音交互、智能代理、自动化工作流、RAG 检索增强生成以及图像生成等能力，无需依赖云端服务。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的安装脚本、服务编排（Docker Compose）、控制面板、CLI 工具、测试套件和运维文档。核心运行时位于 ods/ 目录下，提供一键安装脚本和模块化扩展。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 和 Docker Compose 构建，整合 Ollama、Open WebUI、n8n、ComfyUI 等开源组件，支持 GPU 加速和本地模型管理。
zh.hot: 本周新增 321 星，总星数 3412，位列 GitHub Python 周榜第 12。用户渴望私有化、零配置的本地 AI 方案，ODS 一站式解决了碎片化部署痛点。
uses: 个人开发者/极客 —— 在本地搭建私有 AI 助手，保护数据隐私
企业/团队 —— 内部部署 AI 服务，避免敏感数据外泄
AI 爱好者 —— 实验多种模型和 Agent 工作流，无需复杂配置
教育/研究 —— 低成本搭建 AI 实验环境，支持教学与原型验证

en.tag: Turn any PC into a private AI server with LLM, chat, agents, RAG, and image gen
en.what: ODS is an AI server deployment system that turns your PC, Mac, or Linux box into a full-featured private AI server. It integrates LLM inference, ChatGPT-style chat UI, voice, agents, workflows, RAG, and image generation, all running locally without cloud dependency.
en.content: The repo includes installers, service orchestration (Docker Compose), a control dashboard, CLI, tests, and operator docs. The runtime lives in ods/ directory with one-click install scripts and modular extensions.
en.stack: Built with Python and Docker Compose, integrating Ollama, Open WebUI, n8n, ComfyUI, and other open-source components, with GPU acceleration and local model management.
en.hot: Gained 321 stars this week, total 3412, ranking #12 on GitHub Python weekly trending. Users crave private, zero-config local AI solutions; ODS solves the fragmentation pain point with an all-in-one deployment.
uses: Individual developers/enthusiasts — set up a private AI assistant locally with data privacy
Enterprises/teams — deploy internal AI services without exposing sensitive data
AI hobbyists — experiment with various models and agent workflows without complex setup
Education/research — build low-cost AI lab environments for teaching and prototyping

zh.tag: 闲鱼多账号自动化客服与商品管理工具
zh.what: 基于 Python + FastAPI 开发的闲鱼自动化客服系统，支持多账号管理、智能自动回复、自动发货、自动评价、商品发布与采集等功能。通过 WebSocket 实时接收消息，集成 AI 回复与定时任务，实现闲鱼虚拟商品全流程自动化。
zh.content: 仓库包含主系统（backend-web、websocket、scheduler、frontend）和返佣子系统（promotion），提供多账号管理、自动回复、AI 回复、自动发货、商品发布、订单评价、商品采集与分销、通知风控等完整模块。附带 Docker 部署脚本和 Windows 桌面启动器。
zh.stack: 后端：Python 3.11+、FastAPI、SQLAlchemy 2.0、MySQL 8.0、Redis 7、Playwright、APScheduler、Loguru。前端：React 18 + TypeScript、Vite、TailwindCSS、Zustand、Lucide React。部署：Docker / Docker Compose、Nginx。
zh.hot: 本周新增 206 星，总星数达 5925，位列 GitHub Python 周榜第 13 名。该项目精准切中闲鱼卖家自动化管理需求，功能全面且开源免费，社区活跃（微信群、QQ群、Telegram），持续更新。
uses: 闲鱼虚拟商品卖家 —— 实现自动回复、自动发货、自动评价，提升效率
多账号运营者 —— 集中管理多个闲鱼账号，统一消息与订单处理

开发者与定制需求 —— 基于开源代码二次开发，或联系作者定制功能

en.tag: Multi-account auto-reply & virtual goods management for Xianyu
en.what: An automated customer service system for Xianyu (Alibaba's second-hand marketplace) built with Python and FastAPI. It supports multi-account management, intelligent auto-reply, auto-delivery of virtual goods, auto-rating, product listing and scraping, all via WebSocket real-time messaging and AI integration.
en.content: The repo includes a main system (backend-web, websocket, scheduler, frontend) and a promotion subsystem (promotion), covering multi-account management, auto-reply, AI reply, auto-delivery, product listing, order & review, product scraping & distribution, notification & risk control. Comes with Docker deployment scripts and a Windows desktop launcher.
en.stack: Backend: Python 3.11+, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0, MySQL 8.0, Redis 7, Playwright, APScheduler, Loguru. Frontend: React 18 + TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS, Zustand, Lucide React. Deployment: Docker / Docker Compose, Nginx.
en.hot: Gained 206 stars this week, reaching 5925 total, ranking #13 on GitHub Python weekly trending. It precisely addresses Xianyu sellers' automation needs with comprehensive features, open-source and free, active community (WeChat, QQ, Telegram), and continuous updates.
uses: Xianyu virtual goods sellers — automate replies, delivery, and ratings to boost efficiency
Multi-account operators — centrally manage multiple Xianyu accounts for unified messaging and order handling
Affiliate promoters — use the promotion subsystem to auto-select, publish, and delete products for commissions
Developers & customization — fork the open-source code for further development or contact the author for custom features

zh.tag: 统一语义元数据交换的开放标准
zh.what: Apache Ossie 是一个行业范围的规范，旨在标准化跨分析、AI 和 BI 平台的语义元数据交换方式，提供厂商中立的单一语义数据源。它解决了不同工具间同一指标定义不一致、团队手动协调定义耗时、AI 代理因业务逻辑不一致而产生不可靠输出等问题。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心规范（spec.md）、机器可读的 schema（spec.yaml、osi-schema.json）、参考转换器（支持 dbt、GoodData、Polaris、Salesforce 等格式）、示例语义模型（含完整 TPC-DS 模型）以及验证工具。
zh.stack: 基于 JSON 和 YAML 的规范，Python 实现参考转换器和验证工具。
zh.hot: 本周新增 827 星，总星数 1428，增长迅猛。数据栈碎片化是普遍痛点，Ossie 作为 Apache 孵化项目，提供了厂商中立的统一方案，吸引了大量关注。
uses: 数据平台团队 —— 统一不同 BI 工具和分析平台的语义层，减少数据定义冲突
AI 代理开发者 —— 确保 AI 代理基于一致的业务逻辑生成可靠输出
数据工程师/分析师 —— 通过标准格式交换语义模型，提升协作效率
工具厂商 —— 实现与 Ossie 的互操作，扩大生态兼容性

en.tag: Open standard for semantic metadata exchange across analytics, AI, and BI
en.what: Apache Ossie is an industry-wide specification effort to standardize how semantic metadata is exchanged across analytics, AI, and BI platforms, providing a vendor-neutral single source of truth for semantic data. It addresses issues like inconsistent KPI definitions across tools, time-consuming manual reconciliation, and unreliable AI agent outputs due to inconsistent business logic.
en.content: The repository contains the core specification (spec.md), machine-readable schema (spec.yaml, osi-schema.json), reference converters (to/from dbt, GoodData, Polaris, Salesforce, etc.), example semantic models (including a complete TPC-DS model), and validation tooling.
en.stack: JSON and YAML based specification, with Python implementations for reference converters and validation tools.
en.hot: Gained 827 stars this week, total 1428, rapid growth. Data stack fragmentation is a common pain point, and Ossie as an Apache incubating project offers a vendor-neutral unified solution, attracting significant attention.
uses: Data platform teams — unify semantic layer across different BI tools and analytics platforms, reduce data definition conflicts
AI agent developers — ensure AI agents produce reliable outputs based on consistent business logic
Data engineers/analysts — exchange semantic models in standard format, improve collaboration efficiency
Tool vendors — implement interoperability with Ossie, expand ecosystem compatibility

zh.tag: AI 加速的跨平台多协议并发下载器
zh.what: Ghost-Downloader-3 是一款基于 Python 和 Qt 构建的下一代下载工具，融合 AI 智能加速与多协议支持。它能够处理 HTTP、BT、M3U8 等多种协议，并内置 YouTube、Bilibili 等平台的解析器，同时提供浏览器扩展和 Android 版本。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的下载器源代码、跨平台构建脚本、浏览器扩展源码以及 Android 版本。提供预编译的二进制包，支持 Windows、macOS、Linux 和 Android 平台。
zh.stack: 技术栈包括 Python、Qt（用于 GUI）、aria2 兼容 RPC、多线程下载引擎，以及 AI 加速模块。依赖包括 PyQt6、requests、yt-dlp 等。
zh.hot: 本周新增 1122 星，总星数达 6885，因其 AI 加速、多协议支持和跨平台特性而广受关注。作为作者的首个 Python 项目，其功能完整性和创新性吸引了大量用户。
uses: 需要高效下载多种协议文件的普通用户
希望利用 AI 加速下载的技术爱好者
需要从 YouTube/Bilibili 下载视频的内容创作者
寻找开源替代 IDM 的跨平台用户

en.tag: AI-boosted cross-platform multi-protocol concurrent downloader
en.what: Ghost-Downloader-3 is a next-generation downloader built with Python and Qt, featuring AI-powered smart acceleration and multi-protocol support. It handles HTTP, BT, M3U8, and more, with built-in parsers for YouTube and Bilibili, plus a browser extension and Android version.
en.content: The repository contains the full downloader source code, cross-platform build scripts, browser extension source, and Android version. Precompiled binaries are available for Windows, macOS, Linux, and Android.
en.stack: Tech stack includes Python, Qt for GUI, aria2-compatible RPC, multithreaded download engine, and AI acceleration modules. Dependencies include PyQt6, requests, yt-dlp, etc.
en.hot: Gained 1122 stars this week, reaching 6885 total, due to its AI acceleration, multi-protocol support, and cross-platform nature. As the author's first Python project, its completeness and innovation attract many users.
uses: General users needing efficient multi-protocol downloads
Tech enthusiasts wanting AI-accelerated downloads
Content creators downloading from YouTube/Bilibili
Cross-platform users seeking an open-source IDM alternative

zh.tag: 用LLM从非结构化文本中提取结构化信息，支持溯源与可视化
zh.what: LangExtract 是一个 Python 库，利用大语言模型从非结构化文本中提取结构化信息。它支持精确的源文本定位，确保每个提取结果都可追溯到原文，并提供交互式可视化。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Python 包、文档、示例（如医学报告提取、罗密欧与朱丽叶全文提取）以及交互式可视化 HTML 生成器。
zh.stack: 基于 Python，支持 Google Gemini、OpenAI 等云端模型以及 Ollama 本地模型，使用 Pydantic 定义输出模式。
zh.hot: 本周新增 506 星，总星数 37630，因其解决了非结构化数据提取中的溯源和可视化痛点，且支持多种 LLM 后端。
uses: 临床医生：从电子病历或放射报告中提取结构化数据
研究人员：从大量文献或文档中提取关键信息
开发者：构建基于LLM的文档处理流水线
法律/金融从业者：从合同或报表中提取结构化字段

en.tag: Extract structured info from unstructured text using LLMs with source grounding and visualization
en.what: LangExtract is a Python library that uses LLMs to extract structured information from unstructured text. It provides precise source grounding, mapping every extraction to its exact location, and offers interactive visualization.
en.content: The repo includes the Python package, documentation, examples (e.g., medication extraction, Romeo and Juliet full text), and an interactive visualization HTML generator.
en.stack: Built with Python, supports cloud models like Google Gemini and OpenAI, as well as local models via Ollama, using Pydantic for output schemas.
en.hot: Gained 506 stars this week, total 37630, because it solves the pain points of source grounding and visualization in unstructured data extraction, and supports multiple LLM backends.
uses: Clinicians: extract structured data from EHRs or radiology reports
Researchers: extract key info from large volumes of literature or documents
Developers: build LLM-based document processing pipelines
Legal/Finance professionals: extract structured fields from contracts or statements

zh.tag: xAI 开源 314B 参数 MoE 大模型
zh.what: Grok-1 是 xAI 开源的 3140 亿参数混合专家（MoE）大语言模型。该仓库提供 JAX 示例代码，用于加载和运行 Grok-1 的开放权重模型。
zh.content: 仓库包含 JAX 示例代码、模型权重下载链接（通过 BitTorrent 或 HuggingFace）以及运行脚本。模型权重以 Apache 2.0 许可证发布。
zh.stack: 基于 JAX 框架实现，依赖 SentencePiece 分词器。模型架构为 64 层、48 个查询注意力头、8 个键/值头，支持 RoPE 和 8-bit 量化。
zh.hot: Elon Musk 的 xAI 开源其旗舰模型，314B 参数规模引发广泛关注。GitHub 星标超 5.1 万，成为本周最热门 AI 项目之一。
uses: AI 研究人员：研究 MoE 架构和大型语言模型
开发者：在充足 GPU 资源下测试和推理 Grok-1
开源社区：探索和贡献大型模型的开源实现

en.tag: xAI open-sources 314B MoE large language model
en.what: Grok-1 is xAI's open-source 314B parameter Mixture of Experts (MoE) large language model. This repository provides JAX example code for loading and running the open-weights model.
en.content: The repository contains JAX example code, model weight download links (via BitTorrent or HuggingFace), and a run script. The model weights are released under Apache 2.0 license.
en.stack: Implemented with JAX framework, using SentencePiece tokenizer. Model architecture: 64 layers, 48 query attention heads, 8 key/value heads, supports RoPE and 8-bit quantization.
en.hot: Elon Musk's xAI open-sources its flagship model; 314B parameters attract massive attention. Over 51K stars on GitHub, one of the hottest AI projects this week.
uses: AI researchers: study MoE architecture and large language models
Developers: test and inference Grok-1 with sufficient GPU resources
Open-source community: explore and contribute to open-source large model implementations

en.tag: Official Anthropic workshops for Claude agent engineering and production AI workflows
en.what: This is the official repository for Anthropic's "Code with Claude" workshops, demonstrating how to build, evaluate, and ship production-grade AI agents using Claude Managed Agents and Claude Code. It covers multi-agent decomposition, MCP tool integration, eval-driven development, memory mechanisms, and cost optimization.
en.content: The repo contains nine standalone, runnable workshop directories—each with complete code samples and hands-on labs—spanning from model selection and agent battles to a production-grade Deal Desk multi-agent research system, forming a progressive learning path from basics to deployment.
en.stack: Primarily TypeScript alongside the Claude Managed Agents API, Claude Code, and MCP protocol; frontends use React/Vite, with some examples in Streamlit/Python, and includes a multi-layer evaluation framework combining programmatic checks with LLM-as-judge.
en.hot: Backed by Anthropic's official brand and surging to 1645 stars (with 45 new today, ranking 6th on GitHub Trending), it serves as the most authoritative hands-on reference for agent engineering. Developers can directly reproduce enterprise-grade multi-agent systems, eval-driven development, and memory architectures—filling the critical gap between prototypes and production.
uses: Engineers and architects looking to systematically master Claude ecosystem agent development
Technical teams exploring the path from prototype to production-grade AI systems
Researchers seeking official reference patterns for eval-driven development and multi-agent orchestration

zh.tag: 开源 Agentic 浏览器，人机双模式替代商业 AI 浏览器
zh.what: BrowserOS 是一个开源 Chromium 分支，内置 AI 代理，旨在成为 ChatGPT Atlas、Perplexity Comet 和 Dia 的隐私优先替代品。同一代码库还包含 BrowserClaw，一款专为 AI Agent 设计的浏览器，允许 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等 MCP 客户端通过用户已登录的账户直接驱动浏览器。所有数据本地处理，用户自备 API Key，强调隐私与可控性。
zh.content: 仓库以单一代码库维护两个产品：面向人类的 BrowserOS（内置 AI 的 Chromium 浏览器）和面向 AI Agent 的 BrowserClaw（支持 MCP 协议、可复用已有登录态的浏览器）。采用 TypeScript 开发，提供 macOS、Windows、Linux 多平台安装包。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 与 Chromium 内核构建，采用 AGPL-3.0 开源协议。通过 MCP（Model Context Protocol）与外部 AI 客户端集成，支持本地运行与用户自托管。
zh.hot: 在 ChatGPT Atlas、Perplexity Comet 等闭源 AI 浏览器密集发布的背景下，BrowserOS 以 AGPL-3.0 开源、本地优先、自带密钥的模式切中隐私与可控性痛点。本周新增 503 Star 跃至 12.3k，跻身 GitHub TypeScript 周榜第 10，反映出开发者对「Agent 可控浏览器基础设施」的强烈需求。
uses: 注重隐私的用户 —— 想要本地运行、不将浏览数据上传至第三方云端的 AI 浏览器使用者。
AI Agent 开发者 —— 需要让 Claude Code、Cursor 等 MCP 客户端操作真实浏览器、复用已有登录态的自动化场景。
开源替代方案寻求者 —— 寻找 ChatGPT Atlas、Perplexity Comet 或 Dia 的开源、可自托管替代品的人。
前端/自动化测试工程师 —— 需要基于 Chromium 构建、支持 AI 驱动的浏览器自动化工作流。

en.tag: Open-source Agentic browser serving both humans and AI agents
en.what: BrowserOS is an open-source Chromium fork with a built-in AI agent, positioned as a privacy-first alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, and Dia. The same codebase also powers BrowserClaw, a browser built for AI agents that lets MCP clients like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor drive it using your existing logged-in sessions. It runs locally and requires you to bring your own AI keys, keeping data private and user-controlled.
en.content: The monorepo maintains two products from one codebase: BrowserOS, a Chromium-based browser with built-in AI for humans, and BrowserClaw, an MCP-compatible browser for AI agents. It is written in TypeScript and ships native installers for macOS, Windows, and Linux.
en.stack: Built on TypeScript and the Chromium engine, licensed under AGPL-3.0. Integrates with external AI clients via MCP (Model Context Protocol) and supports local, self-hosted operation with your own AI keys.
en.hot: Amid a wave of closed-source AI browsers like ChatGPT Atlas and Perplexity Comet, BrowserOS has gained traction by offering an AGPL-3.0 licensed, local-first, bring-your-own-keys alternative that prioritizes privacy and control. It added 503 stars this week to reach 12.3k, landing at #10 on the GitHub TypeScript Weekly Trending chart, signaling strong developer demand for open, agent-controllable browser infrastructure.
uses: Privacy-conscious users seeking a local-first AI browser that keeps browsing data off third-party clouds.
AI agent developers who need MCP-compatible browsers for Claude Code, Cursor, or Codex to automate tasks using existing login sessions.
Open-source advocates looking for a self-hostable alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, or Dia.
Automation engineers building AI-driven browser workflows on top of a Chromium-based stack.

zh.tag: 自托管 AI 虚拟伴侣，支持实时语音与游戏互动
zh.what: AIRI 是一个自托管的 AI 虚拟角色容器，旨在复现 Neuro-sama 级别的交互体验，让用户拥有完全可控的“赛博生命体”。它支持实时语音对话，并能以 AI 代理形态操控 Minecraft、Factorio 等游戏，实现跨 Web 与桌面端的多模态陪伴。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的客户端与服务端代码，提供 Web 及桌面端（macOS/Windows）应用外壳，并内置游戏操控与实时语音交互模块。文档与国际化资源覆盖中、英、日、俄等多语言，配合社区 Discord、Telegram、QQ 等渠道形成完整生态。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 全栈开发，前端使用现代 Web 技术栈构建跨平台界面，服务端支持自托管部署与实时通信。依赖 LLM 后端与语音合成/识别技术，实现多模态 AI 代理与游戏自动化交互。
zh.hot: 凭借“自托管+虚拟女友+游戏 Agent”的精准定位，仓库已积累 42.8k Stars，今日新增 45 并冲入 TypeScript 日榜第 10，反映出用户对可控 AI 陪伴的强需求。以现象级 VTuber Neuro-sama 为标杆，叠加 Minecraft、Factorio 等具象化应用场景，使其在 AI 角色扮演与 Agent 社区中快速破圈。
uses: AI 角色扮演爱好者 —— 想自托管一个可深度定制的虚拟伴侣，拥有独立“灵魂”与记忆。
游戏玩家与直播主 —— 需要能实时语音互动、并能一起玩 Minecraft/Factorio 的 AI 搭档。
开发者与 Agent 研究者 —— 希望基于 TypeScript 全栈方案快速搭建多模态 AI 代理原型。
隐私敏感用户 —— 追求数据完全自持，不愿将个人 AI 交互托管至第三方云平台。

en.tag: Self-hosted AI waifu companion with real-time voice chat and game-playing agents
en.what: AIRI is a self-hosted container for AI "souls" and virtual characters, aiming to recreate the interactive depth of Neuro-sama as a user-owned cyber companion. It supports real-time voice chat and can autonomously play games like Minecraft and Factorio through AI agents, running natively on Web, macOS, and Windows.
en.content: The repo houses full client and server code, application shells for Web and desktop (macOS/Windows), plus built-in modules for real-time voice interaction and game control. It includes multilingual docs and a vibrant community ecosystem across Discord, Telegram, QQ, and WeChat.
en.stack: Built on a TypeScript full-stack, with a modern frontend for cross-platform UI and a self-hostable backend for real-time communication. It integrates LLM backends with speech synthesis/recognition to power multimodal AI agents and in-game automation.
en.hot: Its precise positioning as a self-hosted, user-owned waifu and game-playing agent has earned it 42.8k stars, with 45 new stars today and a top-10 spot on the TypeScript trending list, signaling strong demand for controllable AI companions. By targeting Neuro-sama-level interactivity and concrete use cases like Minecraft and Factorio, it has broken out across both AI roleplay and agent-builder communities.
uses: AI roleplay enthusiasts who want a self-hosted, deeply customizable virtual companion with persistent "soul" and memory.
Gamers and streamers looking for an AI partner that can voice-chat in real time and play Minecraft or Factorio alongside them.
Developers and agent researchers seeking a TypeScript full-stack base to prototype multimodal AI agents quickly.
Privacy-conscious users who insist on full data ownership and refuse to host personal AI interactions on third-party clouds.

zh.tag: 为LLM和AI编辑器提供最新代码文档的MCP服务
zh.what: Context7 是一个 MCP 服务器，能够为 LLM 和 AI 代码编辑器（如 Cursor）提供最新、版本特定的代码文档和示例。它解决了 LLM 依赖过时训练数据导致 API 幻觉的问题。
zh.content: 仓库包含 MCP 服务器实现、CLI 工具、Smithery 集成以及多语言 README。用户可通过 `use context7` 指令在提示中注入实时文档。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript，使用 MCP 协议（Model Context Protocol），可部署为 Smithery 服务或本地运行。
zh.hot: 本周新增 475 星，总星数近 6 万，位列 TypeScript 周榜第 8。它解决了 AI 编码中文档过时的痛点，与 Cursor 等编辑器深度集成，实用性强。
uses: AI 代码编辑器用户（如 Cursor、VS Code 插件）——在提示中获取最新 API 文档
开发者——在 LLM 聊天中查询特定库的版本化文档
团队——集成到 CI/CD 或开发工作流中确保文档时效性

en.tag: Up-to-date code documentation for LLMs and AI code editors via MCP
en.what: Context7 is an MCP server that provides up-to-date, version-specific code documentation and examples to LLMs and AI code editors (e.g., Cursor). It solves the problem of LLMs relying on outdated training data and hallucinating APIs.
en.content: The repo contains the MCP server implementation, CLI tool, Smithery integration, and multilingual READMEs. Users can inject live docs into prompts via the `use context7` directive.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, uses the Model Context Protocol (MCP), deployable as a Smithery service or run locally.
en.hot: Gained 475 stars this week, reaching nearly 60k total, ranking #8 on TypeScript weekly. It addresses the pain point of outdated docs in AI coding, deeply integrates with editors like Cursor, and is highly practical.
uses: AI code editor users (e.g., Cursor, VS Code extensions) — get latest API docs in prompts
Developers — query version-specific docs for libraries in LLM chats
Teams — integrate into CI/CD or dev workflows to ensure documentation freshness

zh.tag: 面向AI/ML研究员的数学、计算机与AI开放通识教程
zh.what: 这是一本强调直觉优先的开放教科书，系统覆盖数学、计算机科学与人工智能核心概念，帮助读者深入理解而非应试。作者整理了个人在AI/ML领域工作多年的笔记，并已被成功用于DeepMind、OpenAI等顶尖公司面试准备。仓库还内置MCP服务器，允许Claude、Cursor等AI助手将全书作为知识库调用。
zh.content: 仓库包含按章节组织的Markdown教材，涵盖向量、矩阵、微积分、统计、概率、机器学习、计算语言学和计算机视觉八大主题。此外还提供了一个基于TypeScript的MCP服务器实现，附带教育工具和示例代码，支持本地部署为AI助手知识库。
zh.stack: 主要采用TypeScript构建MCP服务器及配套工具，核心内容以Markdown格式编写，便于在线阅读和版本控制。用户需本地克隆仓库并配合支持MCP协议的AI客户端（如Claude Code、Cursor）使用知识库功能。
zh.hot: 仓库凭借“直觉优先、拒绝死记硬背”的实用定位，在AI人才竞争加剧的背景下精准击中从业者痛点，Star数已达6,763且单日新增200，冲上Trending日榜第3名。多名读者凭借此笔记成功入职DeepMind、OpenAI等顶级机构，进一步放大了口碑效应。
uses: AI/ML从业者 —— 希望夯实数学与算法基础、深入理解模型原理的工程师与研究员
面试候选人 —— 准备DeepMind、OpenAI等顶尖实验室研究岗面试的求职者
AI辅助学习者 —— 想通过Claude、Cursor等AI助手交互式查询知识库的自学者
技术写作者 —— 寻求高质量开源教材作为参考或补充材料的课程设计者

en.tag: Open compendium on maths, CS and AI for aspiring research engineers
en.what: This is an open, intuition-first textbook covering core concepts in mathematics, computer science, and artificial intelligence from the ground up. It compiles the author's years of AI/ML notes and has been used to prepare for interviews at top labs like DeepMind and OpenAI. The repository also ships an MCP server that turns the compendium into a queryable knowledge base for AI assistants such as Claude and Cursor.
en.content: The repository houses chapter-based Markdown textbooks spanning vectors, matrices, calculus, statistics, probability, machine learning, computational linguistics, and computer vision. It also includes a TypeScript-based MCP server with educational tooling and example implementations, enabling local deployment as a knowledge base for AI assistants.
en.stack: The MCP server and tooling are built primarily in TypeScript, while the core curriculum is authored in Markdown for web readability and version control. Users need to clone the repo locally and pair it with an MCP-compatible AI client—such as Claude Code or Cursor—to leverage the knowledge-base features.
en.hot: Its 'intuition-first, no hand-waving' approach resonates deeply with practitioners amid intensifying AI talent competition, driving the repo to 6,763 stars and a single-day gain of 200 that landed it at #3 on GitHub Trending. The author's credentials—Y Combinator alumnus and successful interview prep for DeepMind and OpenAI—have further amplified its credibility and word-of-mouth appeal.
uses: AI/ML practitioners — engineers and researchers looking to solidify mathematical foundations and deeply understand model mechanics
Interview candidates — job seekers preparing for research roles at top labs like DeepMind, OpenAI, and Nvidia
AI-assisted learners — self-learners who want to interactively query the compendium via Claude, Cursor, or other MCP-compatible assistants
Technical educators — course designers and writers seeking high-quality open-source textbooks as teaching references

zh.tag: AI 代理的统一控制面板，路由、编排、观察一站式管理
zh.what: Claude Code Router 是一个本地控制平面，让你从一个桌面应用集中管理所有 AI 代理和模型提供商。它支持连接 Claude Code、Codex、Grok CLI 等客户端，并可在多个模型间路由、故障转移、扩展工具链，同时提供完整的可观测性。
zh.content: 仓库包含桌面应用（支持 macOS/Windows/Linux）、CLI 工具、提供者预设（如 Kimi K3）、路由规则配置、仪表盘（余额/用量监控）以及详细的文档和快速入门指南。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 开发，依赖 Electron 桌面框架，集成多种 AI 模型 API（如 Kimi、OpenAI 兼容接口），使用本地存储管理配置和路由规则。
zh.hot: 36k+ Stars 说明开发者对统一管理多个 AI 代理的强烈需求，本周新增 311 Stars 持续升温，尤其吸引使用 Claude Code、Codex 等多代理的开发者。
uses: AI 代理开发者 —— 集中管理多个模型和代理，简化路由与故障转移
团队协作场景 —— 统一配置和监控所有 AI 请求，提升可观测性
多模型实验 —— 快速切换不同提供商（如 Kimi、OpenAI）对比效果
工具链编排 —— 在代理工作流中动态注入新工具和能力

en.tag: One local control plane for every AI agent: route, orchestrate, observe
en.what: Claude Code Router is a local control plane that lets you manage all AI agents and model providers from one desktop app. It connects clients like Claude Code, Codex, Grok CLI, and routes requests across models with failover, tool orchestration, and full observability.
en.content: The repo includes a desktop app (macOS/Windows/Linux), CLI tool, provider presets (e.g., Kimi K3), routing rules configuration, dashboard (balance/usage monitoring), and comprehensive docs with quick-start guides.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, leverages Electron for the desktop app, integrates multiple AI model APIs (e.g., Kimi, OpenAI-compatible), and uses local storage for configuration and routing rules.
en.hot: With 36k+ stars and 311 new stars this week, it addresses the strong demand for unified management of multiple AI agents, especially appealing to developers using Claude Code, Codex, and other agents.
uses: AI agent developers — centrally manage multiple models and agents, simplify routing and failover
Team collaboration — unify configuration and monitoring of all AI requests for better observability
Multi-model experimentation — quickly switch between providers (e.g., Kimi, OpenAI) to compare results
Tool orchestration — dynamically inject new tools and capabilities into agent workflows

zh.tag: React 无限画布 SDK，白板应用构建利器
zh.what: tldraw 是一个功能完备的无限画布引擎，可作为任何画布应用的基础。它提供了默认的白板工具集，同时支持自定义形状、工具、绑定和 UI 组件，让开发者轻松构建定制化的画布体验。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 SDK、示例项目、文档和启动套件。核心 SDK 提供画布渲染、多用户实时协作、绘图与图表、运行时 API 以及 AI 集成等能力。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 和 React 构建，依赖 npm 包 tldraw。支持自托管实时协作（@tldraw/sync）和 DOM 画布渲染。
zh.hot: 本周新增 368 颗星，总星数近 5 万，因其强大的可扩展性和被 Google、Shopify 等巨头采用而持续火爆。
uses: React 开发者 —— 快速集成无限画布功能到自己的应用中
产品团队 —— 构建白板协作工具、设计原型或流程图应用
AI 开发者 —— 利用画布原语构建与 LLM 交互的界面

en.tag: Build infinite canvas apps in React with the tldraw SDK
en.what: tldraw is a feature-complete infinite canvas engine designed to be the foundation for any canvas app. It provides a default whiteboarding toolset and supports custom shapes, tools, bindings, and UI components for tailored experiences.
en.content: The repository includes the core SDK, examples, documentation, and starter kits. The core SDK offers canvas rendering, real-time multiplayer collaboration, drawing and diagramming, runtime API, and AI integrations.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript and React, depends on the npm package tldraw. Supports self-hosted real-time collaboration via @tldraw/sync and DOM canvas rendering.
en.hot: Gained 368 stars this week, with nearly 50k total stars, remaining popular due to its extensibility and adoption by giants like Google and Shopify.
uses: React developers — quickly integrate infinite canvas into their apps
Product teams — build whiteboarding collaboration tools, design prototypes, or flowchart apps
AI developers — leverage canvas primitives to build interfaces interacting with LLMs

zh.tag: 构建可靠LLM应用的12条原则
zh.what: 该项目受12 Factor App启发，总结了构建生产级LLM应用的12条原则。它强调LLM应用应主要由确定性代码组成，仅在关键点引入LLM步骤，而非完全依赖智能体循环。
zh.content: 仓库包含12条原则的详细文档、相关演讲视频链接，以及一个用于快速创建符合原则的项目的CLI工具（npx/uvx create-12-factor-agent）。
zh.stack: 基于TypeScript，依赖Node.js/npm或uvx运行CLI工具。
zh.hot: 该项目以24.5k+ Star迅速走红，因为它直击LLM应用开发中的痛点，提供了实用且反主流的原则，吸引了大量开发者和创业者关注。
uses: LLM应用开发者——学习构建可靠生产级应用的原则
创业者——借鉴经验避免常见陷阱
技术决策者——评估LLM应用架构的最佳实践

en.tag: 12 principles for building reliable LLM applications
en.what: Inspired by 12 Factor App, this project outlines 12 principles for building production-grade LLM applications. It emphasizes that LLM apps should be mostly deterministic code with LLM steps sprinkled at key points, rather than relying on agentic loops.
en.content: The repo contains detailed documentation of the 12 principles, links to talk videos, and a CLI tool (npx/uvx create-12-factor-agent) to scaffold projects following the principles.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, requires Node.js/npm or uvx for the CLI tool.
en.hot: With over 24.5k stars, it quickly gained traction by addressing pain points in LLM app development with practical, contrarian principles that resonate with developers and founders.
uses: LLM app developers — learn principles for reliable production apps
Founders — avoid common pitfalls with proven patterns
Tech decision-makers — evaluate best practices for LLM architecture

zh.tag: 多款 AI 编程代理的统一极简 Web 界面
zh.what: T3 Code 是一个极简的 Web GUI，用于统一接入和操作多种 AI 编程代理。它支持 Codex、Claude、Cursor 和 OpenCode 等主流工具，让用户无需在不同 CLI 之间切换即可进行 AI 辅助编码。
zh.content: 仓库包含一个基于 Web 的桌面应用界面，以及通过 npx 运行的 CLI 入口；docs 目录下提供了架构概览、提供商接入指南和运维文档。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 构建，前端采用 Vite+（vp）工具链；提供跨平台桌面客户端，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Arch Linux 发行版。
zh.hot: 一周内新增 613 Star 达到 14.1K，位列 GitHub TypeScript 周榜第 7；其「一个界面统一管理多个 AI 编码代理」的定位精准切中了开发者对多工具碎片化体验的痛点。
uses: 多 AI 编程工具用户 —— 需要在 Codex、Claude、Cursor 等不同代理间切换的开发者
偏好 GUI 的工程师 —— 不习惯纯命令行，希望获得可视化界面来管理 AI 编码会话
早期尝鲜者 —— 愿意尝试新工具链并接受当前版本存在 bug 的技术爱好者

en.tag: Minimal unified web GUI for coding agents like Codex, Claude, Cursor and OpenCode
en.what: T3 Code is a minimal web GUI that unifies access to multiple AI coding agents. It supports popular providers including Codex, Claude, Cursor, and OpenCode, eliminating the need to switch between different CLIs for AI-assisted development.
en.content: The repository includes a web-based desktop app interface and a CLI entrypoint via npx; the docs directory covers architecture overviews, provider guides, and operations references.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript and the Vite+ (vp) toolchain for the frontend; offers cross-platform desktop clients for Windows, macOS, and Arch Linux.
en.hot: It gained 613 stars this week to reach 14.1K, ranking 7th on GitHub's TypeScript weekly trending list; its positioning as a single pane of glass for multiple AI coding agents directly addresses developer friction from fragmented tooling.
uses: Multi-agent developers who switch between Codex, Claude, Cursor, and other coding agents
GUI-preferring engineers seeking a visual interface over pure CLI workflows for AI-assisted coding
Early adopters comfortable with experimental tools and willing to tolerate current bugs

zh.tag: 你的「AI 团队总管」：把一堆 agent 组织起来 7×24 干活
zh.what: 定位「Chief Agent Operator」：把多个 AI agent 当工作单元统一招聘、调度和汇报。核心功能包括 Agent Builder（描述需求即可自动配置出可用 agent）、Agent Groups（多 agent 并行协作）、Pages/Schedule/Project/Workspace 协作面板，以及白盒可编辑的 Personal Memory；支持接入任意模型和模态，号称 10000+ skills 和 MCP 插件生态。
zh.content: 可自部署的 Web 应用（Vercel/Docker/Zeabur/Sealos 一键部署），仓库含完整中英文档、Changelog、插件体系和本地开发指南；默认分支 canary，今天仍在高频 push。
zh.stack: TypeScript + Next.js 系 Web 应用，Docker 自托管，插件走 MCP 协议；许可证为自定义（非标准）。
zh.hot: 多 Agent 调度与即时通信网关的组合，让这一成熟 AI 应用平台形成了明确的协作化方向。
uses: 一人公司 / 自由职业者 —— 组建 7×24 自动干活的 agent 团队处理重复工作
运营团队 —— 定时调度 agent 做日报、巡检、内容分发
进阶玩家 —— 用 Personal Memory 和 10000+ skills 定制专属助手

en.tag: Your 'Chief Agent Operator' — an AI team working 7×24
en.what: Positioned as a 'Chief Agent Operator': hire, schedule and hear reports from multiple AI agents as work units. Key features: Agent Builder (describe the need, get a configured agent), Agent Groups (parallel multi-agent collaboration), Pages/Schedule/Project/Workspace panels, and a white-box editable Personal Memory; any model and modality, with a claimed 10,000+ skills and MCP plugin ecosystem.
en.content: A self-deployable web app (one-click Vercel/Docker/Zeabur/Sealos), with full bilingual docs, a changelog, the plugin system and local dev guides; default branch canary, still pushing frequently today.
en.stack: TypeScript + Next.js, self-hosted via Docker, plugins over MCP; custom (non-standard) license.
en.hot: Its combination of multi-agent orchestration and messaging gateways gives an established AI application platform a clear collaboration-focused direction.
uses: Solo founders & freelancers — run a 7×24 agent team for repetitive work
Ops teams — schedule agents for daily reports, patrols and content distribution
Power users — craft custom assistants with Personal Memory and 10,000+ skills

zh.tag: AI 驱动的网站克隆工具，通过对话秒级生成现代 React 应用
zh.what: Open Lovable 是 Firecrawl 团队开源的示例应用，让用户通过自然语言对话，在数秒内将任意网站克隆并重建为现代化的 React 应用。它集成了 Firecrawl 的网页抓取能力与多模型 AI 代码生成，实现从设计到代码的一站式转换。
zh.content: 仓库包含一个基于 Next.js 的完整示例应用，内置了对接 Firecrawl API 和多款 LLM（Gemini、Claude、OpenAI、Groq）的模块，并支持通过 Vercel 或 E2B 沙箱运行生成的代码。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 与 Next.js 构建，前端使用 React，通过 pnpm 管理依赖；底层调用 Firecrawl 抓取页面，并集成多厂商 LLM API 与 Vercel/E2B 沙箱执行环境。
zh.hot: 该项目凭借“一句话克隆网站”的惊艳效果迅速走红，目前 Star 数已达 27,920，单日新增 326 颗，登上 GitHub TypeScript 日榜第 14 位；其开源形态与对多种主流 AI 模型的灵活支持极大降低了 AI 辅助开发的门槛。
uses: 前端开发者/设计师 —— 快速将参考网站转为可编辑的 React 原型。
AI 应用开发者 —— 学习如何基于 Firecrawl + LLM 搭建代码生成工作流。
创业团队/独立开发者 —— 低成本复刻竞品页面并快速迭代 MVP。
技术爱好者 —— 体验多模型 AI 实时生成与沙箱运行完整应用的过程。

en.tag: AI-powered website cloner that rebuilds any site as a modern React app via chat
en.what: Open Lovable is an open-source demo by the Firecrawl team that lets users clone and recreate any website as a modern React app in seconds through natural-language chat. It combines Firecrawl’s web scraping with multi-model AI code generation to turn existing designs into working code.
en.content: The repo ships a full-stack Next.js demo with built-in modules for Firecrawl API and multiple LLMs (Gemini, Claude, OpenAI, Groq), and supports running generated code inside Vercel or E2B sandboxes.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript and Next.js on top of React, using pnpm for dependency management; it calls the Firecrawl API for scraping and integrates multi-provider LLM APIs with Vercel or E2B sandbox environments.
en.hot: The project went viral thanks to its striking “clone any website in seconds” capability, accumulating 27,920 stars with 326 added in a single day and reaching #14 on GitHub’s daily TypeScript trending list. Its open-source nature and plug-and-play support for leading AI models make AI-assisted development highly accessible.
uses: Frontend devs & designers — rapidly turn reference sites into editable React prototypes.
AI builders — learn how to assemble a Firecrawl + LLM code-generation pipeline.
Startup/indie hackers — cheaply clone competitor landing pages and iterate on MVPs.
Tech enthusiasts — experience multi-model AI live coding with sandbox execution.

zh.tag: AI 编程术语词典，用大白话解释行话
zh.what: 这是一个将 AI 编程领域晦涩术语翻译成通俗英语的词典项目。它帮助开发者理解模型、上下文窗口、工具调用等核心概念，消除 AI 编程的神秘感。
zh.content: 仓库包含按主题分组的 Markdown 文件（如模型、会话、工具、失败模式），并生成一个静态网站。每个术语都有简洁定义和解释。
zh.stack: 使用 TypeScript 和 Markdown 构建，通过 npm 脚本生成静态网站。依赖较少，易于贡献。
zh.hot: 本周新增 349 星，总星数 3002，位列 TypeScript 周榜第 18。AI 编程术语混乱是普遍痛点，该词典精准解决了这一需求。
uses: AI 编程初学者 —— 快速理解术语，降低学习门槛
经验丰富的开发者 —— 澄清模糊概念，统一团队用语
技术写作者 —— 作为术语参考，确保文档准确

en.tag: AI coding jargon explained in plain English
en.what: A dictionary that translates AI coding jargon into plain English. It helps developers understand core concepts like models, context windows, and tool calls, demystifying AI programming.
en.content: Contains Markdown files grouped by topics (e.g., The Model, Sessions, Tools, Failure Modes), which generate a static website. Each term has a concise definition and explanation.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript and Markdown, generating a static site via npm scripts. Minimal dependencies, easy to contribute.
en.hot: Gained 349 stars this week, total 3002, ranked #18 on TypeScript weekly trending. AI coding jargon confusion is a common pain point, and this dictionary addresses it precisely.
uses: AI coding beginners — quickly understand jargon, lower learning curve
Experienced developers — clarify fuzzy concepts, align team vocabulary
Technical writers — use as a terminology reference for accurate documentation

zh.tag: 本地优先的开源 AI 语音工作室，集克隆、合成与听写于一体
zh.what: Voicebox 是一款本地优先的开源 AI 语音工作室，集语音克隆、文本转语音与实时语音输入于一体。它能够在本地运行 7 种 TTS 引擎，支持 23 种语言的语音合成，并通过全局热键向任意文本框听写。此外，它还能为 MCP 兼容的 AI 智能体赋予自定义语音，实现完整的语音输入输出闭环。
zh.content: 仓库包含基于 TypeScript 的桌面应用源码、7 套 TTS 引擎的本地集成、语音克隆与听写核心模块，以及配套落地页与文档站点。
zh.stack: 主技术栈为 TypeScript，构建跨平台桌面应用；依赖本地运行的 LLM 进行语音文本优化，并集成 7 种 TTS 引擎与语音克隆模型实现完整语音 I/O。
zh.hot: 在 ElevenLabs 与 WisprFlow 等云端方案之外，Voicebox 以完全本地运行和隐私保护击中用户痛点，月增 12,138 Star 达 42,229 颗，跻身 TypeScript 月榜第 8。它一次性覆盖语音克隆、合成与听写全链路，降低了创作者与开发者对闭源语音服务的依赖。
uses: 内容创作者 —— 快速克隆音色并生成多语言旁白，无需依赖云端付费 API。
隐私敏感用户 —— 语音数据完全本地处理，适合对数据安全有较高要求的个人与企业。
AI 开发者 —— 为 MCP 智能体快速接入自定义语音，构建具备语音交互能力的本地应用。
效率办公人群 —— 通过全局热键向任意文本框实时语音输入，替代传统键盘录入。

en.tag: Local-first open-source AI voice studio for cloning, synthesis and dictation
en.what: Voicebox is a local-first, open-source AI voice studio that combines voice cloning, text-to-speech, and real-time dictation in one app. It runs seven TTS engines locally for speech synthesis across 23 languages, and lets you dictate into any text field via a global hotkey. It also gives MCP-aware AI agents a custom voice, closing the full voice I/O loop on your machine.
en.content: The repository contains the TypeScript-based desktop application source, integrations for seven local TTS engines, voice-cloning and dictation modules, plus a landing site and documentation.
en.stack: Built primarily in TypeScript as a cross-platform desktop app; it relies on a bundled local LLM for speech refinement and integrates seven TTS engines plus voice-cloning models for complete on-device voice I/O.
en.hot: Hitting a pain point against cloud incumbents like ElevenLabs and WisprFlow, Voicebox offers fully local, privacy-preserving voice I/O; it gained 12,138 stars this month to reach 42,229, ranking 8th on the TypeScript monthly trending list. Its all-in-one coverage of cloning, synthesis, and dictation lowers reliance on proprietary voice services for creators and developers.
uses: Content creators — quickly clone voices and generate multilingual narrations without cloud APIs.
Privacy-conscious users — process all voice data locally for individuals and enterprises with strict data-security needs.
AI developers — give MCP-compatible agents custom voices to build locally running voice-interactive applications.
Productivity-focused users — dictate into any text field via a global hotkey as a keyboard alternative.

zh.tag: 开发者成长路线图与学习资源平台
zh.what: 这是一个社区驱动的开发者路线图项目，提供交互式学习路径、最佳实践指南和面试题。帮助开发者从入门到进阶规划职业发展。
zh.content: 仓库包含前端、后端、DevOps、AI 等数十个技术路线的交互式地图，以及最佳实践和面试题库，所有内容均可在 roadmap.sh 网站访问。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 构建，使用 React 前端框架，后端可能涉及 Node.js，依赖 GitHub 进行版本控制和社区协作。
zh.hot: 拥有 36 万+ Star，是 GitHub 上最受欢迎的学习资源之一。每日新增 210 Star，持续吸引开发者关注，因其全面、免费且社区驱动。
uses: 编程初学者：寻找系统学习路径，从零开始掌握前端、后端或全栈开发
转行开发者：通过路线图规划职业转型，学习 DevOps、AI 等热门方向
技术面试准备：利用最佳实践和面试题库巩固知识
教育者与团队：作为培训大纲或技术分享的参考框架

en.tag: Interactive roadmaps, guides & resources for developer career growth
en.what: A community-driven project offering interactive roadmaps, best practices, and questions to help developers plan their career growth from beginner to advanced levels.
en.content: Contains dozens of interactive roadmaps for frontend, backend, DevOps, AI, etc., along with best practices and question banks, all accessible via roadmap.sh.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, uses React for the frontend, likely Node.js for the backend, and relies on GitHub for version control and community collaboration.
en.hot: With 360K+ stars, it's one of the most popular learning resources on GitHub. Gaining 210 stars daily, it remains hot due to its comprehensive, free, and community-driven content.
uses: Coding beginners: Find systematic learning paths to master frontend, backend, or full-stack from scratch
Career changers: Plan transitions into DevOps, AI, or other hot fields using roadmaps
Interview prep: Use best practices and question banks to solidify knowledge
Educators & teams: Use as a reference framework for training or tech sharing

zh.tag: 基于Puppeteer的WhatsApp Web Node.js客户端库，支持完整消息与媒体交互
zh.what: whatsapp-web.js 是一个强大的 Node.js 库，用于与 WhatsApp Web 进行交互，帮助开发者轻松构建功能完整的 WhatsApp API。它通过 Puppeteer 在托管的浏览器实例中访问 WhatsApp Web 的内部接口，在实现多设备支持、消息收发、媒体传输等功能的同时，降低了被官方封禁的风险。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的源代码、官方指南与文档站点源码、示例脚本（example.js）以及多种认证策略实现，覆盖二维码登录、会话持久化与多设备同步等核心流程。
zh.stack: 基于 Node.js（要求 v18+）与 Puppeteer 构建，利用无头浏览器模拟 WhatsApp Web 客户端行为，通过 npm/yarn/pnpm 分发。
zh.hot: 该库凭借 22.2k+ Star 和 JavaScript 日榜第 10 的热度，成为 WhatsApp 自动化领域最主流的方案之一；其完整的 API 覆盖与活跃的社区生态（Discord、持续更新的文档）使其在开发者群体中保持极高关注度。
uses: 客服与营销团队 —— 需要自动化群发通知、回复客户咨询的中小型企业
开发者与系统集成商 —— 希望将 WhatsApp 消息能力接入 CRM、ERP 或内部办公系统的工程师
社群运营者 —— 管理大型 WhatsApp 群组、定时推送内容的运营人员
IoT与自动化爱好者 —— 通过消息触发硬件指令或日常自动化工作流的极客用户

en.tag: Puppeteer-based Node.js client for WhatsApp Web with full messaging automation
en.what: whatsapp-web.js is a powerful Node.js library that interacts with WhatsApp Web, enabling developers to build dynamic WhatsApp APIs with nearly all web client features. It uses Puppeteer to access WhatsApp Web's internal functions within a managed browser instance, supporting multi-device access, message handling, and media transfers while mitigating the risk of being blocked.
en.content: The repository includes the full source code, official guide and documentation site sources, example scripts (example.js), and multiple authentication strategies covering QR login, session persistence, and multi-device synchronization.
en.stack: Built on Node.js (v18+) and Puppeteer, it simulates WhatsApp Web client behavior in a headless browser and is distributed via npm, yarn, and pnpm.
en.hot: With over 22.2k stars and a top-10 spot on the JavaScript daily trending list, it stands as one of the most popular WhatsApp automation solutions. Its comprehensive API coverage and active community ecosystem—backed by Discord support and continuously updated documentation—keep developer interest consistently high.
uses: Customer support & marketing teams at SMBs looking to automate notifications and reply to customer inquiries
Developers and system integrators seeking to embed WhatsApp messaging into CRM, ERP, or internal business systems
Community managers who need to administer large WhatsApp groups and schedule content pushes
IoT and automation enthusiasts building workflows triggered by WhatsApp messages or bots

zh.tag: 为 AI 编码代理打造的营销技能库，覆盖 CRO、SEO、文案与增长工程
zh.what: 这是一个专为 Claude Code、Cursor、Windsurf 等 AI 编码代理设计的营销技能集合。它通过 Markdown 文件为代理提供 CRO、文案写作、SEO、数据分析与增长工程等领域的专业知识和工作流。添加到项目后，AI 代理可自动识别营销任务并应用相应的框架与最佳实践。
zh.content: 仓库包含一系列 Markdown 格式的技能文件，覆盖产品营销、SEO、CRO、内容文案、付费增长、留存与复购、销售赋能等模块。各技能之间通过引用和共享上下文协同工作，并以 `product-marketing` 技能为基础，其他技能在执行前会先读取它以理解产品、受众与定位。
zh.stack: 主要以 Markdown 文件形式组织，无需传统运行时依赖；通过兼容 Agent Skills 规范与 Claude Code、OpenAI Codex、Cursor、Windsurf 等主流 AI 编码代理集成。
zh.hot: 在 AI 编码代理爆发式增长的背景下，该仓库精准填补了“技术营销人员如何让 AI 代理做专业营销”的空白；凭借 4 万余 Star 和单日新增 200+ Star 的势头，登上 GitHub JavaScript 日榜第 5 名，反映出市场对 AI 驱动增长的强烈需求。
uses: 技术营销人员/增长黑客 —— 想让 Claude Code 等代理自动执行 CRO、SEO 优化与文案撰写。
创始人/独立开发者 —— 缺乏专职营销团队，希望用 AI 代理完成产品营销、着陆页优化与增长策略。
AI 代理开发者/提示工程师 —— 需要参考 Agent Skills 规范，构建可复用的垂直领域技能库。
数字营销学习者 —— 通过阅读结构化的营销技能文件，系统学习转化优化、付费投放与增长工程框架。
