en.tag: Marketing skill packs for AI coding agents: CRO, SEO, copywriting, analytics & growth.
en.what: This repo provides marketing skill packs for AI coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf. Using markdown-based skills, it equips agents with specialized knowledge and workflows across CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering. Once added to a project, the agent can recognize marketing tasks and apply the right frameworks and best practices automatically.
en.content: The repository consists of markdown skill files covering product marketing, SEO, CRO, content/copy, paid growth, retention, and sales enablement. Skills are interlinked and build on shared context, with the `product-marketing` skill serving as the foundational layer that other skills reference first to understand product positioning and audience.
en.stack: The skills are purely markdown-based with no traditional runtime dependencies; they integrate with mainstream AI coding agents such as Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, and Windsurf via the Agent Skills spec.
en.hot: As AI coding agents surge in popularity, this repo fills a critical gap by giving technical marketers and founders ready-to-use marketing expertise for agents. Its explosive traction—40.4k+ stars and 206 added today, hitting #5 on GitHub's JavaScript daily trending—signals massive demand for AI-driven growth tooling.
uses: Technical marketers & growth hackers — who want AI coding agents to automate CRO, SEO, and copywriting tasks.
Founders & indie hackers — looking to offload product marketing, landing-page optimization, and growth strategy to AI agents without hiring a full marketing team.
AI agent builders & prompt engineers — seeking a practical reference for implementing reusable, domain-specific skills under the Agent Skills spec.
Marketing learners — who can study the structured skill files to systematically learn frameworks for conversion optimization, paid acquisition, and growth engineering.

zh.tag: 开源服务器管理面板，支持 SSH/VNC/RDP 远程连接
zh.what: Nexterm 是一个开源的服务器管理软件，允许用户通过 SSH、VNC 和 RDP 远程连接服务器，管理文件（SFTP）、部署 Docker 应用、管理 Proxmox 容器，并支持双因素认证和 OIDC SSO。它还可以将用户和服务器组织到不同的组织中。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Nexterm 的完整源代码，包括服务器端、客户端和引擎组件，以及 Docker 镜像配置和开发文档。
zh.stack: 基于 Node.js 18+、Yarn、FlatBuffers 编译器和可选的 Docker。前端使用 JavaScript，后端使用 Node.js。
zh.hot: 本周新增 152 颗星，总星数达 4860，位列 GitHub JavaScript 周榜第 4。它集成了 SSH、VNC、RDP 和 Docker 管理等多种功能，且完全开源，吸引了需要统一管理多台服务器的开发者和运维人员。
uses: 系统管理员 —— 通过单一面板管理多台远程服务器
DevOps 工程师 —— 结合 Docker 和 Proxmox 进行应用部署与容器管理
小型团队 —— 利用组织功能隔离不同项目的服务器和用户

en.tag: Open-source server management panel with SSH, VNC & RDP support
en.what: Nexterm is an open-source server management software that enables remote connections via SSH, VNC, and RDP, file management via SFTP, Docker application deployment, Proxmox LXC and QEMU container management, with two-factor authentication and OIDC SSO. It also supports organizing users and servers into organizations.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of Nexterm, including server, client, and engine components, along with Docker image configurations and development documentation.
en.stack: Built on Node.js 18+, Yarn, FlatBuffers compiler, and optional Docker. Frontend uses JavaScript, backend uses Node.js.
en.hot: Gained 152 stars this week, reaching 4860 total, ranking 4th on GitHub JavaScript weekly trending. It integrates SSH, VNC, RDP, and Docker management in one open-source tool, attracting developers and sysadmins needing unified server management.
uses: System administrators — manage multiple remote servers from a single panel
DevOps engineers — deploy applications and manage containers via Docker and Proxmox
Small teams — isolate servers and users per project using organizations

zh.tag: 收录拒绝白板算法面试、采用实战考核的科技公司名单
zh.what: 这个仓库维护了一份全球科技公司名单，专门收录那些不采用传统白板面试或 LeetCode 式算法题的企业。它们转而使用结对编程、真实业务问题讨论、带回家作业等更贴近日常工作的考核方式，帮助开发者识别更人性化的雇主。
zh.content: 仓库核心是一份按字母顺序排列的公司名录，每条记录包含所在地与具体面试流程说明；此外还提供 RECOMMENDATIONS.md，分享如何设计更合理的面试环节。
zh.stack: 仓库以 Markdown 文档为主要形态，并配合轻量 Node.js 工具链进行格式校验和自动化 lint，整体技术栈简洁。
zh.hot: 该仓库拥有 5.1 万 Star，今日新增 73 星并登顶 JavaScript 日榜，精准反映了开发者对“八股文”面试的普遍反感，成为技术招聘改革的重要参考。
uses: 开发者求职：快速定位不考算法 puzzle、注重实战能力的潜在雇主
技术招聘方：参考名单中的面试流程，优化自家技术考核设计
职业规划者：获取全球化、接地气的真实技术面试案例库

en.tag: A curated list of companies rejecting whiteboard interviews for real-world assessments
en.what: This repository curates a crowdsourced list of companies that avoid traditional 'whiteboard' interviews and algorithmic trivia. These employers adopt practical assessment methods—such as pair programming, real-world problem discussions, and take-home exercises—to better reflect day-to-day engineering work.
en.content: The core content is an alphabetically sorted directory of companies with location and interview-process details. It also includes a RECOMMENDATIONS.md offering guidelines for designing fairer, more practical interviews.
en.stack: The repo is primarily Markdown-based, supported by lightweight Node.js tooling for linting and format validation, keeping the stack minimal and accessible.
en.hot: With 51.1k stars and 73 new stars today—topping the JavaScript daily trending list—it taps into widespread developer frustration with 'whiteboard' CS trivia and has become a key reference for reforming technical hiring.
uses: Job-seeking developers: quickly identify employers that value practical skills over algorithmic trivia
Engineering hiring teams: reference real-world interview processes to redesign their own assessments
Career coaches and HR professionals: access a global, community-verified playbook for fairer technical interviews

zh.tag: 微软官方 Power Platform 开发插件市场
zh.what: 这是一个插件市场，为 Claude Code 和 GitHub Copilot 提供 Power Platform 开发插件。包含可复用的技能、代理和命令，帮助开发者构建和部署 Power Platform 解决方案。
zh.content: 仓库包含多个插件，如 Power Pages、Model Apps、MCP Apps、Code Apps、Mobile Apps、Canvas Apps 和 Power Automate。每个插件都有独立的 README 和安装脚本。
zh.stack: 主要使用 JavaScript 编写，依赖 Claude Code 或 GitHub Copilot CLI。部分插件使用 React、TypeScript、Expo、.NET 等技术栈。
zh.hot: 本周新增 49 颗星，位列 JavaScript 周榜第 3。作为微软官方项目，它填补了 AI 编码助手与 Power Platform 之间的空白，吸引大量低代码开发者。
uses: Power Platform 开发者 —— 使用 AI 助手快速构建和部署应用
低代码/无代码爱好者 —— 结合 Claude Code 或 Copilot 提升开发效率
企业 IT 团队 —— 标准化 Power Platform 开发流程

en.tag: Official Microsoft plugin marketplace for Power Platform development
en.what: This is a plugin marketplace providing Power Platform development plugins for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot. It includes reusable skills, agents, and commands to help developers build and deploy Power Platform solutions.
en.content: The repository contains multiple plugins such as Power Pages, Model Apps, MCP Apps, Code Apps, Mobile Apps, Canvas Apps, and Power Automate. Each plugin has its own README and installation scripts.
en.stack: Primarily written in JavaScript, relying on Claude Code or GitHub Copilot CLI. Some plugins use React, TypeScript, Expo, .NET, etc.
en.hot: Gained 49 stars this week, ranking 3rd in JavaScript weekly trending. As an official Microsoft project, it bridges AI coding assistants and Power Platform, attracting many low-code developers.
uses: Power Platform developers — quickly build and deploy apps using AI assistants
Low-code/no-code enthusiasts — boost development efficiency with Claude Code or Copilot
Enterprise IT teams — standardize Power Platform development workflows

zh.tag: 开源AI智能标书写作助手，集生成、查重、废标检查于一体的投标工具箱
zh.what: 易标是一款面向招投标场景的桌面端AI助手，通过大模型能力一键生成标书内容，并内置知识库管理、标书查重与废标项自动检查功能。它帮助投标人显著降低文档编写门槛，提升投标合规性与效率。完全开源免费，开箱即用。
zh.content: 仓库包含基于Electron+React的完整桌面应用源码、标书模板与截图资源，采用Vite构建，提供安装包与详细文档。整体呈现为可直接编译或下载使用的全功能客户端形态。
zh.stack: 前端基于Electron 41+与React 19+，使用TypeScript 5.9+开发，构建工具采用Vite 7+，并接入大模型能力实现AI标书生成。整体为现代桌面应用技术栈。
zh.hot: 该仓库今日新增346 Star，总数突破1797，跻身GitHub Trending JavaScript日榜第13位，反映出招投标市场对开源AI提效工具存在强烈需求。
uses: 投标专员/招投标团队 —— 快速生成标书初稿并自动检查废标风险
中小企业商务人员 —— 降低专业标书编写门槛，提升中标率
采购与项目管理 —— 建立企业投标知识库，实现标书复用与查重

en.tag: Open-source AI bid proposal writer with generation, duplication check & compliance audit
en.what: Yibiao is a desktop AI assistant tailored for bidding and tendering scenarios, leveraging LLMs to generate proposal content with built-in knowledge base management, duplication checks, and automatic disqualification clause auditing. It significantly lowers the barrier to document preparation while improving compliance and efficiency. Completely open-source and free to use out of the box.
en.content: The repository ships complete desktop application source code built on Electron and React, along with bid templates and screenshot assets, using Vite for builds. It is packaged as a fully functional client that can be compiled or downloaded for immediate use.
en.stack: Frontend stack is built on Electron 41+ and React 19+ with TypeScript 5.9+ and bundled via Vite 7+, integrating LLM capabilities for AI-powered proposal generation. It follows a modern desktop application architecture.
en.hot: With 346 new stars today and a total of 1,797, it ranks 13th on GitHub's Trending JavaScript daily list, reflecting strong market demand for open-source AI productivity tools in the bidding and tendering sector.
uses: Bid specialists and tendering teams — quickly draft proposals and automatically check for disqualification risks
SMB business staff — lower the barrier to professional bid writing and improve win rates
Procurement and project managers — build corporate bidding knowledge bases and enable reuse and duplication checks

zh.tag: 为 AI 编码代理打造的设计语言与技能集，终结千篇一律的 SaaS 模板风
zh.what: Impeccable 是一套面向 AI 编码代理（如 Claude、Cursor 等）的设计指导语言与 CLI 工具。它通过 23 条标准化命令和 46 条确定性检测规则，帮助 AI 在生成前端界面时摆脱千篇一律的 SaaS 模板风格，产出更具品牌感与专业度的设计。开发者只需在项目中运行初始化命令，即可建立包含品牌语境、视觉规范与组件库的设计上下文。
zh.content: 仓库包含可安装在 AI 工具中的核心技能包、用于本地检测的 CLI 与浏览器扩展，以及一套由 PRODUCT.md 和 DESIGN.md 驱动的设计上下文系统。整体以命令式交互为主，支持实时浏览器迭代与无需 LLM 的离线规则检测。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript/Node.js 构建，通过 npm 分发并以 npx 方式安装，同时提供浏览器扩展用于实时迭代检测。设计规则以确定性逻辑实现，可独立于 LLM 运行。
zh.hot: 该仓库在 GitHub 上已获得 47.7K Star，本周新增 2,331 星并跻身 Trending 周榜第 14 名，反映出开发者对「AI 生成前端同质化」的强烈痛点共鸣。它精准击中了当前 AI 编码工具产出界面千篇一律的普遍问题，提供了可落地的设计工程化方案。
uses: 前端开发者 —— 希望让 AI 助手生成更专业、不千篇一律的界面代码
独立创始人/产品经理 —— 需要快速建立品牌感强、视觉一致的产品界面
设计工程师 —— 想将设计规范转化为 AI 可执行的确定性规则与检测流程

en.tag: A design language and skillset for AI coding agents to escape generic SaaS templates
en.what: Impeccable is a design guidance language and CLI tool for AI coding agents like Claude and Cursor. It provides 23 standardized commands and 46 deterministic detection rules to help AI-generated frontend designs break away from generic SaaS templates and achieve stronger brand identity. Developers can set up a comprehensive design context—including brand voice, visual guidelines, and component libraries—through a single initialization command.
en.content: The repository includes a core skill package for AI tools, a CLI and browser extension for local auditing, and a design context system driven by PRODUCT.md and DESIGN.md. It focuses on command-based interactions, supporting live browser iteration and offline deterministic rule checks without requiring an LLM or API key.
en.stack: Built on JavaScript/Node.js, distributed via npm and installed through npx, with a browser extension for real-time iteration and auditing. The design rules are implemented as deterministic logic that can run independently of any LLM or API key.
en.hot: With 47.7K stars and 2,331 new stars this week landing it at #14 on GitHub Trending, the project resonates strongly with developers frustrated by homogenized AI-generated frontend designs. It directly addresses the pain point of repetitive SaaS templates by offering a practical, engineering-grade design system for AI agents.
uses: Frontend developers who want their AI assistants to generate professional, non-generic UI code
Indie founders and product managers looking to quickly build brand-conscious, visually consistent interfaces
Design engineers seeking to convert design specifications into deterministic, AI-executable rules and audit workflows

zh.tag: 跨平台隐私优先语音转文字工具，支持本地与云端模型
zh.what: OpenWhispr 是一款开源的桌面端语音听写应用，用户可通过全局热键在任何软件中将语音实时转为文字。它支持完全离线的本地转录（Whisper / NVIDIA Parakeet），也允许接入自有密钥的云模型，确保音频数据不出本地即可隐私可控地完成输入。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的跨平台桌面客户端源码与构建产物，覆盖 macOS、Windows、Linux 的全局热键、语音听写、会议转录、AI 笔记及 Agent 功能模块，并附带安装包、API 文档与官网。
zh.stack: 项目以 JavaScript 为主语言开发，基于 Electron 或同类跨平台桌面框架，前端采用现代 Web 技术栈，后端通过本地绑定集成 Whisper 与 NVIDIA Parakeet，并提供 REST API 以对接第三方云服务。
zh.hot: 在 WisprFlow、Granola 等付费语音转写工具备受关注的背景下，OpenWhispr 以“完全开源、零数据收集”的隐私定位成为热门替代方案，本月新增 802 Star，累计达 4,617 Star，跻身 GitHub JavaScript 月榜第 10 名。
uses: 需要高效语音输入的写作者与开发者——通过全局热键在任意编辑器中快速 dictation。
对隐私敏感的用户与团队——利用本地模型实现完全离线的会议转录与笔记生成。
寻求免费替代方案的知识工作者——以开源方案替换 WisprFlow/Granola 进行日常语音记录。

en.tag: Privacy-first cross-platform voice-to-text dictation with local & cloud models
en.what: OpenWhispr is an open-source desktop dictation app that turns speech into text anywhere via a global hotkey. It offers fully offline transcription with local engines like Whisper and NVIDIA Parakeet, or cloud processing via BYOK, keeping user audio data private and under their own control.
en.content: The repository includes the full cross-platform desktop client source and release builds for macOS, Windows, and Linux, featuring global hotkey handling, voice dictation, meeting transcription, AI note-taking, and agent modules, plus API docs and a website.
en.stack: Primarily written in JavaScript and built on a cross-platform desktop framework (likely Electron or Tauri) with a modern web-based UI, it binds locally to Whisper and NVIDIA Parakeet for on-device inference and exposes REST APIs for optional cloud integration.
en.hot: Positioned as a free, open-source and zero-telemetry alternative to paid tools like WisprFlow and Granola, OpenWhispr gained strong traction this month with 802 new stars, reaching 4,617 total stars and ranking #10 on GitHub’s JavaScript monthly trending chart.
uses: Writers and developers needing efficient voice input — dictate into any editor via a global hotkey.
Privacy-conscious users and teams — run fully offline meeting transcription and note-taking with local models.
Knowledge workers seeking free alternatives — replace paid tools like WisprFlow or Granola for daily voice logging.

zh.tag: 为AI代理打造的隐身无头浏览器，绕过反爬检测
zh.what: Camofox Browser 是一个专为AI代理设计的隐身无头浏览器，基于Camoufox（Firefox分支）在C++层面进行指纹伪造，可绕过Cloudflare、谷歌等反爬检测。它提供REST API，支持无障碍快照、稳定元素引用和搜索宏，是Puppeteer/Playwright的即插即用替代品。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的浏览器服务器代码，提供REST API端点用于导航、截图、元素交互等，以及npm包和Docker部署支持。
zh.stack: 基于Node.js，底层依赖Camoufox（Firefox定制版），使用Puppeteer-like API，支持npm和Docker部署。
zh.hot: 本周新增241星，总星数7906，排名JavaScript周榜第13。AI代理需要真实浏览能力，而现有方案易被检测，Camofox提供了C++级别的反检测方案，精准击中痛点。
uses: AI代理开发者——需要无头浏览器抓取数据或与网页交互，且需绕过反爬检测
数据采集工程师——需要稳定、低检测率的网页自动化工具
安全研究人员——测试网站反爬机制或研究浏览器指纹

en.tag: Stealth headless browser for AI agents, bypassing Cloudflare & bot detection
en.what: Camofox Browser is a stealth headless browser built for AI agents, powered by Camoufox—a Firefox fork with C++-level fingerprint spoofing to bypass Cloudflare, Google, and most bot detection. It offers a REST API with accessibility snapshots, stable element refs, and search macros, serving as a drop-in replacement for Puppeteer/Playwright.
en.content: The repository contains the full browser server code with REST API endpoints for navigation, screenshots, element interaction, etc., along with npm package and Docker deployment support.
en.stack: Built on Node.js, powered by Camoufox (custom Firefox), uses Puppeteer-like API, supports npm and Docker deployment.
en.hot: Gained 241 stars this week, total 7906, ranked #13 on JavaScript weekly trending. AI agents need real web browsing, but existing solutions are easily detected; Camofox offers C++-level anti-detection, hitting a key pain point.
uses: AI agent developers — need headless browsing for data scraping or web interaction with anti-detection
Data scraping engineers — require stable, low-detection web automation tools
Security researchers — testing anti-scraping mechanisms or studying browser fingerprinting

zh.tag: 自托管的有声书与播客服务器
zh.what: Audiobookshelf 是一个完全开源的自托管有声书和播客服务器。它允许用户流式播放所有音频格式，搜索并自动下载播客剧集，支持多用户和跨设备进度同步。
zh.content: 仓库包含服务器端代码、Web 客户端以及配套的 Android 和 iOS 应用（测试版）。提供安装文档、反向代理配置和媒体组织指南。
zh.stack: 基于 Node.js（JavaScript）构建，使用 Progressive Web App 技术，支持 Chromecast 和多种音频格式。
zh.hot: 随着有声书和播客的流行，自托管解决方案需求增长。Audiobookshelf 提供免费、开源且功能丰富的替代品，本周 GitHub 星标新增 116，总星标 13630。
uses: 有声书爱好者 —— 自建个人有声书库，随时随地流式收听
播客迷 —— 自动下载和管理播客剧集，支持 RSS 订阅
家庭或小团体 —— 多用户权限管理，共享媒体库
隐私敏感用户 —— 完全自托管，数据不经过第三方

en.tag: Self-hosted audiobook and podcast server
en.what: Audiobookshelf is a fully open-source self-hosted audiobook and podcast server. It allows streaming all audio formats on the fly, searching and auto-downloading podcast episodes, with multi-user support and cross-device progress sync.
en.content: The repository includes server-side code, a web client, and companion Android & iOS apps (beta). It provides installation docs, reverse proxy setup, and media organization guides.
en.stack: Built with Node.js (JavaScript), uses Progressive Web App technology, supports Chromecast and multiple audio formats.
en.hot: With the rise of audiobooks and podcasts, self-hosted solutions are in demand. Audiobookshelf offers a free, open-source, feature-rich alternative, gaining 116 stars this week (total 13,630).
uses: Audiobook enthusiasts — build a personal audiobook library and stream anytime
Podcast fans — auto-download and manage podcast episodes with RSS feeds
Families or small groups — multi-user permissions and shared media library
Privacy-conscious users — fully self-hosted, no third-party data exposure

zh.tag: 韩国生活全场景 AI Agent 技能库，一键接入主流编码助手
zh.what: 这个仓库是一个面向韩国用户的 AI 代理技能集合，支持 Claude Code、Codex 等主流编码智能体直接调用。它将 SRT/KTX 订票、KakaoTalk 搜索、天气查询、快递追踪、政务办事等日常琐事封装成标准化工具，让 AI 自动完成。
zh.content: 仓库内含数十个独立技能模块（如 srt-booking、kakaotalk-mac、korea-weather 等），每个对应一项韩国本地服务，并配有详细文档和可选的 k-skill-proxy 代理层。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript/Node.js 构建，直接对接各韩国服务的公开或私有 API，通过标准化接口供 AI Agent 零客户端调用，必要时借助 k-skill-proxy 转发请求。
zh.hot: 已获 6,358 个 Star，今日新增 96 星并登上 JavaScript 日榜第 11 名；它精准击中了韩国开发者希望用 AI Agent 自动化本地生活刚需（订票、社交、天气、购物）的痛点。
uses: 使用 Claude Code、Codex 等 AI 编码代理的韩国开发者，想让 AI 自动订火车票、查天气或搜 KakaoTalk 记录。
需要把韩国本土政务、交通、电商、新闻等服务整合进 AI 工作流的工程师。
面向韩国用户构建 AI Agent 或自动化助手的初创团队与产品经理。
在韩国生活的普通用户，希望拥有一个能搞定日常琐事的「AI 管家」。

en.tag: Korean-life AI agent toolkit covering transit, chat, weather, shopping & gov
en.what: This repo is a Korean-life skill collection for AI coding agents like Claude Code and Codex. It wraps everyday local services—SRT/KTX booking, KakaoTalk archive search, weather, parcel tracking, and government tasks—into standardized tools that agents can invoke directly.
en.content: It contains dozens of standalone skill modules (e.g., srt-booking, kakaotalk-mac, korea-weather) mapped to Korean domestic services, plus detailed guides and an optional k-skill-proxy for HTTP forwarding.
en.stack: Built in JavaScript/Node.js, it bridges public and private Korean service APIs via normalized interfaces for zero-client AI agent integration, with an optional k-skill-proxy for HTTP forwarding.
en.hot: With 6,358 stars and 96 gained today, it ranks #11 on GitHub’s JavaScript Trending; it resonates with Korean developers eager to automate hyper-local daily tasks—train booking, messaging, weather, and shopping—via AI agents.
uses: Korean developers using Claude Code, Codex, or similar agents who want AI to book trains, check weather, or search KakaoTalk archives.
Engineers seeking to integrate Korean local services (government, transit, e-commerce, news) into AI-driven workflows.
Startups and product teams building Korean-language AI assistants or domestic agent platforms.
Everyday residents in Korea who want a single 'AI butler' to handle routine errands.

zh.tag: AI 编程工具的实时 Token、成本与限额监控桌面组件
zh.what: Token Monitor 是一个桌面小组件，实时显示多种 AI 编程工具（如 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等）的 Token 用量、成本与账户限额。支持多设备同步、历史趋势、按工具/设备/模型/会话的用量分解。
zh.content: 仓库包含桌面应用的源代码、安装包（Windows/macOS/Linux）、多语言 README 以及演示 GIF。主要功能包括实时监控面板、多设备同步、用量历史图表和工具特定数据解析。
zh.stack: 基于 JavaScript 开发，使用 Electron 构建桌面应用，支持跨平台（Windows、macOS、Linux）。依赖本地文件系统读取各工具的日志或数据库。
zh.hot: 本周新增 211 星，总星数 880，位列 JavaScript 周榜第 15。AI 编程工具用户急需一个统一监控面板来管理 Token 消耗和成本，该工具填补了这一空白。
uses: AI 编程工具重度用户——实时监控 Token 消耗，避免超额
团队管理者——多设备同步，统一查看成员用量与成本
开发者——分析不同工具/模型的 Token 效率，优化支出

en.tag: Real-time token, cost & limit widget for AI coding tools
en.what: Token Monitor is a desktop widget that shows live token usage, cost, and account limits across various AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.). It supports multi-device sync, historical trends, and breakdowns by tool, device, model, or session.
en.content: The repo contains source code, installers for Windows/macOS/Linux, multilingual README, and a demo GIF. Key features include a live dashboard, multi-device sync, usage history charts, and tool-specific data parsing.
en.stack: Built with JavaScript and Electron for cross-platform desktop support (Windows, macOS, Linux). It reads local files or databases from each AI tool.
en.hot: Gained 211 stars this week (total 880), ranking #15 on JavaScript weekly trending. AI coding tool users urgently need a unified dashboard to track token usage and costs, and this tool fills that gap.
uses: Heavy users of AI coding tools — monitor token usage in real time to avoid overages
Team managers — sync across devices to view member usage and costs
Developers — analyze token efficiency across tools/models to optimize spending

zh.tag: AI 代理的持久记忆压缩系统
zh.what: Claude-Mem 是一个为 AI 代理（如 Claude Code）设计的持久记忆系统。它能捕获代理在会话中的所有操作，利用 AI 进行压缩，并在未来会话中注入相关上下文，实现跨会话的连续记忆。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心记忆压缩引擎、与多种代理（Claude Code、OpenClaw、Codex 等）的集成模块、CLI 工具以及多语言文档。
zh.stack: 基于 Node.js（≥20），使用 JavaScript 编写，依赖 AI 模型进行上下文压缩与注入。
zh.hot: 解决了 AI 代理缺乏长期记忆的痛点，Star 数高达 8.8 万，本周新增近千，位列 JavaScript 周榜第 7。
uses: 使用 Claude Code 的开发者，希望保持跨会话的上下文连续性
多代理工作流用户，需要统一记忆管理
AI 工具链构建者，集成持久记忆到自定义代理

en.tag: Persistent memory compression system for AI agents
en.what: Claude-Mem is a persistent memory system for AI agents like Claude Code. It captures everything the agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context into future sessions, enabling cross-session continuity.
en.content: The repo includes the core memory compression engine, integration modules for various agents (Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, etc.), CLI tools, and multilingual documentation.
en.stack: Built on Node.js (≥20), written in JavaScript, relies on AI models for context compression and injection.
en.hot: Addresses the pain point of AI agents lacking long-term memory, with 88k stars and nearly 1k new stars this week, ranking #7 on JavaScript weekly trending.
uses: Developers using Claude Code who want cross-session context continuity
Multi-agent workflow users needing unified memory management
AI toolchain builders integrating persistent memory into custom agents

zh.tag: 终端原生 AI Agent 多路复用器，支持持久会话与插件扩展
zh.what: herdr 是一款驻扎在终端内的 Agent 多路复用器，让你能在一个界面中并行运行、监控多个 AI Agent 的状态。它支持会话分离与跨终端重连，Agent 脱离终端后仍可后台运行，并通过纯 Socket API 实现 Agent 之间的相互调用。同时支持键盘与鼠标双模式操作，以及可扩展的插件市场。
zh.content: 仓库主体为一个 Rust 编写的单二进制文件，无需 Electron 或 Node.js 环境，直接嵌入现有终端。核心包含窗格分割与状态可视化、会话持久化、插件系统、纯 Socket API，以及兼容 tmux 风格快捷键与鼠标点击的混合交互层。
zh.stack: 完全基于 Rust 构建，单二进制分发，零额外依赖。提供 curl / Homebrew / mise 等多种安装方式，并已推出 Windows Beta 版本。
zh.hot: 在 AI Agent 工具链需求井喷的节点，herdr 上线不到两周便收获 1.7 万+ Star，本周激增 2512 颗，冲入 Trending 周榜第 17。它用原生终端体验替代了笨重的 Electron 方案，以「Agent 多路复用 + 可编排 Socket API」精准解决了开发者同时管理多 Agent 的痛点。
uses: 终端重度用户/开发者 —— 需要在不离开终端的情况下并行管理多个 AI Agent 任务。
AI Agent 开发者 —— 需要构建、调试和编排 Agent 工作流，并让 Agent 之间互相通信。
远程/服务器开发者 —— 通过 SSH 断连重连，保持 Agent 长时间后台运行不中断。
插件生态爱好者 —— 希望通过插件扩展窗格和工作流，打造自定义终端 Agent 环境。

en.tag: Terminal-native AI agent multiplexer with persistent sessions and plugins
en.what: herdr is a terminal-native agent multiplexer that lets you run and monitor multiple AI agents in parallel from a single interface. Sessions can be detached and reattached from any terminal or over SSH, and agents themselves can orchestrate each other through a pure socket API. It supports both keyboard and mouse workflows, plus a plugin marketplace for extensibility.
en.content: The repo is built as a single Rust binary with no Electron or Node.js runtime, embedding directly into your existing terminal. It ships with core pane splitting and status visualization, persistent sessions, a plugin system, a pure socket API, and a hybrid interaction layer supporting both tmux-style keybindings and mouse actions.
en.stack: Written entirely in Rust and distributed as a single self-contained binary with zero extra dependencies. Installable via curl, Homebrew, and mise, with a Windows beta already available.
en.hot: Riding the wave of AI-agent tooling demand, herdr racked up 17.7k+ stars within weeks of launch, adding 2,512 this week alone and hitting #17 on GitHub Trending. It replaces heavy Electron wrappers with a native terminal experience and solves the pain of orchestrating multiple agents via its unique multiplexing and socket API.
uses: Terminal-heavy developers who need to run and monitor multiple AI agent tasks without leaving the terminal.
Agent developers who need to build, debug, and orchestrate agent workflows with inter-agent communication.
Remote/server developers who require persistent agent sessions that survive SSH disconnects and terminal restarts.
Plugin ecosystem enthusiasts looking to extend pane management and workflows through a customizable plugin marketplace.

zh.tag: 24/7 本地录屏与 AI 记忆引擎，让 Agent 理解你的工作
zh.what: Screenpipe 是一款全天候本地运行的屏幕与音频记录工具，将你在电脑上的所有操作转化为可搜索、可自动化的记忆流。它专为 AI Agent 设计，让智能体能够基于你的实际工作上下文自动触发任务、生成 SOP 或执行操作，且所有数据仅存储在本地，确保隐私安全。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 编写的核心录屏与音频采集引擎、本地 SQLite 向量存储、可扩展的 "pipe" 插件系统，以及跨平台桌面客户端。同时提供了与 OpenClaw、Hermes 等 100+ 应用的集成示例和 SDK。
zh.stack: 以 Rust 为主语言实现高性能底层录制与媒体处理，使用 Tauri 构建跨平台桌面端，数据存储依赖 SQLite 与本地向量数据库，并通过插件系统对接外部 AI Agent 和应用生态。
zh.hot: 作为 YC S26 项目，Screenpipe 精准切中了 AI Agent 时代对「个人上下文」的刚需，凭借 20.2k+ Stars 和单日新增 73 星的速度冲上 GitHub Rust 热榜第 3 名。其「本地优先、隐私优先」的 24/7 记忆流理念，解决了云端 Agent 无法获取用户真实工作画面的核心痛点。
uses: 需要给 AI Agent 提供完整工作上下文以自动执行复杂任务的开发者与高级用户
希望将日常操作流程自动沉淀为可搜索知识库或 SOP 的效率极客
对数据隐私要求极高、不愿将屏幕记录上传到云端的企业与个人用户
构建本地-first 自动化工作流、连接 100+ 应用的集成工程师

en.tag: 24/7 local screen recorder feeding work context to AI agents
en.what: Screenpipe is a 24/7 local screen and audio recorder that turns everything you do on your computer into a searchable, automatable memory stream. Designed for AI agents, it lets intelligent systems trigger tasks, generate SOPs, or execute actions based on your actual work context, with all data kept strictly local and private.
en.content: The repository contains a Rust-based core engine for screen and audio capture, local SQLite/vector storage, an extensible "pipe" plugin system, and cross-platform desktop apps. It also includes integration examples and SDKs for 100+ apps like OpenClaw and Hermes.
en.stack: Built primarily in Rust for high-performance capture and media processing, it uses Tauri for the cross-platform desktop client, relies on SQLite and local vector databases for storage, and connects to external AI agents and app ecosystems via a plugin system.
en.hot: As a YC S26 project, Screenpipe hits the sweet spot of the AI Agent era by providing essential personal context, racing to 20.2k+ Stars with 73 new stars today and landing at #3 on the GitHub Rust trending chart. Its "local-first, privacy-first" 24/7 memory stream solves the core pain point that cloud agents cannot access users' actual work screens.
uses: Developers and power users who need to feed AI agents complete work context for complex automation
Productivity enthusiasts wanting to turn daily workflows into searchable knowledge bases or SOPs
Enterprise and individual users with strict data privacy requirements who refuse to upload screen recordings to the cloud
Integration engineers building local-first automation workflows across 100+ connected apps

zh.tag: 魔法般的 shell 历史管理工具，支持加密同步
zh.what: Atuin 用 SQLite 数据库替代传统的 shell 历史记录，并记录命令的额外上下文（如退出码、执行时间、工作目录等）。它提供可选的端到端加密同步功能，让你在多台机器间共享历史记录。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 编写的命令行工具、同步服务器、以及可选的加密同步服务。提供全屏搜索 UI、统计功能、快捷键绑定等。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 语言开发，依赖 SQLite 数据库存储历史记录，支持加密同步（可选自建服务器或使用官方服务）。
zh.hot: 30k+ Stars 说明其解决了 shell 历史管理的核心痛点：跨设备同步、搜索效率、上下文记录。今日新增 30 Stars 保持热度。
uses: 开发者/运维人员 —— 需要跨多台机器同步和高效搜索 shell 历史
终端重度用户 —— 希望记录命令退出码、耗时等额外信息
隐私敏感用户 —— 需要端到端加密的历史同步方案

en.tag: Magical shell history tool with encrypted sync across machines
en.what: Atuin replaces your existing shell history with a SQLite database, recording additional context like exit code, duration, and working directory. It offers optional fully encrypted synchronization of history across machines via an Atuin server.
en.content: The repo includes a Rust CLI tool, a sync server, and optional encrypted sync service. Features a full-screen search UI, statistics, and key bindings.
en.stack: Built with Rust, uses SQLite for history storage, supports encrypted sync (self-hosted or official server).
en.hot: 30k+ Stars show it solves core shell history pain points: cross-device sync, search efficiency, and context recording. 30 new stars today maintain its popularity.
uses: Developers/DevOps — need cross-machine sync and efficient shell history search
Heavy terminal users — want extra context like exit codes and duration
Privacy-conscious users — require end-to-end encrypted history sync

zh.tag: 用 Rust 重写并兼容 Postgres 18.3 的数据库内核，性能显著提升
zh.what: pgrust 是用 Rust 从头重写的 PostgreSQL 兼容数据库，目标是与 Postgres 18.3 保持行为一致并通过全部回归测试。它采用磁盘兼容设计，可直接从现有 Postgres 数据目录启动，并引入线程每连接模型，在事务和分析场景下均实现大幅性能提升。
zh.content: 仓库包含数据库引擎核心源码、Docker 部署配置、WebAssembly 浏览器演示以及面向 Postgres 18.3 的 46,000+ 回归测试套件。当前已实现线程化连接处理、内置连接池等实验性功能，并预留了无 Vacuum 存储与查询防护等路线图模块。
zh.stack: 以 Rust 为主语言实现存储与查询引擎，利用 AI 辅助编程重构 Postgres 传统 C 代码库。提供 WebAssembly 在线演示与 Docker 容器化部署，兼容标准 Postgres 客户端与数据文件格式。
zh.hot: 本周新增 2,196 Star 并登上 Rust 周榜第 7，原因在于其通过 100% Postgres 回归测试且实现 50% 事务性能提升与 300 倍分析性能飞跃。开发者对“保留 Postgres 生态却用 Rust 彻底解决架构痛点”的愿景表现出极高热情。
uses: 数据库内核开发者 —— 研究如何用 Rust 与线程模型重构经典关系型数据库架构。
高负载应用架构师 —— 在保留 Postgres 兼容性的同时，寻求连接池与 analytical 性能跃升。
技术评估团队 —— 通过 WebAssembly 浏览器演示或 Docker 快速体验磁盘兼容的替代引擎。
AI 辅助编程实践者 —— 关注大规模系统级 C 代码向 Rust 迁移的方法论与成果。

en.tag: A Rust rewrite of Postgres 18.3 engine with full regression pass and major performance gains
en.what: pgrust is a Rust rewrite of PostgreSQL designed to maintain full behavioral compatibility with Postgres 18.3 while passing its entire regression test suite. It is disk-compatible with existing Postgres data directories and replaces the process-per-connection model with multithreading, delivering significant performance gains for both transactional and analytical workloads.
en.content: The repository contains the core database engine source, Docker deployment configs, a WebAssembly browser demo, and a regression test suite covering over 46,000 Postgres 18.3 queries. It currently ships with experimental multithreaded connection handling and built-in connection pooling, along with roadmap modules for vacuum-free storage and query guardrails.
en.stack: Built primarily in Rust to replace Postgres's traditional C codebase with AI-assisted programming, covering storage, query execution, and connection management. Ships with a WebAssembly browser demo and Docker containers, maintaining compatibility with standard Postgres clients and on-disk data formats.
en.hot: Surging with 2,196 new stars this week and ranking 7th on GitHub's Rust Trending, it has captured attention by passing 100% of Postgres regression tests while delivering 50% faster transactional throughput and roughly 300× analytical speedups. Developers are excited by the promise of preserving the Postgres ecosystem while using Rust to fundamentally fix its architectural pain points.
uses: Database kernel developers exploring how to rearchitect a classic relational engine with Rust and a thread-per-connection model.
Architects running high-load applications who need Postgres compatibility with better connection pooling and analytical performance.
Engineering teams evaluating the engine via its WebAssembly browser demo or Docker container before migration.
Practitioners of AI-assisted programming interested in large-scale system migrations from C to Rust.

zh.tag: Rust 即时模式 GUI 库，支持 Web 与原生跨平台应用
zh.what: egui 是一个简单、快速、高度可移植的 Rust 即时模式 GUI 库，目标是成为最易用的 Rust GUI 库和最简单的 Rust Web 应用开发方式。官方框架 eframe 支持一次编写即可部署到 Web、Linux、macOS、Windows 及 Android 平台。
zh.content: 仓库包含 egui 核心库、官方集成框架 eframe、多平台渲染后端，以及丰富的示例代码和在线 Web Demo。
zh.stack: 基于纯 Rust 构建，默认禁止 unsafe 代码；底层通过 wgpu、Glow 等图形 API 实现跨平台渲染，并支持编译为 WASM 运行在浏览器中。
zh.hot: 该仓库已获得近 3 万 Star，凭借简洁的即时模式 API 和“一次编写，Web 与桌面同时运行”的能力，稳居 Rust 生态最受欢迎的 GUI 库之一。
uses: Rust 开发者快速构建跨平台桌面或 Web 应用
游戏开发者在自研或商业引擎中集成调试界面与工具面板
对内存安全和性能敏感的嵌入式、可视化及实时工具开发者

en.tag: Easy-to-use immediate mode GUI library for Rust, runs on web and native
en.what: egui is a simple, fast, and highly portable immediate mode GUI library for Rust, aiming to be the easiest way to build Rust GUIs and web apps. The official `eframe` framework lets you write once and deploy to Web, Linux, macOS, Windows, and Android.
en.content: The repository includes the core egui library, the official `eframe` integration framework, rendering backends for multiple platforms, and extensive examples with an online web demo.
en.stack: Built in pure Rust with unsafe code forbidden by default; it targets cross-platform rendering via graphics APIs like wgpu and Glow, and supports WASM compilation for the browser.
en.hot: With nearly 30k stars, egui ranks among the most popular GUI libraries in the Rust ecosystem, praised for its concise immediate-mode API and true write-once, run-anywhere support across web and desktop.
uses: Rust developers looking to quickly build cross-platform desktop or web apps
Game developers needing to integrate debug UIs and tooling panels into proprietary or third-party engines
Embedded, visualization, and real-time tool developers who prioritize memory safety and performance

zh.tag: 基于Rust的GPU加速跨平台终端模拟器与多路复用器
zh.what: WezTerm 是一款由 Rust 编写的高性能终端模拟器，内置终端多路复用功能。它利用 GPU 加速渲染，在 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 上提供一致的流畅体验，并支持通过 Lua 进行深度定制。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的终端仿真引擎、多路复用器实现、Lua 配置运行时以及跨平台窗口层，附带详尽的用户文档与官网源码。
zh.stack: 核心采用 Rust 语言开发，依托 OpenGL / WebGPU 实现 GPU 加速渲染，使用 Lua 提供可编程配置接口，并基于各平台原生 API 构建窗口系统。
zh.hot: 凭借 Rust 的安全与性能优势，WezTerm 在开发者社区迅速走红；目前拥有 27,669 Stars，本月新增 1,068 Star，跻身 GitHub Rust 月榜第 15 位，成为替代传统终端的热门选择。
uses: 进阶开发者与运维工程师 —— 需要 GPU 加速、多标签/多窗口管理的日常终端用户
跨平台工作者 —— 希望在 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 上保持统一终端体验的开发者
配置控与键盘流用户 —— 追求通过 Lua 脚本深度定制快捷键、外观与行为的极客

en.tag: GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer in Rust
en.what: WezTerm is a high-performance terminal emulator written in Rust, featuring a built-in terminal multiplexer. It leverages GPU acceleration to deliver smooth, consistent experiences across Windows, macOS, and Linux, with deep customization via Lua configuration.
en.content: The repository contains a full terminal emulation engine, built-in multiplexer, Lua configuration runtime, and cross-platform windowing layer, along with comprehensive user documentation and website source.
en.stack: Core is written in Rust with GPU-accelerated rendering via OpenGL/WebGPU, programmable configuration through Lua, and native platform APIs for windowing.
en.hot: Benefiting from Rust's safety and performance, WezTerm has gained strong traction among developers, amassing 27,669 stars with 1,068 added this month and ranking 15th on GitHub's Rust monthly trending list.
uses: Advanced developers and DevOps engineers who need GPU-accelerated, multi-tab terminal sessions
Cross-platform professionals seeking a consistent terminal experience across Windows, macOS, and Linux
Power users and keyboard-driven workflow enthusiasts who want deep customization via Lua scripting

zh.tag: 快速、节省磁盘的 Node.js 包管理器
zh.what: pnpm 是一个快速且节省磁盘空间的 Node.js 包管理器。它通过内容可寻址存储来链接 node_modules 中的文件，从而避免重复下载，并支持 monorepo 和严格的依赖隔离。
zh.content: 仓库包含 pnpm CLI 的完整源代码，包括核心逻辑、锁文件处理、工作区支持以及实验性的 Rust 移植版本（pacquet）。
zh.stack: 主要使用 TypeScript 编写，核心部分有 Rust 实验性实现。依赖 Node.js 生态，支持 Windows、Linux 和 macOS。
zh.hot: pnpm 凭借其极致的速度和磁盘效率，已成为大型 monorepo 项目的首选包管理器，拥有超过 35k 星标，本周新增 90 星，持续受到开发者青睐。
uses: Node.js 开发者，希望提升包安装速度和节省磁盘空间
维护大型 monorepo 项目的团队，需要高效的依赖管理
对严格依赖隔离有要求的项目，避免幽灵依赖问题

en.tag: Fast, disk space efficient Node.js package manager
en.what: pnpm is a fast, disk space efficient package manager for Node.js. It links files from a single content-addressable storage to avoid duplication, supports monorepos, and enforces strict dependency isolation.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of the pnpm CLI, including core logic, lockfile handling, workspace support, and an experimental Rust port (pacquet).
en.stack: Primarily written in TypeScript with an experimental Rust port. Relies on Node.js ecosystem and supports Windows, Linux, and macOS.
en.hot: With its exceptional speed and disk efficiency, pnpm has become the go-to package manager for large monorepos, boasting over 35k stars and 90 new stars this week, continuing to gain developer traction.
uses: Node.js developers seeking faster package installation and disk space savings
Teams managing large monorepo projects needing efficient dependency management
Projects requiring strict dependency isolation to avoid phantom dependencies

zh.tag: 全协议邮件与协作服务器，安全可扩展
zh.what: Stalwart 是一个开源的全功能邮件与协作服务器，支持 IMAP、JMAP、SMTP、CalDAV、CardDAV、WebDAV 等协议。它用 Rust 编写，注重安全性、性能和可扩展性，适合自托管邮件服务。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的邮件服务器实现，包括 SMTP 入站/出站、JMAP/IMAP/POP3 访问、Sieve 脚本过滤、CalDAV/CardDAV 日历与联系人同步，以及 WebDAV 文件存储。提供 Docker 镜像和详细文档。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 语言开发，依赖 Tokio 异步运行时、SQLite/PostgreSQL/FoundationDB 等后端存储，以及 OpenSSL 加密库。
zh.hot: 本周新增 153 星，总星数 1.3 万+。作为 Rust 实现的邮件服务器，它填补了高性能自托管邮件方案的空缺，受到自托管社区和 Rust 爱好者的关注。
uses: 自托管邮件服务器，替代 Gmail/Outlook 等商业服务
需要高性能、低资源占用的邮件基础设施的团队
对邮件协议（JMAP/IMAP/SMTP）有深度定制需求的企业
Rust 开发者学习邮件服务器实现

en.tag: All-in-one mail & collaboration server, secure and scalable
en.what: Stalwart is an open-source all-in-one mail and collaboration server supporting IMAP, JMAP, SMTP, CalDAV, CardDAV, WebDAV and more. Written in Rust, it emphasizes security, performance, and scalability, making it ideal for self-hosted email services.
en.content: The repository contains a full mail server implementation including SMTP inbound/outbound, JMAP/IMAP/POP3 access, Sieve script filtering, CalDAV/CardDAV calendar and contact sync, and WebDAV file storage. Docker images and detailed documentation are provided.
en.stack: Built with Rust, leveraging Tokio async runtime, SQLite/PostgreSQL/FoundationDB for storage, and OpenSSL for encryption.
en.hot: Gained 153 stars this week, total over 13.7k. As a Rust-based mail server, it fills a gap for high-performance self-hosted email solutions, attracting self-hosting enthusiasts and Rust developers.
uses: Self-hosted mail server to replace Gmail/Outlook
Teams needing high-performance, low-resource mail infrastructure
Enterprises requiring deep customization of mail protocols (JMAP/IMAP/SMTP)
Rust developers learning mail server implementation

zh.tag: 比 MinIO 快 2.3 倍的 S3 兼容对象存储
zh.what: RustFS 是一个用 Rust 构建的高性能分布式对象存储系统，兼容 S3 API。它在处理 4KB 小对象时比 MinIO 快 2.3 倍，支持与 MinIO、Ceph 等平台迁移共存，专为数据湖和 AI 场景优化。
zh.content: 仓库包含 RustFS 核心存储引擎、S3 API 网关、分布式节点管理、Docker 部署脚本及完整文档。提供二进制发布和 Docker 镜像，支持快速安装。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 语言开发，依赖 Tokio 异步运行时、S3 API 库、分布式一致性协议（如 Raft），支持 Docker 和 Kubernetes 部署。
zh.hot: 凭借比 MinIO 快 2.3 倍的性能优势和 Rust 的内存安全特性，RustFS 在 GitHub 上获得 30k+ Stars，本周新增 277 Stars，位列 Rust 周榜第 15 名。
uses: 需要高性能 S3 兼容对象存储的 DevOps 团队 —— 替代 MinIO 提升小对象读写速度
AI/ML 数据湖场景 —— 加速模型训练中的小文件存取
云原生基础设施开发者 —— 作为分布式存储后端集成到 Kubernetes

en.tag: S3-compatible object storage 2.3x faster than MinIO for small objects
en.what: RustFS is a high-performance distributed object storage system built in Rust, compatible with S3 API. It is 2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB objects, supports migration and coexistence with MinIO, Ceph, and is optimized for data lakes and AI workloads.
en.content: The repo contains the core storage engine, S3 API gateway, distributed node management, Docker deployment scripts, and comprehensive docs. Pre-built binaries and Docker images are available for quick setup.
en.stack: Built with Rust, leveraging Tokio async runtime, S3 API libraries, and distributed consensus (e.g., Raft). Supports Docker and Kubernetes deployment.
en.hot: With 2.3x performance advantage over MinIO and Rust's memory safety, RustFS has gained 30k+ stars on GitHub, adding 277 stars this week, ranking #15 on Rust weekly trending.
uses: DevOps teams needing high-performance S3-compatible storage — replace MinIO for faster small object I/O
AI/ML data lake scenarios — accelerate small file access during model training
Cloud-native infrastructure developers — integrate as distributed storage backend in Kubernetes

zh.tag: 为 AI Agent 提供实时增量上下文的引擎
zh.what: CocoIndex 是一个增量同步引擎，专为需要长期运行、上下文不断更新的 AI Agent 设计。它只处理每次变更的增量（Δ），确保 Agent 始终拥有最新数据，避免全量重处理的资源浪费。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心 Rust 引擎、Python SDK、多种数据源连接器（代码库、Slack、会议记录等）、转换模块以及目标存储（向量数据库等），并提供快速入门指南和文档。
zh.stack: 核心引擎用 Rust 编写，提供高性能增量处理；Python SDK 用于定义数据管道，支持多种数据源和向量数据库作为目标存储。
zh.hot: 随着 AI Agent 和 RAG 应用对实时上下文的需求激增，CocoIndex 的增量同步方案能大幅降低计算成本，因此迅速获得 10965 颗星。
uses: 构建需要实时知识库的 RAG 应用开发者
维护企业级 Agent 上下文（代码库、文档、聊天记录）的团队
希望降低向量数据库更新成本的 AI 工程师
需要流式 ETL 到 AI 应用的数据工程师

en.tag: Incremental engine for long horizon agents with always-fresh context
en.what: CocoIndex is an incremental sync engine designed for long-running AI agents that need continuously updated context. It processes only the delta (Δ) on each change, ensuring agents always have fresh data without full reprocessing.
en.content: The repo contains the core Rust engine, Python SDK, connectors for various data sources (codebase, Slack, meeting notes, etc.), transformation modules, target stores (vector DB, etc.), along with quickstart guides and documentation.
en.stack: Core engine written in Rust for high-performance incremental processing; Python SDK for defining data pipelines, supporting multiple data sources and vector databases as target stores.
en.hot: As AI agents and RAG applications demand real-time context, CocoIndex's incremental sync approach drastically reduces compute costs, quickly earning 10,965 stars.
uses: Developers building RAG applications requiring real-time knowledge bases
Teams maintaining enterprise agent context (codebase, docs, chat logs)
AI engineers looking to reduce vector database update costs
Data engineers needing streaming ETL for AI applications

zh.tag: 用 Rust 写的极速 Python 代码检查与格式化工具
zh.what: Ruff 是一个用 Rust 编写的 Python 代码检查器（linter）和格式化工具，速度比现有工具快 10-100 倍。它旨在替代 Flake8、Black、isort 等多个工具，提供统一的接口。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Ruff 的源代码、文档、基准测试和编辑器集成配置。提供超过 900 条内置规则，支持自动修复、缓存和 pyproject.toml 配置。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 开发，通过 PyPI 分发 Python 包。依赖 Rust 标准库和少量外部 crate，支持 VS Code 等编辑器集成。
zh.hot: 凭借极致的性能（10-100 倍速度提升）和一站式替代多个 Python 工具的能力，Ruff 获得了 48k+ Star。本周新增 233 Star，持续受到开发者追捧。
uses: Python 开发者：替代 Flake8、Black、isort 等工具，提升代码检查与格式化效率
大型项目维护者：利用 Ruff 的极速性能快速检查整个代码库
CI/CD 流水线：集成 Ruff 作为代码质量检查步骤，减少构建时间

en.tag: An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.
en.what: Ruff is an extremely fast Python linter and code formatter written in Rust, boasting 10-100x speed improvements over existing tools like Flake8 and Black. It aims to replace multiple tools (Flake8, Black, isort, etc.) with a single, unified interface.
en.content: The repository contains Ruff's source code, documentation, benchmarks, and editor integration configs. It features over 900 built-in rules, automatic fix support, caching, and pyproject.toml configuration.
en.stack: Developed in Rust, distributed as a Python package via PyPI. Depends on Rust standard library and a few external crates, with editor integrations for VS Code and others.
en.hot: With its blazing speed (10-100x faster) and ability to replace multiple Python tools, Ruff has gained 48k+ stars. This week it added 233 stars, remaining highly popular among developers.
uses: Python developers: Replace Flake8, Black, isort, etc., for faster linting and formatting
Large project maintainers: Leverage Ruff's speed to check entire codebases quickly
CI/CD pipelines: Integrate Ruff as a code quality step to reduce build times

zh.tag: 基于终端的智能开发环境，内置 AI 代理
zh.what: Warp 是一个智能开发环境，源于终端。它内置了编码代理，也支持接入 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI 等外部 CLI 代理，用于自动化开发工作流。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Warp 的客户端代码，包括 UI 框架（warpui_core 和 warpui）和其余 AGPL 许可的代码。还提供了 Oz for OSS 合作伙伴计划，用于开源项目的代理管理。
zh.stack: 主要语言为 Rust，依赖 GPT 模型（由 OpenAI 赞助），支持多种 CLI 代理。
zh.hot: 本周新增 391 星，总星数 63530，位列 Rust 周榜第 18。Warp 将 AI 代理深度集成到终端开发环境中，吸引了大量开发者关注。
uses: 开发者 —— 使用内置或外部 AI 代理加速编码、调试和代码审查
开源维护者 —— 通过 Oz for OSS 自动化问题分类、PR 审查和社区管理
团队协作 —— 在 build.warp.dev 上跟踪代理会话和贡献进度

en.tag: An agentic development environment built on the terminal with built-in AI agent
en.what: Warp is an agentic development environment born out of the terminal. It comes with a built-in coding agent and supports bringing your own CLI agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, etc.) to automate development workflows.
en.content: The repository contains Warp's client codebase, including the UI framework (warpui_core and warpui crates) and the rest of the code under AGPL. It also features the Oz for OSS partner program for agentic open-source management.
en.stack: Primarily written in Rust, powered by GPT models (sponsored by OpenAI), and supports multiple CLI agents.
en.hot: With 391 new stars this week and 63530 total, ranking #18 on Rust weekly trending. Warp deeply integrates AI agents into the terminal development environment, drawing significant developer interest.
uses: Developers — accelerate coding, debugging, and code review with built-in or external AI agents
Open-source maintainers — automate issue triage, PR review, and community management via Oz for OSS
Team collaboration — track agent sessions and contribution progress on build.warp.dev

zh.tag: 面向多模态 AI 的开源湖仓格式，性能远超 Parquet
zh.what: Lance 是一个专为多模态 AI 设计的开源湖仓格式，支持向量搜索、全文搜索、随机访问和数据版本控制。它兼容 Pandas、DuckDB、Polars 等主流工具，旨在替代 Parquet 和 Iceberg 等传统格式。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Lance 格式的 Rust 核心实现、Python 绑定（pylance）、以及完整的格式规范文档。提供 CLI 工具和多种语言的 SDK。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Rust 开发，依赖 Apache Arrow 列式内存格式，支持通过 PyArrow 与 Python 生态集成。
zh.hot: 本周新增 48 星，总星数 6832，位列 Rust 周榜第 19。其宣称的 100 倍随机访问加速和原生多模态支持吸引了 AI 基础设施开发者。
uses: AI 工程师：存储和查询大规模多模态数据（图像、视频、音频、文本、嵌入向量）
数据平台团队：构建高性能湖仓，替代 Parquet/Iceberg 用于 AI 工作流
ML 训练与推理：需要快速随机访问和版本控制的特征存储与训练数据管理

en.tag: Open lakehouse format for multimodal AI, 100x faster random access than Parquet
en.what: Lance is an open lakehouse format designed for multimodal AI, supporting vector search, full-text search, random access, and data versioning. It is compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, and other tools, aiming to replace traditional formats like Parquet and Iceberg.
en.content: The repository contains the Rust core implementation of the Lance format, Python bindings (pylance), and full format specification documentation. It also provides CLI tools and SDKs for multiple languages.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Rust, leveraging Apache Arrow columnar memory format, with Python integration via PyArrow.
en.hot: Gained 48 stars this week, total 6832, ranked 19th on Rust weekly trending. Its claimed 100x random access speedup and native multimodal support attract AI infrastructure developers.
uses: AI engineers: store and query large-scale multimodal data (images, videos, audio, text, embeddings)
Data platform teams: build high-performance lakehouses to replace Parquet/Iceberg for AI workflows
ML training & inference: feature stores and training data management requiring fast random access and versioning

zh.tag: 隐私优先的 AI 代理操作系统
zh.what: IronClaw 是一个以隐私、安全和可扩展性为核心的 AI 代理操作系统。它运行本地 AI 助手，确保用户数据完全由自己控制，不离开设备。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 编写的核心引擎、WebUI、加密凭证存储、后台服务以及命令行工具。支持 macOS、Linux 和 Windows/WSL。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Rust 语言，依赖本地 LLM 提供商 API，支持加密存储和后台服务。
zh.hot: 获得 12,537 星，因其强调隐私和本地控制，在 AI 代理工具中独树一帜，吸引了关注数据安全的用户。
uses: 注重隐私的用户 —— 希望 AI 助手不泄露个人数据
开发者 —— 需要可扩展、开源的 AI 代理框架
安全研究人员 —— 审计和定制本地 AI 系统

en.tag: Privacy-first AI Agent OS
en.what: IronClaw is an Agent OS focused on privacy, security, and extensibility. It runs a local AI assistant that keeps your data under your control, never leaving your device.
en.content: The repo includes a Rust core engine, WebUI, encrypted credential store, background service, and CLI tools. Supports macOS, Linux, and Windows/WSL.
en.stack: Primarily written in Rust, relies on local LLM provider APIs, with encrypted storage and background service.
en.hot: 12,537 stars, standing out among AI agent tools for its emphasis on privacy and local control, attracting users concerned about data security.
uses: Privacy-conscious users — want an AI assistant that doesn't leak personal data
Developers — need an extensible, open-source AI agent framework
Security researchers — audit and customize local AI systems

zh.tag: 兼容 Git 的现代版本控制系统，简洁而强大
zh.what: Jujutsu (jj) 是一个从头设计的版本控制系统，旨在易用且强大。它抽象了用户界面与存储后端，当前使用 Git 仓库作为存储层，兼容 Git 工具链。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Rust 实现的 VCS 核心、CLI 工具、文档和测试。支持快照、撤销、自动变基等现代特性，并可与 Git 互操作。
zh.stack: 使用 Rust 语言开发，依赖 Git 作为存储后端，支持多种平台。
zh.hot: 凭借简洁的设计和 Git 兼容性，吸引了 30k+ 星标，本周新增 177 星，开发者社区活跃。
uses: 个人开发者 —— 寻求更直观的版本控制体验
团队协作 —— 需要自动变基和撤销等高级功能
Git 用户 —— 希望过渡到更现代的工具但保持兼容性
开源贡献者 —— 参与 VCS 工具创新

en.tag: A Git-compatible VCS that is both simple and powerful
en.what: Jujutsu (jj) is a version control system designed from the ground up to be easy to use and powerful. It abstracts the UI from storage backends, currently using Git repos as a storage layer, making it compatible with Git-based tools.
en.content: The repo contains the Rust-based VCS core, CLI tool, documentation, and tests. It supports snapshots, undo, automatic rebase, and interoperability with Git.
en.stack: Developed in Rust, uses Git as a storage backend, cross-platform.
en.hot: With its simple design and Git compatibility, it has gained 30k+ stars, 177 new this week, and an active developer community.
uses: Individual developers — seeking a more intuitive VCS experience
Teams — needing advanced features like auto-rebase and undo
Git users — wanting to transition to a modern tool while staying compatible
Open source contributors — participating in VCS innovation

zh.tag: 单文件开源实时后端，内置数据库、用户认证与管理后台
zh.what: PocketBase 是一个开源 Go 后端，将 SQLite 数据库、实时订阅、文件存储、用户认证和管理后台打包在一个可执行文件中。它让开发者无需部署和维护多个服务，就能快速启动包含后端的全栈项目。
zh.content: 仓库提供各平台预构建可执行文件、Go 框架源码与基础示例，以及官方 JavaScript 和 Dart SDK；预构建版本默认启用 JS VM 插件，允许通过 JavaScript 扩展后端逻辑。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 1.25+ 构建，内嵌 SQLite 并提供 REST-ish API；客户端通过 JavaScript（浏览器、Node.js、React Native）或 Dart（全平台）SDK 与后端交互。
zh.hot: 凭借「一个文件搞定后端」的极简理念，PocketBase 已积累近 6 万 Star，日增 37 星并登上 Go 语言日榜，成为个人开发者和快速原型场景中 Firebase 的热门轻量替代品。
uses: 个人开发者与独立黑客 —— 无需运维，单二进制文件即可部署上线全栈应用
移动/Web 原型团队 —— 借助 Dart/JS SDK 快速搭建带实时同步与文件存储的后端
追求成本可控的中小项目 —— 作为 Firebase 的自托管开源替代，减少云服务依赖

en.tag: Open-source realtime backend in a single file with embedded DB, auth and admin UI
en.what: PocketBase is an open-source Go backend that bundles an embedded SQLite database with realtime subscriptions, file storage, user authentication, and an admin dashboard into a single portable executable. It enables developers to bootstrap full-stack projects without deploying and managing multiple separate services.
en.content: The repository ships prebuilt executables for multiple platforms, the Go framework source code with base examples, plus official JavaScript and Dart SDKs; the prebuilt binary enables a JS VM plugin by default for extending backend logic with JavaScript.
en.stack: Built with Go 1.25+ around an embedded SQLite database and exposed through a REST-ish API; client interaction is handled via official JavaScript (Browser, Node.js, React Native) and Dart (Web, Mobile, Desktop, CLI) SDKs.
en.hot: With its "backend in one file" philosophy, PocketBase has gained nearly 60k stars—adding 37 today and hitting the Go daily trending list—making it a popular lightweight, self-hosted alternative to Firebase for indie hackers and rapid prototyping.
uses: Indie developers and hackers — ship a zero-ops backend in a single portable binary
Mobile and web prototyping teams — rapidly build backends with realtime sync and file storage using Dart and JS SDKs
Cost-conscious small-to-medium projects — a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Firebase that reduces cloud vendor lock-in

zh.tag: AI API 订阅配额中转与拼车共享平台
zh.what: Sub2API 是一款开源中转服务，将 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Grok 等主流 AI 订阅统一接入单一平台。通过配额分发与拼车共享机制，帮助用户高效分摊订阅成本，并支持 Claude Code、Codex 等原生工具无缝调用。
zh.content: 仓库包含基于 Go 的 API 网关后端、Vue 3 前端管理界面，以及 Docker 部署配置。项目提供多语言文档、赞助商展示模块，并内置 PostgreSQL 与 Redis 的存储和缓存支持。
zh.stack: 后端基于 Go 1.25+ 构建，前端采用 Vue 3.4+，数据层依赖 PostgreSQL 15+ 与 Redis 7+，并通过 Docker 提供一键部署能力。
zh.hot: 凭借 32.7k Star 和本周新增 1416 Star 的增速，该项目精准切中 AI 开发者对多模型聚合与低成本共享订阅的刚需；其开源中转架构和「拼车」模式大幅降低了个人与团队使用顶级 AI 模型的门槛。
uses: 拥有多平台 AI 订阅但希望统一管理和分发配额的开发者或团队
希望以「拼车」方式分摊 Claude、OpenAI 等高昂订阅成本的个人用户
需要在 Claude Code、Codex 等原生工具中无缝切换多模型 API 的工程师

en.tag: AI API Gateway for Subscription Quota Sharing & Cost Splitting
en.what: Sub2API is an open-source relay gateway that unifies access to Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Grok and other AI subscriptions under one platform. It distributes subscription quotas and supports ride-sharing-style cost splitting to reduce individual expenses, while allowing native tools like Claude Code and Codex to work seamlessly.
en.content: The repository contains a Go-based backend API gateway, a Vue 3 frontend admin panel, and Docker deployment configurations. It ships with multi-language documentation, sponsor modules, and built-in PostgreSQL and Redis support for storage and caching.
en.stack: Backend is built with Go 1.25+, frontend uses Vue 3.4+, with PostgreSQL 15+ and Redis 7+ handling data and caching, and Docker providing one-click deployment.
en.hot: With 32.7k stars and 1,416 new stars this week, it hits a strong demand for multi-model aggregation and low-cost subscription sharing among AI developers; its open-source relay architecture and ride-sharing model significantly lower the barrier to using top-tier AI models.
uses: Developers or teams managing multiple AI subscriptions who need unified quota distribution
Individual users looking to split high subscription costs for Claude, OpenAI, and others via ride-sharing
Engineers who want seamless multi-model API switching within native tools like Claude Code and Codex

zh.tag: 开源 Google Maps 商家数据抓取工具，支持 CLI/Web UI/API 多端使用
zh.what: 该工具可从 Google Maps 批量提取商家名称、地址、电话、网站、评分、评价、坐标及邮箱等字段，用于构建本地商业数据库。它提供免费的命令行、网页界面和 REST API 三种使用方式，并支持对接 AI Agent 自动执行抓取任务，适用于销售线索挖掘、数据丰富与自动化调研。
zh.content: 仓库包含可独立运行的命令行程序、本地 Web 界面、REST API 服务端及可选的 SaaS 多租户平台代码，配套提供 AI Agent 技能文件、常见场景食谱和 Docker 化部署支持。
zh.stack: 核心以 Go 语言编写，依赖浏览器自动化引擎实现无头抓取，并通过并发调度与代理集成突破反爬限制，输出 CSV/JSON 等标准格式。
zh.hot: 在数据驱动的销售拓客与本地生活研究需求推动下，该仓库已积累 5.1k Stars，单日新增 84 Star，冲上 GitHub Go 语言日榜第 5 名；其多形态交付（CLI/Web/API/AI）大幅降低了不同角色的使用门槛。
uses: 销售与市场团队 —— 批量获取本地商家线索，快速构建潜在客户名单
数据分析师与咨询顾问 —— 调研区域商业分布、竞品评价与市场规模
开发者与 DevOps —— 通过 REST API 或 Docker 将地图数据集成至自有系统
AI Agent 用户 —— 让智能编码助手直接调用并执行自动化抓取任务

en.tag: Open-source Google Maps scraper with CLI, Web UI, REST API and AI agent support
en.what: This tool scrapes business details from Google Maps at scale—including name, address, phone, website, ratings, reviews, coordinates and emails. It offers a free open-source CLI, Web UI, and REST API, plus an AI Agent skill for automated scraping, serving lead generation, data enrichment, and local market research.
en.content: The repository ships with a standalone CLI, a local Web UI, a REST API server, and an optional self-hosted SaaS edition, along with AI agent skill files, workflow recipes, and Docker deployment support.
en.stack: Built in Go with a headless browser automation engine for scraping, featuring concurrent scheduling, proxy integration, and exporting to CSV/JSON.
en.hot: Driven by demand for data-driven sales prospecting and local business research, it has reached 5.1k Stars with 84 new stars today, ranking #5 on GitHub's Go daily trending list; its multi-modal delivery (CLI, Web, API, AI) lowers the barrier for diverse users.
uses: Sales and marketing teams — batch-collect local business leads to build prospect lists quickly
Data analysts and consultants — research regional business distribution, competitor reviews, and market size
Developers and DevOps — integrate map data into internal systems via REST API or Docker
AI agent users — let coding agents invoke and run automated scraping tasks directly

zh.tag: 开源托管代理平台，让编码代理成为真正的队友
zh.what: Multica 是一个开源平台，用于管理和协调 AI 编码代理。你可以像给同事分配任务一样给代理分配 Issue，代理会自动编写代码、报告阻塞并更新状态，无需手动复制粘贴提示或持续监控。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Multica 核心服务（Go 编写）、Web 看板界面、CLI 工具以及支持多种代理后端（如 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor Agent 等）的集成层。还提供 Squad 功能，用于代理团队的路由和任务分配。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言构建，前端可能采用现代 Web 框架（未明确说明），依赖多种第三方 AI 代理 CLI 工具。支持自托管部署。
zh.hot: 随着 AI 编码代理的普及，开发者迫切需要统一的管理平台。Multica 提供类似 Jira 的代理任务管理体验，本周新增 1067 星，总星数超 4.1 万，位居 Go 语言周榜第 5。
uses: 开发团队：将 AI 编码代理集成到工作流中，像管理人类队友一样管理代理
AI 代理开发者：测试和比较不同代理后端（如 Claude Code vs Codex）的表现
开源贡献者：参与构建下一代人机协作基础设施

en.tag: Open-source managed agents platform — turn coding agents into real teammates
en.what: Multica is an open-source platform for managing and orchestrating AI coding agents. You can assign issues to agents like you would to a colleague — they autonomously write code, report blockers, and update statuses, eliminating the need for copy-pasting prompts or babysitting runs.
en.content: The repo contains the Multica core service (written in Go), a web board UI, CLI tools, and an integration layer supporting multiple agent backends (e.g., Claude Code, Codex, Cursor Agent). It also includes Squad functionality for routing and task delegation within agent teams.
en.stack: Primarily built with Go, with a web frontend (framework unspecified), and integrates with various third-party AI agent CLIs. Supports self-hosting.
en.hot: As AI coding agents proliferate, developers urgently need a unified management platform. Multica offers a Jira-like experience for agent task management, gaining 1,067 stars this week and over 41K total, ranking #5 on the Go weekly trending list.
uses: Development teams: integrate AI coding agents into workflows and manage them like human teammates
AI agent developers: test and compare performance of different agent backends (e.g., Claude Code vs Codex)
Open source contributors: participate in building next-gen human-AI collaboration infrastructure

zh.tag: 高性能自托管邮件列表管理器，单二进制部署
zh.what: listmonk 是一个高性能、自托管的新闻通讯和邮件列表管理器，提供现代化仪表盘。它作为一个单二进制应用运行，使用 PostgreSQL 作为数据存储，支持 Docker 或直接二进制部署。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 后端和 Vue + Buefy 前端，提供完整的邮件列表管理功能，包括订阅管理、模板编辑、统计分析和发送队列。
zh.stack: 后端使用 Go 语言，前端使用 Vue.js 和 Buefy UI 框架，数据存储依赖 PostgreSQL。
zh.hot: 自托管邮件服务需求旺盛，listmonk 以高性能、单二进制部署和现代化界面吸引开发者，本周新增 213 星，总星数超 2.2 万。
uses: 需要自托管邮件列表的独立开发者或小团队
希望避免第三方邮件服务依赖的企业或组织
对邮件发送性能和隐私有高要求的用户

en.tag: High-performance, self-hosted newsletter & mailing list manager, single binary
en.what: listmonk is a high-performance, self-hosted newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. It runs as a single binary and uses PostgreSQL as its data store, supporting Docker or direct binary deployment.
en.content: The repo contains a Go backend and Vue + Buefy frontend, offering full mailing list management features including subscriber management, template editing, analytics, and send queues.
en.stack: Backend is written in Go, frontend uses Vue.js with Buefy UI framework, and data storage relies on PostgreSQL.
en.hot: Self-hosted email services are in high demand; listmonk attracts developers with its high performance, single binary deployment, and modern UI, gaining 213 stars this week and over 22k total.
uses: Independent developers or small teams needing self-hosted mailing lists
Organizations wanting to avoid reliance on third-party email services
Users with high performance and privacy requirements for email campaigns

zh.tag: Mac上运行Linux容器与虚拟机的轻量级工具
zh.what: Lima 在 macOS（及 Linux）上启动 Linux 虚拟机，提供自动文件共享与端口转发，让用户无需复杂配置即可运行 Linux 环境和容器。它原生支持 containerd/nerdctl，也兼容 Docker、Podman 和 Kubernetes 等主流引擎。
zh.content: 仓库包含命令行工具 limactl、一组开箱即用的虚拟机模板（docker、k8s 等），以及基于 QEMU 或 Apple Virtualization Framework 的虚拟化后端，实现完整的虚拟机生命周期管理。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言开发，底层使用 QEMU 或 Apple Virtualization Framework (VZ) 提供虚拟化能力，并集成 containerd、nerdctl 等容器运行时。
zh.hot: 仓库已收获 21.5k Star，并位列 Go 语言日榜第 3；它精准解决了 macOS 开发者运行 Linux 容器和 Kubernetes 的痛点，且被 Rancher Desktop、Colima、Finch 等主流桌面容器方案广泛采用。
uses: macOS 开发者需要在本地快速运行 Linux 容器、Kubernetes 或构建跨平台应用
寻求类 WSL2 体验、希望在 macOS 上获得原生 Linux 环境的跨平台用户
为 Rancher Desktop、Colima 等上层容器工具提供底层虚拟机支持的基础设施开发者

en.tag: Lightweight Linux VM and container runtime for macOS
en.what: Lima launches Linux VMs on macOS and Linux hosts with automatic file sharing and port forwarding, enabling users to run Linux environments and containers without complex setup. It natively supports containerd and nerdctl while also offering templates for Docker, Podman, and Kubernetes.
en.content: The repository includes the limactl CLI, a set of ready-to-use VM templates (docker, k8s, etc.), and virtualization backends based on QEMU or Apple Virtualization Framework for full VM lifecycle management.
en.stack: Written in Go, it uses QEMU or the Apple Virtualization Framework (VZ) for virtualization and integrates with containerd, nerdctl, and other container runtimes.
en.hot: With 21.5k stars and ranked #3 on GitHub's Go daily trending list, Lima solves the core pain point of running Linux containers and Kubernetes on macOS. It is also widely adopted by mainstream desktop container tools like Rancher Desktop, Colima, and Finch.
uses: macOS developers who need to run Linux containers, Kubernetes, or build cross-platform apps locally
Cross-platform users seeking a WSL2-like experience and native Linux environment on macOS
Infrastructure developers providing underlying VM support for higher-level tools like Rancher Desktop and Colima

zh.tag: Go 语言的可观测性标准实现
zh.what: OpenTelemetry-Go 是 OpenTelemetry 的 Go 语言实现，提供 API 和 SDK 来测量软件性能和行为，并将数据发送到可观测性平台。它支持追踪（稳定）、指标（稳定）和日志（Beta）三大信号。
zh.content: 仓库包含 OpenTelemetry Go API 和 SDK，以及导出器、处理器等组件，用于生成、处理和导出遥测数据。
zh.stack: 纯 Go 实现，依赖 Go 标准库和少量第三方包，支持多种导出协议（如 OTLP）。
zh.hot: 作为云原生可观测性标准 OpenTelemetry 的官方 Go 实现，随着微服务和云原生架构普及，需求持续增长。本周新增 42 星，总星数 6483，位列 Go 周榜第 12。
uses: Go 后端服务开发者，集成可观测性到应用中
运维和 SRE 团队，统一监控和追踪基础设施
云原生平台开发者，构建可观测性工具链

en.tag: Official Go implementation of OpenTelemetry for observability
en.what: OpenTelemetry-Go is the Go implementation of OpenTelemetry, providing APIs and SDK to measure software performance and behavior, and send data to observability platforms. It supports traces (stable), metrics (stable), and logs (beta).
en.content: The repository contains the OpenTelemetry Go API and SDK, along with exporters, processors, and other components for generating, processing, and exporting telemetry data.
en.stack: Pure Go implementation, depends on Go standard library and a few third-party packages, supports multiple export protocols (e.g., OTLP).
en.hot: As the official Go implementation of the cloud-native observability standard OpenTelemetry, its demand grows with microservices and cloud-native adoption. Gained 42 stars this week, total 6483, ranking 12th in Go weekly trending.
uses: Go backend developers integrating observability into applications
Ops and SRE teams unifying monitoring and tracing across infrastructure
Cloud-native platform developers building observability toolchains

zh.tag: 开源 AI 引擎，本地运行多模态模型，无需 GPU
zh.what: LocalAI 是一个开源 AI 引擎，允许用户在本地硬件上运行 LLM、视觉、语音、图像和视频等多种模型，无需 GPU。它提供与 OpenAI、Anthropic 等 API 兼容的接口，支持多用户认证和内置 AI 代理。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心引擎、多个后端（如 llama.cpp、vLLM、whisper.cpp 等）以及 REST API 服务。每个后端独立容器化，按需拉取，用户只安装所需组件。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 编写，后端依赖 llama.cpp、vLLM、whisper.cpp、stable-diffusion 等 C++/Python 库，支持 NVIDIA、AMD、Intel、Apple Silicon 等多种硬件。
zh.hot: LocalAI 以 47,712 颗星位居 Go 日榜第 4，因其让用户无需 GPU 即可本地运行多种 AI 模型，满足隐私和低成本需求。
uses: 希望在本地运行 AI 模型、保护数据隐私的个人开发者
需要低成本部署 LLM 和多模态 AI 服务的小型团队
教育场景中演示 AI 模型，无需高端硬件

en.tag: Open-source AI engine to run any model locally, no GPU required
en.what: LocalAI is an open-source AI engine that lets you run LLMs, vision, voice, image, and video models on local hardware without a GPU. It offers drop-in API compatibility with OpenAI, Anthropic, and ElevenLabs, and includes multi-user auth and built-in AI agents.
en.content: The repo contains the core engine, multiple backends (llama.cpp, vLLM, whisper.cpp, etc.), and a REST API server. Each backend is containerized and pulled on demand, so you only install what you need.
en.stack: Written primarily in Go, with backends relying on llama.cpp, vLLM, whisper.cpp, stable-diffusion, etc., supporting NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, Apple Silicon, and CPU-only.
en.hot: With 47,712 stars and ranking #4 on Go daily trending, LocalAI is popular for enabling local AI model execution without a GPU, addressing privacy and cost concerns.
uses: Individual developers wanting to run AI models locally for privacy
Small teams needing low-cost deployment of LLMs and multimodal AI
Educational settings demonstrating AI models without high-end hardware

zh.tag: 通用代理平台，支持多种协议与规则
zh.what: sing-box 是一个通用代理平台，旨在提供高性能、低资源占用的网络代理服务。它支持多种代理协议（如 SOCKS、HTTP、Shadowsocks、VMess、Trojan 等），并具备灵活的规则路由功能。
zh.content: 仓库包含 sing-box 核心程序及其命令行工具，支持 JSON 配置文件和多种运行模式。提供详细的文档和示例配置。
zh.stack: 使用 Go 语言开发，依赖较少，跨平台支持（Windows、macOS、Linux、Android、iOS）。
zh.hot: 作为通用代理平台，sing-box 因其高性能、多协议支持和活跃的社区而广受欢迎，本周新增 354 星，总星数超 3.6 万。
uses: 网络代理与翻墙用户 —— 搭建个人代理服务
开发者 —— 集成代理功能到应用或测试网络环境
系统管理员 —— 管理企业网络出口或流量路由

en.tag: Universal proxy platform supporting multiple protocols and routing rules
en.what: sing-box is a universal proxy platform designed for high performance and low resource usage. It supports multiple proxy protocols (e.g., SOCKS, HTTP, Shadowsocks, VMess, Trojan) and offers flexible rule-based routing.
en.content: The repository contains the sing-box core and CLI tool, with JSON configuration and multiple operation modes. Comprehensive documentation and example configs are provided.
en.stack: Written in Go with minimal dependencies, cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS).
en.hot: As a universal proxy platform, sing-box is popular for its high performance, multi-protocol support, and active community, gaining 354 stars this week with over 36k total.
uses: Proxy and circumvention users — set up personal proxy services
Developers — integrate proxy functionality or test network environments
System administrators — manage corporate network egress or traffic routing

zh.tag: GitHub 官方 MCP 服务器，连接 AI 与 GitHub 平台
zh.what: GitHub MCP 服务器将 AI 工具直接连接到 GitHub 平台，使 AI 代理、助手和聊天机器人能够通过自然语言交互读取仓库和代码文件、管理 Issue 和 PR、分析代码以及自动化工作流。
zh.content: 仓库包含 MCP 服务器的 Go 实现源码、文档和配置示例，支持本地部署和远程托管两种模式。
zh.stack: 使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 MCP 协议（Model Context Protocol），可与 VS Code、Claude Desktop、Cursor 等 MCP 主机集成。
zh.hot: 作为 GitHub 官方推出的 MCP 服务器，它填补了 AI 工具与 GitHub 平台之间标准化的桥梁，上线后迅速获得 3.1 万+ Star，本周新增近 200 Star。
uses: 开发者：通过自然语言让 AI 助手管理仓库、Issue 和 PR
DevOps 团队：自动化 CI/CD 监控、工作流分析和故障排查
AI 代理开发者：构建能够与 GitHub 交互的智能代理
代码审查者：利用 AI 分析代码安全、依赖警报和提交历史

en.tag: GitHub's official MCP server bridging AI tools to GitHub platform
en.what: The GitHub MCP Server connects AI tools directly to GitHub's platform, enabling AI agents, assistants, and chatbots to read repositories and code files, manage issues and PRs, analyze code, and automate workflows through natural language interactions.
en.content: The repository contains the Go implementation source code, documentation, and configuration examples for the MCP server, supporting both local deployment and remote hosting modes.
en.stack: Developed in Go, relies on the MCP (Model Context Protocol), and integrates with MCP hosts like VS Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, etc.
en.hot: As GitHub's official MCP server, it fills the standardized bridge between AI tools and the GitHub platform, quickly amassing 31,600+ stars with nearly 200 new stars this week.
uses: Developers: manage repositories, issues, and PRs via natural language with AI assistants
DevOps teams: automate CI/CD monitoring, workflow analysis, and troubleshooting
AI agent developers: build intelligent agents that can interact with GitHub
Code reviewers: leverage AI to analyze code security, dependency alerts, and commit history

zh.tag: 开源密钥管理平台，安全存储与分发敏感数据
zh.what: OpenBao 是一个用于管理、存储和分发敏感数据（如密钥、证书、API 令牌）的软件解决方案。它提供加密存储、动态密钥生成、访问控制和审计日志，帮助组织集中管理 secrets 并降低泄露风险。
zh.content: 仓库包含 OpenBao 的核心 Go 源码、命令行工具、API、存储后端（如文件系统、数据库）、认证方法（如令牌、LDAP）以及秘密引擎（如 KV、PKI、数据库凭据）。还提供 Docker 镜像、Helm Chart 和客户端库。
zh.stack: 主语言 Go，依赖 HashiCorp Vault 的分支代码，使用 OpenSSF 安全最佳实践。支持多种存储后端和认证机制。
zh.hot: 作为 HashiCorp Vault 的社区驱动分支，OpenBao 在 Vault 许可证变更后迅速获得关注，本周新增 108 星，总星数 6750，位列 Go 周榜第 15。
uses: DevOps 工程师 —— 集中管理 CI/CD 流水线中的 API 密钥和数据库凭据
安全团队 —— 实现密钥轮换、审计和访问控制策略
云原生应用开发者 —— 通过 API 动态获取临时凭据，避免硬编码

en.tag: Open-source secrets management platform for secure storage and distribution of sensitive data
en.what: OpenBao is a software solution to manage, store, and distribute sensitive data including secrets, certificates, and keys. It provides encrypted storage, dynamic secret generation, access control, and audit logging, helping organizations centralize secrets management and reduce leakage risks.
en.content: The repository contains OpenBao's core Go source code, CLI, API, storage backends (e.g., file system, database), authentication methods (e.g., token, LDAP), and secret engines (e.g., KV, PKI, database credentials). It also includes Docker images, Helm charts, and client libraries.
en.stack: Primary language Go, forked from HashiCorp Vault, follows OpenSSF security best practices. Supports multiple storage backends and authentication methods.
en.hot: As a community-driven fork of HashiCorp Vault, OpenBao gained rapid traction after Vault's license change, with 108 new stars this week, totaling 6750, ranking 15th on Go weekly trending.
uses: DevOps engineers — centrally manage API keys and database credentials in CI/CD pipelines
Security teams — implement secret rotation, auditing, and access control policies
Cloud-native app developers — dynamically fetch temporary credentials via API, avoiding hardcoding

zh.tag: 开源持续文件同步工具，跨设备安全同步数据
zh.what: Syncthing 是一款开源的连续文件同步程序，可在两台或多台计算机之间实时同步文件。它采用点对点架构，无需依赖中央服务器，将数据安全与防攻击置于首位。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心同步引擎、跨平台 GUI 实现、后台守护进程配置示例以及 Docker 部署支持。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言开发，采用自定义块交换协议，支持 Windows、macOS、Linux 等多平台原生运行。
zh.hot: 坐拥 86,573 Stars 且今日新增 98 Star，长期稳居 Go 语言日榜前列。在数据隐私日益受重视的背景下，其去中心化、开源且安全的特性吸引了大量个人用户。
uses: 需要在多台个人设备间实时同步文件资料的用户
重视数据隐私、希望避免第三方云存储的开发者与技术爱好者
需要局域网或跨网络安全同步办公文档的远程团队

en.tag: Open-source continuous file sync for secure cross-device data sharing
en.what: Syncthing is an open-source continuous file synchronization program that syncs files between two or more computers in real time. It uses a peer-to-peer architecture without relying on central servers, prioritizing data safety and protection against unauthorized access.
en.content: The repository contains the core sync engine, cross-platform GUI implementations, background daemon configuration examples, and Docker deployment support.
en.stack: Built primarily in Go, using a custom block exchange protocol with native multi-platform support across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
en.hot: With 86,573 Stars and 98 new Stars today, it consistently ranks high on Go language trending lists. Its decentralized, open-source, and security-first design resonates strongly amid growing privacy concerns.
uses: Individual users needing real-time file sync across multiple personal devices
Privacy-conscious developers and tech enthusiasts avoiding third-party cloud storage
Remote teams seeking secure LAN or cross-network document synchronization

zh.tag: 简单灵活的工作负载编排器，支持容器、传统应用与虚拟机
zh.what: Nomad 是一个易于使用、灵活且高性能的工作负载编排器，可部署微服务、批处理、容器化和非容器化应用。它支持跨本地和云环境的大规模部署，并原生集成 Consul 和 Vault。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Nomad 的完整源代码、CLI 和 API 文档、插件指南以及教程。核心是一个单一二进制文件，集成了资源管理和调度，无需外部存储或协调服务。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言开发，依赖 Docker、Podman、QEMU 等任务驱动，支持 Linux、Windows 和 macOS。
zh.hot: 本周新增 38 颗星，位列 GitHub Go 语言周榜第 18 名。作为 HashiCorp 的成熟编排工具，其简单性和灵活性持续吸引用户，尤其适合混合工作负载场景。
uses: 运维工程师 —— 统一管理容器、传统应用和虚拟机，简化基础设施编排
平台团队 —— 构建多云或混合云部署平台，利用联邦功能实现全球扩展
AI/ML 工程师 —— 利用 GPU 支持运行机器学习工作负载

en.tag: Simple and flexible workload orchestrator for containers, legacy apps, and VMs
en.what: Nomad is an easy-to-use, flexible, and performant workload orchestrator that can deploy a mix of microservice, batch, containerized, and non-containerized applications. It supports large-scale deployment across on-prem and cloud environments and has native Consul and Vault integrations.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of Nomad, CLI and API documentation, plugin guides, and tutorials. The core is a single binary that integrates resource management and scheduling without requiring external storage or coordination services.
en.stack: Primarily developed in Go, with task drivers for Docker, Podman, QEMU, etc., and supports Linux, Windows, and macOS.
en.hot: Gained 38 stars this week, ranking 18th on GitHub Go weekly trending. As a mature HashiCorp orchestrator, its simplicity and flexibility continue to attract users, especially for mixed workload scenarios.
uses: DevOps engineers — unify management of containers, legacy apps, and VMs to simplify infrastructure orchestration
Platform teams — build multi-cloud or hybrid cloud deployment platforms with federation for global scaling
AI/ML engineers — leverage GPU support for machine learning workloads

zh.tag: Google 开源的跨语言结构化数据序列化协议
zh.what: Protocol Buffers（protobuf）是 Google 推出的语言无关、平台无关、可扩展的结构化数据序列化机制。它通过定义 .proto 文件描述数据结构，再由编译器生成多种语言的代码，实现高效、紧凑的数据交换。广泛应用于微服务通信、配置文件和数据存储等场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含 protoc 编译器核心（C++）、多语言运行时库以及标准 .proto 定义文件。同时提供了基于 Bazel 和 CMake 的构建配置与完整测试套件。
zh.stack: 核心编译器采用 C++ 实现，支持跨语言代码生成；构建系统以 Bazel 为主并兼容 CMake，运行时覆盖 Java、Python、Go、C++ 等主流语言。
zh.hot: 凭借极致的序列化性能与跨语言生态，protobuf 已成为微服务通信的事实标准。其 71.5k+ Stars 和持续稳定的日增关注，体现了基础设施领域长期且广泛的工业采纳度。
uses: 后端与微服务开发者 —— 构建高性能跨语言 RPC 及数据交换协议
云原生工程师 —— 在 Kubernetes 与服务网格中统一定义数据面接口
跨平台开发者 —— 通过 .proto 一次定义生成多语言客户端与服务端代码
数据工程师 —— 高效存储和传输结构化日志、配置与事件流

en.tag: Google's cross-language data serialization format and compiler
en.what: Protocol Buffers is Google's language-neutral, platform-neutral, extensible mechanism for serializing structured data. Developers define data schemas in .proto files and use the protoc compiler to generate efficient, compact serialization code for multiple languages. It is widely adopted for microservices communication, configuration management, and data storage.
en.content: The repository includes the core protoc compiler (C++), multi-language runtime libraries, and standard .proto definitions. It also provides build configurations for Bazel and CMake alongside comprehensive test suites.
en.stack: The core compiler is implemented in C++ and supports cross-language code generation. The build system is primarily Bazel with CMake support, and runtimes cover Java, Python, Go, C++, and other major languages.
en.hot: It has become the de facto standard for microservices communication through extreme serialization performance and a cross-language ecosystem. Its 71.5k+ stars and steady daily growth reflect massive, long-standing industry adoption in the infrastructure space.
uses: Backend and microservices developers — building high-performance, cross-language RPC and data exchange protocols
Cloud-native engineers — standardizing data-plane interfaces in Kubernetes and service mesh environments
Cross-platform developers — generating multi-language client and server code from a single .proto definition
Data engineers — efficiently storing and transmitting structured logs, configurations, and event streams

zh.tag: GTA 5 增强版的开源作弊菜单 DLL
zh.what: 《GTA 5: Enhanced》的实验性修改菜单（mod menu）：编译成 DLL 后用 Xenos 等注入器在游戏主菜单注入，按 INSERT 或 Ctrl+\ 呼出菜单。建议配合 FSL 把存档数据重定向到本地磁盘以保号，且需要关闭 BattlEye 反作弊（目前没有 BE 绕过，公共战局会被心跳检测踢出）。
zh.content: C++ 源码 + 一份简短 README，讲清使用步骤（FSL → 下载 nightly release → 注入器 → 关 BattlEye → 注入）和常见问题修复（掉线、存档消失、游戏起不来）。
zh.stack: C++，DLL 注入式单机/联机修改器，依赖外部注入器和 FSL，GPL-2.0；默认分支 enhanced。
zh.hot: 它面向 GTA5 增强版 Mod 社区的具体需求，并延续 YimMenu 项目路线，为需要开源菜单的用户提供选择。
uses: GTA5 单机玩家 —— 刷车刷钱体验全部游戏内容
mod 开发者 —— 基于源码学习或二次开发游戏菜单
离线娱乐 —— 关 BattlEye 后在私人战局整活

en.tag: The open-source mod menu DLL for GTA 5: Enhanced
en.what: An experimental mod menu for GTA 5: Enhanced: compile to a DLL, inject at the main menu with an injector like Xenos, then press INSERT or Ctrl+\ to open. Pairing with FSL (redirecting save data to local disk) is recommended to protect your account, and BattlEye anti-cheat must be disabled (there's no BE bypass — public sessions will kick you via heartbeat checks).
en.content: C++ source plus a short README covering the workflow (FSL → nightly release → injector → disable BattlEye → inject) and fixes for common issues (disconnects, missing saves, game won't launch).
en.stack: C++, a DLL-injection single/multiplayer mod menu relying on external injectors and FSL; GPL-2.0; default branch enhanced.
en.hot: It targets a concrete need in the GTA5 Enhanced modding community and continues the familiar YimMenu project line for users seeking an open menu.
uses: GTA5 single-player fans — unlock vehicles and cash to experience all content
mod developers — learn from or fork the source for custom game menus
Offline fun — mess around in private sessions with BattlEye off

zh.tag: 现代 C++ 的 JSON 解析与序列化库
zh.what: 这是一个广受欢迎的头文件优先 JSON 库，为 C++ 开发者提供直观、STL 风格的 API 来解析、生成和操作 JSON 数据。它支持将 JSON 与 C++ 数据结构无缝互转，大幅降低了现代 C++ 项目中处理 JSON 的复杂度。
zh.content: 仓库以单头文件（json.hpp）为核心分发形态，同时包含完整的测试套件、基准测试、文档网站源码及多包管理器（Conan、vcpkg 等）支持配置。
zh.stack: 基于 C++11/14/17 标准库实现，无需外部依赖，仅依赖 STL 容器和模板元编程，支持通过 CMake 构建测试与示例。
zh.hot: 凭借超 5 万 Star 和今日新增 17 Star 登上 C++ 日榜第 10，它已成为 C++ 生态的事实标准 JSON 库。其“像 STL 一样直观”的 API 设计和单头文件即用的便捷性持续吸引开发者。
uses: C++ 后端/客户端开发者需要轻量、高性能 JSON 解析与序列化
嵌入式与游戏项目团队希望以单头文件引入依赖，简化构建流程
基础设施开发者在微服务、配置系统或协议网关中进行结构化数据交换

en.tag: Modern C++ JSON parsing and serialization library
en.what: A widely-adopted, header-only JSON library for C++ offering an intuitive, STL-like API to parse, generate, and manipulate JSON. It enables seamless mapping between JSON and C++ data structures, dramatically simplifying JSON handling in modern C++ projects.
en.content: The repository centers around a single-header distribution (json.hpp), complemented by comprehensive tests, benchmarks, documentation site sources, and package manager integrations like Conan and vcpkg.
en.stack: Built on C++11/14/17 with zero external dependencies, relying solely on STL containers and template metaprogramming; tests and examples are built via CMake.
en.hot: With over 50k stars and 17 new stars today, ranking 10th on the C++ daily trending list, it has become the de facto standard JSON library in the C++ ecosystem. Its STL-intuitive API design and single-header convenience continue to attract developers.
uses: C++ backend and client developers needing lightweight, high-performance JSON parsing and serialization
Embedded and game teams looking to simplify builds with a single-header dependency
Infrastructure developers performing structured data exchange in microservices, config systems, or protocol gateways

zh.tag: UE4/5 游戏注入式 Lua 脚本系统与实时模组开发工具
zh.what: RE-UE4SS 是一款面向 Unreal Engine 4/5 游戏的注入式脚本与模组开发框架。它允许玩家和开发者在不替换原始游戏文件的前提下，通过 Lua、蓝图或 C++ API 实时编写并加载模组，同时内置 Live View 属性编辑器与多种 Dump 工具，辅助运行时调试与逆向分析。
zh.content: 仓库包含主注入器核心、Lua API 绑定、C++ Modding API、蓝图模组加载器的完整源码，以及 Live View 实时属性编辑器、UHT / C++ Header Dumper、USMAP / UMAP 导出工具和配套文档。
zh.stack: 项目以 C++ 为主，通过 DLL 注入嵌入 UE4/5 游戏进程，深度依赖 Unreal Engine 的反射系统与对象模型，覆盖 UE 4.12 至 5.7 的广泛版本。
zh.hot: 该仓库以 2,677 Stars 跻身 GitHub C++ 日榜第 14 位，其「零文件替换」的注入式架构和集成的脚本、调试、逆向一体化工具链，精准命中了 UE 游戏模组社区的核心痛点。
uses: UE 游戏模组开发者：无需重打包游戏即可热加载 Lua / 蓝图 / C++ 模组
逆向工程师：利用 Live View 和各类 Dumper 分析运行时内存结构与属性
游戏调试人员：实时查看和编辑对象属性，快速定位数值变更逻辑
普通玩家：通过安装社区模组解锁控制台、修改游戏体验

en.tag: Injectable Lua scripting system and live modding toolkit for UE4/5 games
