en.what: RE-UE4SS is an injectable scripting and modding framework for Unreal Engine 4/5 games. It lets players and developers write and hot-load mods via Lua, Blueprint, or a C++ API without touching original game files, and includes a Live View property editor alongside dumping utilities for runtime debugging and reverse engineering.
en.content: The repository hosts the main injection core, Lua API bindings, C++ Modding API, Blueprint mod loader, alongside source code for the Live View property editor, UHT and C++ header dumpers, USMAP/UMAP recreation utilities, plus full documentation.
en.stack: Written primarily in C++, it embeds into UE4/5 game processes via DLL injection, deeply leveraging the Unreal Engine reflection system and object model across versions 4.12 through 5.7.
en.hot: Boasting 2,677 Stars and a #14 spot on GitHub's C++ daily trending list, its non-destructive DLL-injection architecture and unified toolchain for scripting, debugging, and reverse engineering address a core need in the UE modding community.
uses: UE game modders: Hot-load Lua/Blueprint/C++ mods without repackaging game files
Reverse engineers: Analyze runtime memory structures and properties via Live View and dumpers
Game debuggers: Inspect and edit object properties in real time to trace value changes
Casual players: Install community mods to unlock console commands and customize gameplay

zh.tag: 面向红队的多功能 ESP32 攻击性固件，支持 WiFi 渗透与硬件黑客
zh.what: Bruce 是一款专为 ESP32 开发板设计的开源固件，内置丰富的攻击性安全功能，主要服务于红队渗透测试与硬件黑客场景。它支持 WiFi 欺骗、去认证攻击、ARP 毒化、RAW 嗅探、EvilPortal 等多种无线与网络攻击向量，并兼容 M5Stack、LilyGo 等主流硬件生态。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 C++ 固件源码、预编译二进制文件（Releases）、Web 刷写工具，以及针对 Cardputer、M5Core、T-Deck 等设备的专项适配代码和硬件设计文档。
zh.stack: 基于 C++ 与 ESP-IDF/Arduino 框架开发，针对 ESP32 系列芯片优化，依赖 esptool.py 进行本地烧录，并提供基于浏览器的 Web Flasher 实现一键刷机。
zh.hot: 凭借 6.1k+ Stars 和单日 21 颗新增 Star 登上 C++ 日榜第 5，Bruce 因其将复杂的无线攻击能力集成到低成本 ESP32 硬件中而备受安全社区追捧，极大降低了红队工具的门槛。
uses: 网络安全红队人员 —— 用于近距离无线渗透测试与社工演练。
硬件黑客与极客 —— 在 Cardputer、M5Stack 等便携设备上快速部署攻击环境。
安全研究者 —— 学习 WiFi 协议漏洞、ARP 欺骗及嵌入式攻击技术的实验平台。
电子爱好者 —— 探索 ESP32 外设与开源硬件设计的参考项目。

en.tag: Multi-functional ESP32 offensive firmware for Red Team ops and hardware hacking
en.what: Bruce is an open-source ESP32 firmware packed with offensive security features designed for Red Team operations and hardware hacking. It supports a wide range of wireless and network attack vectors including WiFi deauthentication, beacon spamming, ARP poisoning, RAW sniffing, and EvilPortal, while being compatible with popular hardware like M5Stack and LilyGo devices.
en.content: The repository houses the complete C++ firmware source code, pre-built binaries in Releases, an official web flasher, and device-specific adaptations for Cardputer, M5Core, T-Deck and other supported boards, along with hardware design references.
en.stack: Built in C++ for the ESP32 platform using the ESP-IDF/Arduino framework, with local flashing via esptool.py and a browser-based Web Flasher for one-click over-the-air installation.
en.hot: Ranking #5 on GitHub's C++ daily trending with over 6.1k stars and 21 new stars today, Bruce has gained traction by packing advanced wireless attack capabilities into low-cost ESP32 hardware, significantly lowering the barrier to entry for Red Team tooling.
uses: Red Team security professionals — For close-proximity wireless penetration testing and social engineering drills.
Hardware hackers and makers — To rapidly deploy offensive security environments on portable devices like Cardputer and M5Stack.
Security researchers — As an experimental platform to study WiFi protocol vulnerabilities, ARP spoofing, and embedded attack techniques.
Electronics enthusiasts — A reference project for exploring ESP32 peripherals and open-source hardware design.

zh.tag: 经典开源后末日回合制生存游戏，被誉为僵尸生存类Roguelike的祖师爷
zh.what: Cataclysm: DDA 是一款设定在末日后的硬核回合制生存游戏。玩家需要在程序生成的残酷、持久世界中搜刮物资、制作工具、驾驶载具，并对抗僵尸、巨型昆虫、杀人机器人等变异怪物，竭尽所能活下去。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的游戏源码、多种瓦片集与图形资源、实验/稳定双分支的构建流水线，以及面向 Linux、Windows、macOS 和 BSD 的编译与分发文档。
zh.stack: 核心以 C++ 编写，同时支持 ncurses 终端模式与 SDL 图形前端；游戏数据与模组内容通过 JSON 驱动，并利用 CMake/Make 及 GitHub Actions 完成跨平台构建。
zh.hot: 该仓库已积累约 1.27 万 Star，今日新增 24 颗并登上 C++ 日榜第 11 位。其持续十数年的高频更新、近乎疯狂的自由度与深度生存模拟，使其在开源游戏社区中拥有极为忠实的玩家群体。
uses: 硬核 Roguelike 爱好者——体验程序生成世界与永久死亡带来的极致生存挑战
开源游戏研究者——学习大型 C++ 游戏项目架构、数据驱动设计与跨平台分发实践
模组开发者——通过 JSON 自定义物品、怪物、地图与玩法规则，扩展末日世界
后末日题材玩家——在僵尸、怪物与人性挣扎中体验高自由度的沙盒叙事

en.tag: Classic open-source post-apocalyptic turn-based survival roguelike
en.what: Cataclysm: DDA is a hardcore turn-based survival game set in a post-apocalyptic world. Players scavenge a procedurally generated, persistent wasteland for supplies, craft gear, drive vehicles, and fight or flee from zombies, mutants, and killer robots to survive as long as possible.
en.content: The repository contains the full game source code, multiple tilesets and graphical assets, CI/CD pipelines for stable and experimental builds, and compilation/packaging documentation for Linux, Windows, macOS, and BSD.
en.stack: Written primarily in C++ with both ncurses terminal and SDL graphical frontends; game data and modding content are JSON-driven, while cross-platform builds are handled via CMake/Make and GitHub Actions.
en.hot: With roughly 12.7k stars and 24 new stars today placing it at #11 on the C++ daily trending list, the game has maintained a devoted following. Decades of relentless updates, extreme freedom, and deep survival mechanics keep the community highly engaged.
uses: Hardcore roguelike fans seeking brutal permadeath survival in a procedurally generated world
Open-source game researchers studying large-scale C++ architecture and data-driven design
Modders who want to extend the apocalypse via JSON-defined items, monsters, and mechanics
Post-apocalyptic gamers craving sandbox storytelling with zombies, mutants, and moral dilemmas

zh.tag: 开源参数化 3D 建模工具
zh.what: FreeCAD 是一款免费开源的跨平台参数化 3D 建模器，主要用于设计各种尺寸的真实物体。它支持参数化建模，允许用户通过修改历史参数轻松调整设计。
zh.content: 仓库包含 FreeCAD 的完整源代码，以及构建脚本、文档和示例文件。
zh.stack: 基于 OpenCASCADE 几何内核、Coin3D 3D 场景库、Python API 和 Qt GUI 框架。
zh.hot: 作为成熟的开源 CAD 替代方案，FreeCAD 持续获得关注，本周新增 175 星，总星数达 32250，位列 C++ 周榜第 10。
uses: 产品设计师和工程师进行参数化建模与设计修改
建筑师创建建筑模型和施工图纸
教育工作者和学生用于学习 3D 建模和 CAD 概念
爱好者和创客制作可实际制造的设计

en.tag: Open-source parametric 3D modeler
en.what: FreeCAD is a free and open-source cross-platform parametric 3D modeler for designing real-life objects of any size. It supports parametric modeling, allowing users to easily modify designs by changing parameters in the model history.
en.content: The repository contains the complete source code of FreeCAD, along with build scripts, documentation, and example files.
en.stack: Built on OpenCASCADE geometry kernel, Coin3D 3D scene library, Python API, and Qt GUI framework.
en.hot: As a mature open-source CAD alternative, FreeCAD continues to gain attention, adding 175 stars this week, reaching 32,250 total, ranking 10th on the C++ weekly trending list.
uses: Product designers and engineers for parametric modeling and design modifications
Architects for creating building models and construction drawings
Educators and students for learning 3D modeling and CAD concepts
Hobbyists and makers for creating real-world manufacturable designs

zh.tag: 跨平台 PlayStation 4 模拟器，已可运行 Bloodborne 等独占大作
zh.what: shadPS4 是一款使用 C++ 编写的早期 PlayStation 4 模拟器，支持在 Windows、Linux 和 macOS 上运行 PS4 游戏。目前它已能成功启动并运行《血源诅咒》《如龙0》等热门独占作品，尽管仍处于开发初期，尚未达到完美体验。
zh.content: 仓库包含模拟器核心源码、图形/音频后端、指令翻译模块及系统服务实现，同时提供文档、兼容性列表与截图。用户可搭配独立的 QtLauncher 获得完整的图形界面体验。
zh.stack: 基于 C++ 开发，利用 Vulkan 等图形 API 实现 GPU 指令转译与渲染，跨平台兼容 Windows、Linux 与 macOS。
zh.hot: 凭借已能运行《血源诅咒》等 PS4 独占 3A 大作的突破性进展，该项目吸引了大量玩家与开发者关注，本周新增 332 Star 并累积至 32K+，跻身 GitHub C++ 周榜第 16 名。
uses: 硬核主机玩家 —— 想在 PC 或 Mac 上体验 PS4 独占大作。
模拟器开发者 —— 研究 PS4 系统架构、图形渲染与指令转译技术。
开源贡献者 —— 参与兼容性测试、漏洞修复与性能优化。
游戏研究者 —— 分析 PS4 游戏运行原理与系统调用实现。

en.tag: Cross-platform PS4 emulator already running exclusives like Bloodborne
en.what: shadPS4 is an early-stage PlayStation 4 emulator written in C++, enabling users to run PS4 titles on Windows, Linux, and macOS. It can already boot and play popular exclusives such as Bloodborne and Yakuza 0, though it remains a work in progress with known issues.
en.content: The repository houses the emulator core, graphics/audio backends, instruction translation modules, and system service implementations, along with documentation, compatibility lists, and screenshots. Users can pair it with the separate QtLauncher for a full GUI experience.
en.stack: Built primarily in C++, it leverages Vulkan and other graphics APIs to translate and render GPU instructions, with cross-platform support for Windows, Linux, and macOS.
en.hot: Its breakthrough ability to run PS4 exclusives like Bloodborne has drawn massive attention from gamers and developers, earning 332 new stars this week for a total of 32K+ and placing it 16th on GitHub's C++ Trending chart.
uses: Hardcore console gamers who want to play PS4 exclusives on PC or Mac.
Emulator developers studying PS4 system architecture, graphics rendering, and instruction translation.
Open-source contributors helping with compatibility testing, bug fixes, and performance optimization.
Game researchers analyzing PS4 game execution principles and system call implementations.

zh.tag: 跨设备键鼠共享神器
zh.what: Deskflow 是一款免费开源的键鼠共享软件，允许用户使用一台电脑的键盘、鼠标或触控板控制多台邻近电脑，实现无缝协作。它类似于软件 KVM，但不包含视频切换，默认启用 TLS 加密，支持 Wayland 和剪贴板共享。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Deskflow 的完整源代码、构建脚本、安装包下载链接以及详细的文档，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 平台。
zh.stack: 主要使用 C++ 开发，依赖 Qt 框架、OpenSSL 等库，支持 CMake 构建系统。
zh.hot: 作为 Synergy 的开源替代品，Deskflow 凭借免费、跨平台、支持 Wayland 和剪贴板共享等特性吸引了大量用户，本周新增 237 星，总星数达 27489。
uses: 多设备办公用户：在多个电脑间共享一套键鼠，提升工作效率
开发者与极客：跨平台开发测试，无需切换外设
家庭或工作室用户：控制多台电脑，简化桌面布局

en.tag: Share keyboard and mouse across multiple computers seamlessly
en.what: Deskflow is a free and open-source keyboard and mouse sharing app that lets you control multiple computers using a single keyboard, mouse, or trackpad. It acts like a software KVM (without video), with TLS encryption by default, Wayland support, and clipboard sharing.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code, build scripts, download links for packages, and comprehensive documentation, supporting Windows, macOS, and Linux.
en.stack: Primarily developed in C++, relying on Qt framework, OpenSSL, and other libraries, with CMake as the build system.
en.hot: As a free open-source alternative to Synergy, Deskflow attracts users with cross-platform support, Wayland compatibility, and clipboard sharing, gaining 237 stars this week and reaching 27,489 total stars.
uses: Multi-device office users: share one keyboard and mouse across computers for efficiency
Developers and power users: cross-platform development and testing without switching peripherals
Home or studio users: control multiple computers to simplify desk setup

zh.tag: 开源反检测浏览器，专为爬虫和AI代理设计
zh.what: Camoufox 是一个开源的反检测浏览器，旨在帮助用户绕过网站的反爬虫机制。它通过模拟真实浏览器指纹和行为，让爬虫和AI代理看起来像普通用户。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Camoufox 浏览器的核心源码、构建脚本、文档和示例。项目处于开发阶段，提供 Python 包和可执行文件。
zh.stack: 基于 C++ 开发，使用 Python 作为主要接口，依赖浏览器引擎（如 Firefox）和指纹库。
zh.hot: 本周新增 264 星，总星数超 1 万，因其填补了开源反检测浏览器的空白，且与 AI 代理和爬虫需求高度契合。
uses: 网络爬虫开发者 —— 需要绕过反爬机制采集数据
AI 代理开发者 —— 让代理在浏览器环境中隐身操作
安全研究人员 —— 测试网站指纹检测能力

en.tag: Open-source anti-detect browser for web scraping & AI agents
en.what: Camoufox is an open-source anti-detect browser designed to help users bypass anti-bot measures. It mimics real browser fingerprints and behaviors to make scrapers and AI agents appear as regular users.
en.content: The repo contains core source code, build scripts, documentation, and examples for Camoufox. It's under development, offering a Python package and executable.
en.stack: Built with C++, uses Python as the primary interface, relies on browser engines (e.g., Firefox) and fingerprinting libraries.
en.hot: Gained 264 stars this week, total over 10k, because it fills a gap in open-source anti-detect browsers and aligns well with AI agent and scraping needs.
uses: Web scrapers needing to bypass anti-bot measures
AI agent developers requiring stealthy browser automation
Security researchers testing fingerprint detection

zh.tag: 跨平台高性能机器学习推理与训练加速器
zh.what: ONNX Runtime 是一个跨平台的机器学习推理和训练加速器，支持 PyTorch、TensorFlow、scikit-learn 等多种框架的模型。它通过硬件加速器、图优化和变换实现最优性能，适用于多种硬件、驱动和操作系统。
zh.content: 仓库包含 ONNX Runtime 的核心 C++ 源代码、Python/C#/C 等语言的绑定、文档、示例以及训练加速模块。
zh.stack: 核心用 C++ 编写，依赖 ONNX 格式，支持 CUDA、TensorRT、OpenVINO 等硬件后端。
zh.hot: 作为微软官方的跨平台 ML 加速方案，ONNX Runtime 持续获得广泛关注，本周新增 72 星，总星数超 2.1 万，稳居 C++ 趋势榜。
uses: ML 工程师与数据科学家：在生产环境中加速模型推理，降低延迟和成本
深度学习框架用户：将 PyTorch/TensorFlow 模型导出为 ONNX 并利用 ONNX Runtime 进行高效部署
边缘设备开发者：在资源受限的设备上运行优化的 ML 模型

en.tag: Cross-platform, high-performance ML inference and training accelerator
en.what: ONNX Runtime is a cross-platform inference and training accelerator for machine learning models from frameworks like PyTorch, TensorFlow, and scikit-learn. It delivers optimal performance via hardware accelerators, graph optimizations, and transforms across diverse hardware and OS.
en.content: The repo contains core C++ source code, bindings for Python/C#/C, documentation, examples, and training acceleration modules.
en.stack: Core written in C++, relies on ONNX format, supports hardware backends like CUDA, TensorRT, OpenVINO.
en.hot: As Microsoft's official cross-platform ML acceleration solution, ONNX Runtime continues to gain traction with 72 new stars this week, totaling over 21k stars, firmly in the C++ trending list.
uses: ML engineers & data scientists: accelerate model inference in production, reducing latency and cost
Deep learning framework users: export PyTorch/TensorFlow models to ONNX and deploy efficiently with ONNX Runtime
Edge device developers: run optimized ML models on resource-constrained devices

zh.tag: 开源金融终端，市场分析与投资研究工具
zh.what: FinceptTerminal 是一款现代化的金融应用，提供高级市场分析、投资研究和经济数据工具。它旨在为用户提供交互式探索和数据驱动的决策支持，界面友好。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的终端应用源代码，基于 C++20 和 Qt6 构建，集成 Python 3.11+ 脚本支持。提供实时市场数据、图表分析、投资组合管理等功能模块。
zh.stack: 技术栈：C++20、Qt6（GUI 框架）、Python 3.11+（脚本扩展）、AGPL-3.0 许可证。
zh.hot: 拥有 28.7k+ Stars，本周新增 404，位列 C++ 周榜第 17。尽管维护频率降低，但作为开源金融终端，仍吸引大量量化交易和金融科技爱好者。
uses: 量化交易员 —— 用于实时市场数据分析和策略回测
金融研究人员 —— 探索经济数据和投资研究
开发者 —— 学习 C++/Qt6 金融应用开发

en.tag: Open-source financial terminal for market analytics, investment research, and economic data
en.what: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code of the terminal application, built with C++20 and Qt6, with Python 3.11+ scripting support. It includes modules for real-time market data, charting, portfolio management, and more.
en.stack: Tech stack: C++20, Qt6 (GUI framework), Python 3.11+ (scripting), licensed under AGPL-3.0.
en.hot: With 28.7k+ stars and 404 added this week, it ranks #17 on C++ weekly trending. Despite reduced maintenance, its open-source nature attracts quant traders and fintech enthusiasts.
uses: Quant traders — for real-time market data analysis and backtesting
Financial researchers — exploring economic data and investment research
Developers — learning C++/Qt6 financial application development

zh.tag: Google 开源的生产级系统性能追踪与分析套件
zh.what: Perfetto 是面向复杂软件系统的开源生产级追踪与性能分析平台，主要用于 Android 操作系统和 Chromium 浏览器。它通过高性能守护进程、低开销 SDK 和浏览器可视化界面，帮助开发者定位功能与性能瓶颈。
zh.content: 仓库包含高性能追踪守护进程、C++17 低开销 SDK、系统级探针、基于浏览器的本地可视化 UI，以及支持 SQL 查询的 trace 分析库。
zh.stack: 主体以 C++17 编写，核心依赖包含 Linux ftrace、Android 内部机制，UI 端使用 Web 技术实现完全本地化的浏览器界面。
zh.hot: 凭借作为 Android 和 Chromium 默认追踪系统的权威背书，该仓库已获得 6,000+ Star，今日新增 6 颗并登上 GitHub C++ 日榜第 6 名。
uses: Android 应用与平台开发者排查启动慢、掉帧、ANR 及内存问题
C/C++ 开发者利用 SDK 在 Linux/macOS/Windows 上插桩追踪执行流
Linux 内核与系统开发者通过 ftrace 可视化调度、系统调用与中断
性能工程师与 SRE 使用 SQL 接口统一分析 perf、Instruments 等多源追踪数据

en.tag: Google's production-grade system tracing, profiling & trace analysis suite
en.what: Perfetto is an open-source, production-grade platform for tracing, profiling and analyzing complex software systems, serving as the default tracing system for Android and Chromium. It helps developers root-cause functional and performance issues through high-performance daemons, low-overhead SDKs and a browser-based UI.
en.content: The repo includes high-performance tracing daemons, a C++17 low-overhead SDK, OS-level probes, a browser-based local visualization UI, and a SQL-based trace analysis library.
en.stack: Written primarily in C++17, with core dependencies on Linux ftrace and Android internals, and a Web-based UI running entirely locally in the browser.
en.hot: Backed by being the default tracing system for Android and Chromium, it has earned 6,000+ stars, gaining 6 today and ranking 6th on GitHub's daily C++ Trending.
uses: Android app and platform developers debugging slow startups, jank, ANRs and memory issues
C/C++ developers instrumenting apps on Linux, macOS and Windows via the Tracing SDK
Linux kernel and system developers visualizing scheduling, syscalls and interrupts via ftrace
Performance engineers and SREs programmatically analyzing traces from perf, Instruments and more using SQL

zh.tag: 用 Web 技术构建跨平台桌面应用的框架
zh.what: Electron 是一个开源框架，允许开发者使用 JavaScript、HTML 和 CSS 构建跨平台桌面应用。它基于 Node.js 和 Chromium，被 Visual Studio Code 等众多知名应用采用。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Electron 框架的完整源代码、构建脚本、文档和示例。核心是 C++ 编写的底层绑定，上层提供 JavaScript API。
zh.stack: 技术栈包括 C++（核心）、JavaScript/Node.js（API 层）、Chromium（渲染引擎）。依赖 npm 进行安装和管理。
zh.hot: 拥有 122K+ 星标，本周新增 150，长期稳居 GitHub 热门榜。作为最流行的桌面应用框架之一，持续活跃的社区和广泛的应用生态是其热度不减的原因。
uses: 前端开发者：用 Web 技术快速构建桌面应用
桌面应用开发者：需要跨平台支持的项目
企业团队：开发内部工具或商业桌面软件

en.tag: Build cross-platform desktop apps with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS
en.what: Electron is an open-source framework that enables developers to build cross-platform desktop applications using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. It is based on Node.js and Chromium and is used by many popular apps like Visual Studio Code.
en.content: The repository contains the full source code, build scripts, documentation, and examples for the Electron framework. The core is written in C++ for low-level bindings, with JavaScript APIs on top.
en.stack: Tech stack includes C++ (core), JavaScript/Node.js (API layer), and Chromium (rendering engine). Managed via npm for installation.
en.hot: With 122K+ stars and 150 new stars this week, it consistently ranks on GitHub trending. As one of the most popular desktop app frameworks, its active community and wide ecosystem keep it hot.
uses: Frontend developers: quickly build desktop apps using web technologies
Desktop app developers: projects requiring cross-platform support
Enterprise teams: develop internal tools or commercial desktop software

zh.tag: C++高性能LLM推理引擎，支持本地多硬件运行与量化部署
zh.what: llama.cpp 是一个基于纯 C/C++ 编写的大语言模型推理框架，无需 PyTorch 等重量级依赖即可在本地运行主流开源 LLM。它通过极致的底层优化和多种量化方案，使从消费级 CPU 到 GPU 的广泛硬件都能高效执行推理。项目同时提供了命令行工具、HTTP 服务（llama-server）及全新 WebUI，方便快速集成与交互。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心推理库 libllama、命令行示例、llama-server REST API 服务、全新 WebUI，以及面向 CUDA/Metal/Vulkan 等多后端的 ggml 计算引擎。此外还提供了丰富的模型格式转换、量化脚本和跨平台构建配置。
zh.stack: 以 C/C++ 为内核，使用 CMake 构建系统，支持通过 CUDA、Metal、Vulkan、SYCL 等后端加速，并附带 Python 绑定与 Docker 部署方案。
zh.hot: 作为本地 LLM 推理的标杆实现，llama.cpp 凭借轻量、高性能和跨平台特性成为开源社区首选，GitHub Star 数已突破 12 万，今日新增 127 星并跻身 C++ 日榜第 18 位。
uses: 本地 AI 开发者与研究者——需要在个人设备或边缘端快速验证、调试和部署开源大模型
硬件与嵌入式爱好者——希望在消费级 CPU、笔记本甚至低配置设备上流畅运行 LLM
下游应用/Agent 集成者——寻求轻量无依赖的推理后端，为 Chatbot、RAG 或 AI Agent 提供底层支持
企业私有化部署工程师——追求无需重型框架、可跨平台编译的私有 LLM 推理方案

en.tag: High-performance C++ LLM inference engine for local multi-hardware deployment
en.what: llama.cpp is a pure C/C++ inference framework for large language models that runs mainstream open-source LLMs locally without heavy dependencies like PyTorch. Through extreme low-level optimizations and various quantization schemes, it enables efficient inference across hardware ranging from consumer CPUs to GPUs. The project also includes CLI tools, an HTTP server (llama-server), and a new WebUI for quick integration and interaction.
en.content: The repository contains the core inference library libllama, CLI examples, the llama-server REST API service, a new WebUI, and the ggml compute engine targeting multiple backends including CUDA, Metal, and Vulkan. It also provides extensive model format conversion, quantization scripts, and cross-platform build configurations.
en.stack: Built on a C/C++ core with CMake, it supports acceleration via CUDA, Metal, Vulkan, SYCL, and other backends, along with Python bindings and Docker deployment options.
en.hot: As the reference implementation for local LLM inference, llama.cpp has become the open-source community's go-to choice for its lightweight, high-performance, and cross-platform nature, surpassing 120k GitHub stars with 127 new stars today and ranking 18th on the C++ daily trending list.
uses: Local AI developers and researchers who need to quickly validate, debug, and deploy open-source LLMs on personal or edge devices
Hardware and embedded enthusiasts looking to run LLMs smoothly on consumer CPUs, laptops, and low-spec devices
Downstream application and agent integrators seeking a lightweight, dependency-free inference backend for chatbots, RAG, or AI agents
Enterprise engineers pursuing private LLM inference solutions that compile across platforms without heavy frameworks

zh.tag: Google 开源 C++ 通用库，生产级标准库扩展
zh.what: Abseil 是 Google 开源的 C++ 通用库集合，旨在补充和扩展 C++ 标准库。它从 Google 内部代码库提取，经过大规模生产环境验证，提供 C++17 兼容的高可靠基础组件。
zh.content: 仓库包含 base、algorithm、cleanup、container、debugging、flags、hash、log、numeric、strings、synchronization、time 等模块代码，覆盖初始化、算法扩展、容器、日志与并发工具等基础能力，支持 Bazel 和 CMake 构建。
zh.stack: 基于 C++17 标准开发，官方支持 Bazel 与 CMake 构建，兼容主流编译器与平台，无外部运行时依赖，仅依赖 C++ 标准库。
zh.hot: 本周新增 608 Star 冲上 GitHub 周榜第 2，反映出 C++ 开发者对经过 Google 生产环境验证、能填补标准库空白的高质量基础组件的强劲需求。17964 Star 的积累也证明了其作为现代 C++ 基础设施的核心地位。
uses: C++ 后端/基础架构开发者 —— 需要可靠的基础工具库替代或补充标准库
追求代码稳定性与工程规范的大型项目 —— 使用 Google 内部验证过的高质量保证库
跨平台 C++ 应用开发团队 —— 借助其良好的编译器与平台支持降低移植成本

en.tag: Google's open-source C++ common libraries extending the standard library
en.what: Abseil is an open-source collection of C++ libraries from Google designed to augment the standard library. Extracted from Google's internal codebase and battle-tested in production, it provides C++17-compliant foundational utilities.
en.content: The repository includes modular components such as base, algorithm, cleanup, container, debugging, flags, hash, log, strings, synchronization, and time, supporting both Bazel and CMake build systems.
en.stack: Built on C++17 with official Bazel and CMake support, compatible with major compilers and platforms, with zero external runtime dependencies beyond the C++ standard library.
en.hot: Surging to #2 on GitHub Trending with 608 new stars this week, it reflects strong demand from C++ developers for battle-tested, production-grade utilities that fill gaps in the standard library. Its 17,964 total stars cement its role as essential modern C++ infrastructure.
uses: C++ backend and infrastructure developers who need reliable foundational utilities to complement or replace the standard library
Large-scale projects prioritizing code stability and engineering rigor, leveraging Google's internally battle-tested libraries
Cross-platform C++ teams looking to reduce porting costs through broad compiler and platform support

zh.tag: AI 驱动的本地求职助手，基于 Claude Code 自动化申请流程
zh.what: 这是一个基于 Claude Code 的 AI 求职应用框架，能在你的机器上运行。它可以评估职位描述、定制简历、撰写求职信并准备面试，将整个求职流程自动化。
zh.content: 仓库包含一套结构化工作流，包括个人资料设置、职位搜索、匹配评估、申请生成和面试准备等模块。还提供了针对丹麦求职网站的搜索技能，但设计上支持替换为本地求职平台。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 开发，核心依赖 Claude Code 作为 AI 引擎，使用 Node.js 运行时。
zh.hot: 本月新增超 2 万星，总星数达 2.4 万，排名 GitHub Trending 月榜第二。作者本人用此框架成功找到 AI 工程师工作，真实案例引发大量关注。
uses: 求职者：希望用 AI 自动化简历定制、求职信撰写和面试准备的个人
开发者：对 AI Agent 工作流感兴趣，想学习或扩展 Claude Code 应用框架的技术人员
招聘顾问：需要批量评估职位匹配度、优化申请材料的专业人士

en.tag: AI-powered local job search assistant automating applications via Claude Code
en.what: An AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code that runs on your machine. It evaluates job postings, tailors CVs, writes cover letters, and prepares interviews, automating the entire job search workflow.
en.content: The repo contains a structured workflow with modules for profiling, job scraping, fit evaluation, application generation, and interview prep. It includes search skills for Danish job portals but is designed to be adaptable to local boards.
en.stack: Built with TypeScript, relies on Claude Code as the AI engine, and runs on Node.js.
en.hot: Gained over 20k stars this month, reaching 24k total, ranking #2 on GitHub Trending monthly. The author personally used this framework to land an AI engineer job, sparking massive interest.
uses: Job seekers: individuals wanting to automate CV tailoring, cover letter writing, and interview prep with AI
Developers: tech enthusiasts interested in AI agent workflows, looking to learn or extend Claude Code application frameworks
Recruitment consultants: professionals needing to batch evaluate job fit and optimize application materials

zh.tag: 开源智能体视频制作系统，将AI编程助手升级为视频工作室
zh.what: OpenMontage 是全球首个开源的智能体驱动视频制作系统，通过 12 条流水线、52 款工具和 500 余项智能体技能，将用户的 AI 编程助手转化为完整的视频生产工作室。用户只需提供灵感或参考视频，即可由多智能体协作完成从脚本、素材到成片的自动化视频创作。
zh.content: 仓库内置了 12 条可编排的视频生产流水线、52 个专用工具模块以及超过 500 项智能体技能配置，涵盖从脚本生成、素材处理到后期合成的完整链路。项目以 Python 为主语言，提供快速启动指南、提示词模板及多模型提供商接入文档。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 构建，采用智能体编排架构，支持接入 Claude、ChatGPT、DeepSeek 等主流大模型 API，并依赖 Bloome 等多智能体协作平台与 Atlas Cloud 等全模态推理服务完成视频生成与图像合成。
zh.hot: 项目上线短期内狂揽 39.6K Star，其中本月新增 34.7K，登顶 GitHub Trending 月榜第 1，反映出社区对「智能体驱动视频自动化」的强烈需求。其首创的「将 AI 编程助手转化为视频工作室」理念，填补了开源领域端到端智能视频生产的空白。
uses: AI 开发者与智能体研究者——希望基于开源架构快速搭建自动化视频工作流
内容创作者与自媒体团队——需要批量生成短视频、广告或解说视频
编程爱好者与 AI 辅助用户——想将已有的 AI Coding Assistant 升级为视频生产工具
开源社区与技术布道者——寻找可扩展、可定制的多智能体协作视频方案

en.tag: Open-source agentic video production: turn AI coding assistant into studio
en.what: OpenMontage is the world's first open-source, agentic video production system. It transforms your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio through 12 pipelines, 52 tools, and 500+ agent skills. Users can paste a reference video or provide prompts to automate end-to-end video creation via multi-agent collaboration.
en.content: The repository contains 12 orchestrated video production pipelines, 52 dedicated tool modules, and 500+ agent skill configurations covering scripting, asset processing, and post-production. Written primarily in Python, it includes quick-start guides, prompt templates, and provider integration docs for multi-model backends.
en.stack: Built on Python with an agent orchestration architecture, it supports mainstream LLM APIs such as Claude, ChatGPT, and DeepSeek. It leverages multi-agent collaboration platforms like Bloome and full-modal inference services like Atlas Cloud for video generation and image synthesis.
en.hot: The project has skyrocketed to 39.6K stars with 34.7K added this month, claiming the #1 spot on GitHub Trending monthly rankings. This reflects massive community demand for agentic video automation, as its pioneering concept of turning AI coding assistants into video studios fills a gap in open-source end-to-end intelligent video production.
uses: AI developers and agent researchers seeking to build automated video workflows on open-source architecture.
Content creators and social media teams needing batch production of short videos, ads, or explainer clips.
Coding enthusiasts and AI-assisted users who want to upgrade their existing AI coding assistant into a video production tool.
Open-source communities and tech evangelists looking for scalable, customizable multi-agent collaborative video solutions.

zh.tag: 开源AI自动化渗透测试工具，自主发现并修复应用漏洞
zh.what: Strix 是一个开源的 AI 渗透测试平台，通过自主 AI 代理动态运行代码，像真实黑客一样侦察、利用并验证应用漏洞。它通过生成实际的可利用 Proof-of-Concept 来确认漏洞，而非仅依赖静态分析的误报，并支持多代理协作规模化执行安全测试。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的渗透测试工具包，支持侦察、漏洞利用与验证开箱即用；同时提供 GitHub Actions 集成与 CI/CD 流水线插件，可自动扫描 Pull Request 并在代码合并前阻断不安全提交。
zh.stack: 项目以 Python 为主要语言构建，支持通过 PyPI 分发安装（strix-agent），并依赖现代 AI 代理编排框架实现多智能体协作；可与现有 DevOps 工具链深度集成。
zh.hot: 该项目月增 16,488 Star 跃至 GitHub 月榜第 5 名，总星数突破 42,318；其“AI + 动态 PoC 验证”模式精准击中了传统静态扫描误报率高、人工渗透测试成本高的痛点，成为安全左移趋势下的热门方案。
uses: 开发团队 —— 在 CI/CD 中自动化安全扫描，在代码合并前拦截漏洞
安全工程师 —— 利用多 AI 代理协作执行大规模渗透测试与漏洞验证
DevOps/平台团队 —— 将安全左移，无需额外基础设施即可接入现有流水线

en.tag: Open-source autonomous AI pentesting agents that find and fix app vulnerabilities
en.what: Strix is an open-source AI-powered penetration testing platform where autonomous agents dynamically run code to discover and validate vulnerabilities like real hackers. It generates working proofs-of-concept rather than static-analysis false positives, and scales through multi-agent orchestration for collaborative security testing.
en.content: The repository ships with a full pentesting toolkit covering reconnaissance, exploitation, and validation out of the box. It also provides GitHub Actions integration and CI/CD pipeline plugins to auto-scan pull requests and block insecure code before it reaches production.
en.stack: Built primarily in Python and distributed via PyPI as strix-agent, it relies on modern AI agent orchestration frameworks for multi-agent collaboration and deep integration with existing DevOps toolchains.
en.hot: With 16,488 new stars this month and a #5 spot on GitHub Trending, it has climbed to 42,318 total stars. Its “AI + dynamic PoC validation” model directly addresses the high false-positive rates of legacy scanners and the cost of manual pentesting, making it a standout in the shift-left security movement.
uses: Development teams — Automate security scanning in CI/CD to intercept vulnerabilities before code merges.
Security engineers — Leverage multi-agent AI collaboration for large-scale pentesting and real exploit validation.
DevOps/platform teams — Shift security left by plugging into existing pipelines with zero additional infrastructure.

zh.tag: 高性能代码智能 MCP 服务器，毫秒级构建代码知识图谱
zh.what: 这是一个专为 AI 编程代理设计的高性能代码智能引擎，通过 Tree-sitter AST 分析将代码库索引为持久化知识图谱。它能在毫秒内完成普通仓库的全量索引，并以亚毫秒级延迟回答结构化查询。作为 MCP 服务器，它提供 15 个工具，支持 43 种客户端接入，可将 Token 消耗降低 99%。
zh.content: 仓库包含纯 C 编写的单静态二进制可执行文件，内置基于 Tree-sitter 的 158 语言解析器与 10 种语言的 Hybrid LSP 语义增强模块。产物为零依赖的跨平台（macOS/Linux/Windows）二进制，附带 15 个 MCP 工具与 5600+ 测试用例。
zh.stack: 核心采用纯 C 语言实现以保证极致性能与零依赖，通过 tree-sitter 生成 AST 并辅以 Hybrid LSP 进行语义类型解析。编译为单静态二进制分发，无需任何运行时依赖。
zh.hot: 本月暴涨 28,151 Star 至 32,528，冲上 GitHub 月榜第 2，反映出 AI Agent 生态对「极速代码理解基础设施」的迫切需求。相比逐文件探索，它实现 10 倍 Token 节省与 2.1 倍工具调用减少，成为开发者提升 AI 编码效率的热门选择。
uses: AI 编程代理开发者 —— 为 Cursor、Claude Code 等客户端提供秒级代码库记忆与结构化查询能力
大型代码库维护者 —— 在毫秒级内索引千万行级项目（如 Linux 内核），降低 AI 辅助理解的成本
追求极致效率的工程师 —— 通过单二进制零依赖部署，快速接入 158 种语言的亚毫秒代码检索
MCP 生态集成者 —— 利用 15 个标准化工具与 43 个客户端表面，构建自动化的代码分析流水线

en.tag: High-performance code-intelligence MCP server building persistent knowledge graphs in milliseconds
en.what: A high-performance code intelligence engine designed for AI coding agents that indexes entire codebases into persistent knowledge graphs via Tree-sitter AST analysis. It full-indexes average repositories in milliseconds and answers structural queries in under 1ms. As an MCP server, it exposes 15 tools across 43 client surfaces while cutting token usage by 99%.
en.content: A pure-C single static binary with built-in Tree-sitter parsers for 158 languages and Hybrid LSP semantic resolution for 10 languages. Ships as a zero-dependency, cross-platform executable (macOS/Linux/Windows) with 15 MCP tools and over 5,600 passing tests.
en.stack: Built entirely in C for extreme performance and zero dependencies, leveraging tree-sitter for AST generation and Hybrid LSP for semantic type resolution. Distributed as a single static binary requiring no runtime dependencies.
en.hot: Skyrocketed by 28,151 stars this month to 32,528, landing at #2 on GitHub's monthly Trending—reflecting soaring demand for lightning-fast code-intelligence infrastructure in the AI Agent era. It delivers 10× fewer tokens and 2.1× fewer tool calls versus file-by-file exploration, making it a go-to choice for AI-assisted coding workflows.
uses: AI agent developers —— Feed Cursor, Claude Code, and other MCP clients with instant codebase memory and sub-ms structural querying
Large-scale codebase maintainers —— Index multi-million-LOC projects like the Linux kernel in minutes, slashing AI comprehension costs
Efficiency-focused engineers —— Deploy a single zero-dependency binary to get sub-millisecond code search across 158 languages
MCP ecosystem integrators —— Leverage 15 standard tools and 43 client surfaces to build automated code-analysis pipelines

zh.tag: 现代 C++ 原生单元测试与微基准框架，支持 TDD/BDD
zh.what: Catch2 是一个专为 C++ 设计的现代单元测试框架，同时提供微基准测试与基础 BDD 宏支持。它让测试代码看起来像普通 C++ 布尔表达式，无需繁琐的宏定义即可自然编写测试用例。
zh.content: 仓库包含多头文件库源码、CMake 构建配置、CI 工作流及详尽文档；v3 版本从单头文件重构为常规多文件库，提供独立的 benchmark 模块与测试宏集合。
zh.stack: 核心基于现代 C++（C++14/17/20 为主），使用 CMake 构建，支持 Linux、macOS、Windows 多平台 CI，并提供 Godbolt 在线体验。
zh.hot: 作为 C++ 生态最流行的测试框架之一，Catch2 已积累超 21k Star，本周新增 769 星并跻身 GitHub C++ 周榜第 7 名，反映出 C++ 社区对简洁、现代测试工具的旺盛需求。
uses: C++ 开发者 —— 需要为项目快速引入单元测试与回归测试
TDD/BDD 实践者 —— 想用接近自然语言的断言和场景描述写测试
性能工程师 —— 需要集成微基准测试以追踪代码性能回归
开源库维护者 —— 寻求跨平台、 header-only（v2）或现代库形态（v3）的测试方案

en.tag: Modern C++-native unit-testing & micro-benchmarking framework for TDD/BDD
en.what: Catch2 is a modern, C++-native unit testing framework that also offers micro-benchmarking capabilities and basic BDD macros. It lets you write tests using natural C++ boolean expressions without cumbersome macro boilerplate.
en.content: The repository houses a multi-header library source, CMake build configs, CI workflows, and extensive docs. Starting with v3, it was restructured from a single-header library into a normal multi-file library with a dedicated benchmark module and test macro suite.
en.stack: Built on modern C++ (primarily C++14/17/20), uses CMake, supports cross-platform CI on Linux, macOS, and Windows, and offers Godbolt online playground integration.
en.hot: One of the most popular C++ testing frameworks with over 21k stars, Catch2 gained 769 stars this week and hit #7 on the GitHub C++ Trending list, signaling strong demand for lightweight, modern C++ testing tools.
uses: C++ developers looking to quickly integrate unit and regression tests
TDD/BDD practitioners who want natural-language-like assertions and scenario descriptions
Performance engineers needing built-in micro-benchmarking to track code regressions
Open-source maintainers seeking cross-platform testing in header-only (v2) or modern library (v3) form

zh.tag: Git预提交AI代理网关，自动把关代码质量并生成干净PR
zh.what: no-mistakes 在本地与远程仓库之间架设了一层 Git 代理，所有代码在真正推送到 origin 之前，都会先进入一个隔离的临时工作树。它会自动触发 AI 驱动的验证流水线（review、test、lint、docs），只有全部检查通过后才转发分支，并自动创建干净的 Pull Request。开发者无需中断当前工作，既可让 AI 自动修复机械性问题，也能把涉及意图的改动提交人工审核。
zh.content: 仓库主体是一个 Go 编写的 CLI，核心包含本地 Git 代理、多 Agent 适配层（Claude、Codex、Cursor、Copilot 等）以及流水线执行引擎。它通过创建临时工作树实现非阻塞验证，并附带自动发布与跨平台构建配置。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 开发，利用 Git 工作树与代理机制拦截推送，通过可扩展的 AI Agent 接口（acpx 等）串联 Review、Test、Lint 等关卡，支持 macOS、Linux、Windows 三平台。
zh.hot: 在 AI 编程助手爆发式普及的当下，该工具切中了‘AI 生成代码质量不可控’的痛点，月增 5063 Star、总星数 6439、位列 GitHub 月榜第 4，说明开发者对‘Agent 原生’的自动化代码把关与干净 PR 工作流需求强烈。
uses: 使用 AI 编程助手（Cursor、Copilot、Claude Code 等）的开发者，想在 push 前自动验证 AI 生成的代码
追求干净 PR 与高质量代码审查的工程师团队，希望把 lint、test、review 统一到 push 前阶段
需要非阻塞式本地验证的开发者，不想因流水线执行而打断当前编码节奏
开源贡献者，希望自动修复机械性问题并减少因疏忽导致的 CI 失败

en.tag: Git pre-push AI agent gateway that auto-validates code and opens clean PRs
en.what: no-mistakes acts as a local Git proxy between your branch and the remote. Before anything reaches origin, your push is spun into a disposable worktree where an AI-driven validation pipeline runs review, tests, lint, and docs checks. Only after every gate passes does it forward the branch and open a clean PR automatically, applying safe auto-fixes while escalating intent-related changes for human review without disrupting your current workspace.
en.content: The repo is primarily a Go-based CLI comprising a local Git proxy core, multi-agent adapters for Claude, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, and others via acpx, and a configurable pipeline runner. It manages disposable worktrees for non-blocking validation and ships with automated release workflows and cross-platform builds.
en.stack: Written in Go, it intercepts pushes via Git worktree and proxy mechanisms, chains review, test, and lint gates through pluggable AI agent interfaces like acpx, and supports macOS, Linux, and Windows.
en.hot: As AI coding assistants go mainstream, it directly addresses the pain point of uncontrolled AI-generated code quality, earning 5,063 new stars this month for a total of 6,439 and ranking 4th on GitHub's monthly trending list—reflecting strong demand for agent-native automated code gating and clean PR workflows.
uses: Developers using AI coding assistants (Cursor, Copilot, Claude Code, etc.) who want automated validation before pushing AI-generated code
Engineering teams pursuing clean PRs and high-quality code reviews by unifying lint, test, and review into a pre-push stage
Developers needing non-blocking local validation that doesn't interrupt their current coding flow
Open-source contributors who want mechanical issues auto-fixed and fewer CI failures from oversight

zh.tag: 本地优先的 AI 会议助手，实时转录并自动总结纪要
zh.what: Meetily 是一款基于 Rust 开发的 AI 会议助手，支持在 macOS 和 Windows 上实现 100% 本地化的实时会议转录、说话人分离与智能总结。它无需云端连接，通过 Parakeet/Whisper 实现 4 倍速实时转录，并借助 Ollama 自动生成会议纪要，满足企业对隐私与合规的严苛要求。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的桌面客户端源码、基于 Rust 的本地音频处理与转录引擎、Ollama 集成模块，以及面向 macOS 和 Windows 的预编译安装包和演示文档。
zh.stack: 核心采用 Rust 构建以保证高性能与低资源占用，集成 Parakeet/Whisper 语音识别模型实现实时转录，并通过 Ollama 在本地运行大模型完成会议总结。
zh.hot: 在数据隐私监管日益严格的背景下，其「100% 本地处理、零云端」的架构精准击中了企业合规痛点；凭借 25.3K Star 和本月新增 2,854 Star 登上 GitHub Trending 月榜第 8，显示出市场对隐私优先型生产力工具的强烈需求。
uses: 企业合规团队 —— 需在完全离线环境下处理敏感会议内容，满足数据主权与隐私合规要求。
远程办公用户 —— 希望自动获得带说话人分离的实时转录与会议纪要，无需上传云端。
开发者与隐私爱好者 —— 寻求可自托管、可审计的开源会议工具，并能基于 Rust 源码二次定制。
咨询与法律行业 —— 在客户机密对话场景中，要求本地存储且可控的 AI 会议记录方案。

en.tag: Privacy-first AI meeting assistant with local transcription & summarization
en.what: Meetily is a Rust-built, privacy-first AI meeting assistant that delivers 100% on-device live transcription, speaker diarization, and smart summarization for macOS and Windows. It runs entirely offline using Parakeet/Whisper for 4x faster real-time transcription and Ollama for automated meeting minutes, ensuring enterprises retain full data sovereignty without cloud dependencies.
en.content: The repository houses the full desktop client source code, a Rust-based local audio processing and transcription engine, Ollama integration modules, along with pre-built installers and documentation for macOS and Windows.
en.stack: The core is built in Rust for high performance and low resource usage, integrating Parakeet/Whisper speech recognition for real-time transcription and leveraging Ollama to run LLMs locally for meeting summarization.
en.hot: Amid tightening data privacy regulations, its "100% local processing, zero cloud" architecture directly addresses enterprise compliance pain points; its 25.3K stars and 2,854 new stars this month—ranking 8th on GitHub Trending—signal strong market demand for privacy-first productivity tools.
uses: Enterprise compliance teams —— Process sensitive meetings in fully offline environments to meet data sovereignty and privacy requirements.
Remote professionals —— Automatically obtain real-time transcripts with speaker diarization and summaries without cloud uploads.
Developers and privacy advocates —— Seek a self-hostable, auditable open-source meeting tool that can be customized via the Rust codebase.
Consulting and legal sectors —— Handle confidential client conversations with locally stored, fully controllable AI meeting records.

zh.tag: 全球主流AI系统提示词泄露收录与透明度研究
zh.what: 持续抓取并归档 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini、Grok 等主流 AI 的系统提示词（system prompts），揭示模型在接收用户消息前的隐藏指令与行为规则。项目被《华盛顿邮报》等权威媒体引用，成为 AI 透明度研究的重要信源。
zh.content: 按厂商（Anthropic、OpenAI、Google、xAI 等）分目录存放各产品的完整系统提示词文本，涵盖常规对话、编程助手（Claude Code、Copilot）、深度研究（Perplexity）等多场景版本。
zh.stack: 以 Markdown 文档为主，辅以简单的 JavaScript 脚本和 GitHub Actions 自动化更新，无需复杂后端依赖。
zh.hot: 本月新增近 3,000 Star 冲上 Trending 月榜第 3，反映出行业与公众对 AI 黑箱指令的极强好奇心；模型版本快速迭代也让提示词考古成为开发者刚需。
uses: AI 研究者与媒体 —— 分析不同厂商的系统级安全策略与价值观对齐方式
提示词工程师与开发者 —— 逆向学习顶级产品的指令工程技巧以优化自身应用
关注 AI 伦理的公众 —— 了解聊天机器人在对话前的隐藏规则与行为边界

en.tag: Leaked system prompts archive for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more
en.what: This repository systematically collects and archives leaked system prompts from leading AI chatbots like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Grok, exposing the hidden instructions and behavioral rules they receive before processing user messages. Cited by major outlets like The Washington Post, it serves as a key resource for AI transparency research.
en.content: Organized by vendor (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, xAI, etc.), the repo stores verbatim system prompt texts across products and scenarios, including general chat, coding agents (Claude Code, Copilot), and deep research modes (Perplexity).
en.stack: Primarily Markdown documentation with lightweight JavaScript utilities and GitHub Actions for automated updates, requiring no complex backend dependencies.
en.hot: Surging with nearly 3,000 new stars this month to hit #3 on GitHub Trending, it reflects intense curiosity about AI black box instructions; rapid model iteration has also made prompt archaeology essential for developers.
uses: AI researchers and journalists — analyze system-level safety policies and value alignment across vendors
Prompt engineers and developers — reverse-engineer instruction-engineering techniques from top products to optimize their own apps
AI-ethics-minded public — understand the hidden rules and behavioral boundaries chatbots follow before responding

zh.tag: 网页内嵌式 AI GUI Agent，纯文本操控无需截图
zh.what: Page Agent 是一个运行在浏览器页面内的 JavaScript GUI Agent，只需嵌入一段脚本即可让任何网页拥有自然语言操控能力。它通过纯文本 DOM 解析而非截图视觉感知来理解页面结构，使用户能用对话方式完成点击、输入、导航等操作。支持接入主流大模型（包括本地部署），并可选配 Chrome 扩展实现跨页面任务。
zh.content: 仓库核心是一个可嵌入任意网页的 JavaScript/TypeScript SDK，提供基于文本的 DOM 感知、LLM 调用编排和动作执行引擎；另包含可选的 Chrome 浏览器扩展、MCP 服务及官方文档站点。
zh.stack: 基于 TypeScript 构建，以 npm 包形式分发，无 Python 或无头浏览器依赖，仅通过浏览器原生 JavaScript 运行，可对接任意 OpenAI 兼容接口的主流或本地大模型。
zh.hot: 月增 8,521 Star 冲上 Trending 月榜第 10，它用纯前端方案解决了传统 AI Agent 依赖截图/多模态/浏览器扩展的痛点，实现了“一行脚本即可 AI 化任意网页”的极低接入成本。
uses: 前端开发者——无需改动后端即可为现有 Web 应用快速添加自然语言交互能力
自动化测试/运维人员——用文本指令替代传统脚本进行网页自动化操作
AI 产品团队——快速构建浏览器内的智能助手或 Copilot 体验
隐私敏感用户——支持纯本地模型，无需上传页面截图至云端

en.tag: In-page AI GUI agent using text-based DOM manipulation without screenshots
en.what: Page Agent is a JavaScript GUI agent that lives inside the browser page, giving any website natural language control with a single script embed. It understands page structure through text-based DOM parsing rather than screenshot vision, enabling conversational interaction for clicks, inputs, and navigation. It supports mainstream LLMs including local deployments, with an optional Chrome extension for multi-page workflows.
en.content: The repository centers on an embeddable JavaScript/TypeScript SDK that provides text-based DOM perception, LLM orchestration, and action execution; plus an optional Chrome extension, MCP server, and documentation site.
en.stack: Built in TypeScript and distributed as an npm package, it runs purely in-browser via native JavaScript without Python or headless browser dependencies, connecting to any OpenAI-compatible mainstream or local LLM.
en.hot: Surging 8,521 stars this month to hit Trending #10, it solves the pain points of traditional agents that require screenshots, multimodal LLMs, or browser extensions by offering a purely frontend, “one-script” AI integration for any webpage.
uses: Frontend developers — add natural language interaction to existing web apps without backend changes
Automation/test engineers — replace traditional scripts with text commands for web automation
AI product teams — rapidly build in-browser assistants or copilot experiences
Privacy-conscious users — run local LLMs without uploading page screenshots to the cloud

zh.tag: AI简历评估代理：PDF解析、GitHub信号增强与可解释评分
zh.what: Hiring Agent 解析 PDF 简历并提取结构化数据，结合候选人的 GitHub 档案与项目信号进行 enrichment，再通过本地或托管 LLM 生成带有证据、加分项与扣分的客观评估报告。
zh.content: 仓库包含 PDF 转 Markdown 的解析模块、基于 Jinja 模板的 LLM 提取与评估流水线、GitHub 数据抓取及分类器，以及 Pydantic 模型、提示词模板和 CLI 入口。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 3.11+，可选 Ollama 本地模型或 Google Gemini API；依赖 PyMuPDF、Pydantic、Jinja2，以 Black 规范代码风格。
zh.hot: 该项目位列 GitHub 月榜第 12，一个月内新增 4955 Star 至 6030，反映出市场对可解释、隐私可控的 AI 招聘自动化工具的强烈需求。
uses: 需要批量初筛技术简历的 HR 与招聘团队
希望结合 GitHub 代码贡献进行技术面试初评的工程师主管
想在本地安全环境评估简历、避免数据泄露的合规型企业
寻求标准化、可解释评分以减少招聘偏见的组织

en.tag: AI agent that parses PDFs, enriches GitHub data, and outputs explainable scores
en.what: Hiring Agent parses PDF resumes into structured JSON data. It augments candidate profiles with GitHub signals, then leverages a local or hosted LLM to generate fair, explainable evaluations complete with category scores and evidence.
en.content: The repo includes PDF-to-Markdown parsing, LLM extraction and evaluation pipelines driven by Jinja templates, GitHub data fetching and classification, plus Pydantic schemas, prompt templates and a CLI entry point.
en.stack: Built on Python 3.11+, supporting either Ollama local models or Google Gemini API; uses PyMuPDF, Pydantic, and Jinja2 with Black code formatting.
en.hot: Ranking #12 on GitHub's monthly Trending, it gained 4,955 stars in one month to reach 6,030, reflecting strong demand for explainable, privacy-controlled AI hiring automation. Full local support via Ollama lets companies keep sensitive resume data on-premise, a key driver of its rapid adoption.
uses: HR and recruiting teams batch-screening technical resumes
Engineering leads factoring GitHub contributions into candidate reviews
Compliance-focused enterprises needing on-premise, local-LLM evaluation
Organizations aiming to reduce hiring bias through standardized, explainable scoring

zh.tag: 首款无用户标识的端到端加密通讯网络，iOS/Android/桌面全平台覆盖
zh.what: SimpleX 是一个去中心化、无需任何用户标识符的即时通讯网络。它通过端到端加密和去中心化中继服务器，确保消息内容与元数据的完全隐私。支持 iOS、Android 和桌面端应用，让用户在不暴露身份的前提下建立安全连接。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Haskell 编写的核心协议与加密引擎、多平台客户端源码（iOS/Android/桌面），以及完整的文档、翻译资源和 CI/CD 工作流。整体采用多模块架构，核心库与各平台 UI 层清晰分离。
zh.stack: 后端核心与加密协议采用 Haskell 实现，移动端使用 Kotlin（Android）和 Swift（iOS），桌面端基于 Compose Multiplatform。依赖包括 libsodium 等密码学库，以及各平台原生 UI 框架。
zh.hot: 在全球隐私监管趋严与通讯平台信任危机背景下，SimpleX 以“零用户标识”架构和端到端加密成为隐私极客的新选择。本月新增 7,662 Star，总星数逼近 1.9 万，位列 GitHub 月榜第 14，足见用户对去中心化隐私通讯的迫切需求。
uses: 隐私敏感用户——需要不暴露手机号/邮箱等身份标识的安全通讯
记者与吹哨人——依赖元数据保护进行匿名信源沟通
去中心化爱好者——寻求无中央服务器控制、抗审查的消息网络
跨平台团队——需在 iOS、Android 和桌面端无缝协作的隐私优先团队

en.tag: First messaging network with no user identifiers, E2EE across iOS, Android & desktop
en.what: SimpleX is a decentralized messaging network that operates without any user identifiers. It ensures complete privacy for both message content and metadata through end-to-end encryption and decentralized relay servers. The platform offers apps for iOS, Android, and desktop, enabling secure connections without exposing user identities.
en.content: The repo contains the Haskell-based core protocol and encryption engine, multi-platform client source code (iOS/Android/Desktop), along with comprehensive docs, translations, and CI/CD workflows. It follows a multi-module architecture with core libraries separated from platform-specific UI layers.
en.stack: The backend core and cryptographic protocols are implemented in Haskell, while mobile clients use Kotlin (Android) and Swift (iOS), with the desktop client built on Compose Multiplatform. It relies on cryptographic libraries like libsodium and native UI frameworks for each platform.
en.hot: Amid rising global privacy concerns and trust crises around mainstream messaging platforms, SimpleX's "zero user identifier" architecture and E2EE design have made it a top choice for privacy advocates. It gained 7,662 stars this month, bringing its total to nearly 18.7k and ranking 14th on GitHub's monthly trending list, reflecting strong demand for decentralized private communication.
uses: Privacy-conscious users who need secure messaging without exposing phone numbers or emails.
Journalists and whistleblowers relying on metadata protection for anonymous source communication.
Decentralization advocates seeking a censorship-resistant network with no central server control.
Cross-platform teams that prioritize privacy and need seamless collaboration across iOS, Android, and desktop.

zh.tag: 给 AI Agent 一键接入全网内容的免费开源工具箱
zh.what: Agent Reach 是一款专为 AI Agent 设计的开源互联网接入工具，通过一条命令行即可让 Agent 读取 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台内容。它采用零 API 费用的设计，通过多后端路由自动绕过平台封锁和登录限制，让 Agent 真正拥有“看”互联网的能力。
zh.content: 仓库包含跨平台内容读取模块（网页、视频、社交媒体、RSS）、多后端智能路由系统、一键诊断工具 agent-reach doctor，以及面向 Claude Code、Cursor、Windsurf 等 Agent 的即装即用 CLI 安装脚本。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 3.10+ 构建，核心依赖包括 yt-dlp/bili-cli 等视频解析后端、MCP 语义搜索接入、Playwright 或浏览器 Cookie 方案，以及模块化 CLI 架构支持各平台热插拔。
zh.hot: 该仓库在一个月内新增 25,126 Star，总量突破 57,000，位列 GitHub Trending 月榜第 11。其爆火源于精准切中了 AI Agent“能思考却无法上网”的痛点，以零成本和一键安装方案替代了繁琐的 API 配置与反爬对抗。
uses: AI Agent 开发者 —— 无需为每个平台单独写爬虫或购买 API，一行命令即可扩展 Agent 的感知边界
自动化研究员/分析师 —— 让 Agent 自动监控 Reddit、Twitter、小红书等多平台舆情与竞品动态
个人效率用户 —— 在 Claude Code、Cursor 等对话式工具中直接要求“搜索 B站教程”或“总结 GitHub Issue”
开源维护者 —— 通过诊断命令快速排查平台接口失效问题，社区自动维护多后端路由

en.tag: Open-source CLI toolbox that gives AI agents free eyes across the entire internet
en.what: Agent Reach is an open-source internet access toolkit designed for AI agents, enabling them to read and search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, Bilibili, and XiaoHongShu via a single CLI command. It adopts a zero-API-fee design with multi-backend routing to automatically bypass platform blocks and login restrictions, giving agents true eyes to browse the web.
en.content: The repo packs cross-platform content readers for webpages, videos, social media and RSS, a smart multi-backend routing system, a one-click diagnostic tool (`agent-reach doctor`), and ready-to-use CLI install scripts for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf and other agents.
en.stack: Built on Python 3.10+ with core dependencies including video parsers like yt-dlp/bili-cli, MCP-based semantic search, Playwright or browser cookie solutions, and a modular CLI architecture for hot-swappable platform adapters.
en.hot: It gained 25,126 stars in just one month, hitting 57,000+ total and ranking #11 on GitHub's monthly Trending. It exploded because it precisely solves the pain point of AI agents that can think but can't browse, replacing tedious API setups and anti-bot battles with a zero-cost, one-command install.
uses: AI Agent developers —— Expand agent perception boundaries with one command instead of writing scrapers or buying APIs for each platform
Automation researchers & analysts —— Let agents monitor multi-platform sentiment and competitor trends across Reddit, Twitter, and XiaoHongShu
Personal productivity users —— Directly ask Claude Code or Cursor to search Bilibili tutorials or summarize GitHub issues within chat
Open-source maintainers —— Quickly diagnose platform outages via doctor commands while the community maintains multi-backend routes

zh.tag: C++即时模式GUI库，轻量无依赖，专为工具与调试界面而生
zh.what: Dear ImGui 是一个无冗余、自包含的 C++ 即时模式图形用户界面库，专注于为开发者提供内容创作与调试工具的快速迭代能力。它输出优化后的顶点缓冲区，可无缝集成到现有 3D 渲染管线中，无需外部依赖。与传统保留模式 UI 不同，它更适合构建高性能的内部工具、可视化面板和调试窗口。
zh.content: 仓库以核心头文件与单文件源码（imgui.h / imgui.cpp）为主体，并附带大量官方渲染后端与平台绑定（DirectX、OpenGL、Vulkan、Metal、GLFW、SDL、Win32 等）。同时提供开箱即用的示例程序、综合 Demo 窗口、文档 Wiki，以及独立的 imgui_test_engine 测试引擎。
zh.stack: 纯 C++ 编写，自包含且无任何外部依赖；通过可插拔后端接入 DirectX、OpenGL、Vulkan、Metal、WebGPU 等现代图形 API，并可绑定至 GLFW、SDL、Win32 等窗口系统。
zh.hot: 作为 C++ 生态中事实标准的工具型 UI 方案，Dear ImGui 已积累 74.7K Stars，本月新增 338 星并位列 Trending 月榜第 13。它几乎被所有主流游戏引擎和 3D 工具链采用，填补了高性能即时调试界面的长期空白。
uses: 游戏/图形引擎开发者 —— 为自研引擎快速搭建关卡编辑器、材质调试与性能分析面板
实时可视化与监控工具 —— 构建机器人、量化交易、嵌入式系统的实时数据看板
桌面工具软件作者 —— 为 C++ 桌面程序创建轻量、可移植的 ImGui 原生界面
算法与科研调试 —— 在图形/仿真/AI 训练过程中快速可视化参数与中间状态

en.tag: Bloat-free immediate-mode GUI library for C++ with minimal dependencies
en.what: Dear ImGui is a bloat-free, self-contained immediate-mode GUI library for C++ that empowers developers to build content creation and debugging tools with rapid iteration. It outputs optimized vertex buffers that can be rendered directly into any 3D pipeline, requiring zero external dependencies. Unlike retained-mode UI libraries, it is purpose-built for high-performance internal tools, visualizers, and debug windows.
en.content: The repository centers on core single-file headers (imgui.h / imgui.cpp) and ships with official renderer backends and platform bindings (DirectX, OpenGL, Vulkan, Metal, GLFW, SDL, Win32, etc.). It also includes ready-to-run examples, a comprehensive demo window, extensive documentation, and a separate imgui_test_engine for automated testing.
en.stack: Written in pure C++ with zero external dependencies; integrates with modern graphics APIs via swappable backends for DirectX, OpenGL, Vulkan, Metal, and WebGPU, alongside platform bindings for GLFW, SDL, and Win32.
en.hot: With 74.7K Stars and 338 new stars this month (ranking 13th on the monthly GitHub Trending), Dear ImGui is the de-facto standard for tooling UIs in C++. It is adopted by virtually every major game engine and 3D toolchain, filling a long-standing gap for high-performance immediate-mode debugging interfaces.
uses: Game/graphics engine developers — rapidly build level editors, material debuggers, and profiling dashboards for custom engines
Real-time visualization & monitoring — create live data dashboards for robotics, quant trading, and embedded systems
Desktop tool builders — craft lightweight, portable native UIs for C++ applications without heavy framework overhead
Algorithm & research debugging — visualize parameters and intermediate states during graphics, simulation, or AI training runs

zh.tag: 为 Claude 等 AI 提供终端控制、文件搜索与 diff 编辑的 MCP 服务器
zh.what: DesktopCommanderMCP 是一个基于 Model Context Protocol（MCP）的服务器，它让 Claude 等 AI 客户端能够直接控制用户终端、搜索文件系统并执行基于 diff 的代码编辑。它超越了传统 AI 编辑器的局限，允许 AI 在获得授权后运行长时间命令、管理进程和自动化本地开发任务，且无需额外 API Token 成本。
zh.content: 仓库包含 MCP 服务器源码、基于 TypeScript 的终端与文件系统工具集，以及一个独立的 Desktop Commander App（Beta），后者提供可视化文件预览、Markdown 编辑器和对多模型（Claude/GPT-4.5/Gemini 等）的支持。
zh.stack: 主要使用 TypeScript 开发，基于 MCP Filesystem Server 构建，通过 Model Context Protocol 与 Claude Desktop 等客户端通信，并支持 npm 分发安装。
zh.hot: 在 AI 编程助手爆发式增长的背景下，该仓库凭借 8,467 Star（本周新增 1,657，冲至周榜第 5）的势头，精准解决了 AI 无法直接操作本地终端和文件系统的痛点，让开发者能用自然语言驱动完整的本地开发工作流。
uses: 开发者 —— 想通过自然语言让 AI 直接执行终端命令、批量修改代码文件
AI 工具链集成者 —— 需要在 Claude Desktop 或其他 MCP 客户端中扩展本地文件与命令行能力
追求效率的自动化用户 —— 希望在一个聊天界面中完成代码检索、编辑和进程管理的全流程

en.tag: MCP server granting Claude terminal control, file search & diff editing
en.what: DesktopCommanderMCP is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that grants Claude and other AI clients terminal control, filesystem search, and diff-based file editing capabilities. It goes beyond conventional AI editors by letting AI execute long-running commands, manage processes, and automate local development tasks using the host client's subscription instead of extra API tokens.
en.content: The repository contains the MCP server source code, a TypeScript-based toolkit for terminal and filesystem operations, and a standalone Desktop Commander App (Beta) with visual file previews, a Markdown editor, and support for multiple AI models.
en.stack: Built primarily in TypeScript on top of the MCP Filesystem Server, it communicates with clients like Claude Desktop via the Model Context Protocol and is distributed via npm.
en.hot: Amid the AI coding assistant boom, it has surged to 8,467 stars with 1,657 added this week (ranking 5th on GitHub Trending), precisely solving the pain point of AI being unable to directly operate local terminals and filesystems, enabling developers to drive entire local workflows via natural language.
uses: Developers who want to execute terminal commands and batch-edit code via natural language instructions
AI toolchain integrators looking to extend Claude Desktop or other MCP clients with local filesystem and shell capabilities
Automation-minded users seeking a unified chat interface for code search, editing, and process management

zh.tag: 极速 C++ 日志库，支持头文件-only与编译双模式
zh.what: spdlog 是一款高性能 C++ 日志库，支持头文件-only和编译两种集成方式。它提供丰富的日志输出目标、异步/同步模式、运行时与编译时日志级别过滤，以及基于 fmt 的现代化格式化语法。
zh.content: 仓库包含头文件目录、CMake 构建脚本、多平台 CI 配置、示例代码及基准测试；用户可直接拷贝 include 文件夹以头文件方式使用，或通过 CMake 编译为静态/动态库。
zh.stack: 核心为现代 C++11/14 实现，格式化层依赖 fmt 库；支持通过 CMake 构建，并覆盖 Linux、Windows、macOS、Android 等主流平台。
zh.hot: 作为 C++ 生态最广泛采用的日志方案之一，spdlog 凭借极致性能与零成本抽象累积近 3 万 Star；本月新增 141 Star 并登 Trending 月榜第 16，足见其在高性能后端与嵌入式场景的持续热度。
uses: 高性能 C++ 后端服务开发者 —— 需要纳秒级延迟的同步或异步日志记录
跨平台桌面与嵌入式应用团队 —— 寻求覆盖 Windows、Linux、macOS 及 Android 的统一日志方案
游戏引擎与中间件开发者 —— 追求头文件-only快速集成或编译库以缩短构建时间
DevOps 与系统工具开发者 —— 需要日志轮转、syslog、环境变量级别控制等生产级特性

en.tag: Blazing-fast C++ logging library with header-only & compiled modes
en.what: spdlog is a high-performance C++ logging library offering both header-only and compiled integration modes. It supports multiple sinks, asynchronous/sync logging, runtime and compile-time level filtering, and modern formatting powered by the fmt library.
en.content: The repo provides header-only sources, CMake build scripts, cross-platform CI configs, usage examples, and benchmarks. Users can either copy the include folder for header-only use or build a static/shared library via CMake.
en.stack: Built on modern C++11/14, it relies on the fmt library for formatting and uses CMake for building, supporting Linux, Windows, macOS, Android, and more.
en.hot: As one of the most widely adopted C++ logging solutions, spdlog has amassed nearly 30k stars thanks to its extreme performance and zero-cost abstractions; gaining 141 stars this month and ranking 16th on the Trending monthly chart reflects its enduring popularity in high-performance backends and embedded systems.
uses: High-performance C++ backend engineers — needing nanosecond-scale sync or async logging
Cross-platform desktop and embedded teams — seeking a unified logging solution across Windows, Linux, macOS, and Android
Game engine and middleware developers — pursuing header-only quick integration or compiled libraries for faster build times
DevOps and systems tool builders — requiring production-grade features like log rotation, syslog, and environment-level controls

zh.tag: 让Claude具备看视频能力的Agent插件，一键解析任意视频
zh.what: 它通过 /watch 命令为 Claude Code、Cursor、Copilot 等 AI 助手赋予“观看”视频的能力。用户粘贴任意视频链接或本地路径后，它会自动下载、提取关键帧、获取时间戳字幕，并将视觉和音频信息完整交给 Claude 理解。最终让 AI 真正“看到”画面并“听到”内容，而非仅靠标题猜测。
zh.content: 仓库包含基于 Python 的 /watch 插件核心源码，以及面向 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Copilot、Gemini CLI 等 50 余种 Agent Skills 平台的安装配置与文档。整体以命令行插件形态交付，采用零配置设计，首次运行时自动引导安装 yt-dlp 与 ffmpeg。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 构建，使用 yt-dlp 负责视频下载，ffmpeg 处理帧提取与音视频分离，优先调用免费字幕接口，无字幕时回退至 OpenAI Whisper API。通过标准化插件协议与 Claude Code 等 Agent 环境集成。
zh.hot: 在 8992 颗 Star 的基础上本周再增 1876，跻身 GitHub Python 周榜第 15 名。它精准解决了 AI Agent 无法感知视频这一痛点，以零配置、多平台兼容和“真正看懂视频”的体验迅速获得开发者青睐。
uses: 内容创作者与营销人员：快速拆解竞品视频结构、分析热门视频开场钩子与广告创意
开发者与测试工程师：通过录屏诊断 Bug，让 AI 直接定位问题帧并分析故障原因
学习者与研究者：将长视频或课程播放列表转为可搜索的带时间戳笔记，跳过无效信息
产品经理与分析师：过滤发布会和更新视频中的营销话术，直接提取实质功能更新

en.tag: Agent plugin that gives Claude eyes: downloads, frames & transcribes any video
en.what: It gives Claude and other AI agents the ability to "watch" videos via a simple /watch command. The tool downloads the video, extracts scene-aware frames, pulls timestamped transcripts (free captions first, Whisper as fallback), and feeds everything to the AI. This lets Claude actually see what's on screen and hear the audio instead of guessing from titles or partial transcripts.
en.content: The repo contains the Python core of the /watch plugin, plus installation configs and docs for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI and over 50 Agent Skills hosts. It ships as a CLI plugin with zero-config setup, automatically installing yt-dlp and ffmpeg on first run.
en.stack: Built in Python, it relies on yt-dlp for video fetching, ffmpeg for frame extraction and audio demuxing, and falls back to the OpenAI Whisper API when free captions are unavailable. It integrates with agent environments via plugin protocols.
en.hot: With 8,992 stars and 1,876 added this week alone, it hit #15 on GitHub's Python Trending list. It solves the critical gap of AI agents being unable to perceive video, winning developers over with zero-config setup, multi-platform support, and a true "see-and-hear" experience.
uses: Content creators & marketers: analyze competitor video structures, viral hooks, and ad creatives
Developers & QA engineers: diagnose bugs from screen recordings by having the AI pinpoint issue frames
Learners & researchers: turn long videos or course playlists into searchable, timestamped notes
Product managers & analysts: strip hype from launch videos and extract substantive feature updates

zh.tag: 支持小红书/抖音/B站等七大平台的自媒体数据采集与评论分析工具
zh.what: MediaCrawler 是一个开源的多平台自媒体数据采集工具，支持小红书、抖音、快手、B站、微博、百度贴吧和知乎等主流中文内容平台的公开信息抓取。它无需复杂的 JS 逆向，基于 Playwright 浏览器自动化保留登录态，通过 JS 表达式获取签名参数，大幅降低技术门槛。同时支持关键词搜索、二级评论、创作者主页、IP 代理池及评论词云生成等功能。
zh.content: 仓库以模块化方式按平台组织代码，每个平台包含独立的爬虫逻辑、配置项和数据存储实现；同时提供登录态缓存、IP 代理池、词云生成等通用组件，并配有 Pro 版本的订阅入口。
zh.stack: 主要基于 Python 开发，核心依赖 Playwright 浏览器自动化框架实现登录态保持与签名参数获取，配合异步请求与 IP 代理池进行高效数据采集。
zh.hot: 凭借「无需 JS 逆向」的低门槛方案与对七大主流中文平台的广泛覆盖，MediaCrawler 已积累 56.8k Stars，本月新增 5.6k 并跻身 GitHub Python 月榜第 8，成为自媒体数据分析与 AI 训练语料获取的热门基础设施。
uses: 数据分析师与研究者 —— 需要批量采集社交媒体公开内容进行分析与舆情监测
AI 开发者与训练师 —— 需要获取高质量中文社交媒体语料用于模型微调与训练
自媒体运营者 —— 需要追踪竞品账号、热门话题及评论情感以优化内容策略
爬虫技术学习者 —— 希望学习基于 Playwright 的无逆向爬虫架构与多平台工程实践

en.tag: All-in-one Chinese social media content crawler supporting 7 major platforms
en.what: MediaCrawler is an open-source multi-platform social media data collection tool that scrapes public content from major Chinese platforms including Xiaohongshu, Douyin, Kuaishou, Bilibili, Weibo, Tieba, and Zhihu. It leverages Playwright browser automation to maintain login sessions and obtain signature parameters via JS expressions, eliminating the need for complex reverse engineering. The tool supports keyword search, nested comments, creator profiles, IP proxy pools, and comment word cloud generation.
en.content: The repository is organized by platform with modular scraper logic, configs, and data storage for each; it also includes shared utilities for session caching, IP proxy pools, word cloud generation, and a gateway to the Pro subscription.
en.stack: Built primarily in Python, it relies on Playwright for browser automation to maintain login states and retrieve signature parameters, paired with async requests and IP proxy pools for efficient data scraping.
en.hot: Its "no JS reverse engineering" approach and broad coverage of seven major Chinese social platforms have earned it 56.8k stars, with 5.6k added this month alone, landing it at #8 on GitHub's Python monthly trending list as a go-to tool for content analysis and AI training data acquisition.
uses: Data analysts and researchers — batch-collecting public social media content for trend analysis and sentiment monitoring.
AI developers and trainers — sourcing high-quality Chinese social media corpora for model fine-tuning and training.
Content creators and marketers — tracking competitor accounts, trending topics, and comment sentiment to optimize content strategy.
Web scraping learners — studying reverse-engineering-free Playwright-based crawler architecture and multi-platform engineering practices.

zh.tag: 开源低延迟语音代理框架，支持全本地模块化VAD-STT-LLM-TTS流水线
zh.what: Hugging Face 推出的开源语音代理框架，通过一条 VAD → STT → LLM → TTS 的模块化流水线，让用户能在本地或混合环境中搭建低延迟语音对话系统。它对外暴露兼容 OpenAI Realtime API 的 WebSocket 接口，任何兼容客户端都能直接接入，且每个环节均可替换为自托管或开源模型。
zh.content: 仓库包含可插拔的流水线引擎、OpenAI Realtime 兼容的 WebSocket 服务端、开箱即用的 CLI，以及支持多语言和 Pocket TTS 的脚本与文档。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 构建，默认集成 Parakeet TDT（STT）与 Qwen3-TTS（语音合成），LLM 端支持 OpenAI API、HF Inference Providers、vLLM 及 llama.cpp 等任意兼容后端。
zh.hot: 在语音 Agent 爆发期，它以「全模块可替换 + 全本地可运行」直击开发者对隐私与可控性的痛点；本月新增 1,334 Star，总星数 6,149，冲上 Python 月榜第 10，并已实际部署在数千台 Reachy Mini 机器人上。
uses: 希望搭建本地语音助手、避免数据外泄的开发者与初创团队
需要将 LLM 快速接入语音交互、并要求兼容 OpenAI Realtime 协议的硬件/机器人厂商
关注低延迟对话系统、想自定义 VAD/STT/TTS 模块的研究者与工程师

en.tag: Low-latency modular voice-agent pipeline with fully local VAD-STT-LLM-TTS stack
en.what: An open-source voice-agent framework from Hugging Face that chains VAD → STT → LLM → TTS into a low-latency, fully modular pipeline for local or hybrid deployments. It exposes an OpenAI Realtime-compatible WebSocket API so any compatible client can connect, with every component swappable for self-hosted or open-source models.
en.content: The repo includes a pluggable pipeline engine, an OpenAI Realtime-compatible WebSocket server, a ready-to-use CLI, plus scripts and docs supporting multi-language and Pocket TTS.
en.stack: Built in Python, defaulting to Parakeet TDT for STT and Qwen3-TTS for synthesis, with the LLM slot supporting any OpenAI-compatible backend including hosted APIs, HF Inference Providers, vLLM, and llama.cpp.
en.hot: It hits the sweet spot for privacy and control with a fully swappable, fully local stack amid the voice-agent boom; it gained 1,334 stars this month for a total of 6,149, hitting #10 on the Python monthly trending list, and already powers thousands of Reachy Mini robots in production.
uses: Developers and startups building local voice assistants who need to keep data on-premise
Hardware/robotics vendors looking to add LLM-powered voice interfaces via an OpenAI Realtime-compatible protocol
Researchers and engineers experimenting with low-latency dialog systems who want to swap VAD, STT, or TTS components

zh.tag: AWS 官方 AI 编码代理工具包，提供 MCP 服务器与多 IDE 插件
zh.what: 这是 AWS 官方推出的 AI 编码代理工具包，为 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等主流 AI 编码助手提供官方 MCP 服务器、技能集与插件。它让 AI 代理能够安全地构建、部署和管理 AWS 上的应用，覆盖基础设施即代码、数据分析和 AI 智能体开发等完整场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含按场景划分的多个插件包（如 aws-core、aws-agents、aws-data-analytics、aws-agents-for-devsecops），以及对应的 MCP 服务器实现和配套文档。支持通过 AWS CLI、Claude Code 官方插件市场、Codex 及 Cursor 团队市场等多种途径安装。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 开发，遵循 MCP（Model Context Protocol）协议，与 AWS CLI、Amazon Bedrock、CDK、CloudFormation、Glue、Athena 等 AWS 服务深度集成，兼容 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等主流 AI 编码工具。
zh.hot: 作为 AWS 官方推出的 GA（正式可用）级项目，该仓库在极短时间内斩获 1.9K Star 并冲入 GitHub Python 日榜第 5，反映了开发者和企业对「让 AI 代理安全运维云基础设施」的爆发式需求，填补了主流 AI 编码工具缺乏官方 AWS 能力集的空白。
uses: 正在使用 Claude Code、Cursor 或 Codex 进行开发，需要 AI 代理直接操作 AWS 资源的开发者
希望通过自然语言交互完成 CDK/CloudFormation 部署、Serverless 架构搭建的云架构师
需要在 AWS 上构建 AI Agent（基于 Amazon Bedrock）的机器学习工程师
负责数据湖、ETL 流程（Glue/Athena/S3 Tables）建设的数据工程师

en.tag: Official AWS AI coding agent toolkit with MCP servers and IDE plugins
en.what: An official AWS toolkit that provides MCP servers, skills, and plugins for popular AI coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. It enables AI agents to securely build, deploy, and manage applications on AWS across infrastructure-as-code, data analytics, and AI agent development scenarios.
en.content: The repository contains multiple scenario-based plugin packages (aws-core, aws-agents, aws-data-analytics, aws-agents-for-devsecops), corresponding MCP server implementations, and documentation. It supports installation via AWS CLI, Claude Code official marketplace, Codex, and Cursor team marketplaces.
en.stack: Built primarily in Python following the Model Context Protocol (MCP), it deeply integrates with AWS CLI, Amazon Bedrock, CDK, CloudFormation, Glue, and Athena, while supporting mainstream AI coding tools like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor.
en.hot: As an AWS-official GA project, it quickly gained 1.9K stars and hit #5 on GitHub's Python daily trending list, reflecting explosive demand for AI agents that can safely manage cloud infrastructure. It fills the gap where mainstream AI coding tools lacked an official, comprehensive AWS capability set.
uses: Developers using Claude Code, Cursor, or Codex who need AI agents to directly interact with AWS resources
Cloud architects who want to deploy CDK/CloudFormation and build serverless architectures via natural language
ML engineers building AI agents on AWS using Amazon Bedrock
Data engineers working on data lakes and ETL pipelines with Glue, Athena, and S3 Tables

zh.tag: 哈佛开源ML系统教材，中英日韩多语言，配套实验与硬件套件
zh.what: 这是哈佛大学边缘计算实验室维护的《机器学习系统》开源教科书，系统讲解从模型训练到边缘部署的全栈工程原理与实践。内容涵盖AI系统的算法基础、硬件加速、能耗优化及可靠性设计，并配套完整的课程实验与教学资源。
zh.content: 仓库主体为Quarto格式的书籍源码与多语言翻译（英/中/日/韩），另含Jupyter实验笔记本、TinyTorch教学框架、Arduino硬件套件代码、课堂幻灯片及教师指导手册，形成从理论到动手实践的一站式课程资源。
zh.stack: 基于Python生态构建，使用Quarto进行书籍排版与网站生成，Jupyter Notebook承载交互实验，Arduino C/C++支持嵌入式套件，并通过GitHub Actions实现书籍、代码与课件的多维度自动化构建与验证。
zh.hot: 作为哈佛王牌课程CS249r的官方教材，其Stars已突破2.7万，本月激增2,667星并登上Python月榜第13位。多语言开源与软硬件协同的实践模式，填补了ML系统全栈教育资源的空白。
uses: 高校教师与课程设计者——可直接采用全套书籍、课件与实验方案开设ML系统课程
嵌入式与边缘AI工程师——通过TinyTorch和Arduino套件深入理解模型部署与硬件协同
自学者与转行者——借助多语言教材与交互式Jupyter实验从零掌握ML系统工程化
研究者与开发者——参考书中系统级视角优化算法、能效与可靠性设计

en.tag: Harvard's open-source ML systems textbook with multilingual support, labs & hardware kits
en.what: An open-source textbook maintained by Harvard Edge Computing Lab that teaches full-stack ML engineering from model training to edge deployment. It covers algorithmic foundations, hardware acceleration, energy efficiency, and reliability design for AI systems, complete with course labs and teaching resources.
en.content: The repo contains Quarto-based book source and multilingual translations (EN/ZH/JA/KO), plus Jupyter lab notebooks, the TinyTorch teaching framework, Arduino hardware kit code, lecture slides, and instructor guides—forming an end-to-end course resource from theory to hands-on practice.
en.stack: Built on the Python ecosystem with Quarto for book typesetting and site generation, Jupyter Notebooks for interactive labs, Arduino C/C++ for embedded kits, and GitHub Actions automating multi-dimensional builds and validation across the book, code, and courseware.
en.hot: As the official text for Harvard's flagship CS249r course, it has surpassed 27k stars with a monthly surge of 2,667, ranking 13th on GitHub's Python monthly trending list. Its multilingual open-source approach and hardware-software co-design labs fill a key gap in full-stack ML systems education.
uses: Educators & curriculum designers — adopt the complete book, slides, and labs to teach ML systems courses
Embedded & edge-AI engineers — use TinyTorch and Arduino kits to grasp model deployment and hardware co-design
Self-learners & career-switchers — follow multilingual materials and interactive Jupyter labs to master ML engineering
Researchers & developers — leverage the systems-level perspective to optimize algorithms, energy efficiency, and reliability

zh.tag: 用代码智能体编辑视频，自然语言驱动
zh.what: video-use 让你通过 Claude Code 等代码智能体，用自然语言指令编辑视频。只需将原始素材放入文件夹，与智能体对话，即可获得最终成品 final.mp4，无需手动操作。
zh.content: 仓库包含安装脚本、技能定义文件（SKILL.md）、编辑脚本（helpers/）以及依赖管理。支持自动剪辑、调色、字幕、动画叠加等功能。
zh.stack: 基于 Python，依赖 ffmpeg、ElevenLabs API，并集成 HyperFrames、Remotion、Manim 等动画生成工具。
zh.hot: 17k+ Stars，今日新增 110，因其将 AI 智能体与视频编辑结合，极大降低了视频创作门槛，吸引开发者和内容创作者。
uses: 内容创作者 — 快速剪辑口播、教程、旅行视频，无需打开专业编辑软件
开发者 — 集成到自动化工作流，用代码控制视频编辑流程
团队协作 — 通过项目文件持久化会话，多轮编辑无缝衔接

en.tag: Edit videos with coding agents via natural language
en.what: video-use lets you edit videos by chatting with coding agents like Claude Code. Drop raw footage in a folder, describe your edits in natural language, and get final.mp4 back—no manual editing required.
en.content: The repo includes installation scripts, skill definition (SKILL.md), editing scripts (helpers/), and dependency management. It supports auto-cutting, color grading, subtitles, animation overlays, and more.
en.stack: Built with Python, relies on ffmpeg, ElevenLabs API, and integrates with HyperFrames, Remotion, Manim for animation generation.
en.hot: 17k+ stars, +110 today, because it combines AI agents with video editing, dramatically lowering the barrier for video creation, attracting both developers and content creators.
uses: Content creators — quickly edit talking heads, tutorials, travel videos without opening professional editing software
Developers — integrate into automated workflows, control video editing with code
Team collaboration — persist sessions via project files for seamless multi-round editing

zh.tag: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析与自动推送系统
zh.what: 基于大语言模型的每日自选股智能分析系统，覆盖 A 股、港股、美股、日股、韩股、台股及 ETF。系统自动聚合多源行情、实时新闻与基本面数据，生成包含评分、趋势、买卖点位和风险警报的 AI 决策报告，并推送到企业微信、飞书、Telegram 等主流协作平台。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Web / 桌面工作台、FastAPI 服务、15 种内置 Agent 策略问股模块、自动化推送脚本与 Docker / GitHub Actions 部署配置，附带完整 Markdown 文档与多语言 README。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 3.10+ 构建，前端采用 HTML/JS，通过 FastAPI 提供 API 服务，利用 Docker 与 GitHub Actions 实现零成本定时运行，并集成多种第三方数据源与 LLM 服务。
zh.hot: 仓库已获 57.7k Star，本月新增 1.5 万星并登上 GitHub Python 月榜第 9，显示出个人投资者对零成本自动化 AI 投研工具的巨大热情。
uses: 个人投资者 —— 每日定时获取自选股 AI 决策报告与风险提醒
量化爱好者 —— 在 Web 工作台进行回测、策略问股与持仓管理
投研团队 —— 通过多市场数据聚合与自动推送实现协作监控
技术开发者 —— 参考 LLM 与金融数据结合的最佳实践及自动化部署方案

en.tag: LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis and automated push system
en.what: An LLM-based daily intelligent stock analysis system covering A-shares, Hong Kong, US, Japan, Korea, Taiwan markets and ETFs. It aggregates multi-source market data, real-time news and fundamentals to generate AI decision reports with ratings, trends, entry/exit points and risk alerts, then pushes them to collaboration platforms on a schedule.
en.content: The repo includes a web/desktop workspace, FastAPI service, 15 built-in agent strategy modules, automated push scripts, Docker and GitHub Actions deployment configs, along with comprehensive documentation and multilingual READMEs.
en.stack: Built on Python 3.10+ with an HTML/JS frontend and FastAPI backend, it runs on Docker and GitHub Actions for zero-cost scheduling, integrating multiple third-party data sources and LLM services.
en.hot: With 57.7k stars and 15k added this month, it reached #9 on GitHub's Python monthly trending, reflecting massive retail investor appetite for zero-cost automated AI investment research tools.
uses: Retail investors — receive daily AI decision reports and risk alerts for watchlists
Quant enthusiasts — run backtests, agent strategy queries and portfolio management via the web workspace
Research teams — collaborate on multi-market monitoring through aggregated data and automated notifications
Developers — learn best practices for LLM-financial data integration and automated deployment pipelines

zh.tag: 面向AI代理的开源网络安全技能库，817条生产级技能，覆盖29个安全域
zh.what: 该仓库为AI代理提供了817个结构化的网络安全技能，涵盖红队测试、蓝队防御、欺诈检测等29个安全域，并映射到MITRE ATT&CK、NIST CSF 2.0等六大行业标准框架。技能遵循agentskills.io开放标准，可直接注入Claude Code、GitHub Copilot、Cursor、Codex CLI等26余种AI编码与代理平台。
zh.content: 仓库以YAML/JSON格式按域组织技能定义，包含每条技能的描述、参数、所需权限、映射关系及平台兼容元数据；附带使用文档、贡献指南和框架映射表。
zh.stack: 技能定义以结构化数据（YAML/JSON）为主，依托Python生态进行验证与自动化，遵循agentskills.io开放标准，无特定运行时依赖。
zh.hot: 项目月增近万星（+9,841），总星数突破25.7k，登上GitHub Python月榜第11名，反映了AI安全自动化与"AI代理+网络安全"交叉领域的巨大需求。
uses: 红队/蓝队安全工程师 —— 将攻防技能直接注入AI代理，实现自动化渗透测试与防御编排
AI平台开发者 —— 基于agentskills.io标准快速扩展安全能力
安全合规顾问 —— 利用MITRE/NIST映射快速对齐合规框架
AI安全研究员 —— 研究大模型在网络安全任务中的行为与边界

en.tag: Open-source cybersecurity skills library for AI agents: 817 skills, 29 domains
en.what: This repository provides 817 structured, production-grade cybersecurity skills for AI agents, spanning 29 domains including red teaming, blue team defense, and fraud detection, mapped to six major frameworks like MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF 2.0. The skills follow the agentskills.io open standard and plug into 26+ AI platforms such as Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and Codex CLI.
en.content: The repo organizes skill definitions by domain in YAML/JSON with descriptions, parameters, required privileges, framework mappings, and platform compatibility metadata; plus docs, contribution guides, and framework mapping tables.
en.stack: Structured data (YAML/JSON) for skill definitions, validated via Python tooling following the agentskills.io open standard; no heavy runtime dependencies.
en.hot: Surging with ~9,841 new stars this month and 25.7k total, it hit #11 on GitHub's Python Monthly Trending, reflecting massive demand for AI-agent-driven security automation.
uses: Red/blue team engineers —— inject offensive and defensive skills into AI agents for automated pentesting and defense orchestration
AI platform builders —— extend security capabilities quickly using the agentskills.io standard
Security compliance consultants —— align workflows with MITRE/NIST frameworks via built-in mappings
AI security researchers —— study LLM behavior and boundaries in cybersecurity tasks

zh.tag: 基于个人信息的密码字典生成器，用于渗透测试与取证
zh.what: CUPP 通过交互式问卷收集目标用户的生日、昵称、宠物名等个人信息，生成高度定制化的弱密码字典，用于针对性破解。它专为合法渗透测试和取证调查设计，帮助安全人员快速评估密码强度。
zh.content: 仓库核心为单文件 Python 脚本 cupp.py，附带配置文件 cupp.cfg，支持交互式画像、外部词库下载、Alecto 数据库解析及现有字典增强。
zh.stack: 完全基于 Python 3 标准库开发，零第三方依赖，跨平台开箱即用。
zh.hot: 总星数 6413，本月激增 468 星并跻身 Python 月榜第 17，反映出网络安全与隐私测试领域持续升温，轻量级社会工程学工具再度受到白帽与安全研究者热捧。
uses: 渗透测试人员 —— 在授权测试中利用社会工程学信息生成定向爆破字典
安全取证专家 —— 在调查现场根据已知用户画像快速缩小密码范围
网络安全学习者 —— 在 CTF 或实验环境中理解弱密码与社会工程学的关系
企业安全团队 —— 评估内部员工密码习惯并制定针对性加固策略

en.tag: Personal-info-based password profiler and dictionary generator for pentesting
en.what: CUPP collects target personal information—such as birthdays, nicknames, and pet names—through interactive questionnaires to generate highly customized weak-password dictionaries for targeted cracking. It is designed for legal penetration tests and forensic investigations to help security professionals quickly assess password strength.
en.content: The repo centers on a single Python script cupp.py with a configuration file cupp.cfg, supporting interactive profiling, external wordlist downloads, Alecto DB parsing, and enhancing existing dictionaries.
en.stack: Built entirely on Python 3 standard libraries with zero third-party dependencies; works cross-platform out of the box.
en.hot: With 6413 total stars and 468 new stars this month, ranking 17th on the Python monthly trending list, CUPP reflects rising interest in cybersecurity and privacy testing, as lightweight social-engineering tools regain popularity among white-hat researchers.
uses: Penetration testers — generate targeted brute-force dictionaries from OSINT during authorized engagements
Forensic investigators — quickly narrow down password ranges using known user profiles at investigation sites
Cybersecurity learners — study the relationship between weak passwords and social engineering in CTF or lab environments
Enterprise security teams — assess internal password habits and formulate targeted hardening strategies

zh.tag: 微软官方 Fabric AI 技能库，让 Copilot/Claude 直接操作数据平台
zh.what: 这是一组面向 Microsoft Fabric 的可复用 AI 助手指令（Skills）与 MCP 系统，让 GitHub Copilot CLI、VSCode 及 Claude 等 AI 工具能够理解和操作 Fabric 工作负载。它封装了 Fabric 的 API、查询模式、运维最佳实践与架构知识，使开发者通过自然语言即可执行数据仓库管理、Power BI 报表开发、性能诊断等复杂任务。
zh.content: 仓库包含五个技能包（bundle）：完整的 fabric-skills、面向创作的 fabric-authoring、面向查询消费的 fabric-consumption、面向运维诊断的 fabric-operations，以及独立的 powerbi-authoring。此外还提供了安装脚本、更新命令及 NYC Taxi 等场景的示例提示词（prompt_examples）。
zh.stack: 基于 Python 构建，以 GitHub Copilot CLI 插件体系为载体，通过 MCP（Model Context Protocol）协议与 VSCode、Claude 等 AI 客户端对接。底层覆盖 Fabric REST API、T-SQL、KQL、Spark、Dataflows Gen2 及 PBIP 工作流等技术。
zh.hot: 本月新增 276 Star，总星数突破 815 并冲入 GitHub Python 月榜第 14 位，反映出企业数据平台与 AI 编码助手集成的需求正在爆发。作为微软官方出品，它首次系统化地将 Fabric 全栈能力（从数据仓库到 Power BI）封装为 AI 可消费的 Skills，极大降低了数据工程与分析的门槛。
uses: 数据工程师/DBA —— 通过自然语言批量管理 Fabric 数据仓库、Lakehouse 及执行 T-SQL/KQL 查询。
Power BI 开发者 —— 借助 AI 辅助完成语义模型设计、PBIP 工作流及报表创作。
平台运维人员 —— 快速诊断仓库性能瓶颈、排查慢查询并监控平台健康状态。
AI 工具链集成者 —— 希望在 VSCode 或 Claude 中通过 MCP 直接操控 Fabric 的开发者。

en.tag: Microsoft's official Fabric AI skills for Copilot CLI, VSCode & Claude
en.what: It provides reusable AI assistant instructions (skills) and MCP systems for Microsoft Fabric, enabling GitHub Copilot CLI, VSCode, and Claude to understand and operate Fabric workloads. By encapsulating APIs, query patterns, operational best practices, and architecture knowledge, it allows developers to perform complex tasks like data warehouse management, Power BI authoring, and performance diagnostics through natural language.
en.content: The repository contains five skill bundles: the full fabric-skills set, plus focused packages for authoring, consumption, operations, and Power BI authoring.
