zh.hot: 作为云原生监控的事实标准，Prometheus 已积累 65,191 Stars，本周新增 277，位列 GitHub Go 周榜第 14，是 Kubernetes 生态不可或缺的观测基础设施。
uses: SRE / 运维团队 —— 构建云原生监控与统一告警体系
后端开发者 —— 为微服务与容器集群埋点暴露指标
企业 IT 架构 —— 进行基础设施监控、容量规划与故障定位
平台厂商 —— 集成或基于 Prometheus 二次开发可观测性产品

en.tag: Cloud-native monitoring and multi-dimensional time series database
en.what: A CNCF graduated project that scrapes metrics from targets using a pull model, stores them in a multi-dimensional time series model, and offers PromQL querying with flexible alerting. It operates as autonomous single nodes without distributed storage dependencies.
en.content: The repository holds the Prometheus server source, PromQL query engine, rule evaluator, HTTP APIs, various service discovery adapters, plus official documentation and architecture diagrams.
en.stack: Implemented primarily in Go, supporting HTTP scraping or Push Gateway ingestion, and integrating with visualization tools like Grafana and service discovery backends such as Kubernetes and Consul.
en.hot: With 65,191 stars and 277 new this week, it ranks #14 on GitHub's Go Trending weekly list, serving as the de facto observability standard in the Kubernetes and cloud-native ecosystem.
uses: SRE / DevOps teams — building unified cloud-native monitoring and alerting stacks
Backend developers — instrumenting microservices and container clusters with metrics
Enterprise IT — monitoring infrastructure, capacity planning, and incident diagnosis
Platform vendors — integrating or extending Prometheus for commercial observability offerings

zh.tag: Kubernetes 声明式 GitOps 持续交付工具
zh.what: Argo CD 是面向 Kubernetes 的声明式 GitOps 持续交付工具，通过监控 Git 仓库中的配置声明自动将应用状态同步到目标集群。它支持 Kustomize、Helm、Jsonnet 等多种配置管理工具，让应用部署和生命周期管理实现自动化、可审计且易于理解。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Argo CD 核心服务端、Web UI、CLI 命令行工具及完整文档，源码以 Go 为主，同时提供 Helm Chart 和标准化安装清单。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言开发，深度依赖 Kubernetes 及其 API，前端采用 React/TypeScript 构建，并集成 Kustomize、Helm、Jsonnet 等主流配置管理工具。
zh.hot: 作为云原生 GitOps 领域的标杆项目，Argo CD 已获 23.6k+ Star，本周新增 163 Star 并跻身 Go 语言周榜第 4，反映出 Kubernetes 社区对声明式交付和自动化运维的强烈需求。
uses: 云平台运维团队 —— 需要为多个 Kubernetes 集群实现声明式、自动化的应用持续交付
DevOps 工程师 —— 希望以 Git 为唯一可信源，落地 GitOps 工作流并提升部署可审计性
云原生架构师 —— 构建多环境（开发/测试/生产）一致性的 Kubernetes 应用交付体系

en.tag: Declarative GitOps continuous delivery tool for Kubernetes
en.what: Argo CD is a declarative GitOps continuous delivery tool for Kubernetes that automatically syncs application states to target clusters by monitoring configuration declarations in Git repositories. It supports multiple configuration management tools including Kustomize, Helm, and Jsonnet, enabling automated, auditable, and transparent application deployment and lifecycle management.
en.content: The repository contains the Argo CD core server, Web UI, CLI tool, and comprehensive documentation. The source code is primarily written in Go, with Helm charts and standard installation manifests provided.
en.stack: Built primarily in Go and relies on Kubernetes and its APIs. The frontend is built with React/TypeScript, and it integrates configuration management tools including Kustomize, Helm, and Jsonnet.
en.hot: As a landmark project in the cloud-native GitOps space, Argo CD has garnered over 23.6k stars, with 163 new stars this week and a ranking of #4 on the GitHub Go Trending weekly list, reflecting strong community demand for declarative delivery and automated operations in Kubernetes environments.
uses: Platform/Ops teams —— Automating declarative app delivery across multiple Kubernetes clusters
DevOps engineers —— Implementing GitOps workflows with Git as the single source of truth for auditable deployments
Cloud-native architects —— Building consistent Kubernetes application delivery pipelines across dev, test, and production environments

zh.tag: 基于 HTTP 的轻量级 pub-sub 消息推送服务，支持自托管
zh.what: ntfy 是一个基于 HTTP 的 pub-sub 通知服务，允许用户通过简单的 PUT/POST 请求从任何脚本或计算机向手机、桌面推送实时通知。它无需注册账号或支付费用即可使用官方托管服务，同时也支持完全开源的自托管部署，满足隐私与定制化需求。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 编写的服务端核心与 Web 前端，并配合独立维护的开源 Android 与 iOS 客户端应用，形成端到端的推送生态。
zh.stack: 后端基于 Go 构建高性能 HTTP API，默认采用 SQLite 存储消息与订阅状态；客户端覆盖 Android、iOS 及 PWA 多平台。
zh.hot: 凭借「一行 curl 即可推送」的极简体验和完全开源可自托管的特性，ntfy 已获得近 3.2 万 Star，本月新增 1195 Star，跻身 GitHub Go 语言月榜第 8，成为开发者最喜爱的轻量消息基础设施之一。
uses: DevOps / SRE —— 将服务器告警、CI/CD 流水线结果实时推送到手机
开发者 / 极客 —— 脚本执行完毕、定时任务完成时接收桌面或移动端通知
隐私敏感用户 —— 通过自托管实例替代商业推送服务，掌控数据主权
IoT / 家庭自动化 —— 将设备状态、智能家居事件推送到家庭成员终端

en.tag: Lightweight HTTP pub-sub notification service with self-hosting support
en.what: ntfy is a simple HTTP-based pub-sub notification service that lets you send real-time alerts to your phone or desktop via PUT/POST requests from any script or computer. It requires no sign-up or fees to use the hosted instance, and being fully open source, it also supports self-hosting for privacy and customization.
en.content: The repository contains the Go-based server core and web frontend, complemented by separate open-source Android and iOS clients, forming an end-to-end push ecosystem.
en.stack: The backend is built in Go for a high-performance HTTP API, using SQLite by default for message and subscription storage, with clients available for Android, iOS, and PWA.
en.hot: With its 'one-line curl to push' simplicity and fully open-source, self-hostable nature, ntfy has earned nearly 32k stars, gaining 1,195 this month and ranking 8th on GitHub's Go monthly trending list as a favorite lightweight messaging infra tool.
uses: DevOps / SRE —— Push server alerts and CI/CD pipeline results to mobile in real time
Developers / Geeks —— Get notified on phone or desktop when scripts or cron jobs finish
Privacy-conscious users —— Self-host to replace commercial push services and retain data sovereignty
IoT / Home automation —— Push device status and smart-home events to family members' devices

zh.tag: 生产级容器编排与调度平台
zh.what: Kubernetes（K8s）是开源的容器集群管理系统，用于自动化部署、扩展和管理容器化应用。它基于 Google 十五年大规模运行生产工作负载的 Borg 系统经验构建，能够跨多台主机实现高效的资源调度与自愈。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心控制平面组件（kube-apiserver、kube-scheduler、kube-controller-manager）、节点代理 kubelet、命令行工具 kubectl，以及完整的内置 API 和丰富的扩展机制（如 CRD、Operator、CNI/CSI/CRI 插件接口）。
zh.stack: 核心以 Go 语言编写，使用 etcd 作为分布式键值存储，组件间通过 gRPC/HTTP 通信，并基于容器运行时接口（CRI）对接 Docker、containerd 等底层运行时。
zh.hot: 作为云原生技术栈的基石，Kubernetes 拥有近 12.4 万 Star，本月新增 1,895 星，稳居 Go 语言月榜第 13 位，几乎已成为现代云基础设施的事实标准控制平面。
uses: 云原生 / SRE / DevOps 工程师构建高可用、可扩展的微服务架构
企业运维团队统一调度混合云、多云及本地数据中心的容器集群
平台开发者基于 K8s API 与 CRD 扩展能力构建内部 PaaS 或 Serverless 平台
开源贡献者与 CNCF 生态参与者投身核心基础设施演进

en.tag: Production-Grade Container Orchestration and Scheduling Platform
en.what: Kubernetes is an open-source system for automating the deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications across multiple hosts. Built on Google’s 15+ years of experience running production workloads at scale with Borg, it provides a robust, self-healing framework for distributed systems.
en.content: The repository hosts the core control plane components (kube-apiserver, kube-scheduler, kube-controller-manager), the node agent kubelet, the CLI tool kubectl, as well as comprehensive built-in APIs and extensive extension mechanisms such as CRD, Operator, and CNI/CSI/CRI interfaces.
en.stack: The core is written in Go, relying on etcd as the distributed key-value store, using gRPC/HTTP for inter-component communication, and integrating with underlying runtimes such as Docker and containerd via the Container Runtime Interface (CRI).
en.hot: As the cornerstone of cloud-native technology, Kubernetes boasts nearly 123.8k stars, with 1,895 new stars this month, ranking 13th on the Go Trending monthly list, making it the de facto standard control plane for modern cloud infrastructure.
uses: Cloud-native, SRE, and DevOps engineers building highly available, scalable microservices architectures
Enterprise ops teams managing hybrid-cloud, multi-cloud, and on-premises container clusters
Platform developers building internal PaaS or Serverless platforms using the K8s API and CRD extensions
Open-source contributors and CNCF ecosystem participants driving core infrastructure evolution

zh.tag: 高颜值现代化终端文件管理器
zh.what: superfile 是一款在终端中运行的文件管理器，采用现代化的 TUI 界面，让开发者无需离开命令行即可高效浏览、预览和操作文件。它支持多面板布局、主题定制与插件扩展，致力于在保持终端工作流的同时提供图形化般的交互体验。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Go 源码、安装脚本与构建指南，以及丰富的主题包、插件文档和快捷键配置示例。同时提供了面向 macOS、Linux 和 Windows 的跨平台发布与安装说明。
zh.stack: 基于 Go 语言构建，采用现代化终端 UI 技术实现跨平台渲染，支持多架构二进制分发与 Homebrew 等包管理器集成。
zh.hot: 凭借精致的多栏 TUI 设计与流畅的交互体验，superfile 在开发者中迅速走红，目前已积累 18.6k Stars，本月新增 1,295 颗，跻身 GitHub Go 语言月榜第 11 位，成为传统终端文件管理器的强力现代替代品。
uses: 终端重度用户与键盘党 —— 追求不离开命令行即可完成复杂文件操作
DevOps 与运维工程师 —— 需要在远程服务器上快速浏览、编辑和管理文件
追求美观的开发者 —— 希望终端工具拥有现代 UI 与丰富主题定制
跨平台工作者 —— 在 macOS、Linux 和 Windows 间寻求一致的文件管理体验

en.tag: A fancy, modern terminal file manager with rich TUI
en.what: superfile is a terminal-based file manager that delivers a modern, fancy TUI interface, allowing developers to browse, preview, and manipulate files without leaving the command line. It features multi-panel layouts, customizable themes, and plugin support, blending the efficiency of terminal workflows with a near-GUI interactive experience.
en.content: The repository ships full Go source code, installation scripts, build guides, and a rich collection of themes, plugin docs, and hotkey configuration samples. It also provides cross-platform release notes and installation instructions for macOS, Linux, and Windows.
en.stack: Built in Go with modern terminal UI libraries for cross-platform rendering, supporting multi-arch binaries and package managers like Homebrew.
en.hot: Thanks to its polished multi-pane TUI design and smooth interactions, superfile has gained strong traction among developers, amassing 18.6k stars with 1,295 added this month and ranking 11th on GitHub's Go monthly trending list as a compelling modern alternative to classic terminal file managers.
uses: Terminal power users and keyboard-driven developers who want to handle complex file operations without leaving the CLI
DevOps and system administrators who need to quickly browse, edit, and manage files on remote servers
Aesthetics-minded developers looking for modern UI, rich themes, and customization in terminal tools
Cross-platform workers seeking a consistent file management experience across macOS, Linux, and Windows

zh.tag: Go 原生的 AI 代理开发工具包
zh.what: ADK Go 是 Google 开源的 Go 语言 AI 代理开发工具包，提供构建、评估和部署智能代理的模块化框架。它采用代码优先的设计理念，支持多代理协作、丰富工具集成，并针对云原生环境优化。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 库、示例代码、文档和测试工具，核心模块包括代理定义、工具注册、多代理编排和部署支持。
zh.stack: 技术栈基于 Go 语言，依赖 Google Gemini API（但模型无关），支持 gRPC 和 HTTP 部署，与 Google Cloud Run 等云平台集成。
zh.hot: 作为 Google 官方推出的 Go 版 AI 代理框架，ADK Go 填补了 Go 生态中高级代理开发工具的空白，本月新增 433 星，总星数达 8513，在 GitHub Go 月榜排名第 10。
uses: Go 开发者构建云原生 AI 代理应用
需要高性能、并发安全的代理系统
希望代码优先、可版本控制的代理开发团队
多代理协作和复杂工作流编排场景

en.tag: Code-first Go toolkit for building AI agents
en.what: ADK Go is an open-source Go toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents. It offers a modular, code-first framework that supports multi-agent systems, rich tool integration, and cloud-native deployment.
en.content: The repo contains Go libraries, examples, documentation, and testing utilities, with core modules for agent definition, tool registration, multi-agent orchestration, and deployment.
en.stack: Built with Go, model-agnostic with Gemini optimization, supports gRPC/HTTP deployment, and integrates with cloud platforms like Google Cloud Run.
en.hot: As Google's official Go agent framework, ADK Go fills a gap in the Go ecosystem for advanced agent development, gaining 433 stars this month (total 8513) and ranking #10 on GitHub Go monthly trending.
uses: Go developers building cloud-native AI agent applications
Teams needing high-performance, concurrency-safe agent systems
Developers preferring code-first, version-controlled agent development
Scenarios requiring multi-agent collaboration and complex workflow orchestration

zh.tag: 容器安全沙箱与用户态应用内核，兼容 K8s/Docker
zh.what: gVisor 是 Google 开源的容器应用内核，用 Go 语言在用户态实现了一套 Linux 兼容接口，为容器提供额外的安全隔离层。它通过限制应用对宿主机内核的直接访问，大幅降低容器逃逸风险，同时保持接近原生容器的启动速度与资源开销。
zh.content: 仓库包含 runsc（兼容 OCI 的容器运行时）、Sentry（用户态内核）、Gofer（文件系统代理）等核心组件，以及大量 Linux 系统调用的 Go 语言实现与测试套件。
zh.stack: 主要采用 Go 语言编写，支持 x86_64 与 ARM64 架构；作为 OCI 运行时可直接对接 Docker、containerd 与 Kubernetes 生态。
zh.hot: 在容器安全需求激增的背景下，gVisor 以近 1.9 万 Star 成为云原生沙箱的热门选择，本周新增 85 Star 并跻身 Go 语言周榜第 13 位，体现了社区对"轻量隔离"方案的持续追捧。
uses: 云原生平台运维者 —— 为多租户集群或不可信工作负载提供安全沙箱。
安全合规团队 —— 在保持容器敏捷性的同时满足更严格的内核隔离要求。
边缘与 Serverless 开发者 —— 利用快速启动、低开销的用户态内核运行短时函数或微服务。

en.tag: Userspace application kernel for sandboxed containers with OCI/K8s compatibility
en.what: gVisor is an open-source application kernel from Google that implements a Linux-compatible interface in userspace using Go, adding an extra security isolation layer to containers. By limiting direct access to the host kernel, it significantly reduces container escape risks while maintaining near-native startup speed and resource overhead.
en.content: The repository contains the runsc OCI runtime, the Sentry userspace kernel, the Gofer filesystem proxy, and extensive Go implementations of Linux system calls along with test suites.
en.stack: Written primarily in Go and supports x86_64 and ARM64 architectures; as an OCI runtime it integrates directly with Docker, containerd, and Kubernetes.
en.hot: With nearly 19k stars, gVisor is trending as a top cloud-native sandbox amid surging container security demands; its 85 new stars this week and #13 spot on the Go trending list reflect strong community interest in lightweight isolation.
uses: Cloud-native platform operators —— providing secure sandboxes for multi-tenant clusters or untrusted workloads.
Security and compliance teams —— meeting stricter kernel isolation requirements without sacrificing container agility.
Edge and serverless developers —— leveraging fast-start, low-overhead userspace kernels for short-lived functions or microservices.

zh.tag: 基于 WireGuard 的零配置安全组网与远程访问基础设施
zh.what: Tailscale 基于 WireGuard 协议构建安全的虚拟专用网络，让用户无需公网 IP 或端口转发即可将设备组成私有网络。它集成了身份验证和两因素认证（2FA），简化了团队和设备之间的安全远程访问与内网穿透。
zh.content: 仓库主要包含 tailscaled 守护进程与 tailscale 命令行工具的核心源码，覆盖 Linux、Windows、macOS 及 BSD 系统的网络栈与控制逻辑。移动端 App 的底层网络库亦来源于此，但各平台 GUI 包装代码位于其他独立仓库。
zh.stack: 项目以 Go 语言为主开发，要求使用最新版 Go 1.26 编译，并基于 WireGuard 协议实现加密通信。构建脚本 `build_dist.sh` 用于将版本信息嵌入二进制，支持多种 Linux 发行版及跨平台打包。
zh.hot: 凭借“零配置”即可在任意设备间建立加密组网的能力，Tailscale 已成为远程办公和云原生时代的核心网络工具，GitHub 累计获得 34k+ Stars，本周再以 583 新增 Star 登上 Go 语言 Trending 榜第 2 名。
uses: 远程办公团队 —— 无需公网 IP 即可安全访问公司内网与私有云资源
开发运维人员 —— 快速搭建跨云、跨地域的容器与服务器调试网络
个人技术爱好者 —— 将家庭 NAS、树莓派等设备组成加密私有网络
安全合规企业 —— 基于 SSO/2FA 的零信任网络替代传统 VPN 方案

en.tag: Zero-config WireGuard VPN for secure remote access and private networking
en.what: Tailscale builds secure virtual private networks on top of WireGuard, allowing devices to form a private mesh network without public IPs or port forwarding. It integrates identity-based authentication and two-factor authentication (2FA) to simplify secure remote access and intranet penetration for teams and devices.
en.content: The repository primarily contains the core source code for the `tailscaled` daemon and the `tailscale` CLI tool, covering the networking stack and control logic for Linux, Windows, macOS, and BSD systems. It also serves as the underlying network library for mobile apps, while platform-specific GUI wrappers reside in separate repositories.
en.stack: Developed primarily in Go and requiring the latest Go 1.26 release, it implements encrypted communication over the WireGuard protocol. The `build_dist.sh` script embeds version metadata into binaries, supporting packaging for multiple Linux distributions and cross-platform deployments.
en.hot: Its "zero-config" approach to encrypted mesh networking across any device has made it an essential tool for remote work and cloud-native environments. With over 34k total stars and 583 new stars this week, it ranks #2 on GitHub's Go Trending chart, reflecting strong community traction.
uses: Remote teams — Securely access corporate intranets and private cloud resources without public IPs
DevOps engineers — Quickly build debug networks across multi-cloud and multi-region servers and containers
Homelab enthusiasts — Encrypt and interconnect personal devices like NAS and Raspberry Pi into a private mesh
Security-focused enterprises — Replace legacy VPNs with zero-trust networking based on SSO and 2FA

zh.tag: 高人气内网穿透与反向代理工具，支持 TCP/UDP/HTTP/HTTPS 及 P2P 模式
zh.what: frp 是一个快速反向代理工具，用于将位于 NAT 或防火墙后的本地服务器暴露到公网。它支持 TCP、UDP、HTTP 和 HTTPS 协议，并允许通过域名将请求转发到内网服务，同时提供 P2P 直连模式。
zh.content: 仓库包含 frps（服务端）和 frpc（客户端）二进制及源码，提供完整的配置文件示例、文档（含中文）以及多种协议转发和 P2P 穿透的实现代码。
zh.stack: 以 Go 语言为主开发，支持跨平台编译部署，依赖 Go 标准库及网络协议栈实现高性能内网穿透。
zh.hot: 作为内网穿透领域的事实标准工具，frp 已积累超过 10.8 万 Star，本月新增 879 Star，稳居 Go 语言月榜前列，深受开发者与运维人员信赖。
uses: 远程办公与家庭服务器运维——将内网 SSH、NAS、Web 服务安全暴露到公网
本地开发调试——让前端、后端、Webhook 在公网可访问
云原生与 IoT 场景——为无公网 IP 的容器、边缘设备提供稳定入口
技术爱好者与极客——快速搭建个人博客、图床、游戏服务器等内网穿透服务

en.tag: Popular fast reverse proxy for NAT traversal, supporting TCP/UDP/HTTP/HTTPS and P2P mode
en.what: frp is a fast reverse proxy that exposes local servers behind NAT or firewalls to the internet. It supports TCP, UDP, HTTP, and HTTPS protocols, forwards requests to internal services via domain names, and offers a P2P connect mode.
en.content: The repository contains frps (server) and frpc (client) binaries and source code, complete configuration examples, documentation (including Chinese), and implementations for multi-protocol forwarding and P2P tunneling.
en.stack: Written primarily in Go with cross-platform compilation support, relying on Go's standard library and networking stack to deliver high-performance NAT traversal.
en.hot: A de-facto standard for NAT traversal, frp has accumulated over 108K stars, gaining 879 this month alone and ranking high on the Go monthly trending list, trusted by developers and ops worldwide.
uses: Remote work and homelab ops — securely expose internal SSH, NAS, and web services to the internet
Local development and debugging — make frontend, backend, and webhook endpoints publicly accessible
Cloud-native and IoT scenarios — provide stable ingress for containers and edge devices without public IPs
Hobbyists and geeks — quickly tunnel personal blogs, image hosting, and game servers from behind NAT

zh.tag: Tailscale 控制服务器的开源自托管实现，可自建私有 VPN 控制平面
zh.what: Headscale 是 Tailscale 商业控制服务器的完全开源替代方案，允许用户在自己的服务器上部署私有控制平面，管理 WireGuard 节点、分配 IP 与路由。它专为个人开发者、家庭实验室及小型组织设计，实现去厂商锁定的安全组网。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Go 编写的控制服务端代码、CLI 工具、NixOS 模块及完整文档，提供容器镜像与二进制开发构建，支持多种官方 Tailscale 客户端接入。
zh.stack: 采用 Go 语言开发，基于 WireGuard 协议构建 overlay 网络控制层；作为独立服务端兼容 Tailscale 官方客户端，通过 NAT 穿透实现节点自动发现与组网。
zh.hot: 仓库已收获 41.8k Stars，本周新增 369 星并位列 GitHub Go 周榜第 7，反映出用户对自托管网络主权、去厂商锁定及低成本安全组网的强烈需求。
uses: 自托管爱好者与家庭实验室用户——希望完全掌控网络控制平面，避免依赖第三方商业服务。
中小团队与开源组织——需要低成本、跨地域的加密组网与设备访问控制。
隐私敏感型开发者与运维人员——追求数据不出境，通过自建控制服务器实现端到端加密连接。
寻求厂商替代方案的企业——意图摆脱商业 Tailscale 控制层绑定，实现可审计、可定制的 VPN 基础设施。

en.tag: Open-source, self-hosted Tailscale control server for private VPN mesh networks
en.what: Headscale is a fully open-source, self-hosted alternative to the Tailscale commercial control server, letting users deploy their own control plane to manage WireGuard nodes, assign IPs, and share routes. It targets hobbyists, homelabbers, and small organizations seeking a vendor-free, secure mesh network.
en.content: The repository includes the Go-based control server, CLI tools, a NixOS module, and full documentation, shipping container images and development binaries for official Tailscale clients.
en.stack: Written in Go and built on WireGuard for the overlay control plane; it runs as a standalone server compatible with official Tailscale clients, enabling automatic NAT traversal and node discovery.
en.hot: With 41.8k stars and 369 added this week, placing 7th on GitHub's Go Trending, it reflects strong demand for network sovereignty, vendor independence, and low-cost secure mesh networking.
uses: Self-hosting enthusiasts and homelabbers who want full control over their network control plane without relying on third-party commercial services.
Small teams and open-source organizations needing low-cost, cross-region encrypted mesh and device access control.
Privacy-focused developers and operators seeking data residency and end-to-end encryption through a self-hosted control server.
Businesses looking for vendor independence—aiming to replace the commercial Tailscale control layer with an auditable, customizable VPN infrastructure.

zh.tag: 基于 YAML 模板的快速漏洞扫描器，安全社区驱动
zh.what: Nuclei 是一款高性能的漏洞扫描工具，通过简洁的 YAML 领域特定语言让全球安全社区协作编写检测模板。它能够快速发现应用程序、API、网络、DNS 及云配置中的安全漏洞，并以极低的误报率模拟真实攻击场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心扫描引擎、YAML 模板解析器、丰富的官方模板库以及多协议支持模块（HTTP/DNS/TCP/SSL 等），同时提供完善的 CLI 工具和 SDK 集成接口。
zh.stack: 主要使用 Go 语言编写，依托 YAML 模板引擎实现漏洞检测逻辑。支持跨平台运行并可与 CI/CD 流程及各类云原生工具链无缝集成。
zh.hot: 凭借 29,811 Stars 和本周新增 228 Stars 的热度，Nuclei 已成为安全社区事实上的漏洞扫描标准。其 YAML 模板生态让全球研究者能够实时响应最新漏洞，实现了「当天漏洞、当天检测」的协作式安全防御。
uses: 企业安全团队 —— 用于资产梳理、漏洞巡检与红蓝对抗演练
渗透测试工程师 —— 快速验证目标环境中已知 CVE 与配置缺陷
DevSecOps 工程师 —— 集成至 CI/CD 流水线实现自动化安全左移
安全研究员 —— 编写并共享 YAML 模板，跟踪分析最新漏洞趋势

en.tag: Fast, community-powered vulnerability scanner using YAML templates
en.what: Nuclei is a high-performance vulnerability scanner that uses a simple YAML-based DSL to enable global security collaboration on detection templates. It rapidly identifies vulnerabilities across applications, APIs, networks, DNS, and cloud configurations while mimicking real-world attack scenarios with minimal false positives.
en.content: The repository houses the core scanning engine, YAML template parser, extensive official template libraries, and multi-protocol support modules (HTTP/DNS/TCP/SSL), along with a comprehensive CLI tool and SDK integration interfaces.
en.stack: Written primarily in Go, it relies on a YAML template engine for vulnerability detection logic. It supports cross-platform execution and integrates seamlessly with CI/CD pipelines and various cloud-native toolchains.
en.hot: With 29,811 Stars and 228 new Stars this week, Nuclei has become the de facto standard for community-driven vulnerability scanning. Its YAML template ecosystem allows global researchers to respond to emerging threats in real time, enabling same-day detection of trending vulnerabilities through collaborative security defense.
uses: Enterprise security teams — for asset inventory, vulnerability patrols, and red/blue team exercises
Penetration testers — to rapidly verify known CVEs and misconfigurations in target environments
DevSecOps engineers — integrating into CI/CD pipelines for automated shift-left security
Security researchers — writing and sharing YAML templates to track and analyze emerging vulnerability trends

zh.tag: 微软用 Go 原生重写 TypeScript 编译器，迈向高性能 TS 7
zh.what: 这是 TypeScript 编译器的原生 Go 语言移植版，目标是用原生性能替代现有的 TypeScript-on-JavaScript 架构。它将成为 TypeScript 7 的核心基础，最终合并回主仓库。目前大部分核心功能（解析、类型检查、代码生成等）已实现，并提供可预览的 npm 包和 VS Code 扩展。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的编译器管线实现（扫描、解析、类型解析与检查、声明和 JS 输出），以及 LSP 语言服务原型和命令行工具链。开发者可通过 npm 安装 `@typescript/native-preview` 使用 `tsgo` 命令，或在 VS Code 中安装预览版扩展体验。
zh.stack: 整体以 Go 语言原生实现编译器核心，兼顾跨平台性能；通过 npm 分发预览包并提供 Node.js 可用的 CLI 封装，同时配套发布 VS Code 扩展以集成语言服务。
zh.hot: 作为 TypeScript 生态的基石级重写，该项目在 GitHub 已斩获 25.9k Star，本周新增 110 Star 并冲入 Go 语言周榜第 3 名，社区高度关注编译速度可能带来的数量级提升。
uses: 前端/全栈开发者 —— 希望在大型代码库中获得更快的类型检查和编译速度。
TypeScript 工具链贡献者 —— 关注编译器架构迁移与 Go 实现细节，提前适配 TS 7。
VS Code 用户 —— 想抢先体验基于原生编译器的语言服务与实时反馈。
基础设施团队 —— 评估将核心开发工具从 JavaScript 运行时迁移到原生二进制的影响。

en.tag: Microsoft's Go rewrite of the TypeScript compiler for high-performance TS 7
en.what: This is a native Go port of the TypeScript compiler, aiming to replace the existing TypeScript-on-JavaScript architecture with native performance. It will serve as the foundation for TypeScript 7 and eventually merge back into the main TypeScript repository. Most core features like parsing, type checking, and emit are already implemented, with preview npm packages and a VS Code extension available.
en.content: The repo houses the full compiler pipeline (scanning, parsing, type resolution and checking, declaration and JS emit), plus an LSP language service prototype and CLI toolchain. Developers can try it via the `@typescript/native-preview` npm package using the `tsgo` command, or through a preview VS Code extension.
en.stack: The compiler core is built natively in Go for cross-platform performance, distributed via npm with a Node.js-compatible CLI wrapper, and paired with a VS Code extension that integrates the language service.
en.hot: As a cornerstone rewrite of the TypeScript ecosystem, the project has garnered 25.9k stars on GitHub, adding 110 this week and hitting #3 on the Go Trending chart, reflecting massive community interest in potential order-of-magnitude compile-speed gains.
uses: Front-end/full-stack developers seeking faster type-checking and compilation in large codebases.
TypeScript toolchain contributors tracking the compiler architecture migration and Go implementation ahead of TS 7.
VS Code users wanting to preview the native-compiler-based language service and real-time feedback.
Infrastructure teams evaluating the impact of migrating core dev tools from JavaScript runtime to native binaries.

zh.tag: 全自动AI渗透测试代理系统
zh.what: PentAGI 是一个基于人工智能的自动化渗透测试平台，利用自主 AI Agent 自动规划并执行复杂的安全测试任务。它能够在完全隔离的 Docker 沙箱环境中运行，帮助安全研究人员和伦理黑客高效地发现系统漏洞。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 Docker 化部署方案、Web 界面与 API 接口，以及面向 OpenAI、Anthropic、DeepSeek、Ollama 等十余种 LLM 的适配配置。同时集成了知识图谱（Graphiti）、Langfuse 可观测性与 OAuth 认证等高级模块。
zh.stack: 核心系统以 Go 语言构建，前端基于现代 Web 技术。它通过 Docker 实现任务级沙箱隔离，并支持灵活接入主流闭源与开源大模型。
zh.hot: 该仓库已收获 20,871 Stars，本周新增 1,111 Star 并跻身 GitHub Go 语言周榜第 15 位，反映出网络安全社区对「AI+自主渗透测试」这一交叉领域的极大热情。
uses: 企业安全团队 —— 需要自动化评估系统漏洞与防御能力的红队/蓝队成员
渗透测试工程师 —— 希望借助 AI 代理提升复杂渗透测试任务效率的安全专家
安全研究员 —— 研究 AI Agent 在攻防场景下自主决策与工具链调用的学者
伦理黑客 —— 在隔离沙箱中快速验证漏洞利用路径的技术爱好者

en.tag: Fully autonomous AI agent system for complex penetration testing
en.what: PentAGI is an AI-powered autonomous penetration testing platform that plans and executes complex security assessments using intelligent agents. It operates within fully isolated Docker sandboxes to help security researchers and ethical hackers identify vulnerabilities efficiently.
en.content: The repository includes a complete Docker-based deployment, web UI and API, plus adapters for over a dozen LLM providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek and Ollama. It also integrates advanced modules such as Graphiti knowledge graph, Langfuse observability, and OAuth authentication.
en.stack: The core system is built in Go with a modern web frontend. It leverages Docker for strict task-level sandbox isolation and offers flexible plug-ins for both proprietary and open-source LLMs.
en.hot: With 20,871 Stars and 1,111 added this week alone, PentAGI ranks 15th on GitHub's weekly Go trending list, reflecting strong community excitement for autonomous AI-driven penetration testing.
uses: Enterprise red/blue teams seeking automated vulnerability assessment and defense validation
Penetration testers looking to boost efficiency of complex security tasks with AI agents
Security researchers studying autonomous decision-making and tool orchestration in offensive AI
Ethical hackers and enthusiasts who need isolated sandboxes to rapidly verify exploit paths

zh.tag: 开源基础设施即代码工具，多云资源配置与管理利器
zh.what: Terraform 是 HashiCorp 推出的基础设施即代码（IaC）工具，允许用户使用声明式配置文件安全、可预测地创建、修改和管理基础设施资源。它将各类云服务商和本地环境的 API 抽象为代码，支持版本控制、团队协作和自动化变更。
zh.content: 仓库包含 Terraform 核心引擎、声明式 HCL 语言解析器、资源状态管理机制，以及大量官方 Provider 插件，覆盖 AWS、Azure、GCP 等主流云平台。
zh.stack: 核心采用 Go 语言编写，配置语言为 HashiCorp Configuration Language（HCL），通过 Provider 插件架构对接各类云 API，依赖 gRPC 与 Go 插件系统实现扩展。
zh.hot: 作为基础设施即代码领域的标杆项目，Terraform 在 GitHub 已积累 49,219 Stars，本周新增 429 Stars 并登顶 Go 语言周榜第 1 名，反映出云原生时代开发运维团队对自动化、多云一致管理的强烈需求。
uses: 云架构师 / DevOps 工程师 —— 需要以代码方式统一管理 AWS、Azure、GCP 等多云基础设施
平台工程团队 —— 构建可复用、可版本控制的内部平台与标准化部署流水线
中小企业技术负责人 —— 寻求低成本、可审计的基础设施自动化方案，减少人工配置错误

en.tag: Open-source IaC tool for safely managing multi-cloud infrastructure
en.what: Terraform is HashiCorp's open-source infrastructure-as-code tool that lets you safely and predictably provision and manage cloud resources through declarative configuration files. It codifies APIs from various providers into version-controlled, reviewable code, enabling teams to automate infrastructure lifecycle across multi-cloud and on-premises environments.
en.content: The repository contains Terraform core engine, HCL configuration parser, resource state management, and an extensive ecosystem of official and community providers for AWS, Azure, GCP, and other services.
en.stack: Core is written in Go, uses HashiCorp Configuration Language (HCL) for declarations, and adopts a provider plugin architecture based on gRPC and Go plugins to integrate with cloud APIs.
en.hot: As a de facto standard in the IaC space, Terraform has amassed 49,219 Stars on GitHub, with 429 new Stars this week and ranking #1 on the Go Trending chart, reflecting strong demand from DevOps teams for automated, consistent multi-cloud management.
uses: Cloud architects and DevOps engineers managing multi-cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure, GCP) as code
Platform engineering teams building reusable, version-controlled internal platforms and deployment pipelines
SME tech leads seeking cost-effective, auditable infrastructure automation to eliminate manual misconfigurations

zh.tag: 阿里开源轻量级进程内向量数据库，支持混合检索与全文搜索
zh.what: Zvec 是一款可直接嵌入应用程序的进程内向量数据库，由阿里巴巴开源并内部实战验证，主打低延迟、高可扩展的相似性搜索。最新 v0.5.0 原生支持全文搜索与混合检索，可在单一查询中融合稠密向量、稀疏向量与标量过滤。
zh.content: 仓库以 C++ 实现高性能核心引擎，同时提供 Python、Node.js、Go 与 Rust 多语言 SDK；包含完整文档、基准测试数据及 CI 流水线配置。
zh.stack: 核心引擎采用 C++ 构建以保证极致性能，通过 PyPI 和 npm 等包管理器发布多语言绑定，并依赖 DiskANN 等算法实现磁盘级向量索引。
zh.hot: 凭借 15.1K Star 与月增 4.3K 的增速，Zvec 跃居 GitHub C++ 月榜第 3 名；其“嵌入即开即用”的轻量架构与阿里云实战背书，精准命中了 AI 应用对低门槛、高性能向量检索的需求。
uses: AI 应用开发者 —— 需要在本地或边缘端快速嵌入高性能向量检索，无需部署独立数据库服务。
RAG/搜索工程师 —— 需要在一套系统中同时完成稠密向量、稀疏向量与全文搜索的混合召回。
资源敏感型场景 —— 利用 DiskANN 磁盘索引在内存受限环境下支撑大规模向量数据集。

en.tag: Alibaba's open-source, lightning-fast in-process vector DB with hybrid retrieval
en.what: Zvec is an open-source, in-process vector database developed by Alibaba that embeds directly into applications for production-grade, low-latency similarity search. Its latest v0.5.0 introduces native full-text search and hybrid retrieval, enabling a single query to combine dense vectors, sparse vectors, and scalar filtering.
en.content: The repository contains a high-performance C++ core engine alongside official Python, Node.js, Go, and Rust SDKs, plus comprehensive docs, benchmarks, and CI pipelines.
en.stack: The core engine is written in C++ for maximum performance, distributed via PyPI and npm bindings, and leverages algorithms like DiskANN for on-disk vector indexing.
en.hot: With 15.1K stars and 4.3K added this month alone, Zvec ranks 3rd on GitHub's C++ monthly trending list; its zero-dependency, in-process architecture and Alibaba production pedigree directly address the AI industry's demand for high-performance, low-latency vector retrieval.
uses: AI application developers who need to embed high-performance vector search directly into apps without standalone database deployments.
RAG and search engineers requiring unified hybrid retrieval of dense, sparse, and full-text results in a single query.
Resource-constrained environments that benefit from DiskANN on-disk indexing to run large-scale vector datasets with limited RAM.

zh.tag: 多核友好的C++刚体物理与碰撞检测引擎，服务3A游戏与VR
zh.what: Jolt Physics 是一个为现代多核 CPU 优化的刚体物理与碰撞检测库，专为游戏和 VR 应用设计。它支持在后台线程并行加载物理数据、执行碰撞查询，同时保持主模拟循环的稳定性能与即时可见的数据一致性。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的物理引擎源码、可独立运行的示例程序与测试用例，以及针对布娃娃、车辆、碰撞查询等模块的详细文档。代码采用 C++17 编写，提供了跨平台的 CMake 构建系统与 CI 配置。
zh.stack: 核心基于现代 C++17 标准开发，无第三方运行时依赖，支持 Windows、Linux、macOS 及主流游戏主机平台。构建系统采用 CMake，并集成了 SonarCloud 质量门禁与自动化测试。
zh.hot: 凭借《地平线：西之绝境》与《死亡搁浅2》等3A大作的背书，该仓库已获得近 1.1 万 Star，本周新增 242 星并登上 GitHub C++ 周榜第 2 名。开发者在寻求 PhysX/Havok 替代方案时，高度关注其多核并行架构与即时可见的数据一致性设计。
uses: 3A游戏工作室 —— 需要高性能、可定制物理引擎以驱动开放世界与复杂交互的团队
VR/AR开发者 —— 追求稳定物理模拟与低延迟交互的沉浸式应用制作人
独立游戏开发者 —— 寻找零授权费用、跨平台支持且生产验证过的物理中间件
图形引擎研究者 —— 学习现代多核物理架构、碰撞检测算法与无锁数据设计的工程师

en.tag: Multi-core C++ rigid body physics engine powering AAA games and VR apps
en.what: Jolt Physics is a modern, multi-core optimized rigid body physics and collision detection library designed for games and VR applications. It supports background loading of physics data and concurrent collision queries while maintaining stable simulation performance and immediately visible data consistency.
en.content: The repository contains the full engine source, standalone sample applications, test suites, and detailed documentation for ragdolls, vehicles, and collision queries. It is written in C++17 with cross-platform CMake build systems and CI configurations.
en.stack: The core is written in modern C++17 with no third-party runtime dependencies, supporting Windows, Linux, macOS, and major game consoles. It uses CMake for building and integrates SonarCloud quality gates with automated testing.
en.hot: Backed by AAA titles like Horizon Forbidden West and Death Stranding 2, the repo has amassed nearly 11k stars, gaining 242 this week and hitting #2 on GitHub's C++ Trending list. Developers exploring alternatives to PhysX/Havok are drawn to its multi-core parallel architecture and immediate data consistency.
uses: AAA game studios needing high-performance, customizable physics for open worlds and complex interactions
VR/AR developers building immersive apps that require stable simulation and low-latency interaction
Indie developers seeking a zero-license-fee, cross-platform, production-proven physics middleware
Engine researchers studying modern multi-core physics architectures and lock-free data design

zh.tag: 跨语言高性能开源 RPC 框架与通信基础设施
zh.what: gRPC 是由 Google 开源的现代高性能远程过程调用（RPC）框架，旨在让客户端与服务端应用透明通信。它基于 HTTP/2 和 Protocol Buffers 构建，支持多种编程语言，简化了分布式连接系统的构建。
zh.content: 仓库包含基于 C++ 的核心运行时、多语言绑定（Python、Ruby、PHP、C#、Go、Java 等）以及丰富的示例代码。同时提供构建脚本、测试套件和每日更新的预编译包。
zh.stack: 核心基于 C++ 实现，依赖 Protocol Buffers 作为接口定义与序列化格式，通过 HTTP/2 传输。提供各语言原生 SDK，涵盖 Node.js、Go、Java、Dart、Kotlin 等主流生态。
zh.hot: 凭借 45.1K+ Star 的社区认可度与本周新增 158 Star 的持续热度，gRPC 已成为云原生时代服务间通信的事实标准。其多语言支持与卓越性能使其在微服务架构中广受欢迎，稳居 C++ 周榜第 4。
uses: 后端开发者构建跨语言微服务与分布式系统
云原生架构师设计服务网格与容器化通信方案
基础平台团队打造高性能内部 API 与基础设施
多语言技术栈团队统一服务调用协议与接口规范

en.tag: Cross-language, high-performance open-source RPC framework
en.what: gRPC is a modern, high-performance open-source RPC framework by Google that enables transparent communication between client and server applications. Built on HTTP/2 and Protocol Buffers, it supports multiple languages and simplifies building distributed connected systems.
en.content: The repository contains the C++-based core runtime, multi-language bindings (Python, Ruby, PHP, C#, Go, Java, etc.), and extensive examples. It also includes build scripts, test suites, and daily precompiled packages.
en.stack: The core is implemented in C++, relying on Protocol Buffers for IDL and serialization over HTTP/2. It offers native SDKs for major ecosystems including Node.js, Go, Java, Dart, and Kotlin.
en.hot: With 45.1K+ stars and 158 new stars this week, gRPC has become the de facto standard for service-to-service communication in the cloud-native era. Its multi-language support and outstanding performance make it widely adopted in microservices, ranking 4th on the C++ weekly trending list.
uses: Backend developers building cross-language microservices and distributed systems
Cloud-native architects designing service mesh and containerized communication
Platform teams building high-performance internal APIs and infrastructure
Polyglot teams standardizing service call protocols and interface specifications

zh.tag: 开源像素动画与精灵图编辑器，游戏美术必备工具
zh.what: Aseprite 是一款专注于像素艺术和动画精灵图创作的专业桌面软件，支持 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 平台。它通过图层与帧分离的动画时间轴、洋葱皮预览和丰富的像素画笔工具，帮助用户制作游戏素材和复古风格动画。软件同时提供 Lua 脚本扩展、命令行接口和多种格式导入导出，满足从个人创作到工业化流程的多样化需求。
zh.content: 仓库包含完整的 C++ 桌面端源码，基于自研 UI 框架构建，涵盖绘画引擎、动画时间轴、颜色管理、文件读写及脚本系统等核心模块。除主程序代码外，还提供了依赖库（如 Skia 图形后端）的集成配置和跨平台构建脚本。
zh.stack: 主体采用 C++ 开发，图形渲染基于 Skia 库，并依赖 Google 的 depot_tools 进行依赖管理；构建系统支持 CMake，覆盖 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 三端编译。
zh.hot: 凭借 38.1k+ Star 的社区认可度，Aseprite 是像素艺术领域的事实标准工具；其开源属性与专业级动画功能（如洋葱皮、Lua 脚本）持续吸引独立游戏开发者和艺术创作者，本周再获 211 Star 登上 C++ 周榜前 20。
uses: 独立游戏开发者 —— 快速绘制角色、场景与 UI 的像素风游戏素材
像素艺术家与动画师 —— 制作复古风插画、表情包和逐帧动画
游戏美术教育者 —— 作为低门槛、可扩展的像素画教学工具
工具链集成工程师 —— 利用 CLI 与 Lua 脚本实现自动化资产导出流水线

en.tag: Open-source pixel art & animated sprite editor for game developers and artists
en.what: Aseprite is a dedicated desktop application for creating pixel art and animated sprites across Windows, macOS, and Linux. It features a timeline that separates layers and frames, onion skinning for smooth animation workflows, and pixel-perfect drawing tools tailored for game asset creation. The tool also supports Lua scripting, CLI automation, and extensive import/export formats to fit both hobbyist and production pipelines.
en.content: The repository houses the full C++ desktop application source, built on a custom UI framework, covering the rendering engine, animation timeline, color management, file I/O, and scripting subsystems. It also includes dependency integrations (such as the Skia graphics backend) and cross-platform build scripts.
en.stack: Written primarily in C++ with Skia handling the graphics backend and Google depot_tools managing dependencies; the project uses CMake and supports compilation on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
en.hot: With over 38.1k stars, Aseprite is the de facto standard for pixel art; its open-source model combined with professional animation features—such as onion skinning and Lua scripting—keeps attracting indie game developers and artists, earning another 211 stars this week and landing in the top 20 of GitHub’s C++ Trending.
uses: Indie game developers — rapidly creating pixel-art characters, environments, and UI assets
Pixel artists and animators — producing retro-style illustrations, emoticons, and frame-by-frame animations
Game-art educators — teaching pixel fundamentals with a low-barrier, highly extensible tool
Pipeline engineers — automating asset export via CLI and Lua scripting in production workflows

zh.tag: vLLM 昇腾 NPU 社区插件，让大模型推理原生支持国产算力
zh.what: 这是 vLLM 推理引擎的社区维护硬件插件，旨在让主流大模型能够高效运行在华为昇腾（Ascend）NPU 上；它为国产 AI 算力提供了与 CUDA 生态对标的高性能推理方案，降低异构迁移成本。
zh.content: 仓库包含昇腾定制的算子实现、Attention 与采样后端加速模块、vLLM 版本兼容层，以及完整的构建脚本与中文/英文文档。
zh.stack: 核心模块以 C++ 编写并绑定 Python，底层调用华为 CANN 计算架构与 PyTorch 昇腾后端，通过 vLLM 的硬件插件接口完成对接。
zh.hot: 在国产算力替代与自主可控需求推动下，该插件补全了 vLLM 在昇腾生态的关键一环；仓库已获 2,431 Star，本周新增 52 星并跻身 GitHub C++ Trending 第 13 位，关注度持续走高。
uses: 昇腾 NPU 集群用户 —— 希望在华为 910B/310P 等硬件上无缝运行 vLLM 推理服务的工程团队。
国产算力平台构建者 —— 需要基于自主可控芯片搭建大模型推理底座的云厂商与科研机构。
异构适配开发者 —— 从事 AI 推理引擎后端移植、算子优化与硬件插件集成的系统工程师。

en.tag: Community plugin for running vLLM inference natively on Huawei Ascend NPUs
en.what: This community-maintained hardware plugin enables the vLLM inference engine to run efficiently on Huawei Ascend NPUs. It provides a high-performance serving solution for domestic AI hardware, reducing the migration cost from CUDA-centric ecosystems.
en.content: The repository houses Ascend-customized operators, attention and sampling acceleration backends, vLLM compatibility layers, plus build scripts and bilingual documentation.
en.stack: Core modules are written in C++ with Python bindings, calling Huawei's CANN stack and PyTorch Ascend backend underneath, and interfacing with vLLM through its hardware plugin API.
en.hot: Driven by demand for domestic hardware independence, the plugin fills a critical gap for vLLM on Ascend; having earned 2,431 stars with 52 added this week and a spot at #13 on GitHub's C++ Trending, it is gaining significant traction.
uses: Ascend NPU cluster users — Engineering teams seeking to run vLLM inference natively on Huawei 910B/310P hardware.
Domestic AI platform builders — Cloud providers and research institutes building LLM serving stacks on homegrown chips.
Heterogeneous adaptation developers — Systems engineers working on backend porting, operator optimization, and hardware plugin integration for inference engines.

zh.tag: 高性能网格优化库，让 3D 模型更小、渲染更快
zh.what: meshoptimizer 是一个专门优化三角形网格的算法库，通过重排顶点与索引数据提升 GPU 管线效率，并提供网格简化与压缩算法以减小存储体积。它既可直接嵌入 C/C++ 渲染引擎，也能通过 FFI 或官方绑定在 Rust、JavaScript 等语言中调用。
zh.content: 核心包含 meshoptimizer.h 头文件与若干 C++ 源文件，内置顶点缓存优化、过度绘制优化、索引压缩等算法；同时附带 gltfpack 命令行工具与 clusterlod.h 单头文件 LOD 库。
zh.stack: 以 C++ 为底层实现，提供纯 C 接口；支持通过 CMake、Vcpkg、Conan 集成，也可作为原生 Linux 包安装，并具备 Rust（meshopt crate）与 JavaScript（meshoptimizer.js）官方绑定。
zh.hot: 在 GitHub 已积累 8,108 Stars，本周新增 232 星并冲上 C++ 周榜第 3，正值游戏、XR 及实时渲染领域对轻量几何管线需求爆发，其跨平台、多语言覆盖与 gltfpack 的 glTF 生态深度集成使其成为开发者首选。
uses: 游戏引擎开发者——需要在运行时压缩和优化 3D 模型以提升渲染帧率。
元宇宙/XR 应用团队——需在端侧减少几何数据体积，降低带宽与内存占用。
3D 资产管线工程师——需要批量处理 glTF 文件，通过 gltfpack 自动完成网格简化与压缩。

en.tag: High-performance mesh optimization library for smaller & faster 3D rendering
en.what: meshoptimizer is an algorithm library that optimizes triangle meshes for GPU efficiency by reordering vertex and index data, while also providing mesh simplification and compression to reduce storage size. It can be embedded directly into C/C++ renderers or used from Rust, JavaScript and other languages via FFI and official bindings.
en.content: The core consists of a C/C++ header and source files implementing vertex cache optimization, overdraw optimization, and index compression; it also ships with the gltfpack CLI tool and the single-header clusterlod.h library for continuous LOD.
en.stack: Written in C++ with a plain C API; supports CMake, Vcpkg, Conan, and native Linux packages, along with official Rust (meshopt crate) and JavaScript (meshoptimizer.js) bindings.
en.hot: With 8,108 total stars and 232 new stars this week, it ranks #3 on the GitHub C++ Trending list; the surge aligns with booming demand for lightweight geometry pipelines in games, XR, and real-time rendering, where its cross-platform reach, multi-language bindings, and gltfpack's tight glTF integration make it a go-to solution.
uses: Game engine developers who need to compress and optimize 3D meshes at runtime for higher frame rates.
Metaverse / XR teams looking to reduce geometry size on-device to cut bandwidth and memory usage.
3D asset pipeline engineers who need to batch-process glTF files with gltfpack for automatic mesh simplification and compression.

zh.tag: 开源通用SfM与多视图立体重建引擎
zh.what: COLMAP 是一个通用的运动恢复结构（SfM）与多视图立体（MVS）三维重建流水线。它支持通过图形界面或命令行，对有序和无序图像集合进行相机位姿估计和密集点云/网格重建。
zh.content: 仓库包含核心C++重建库、自动重建模块、GUI与CLI前端，以及完整的官方文档。同时提供 PyCOLMAP Python 绑定、Docker 镜像、Conda 包和预编译二进制文件。
zh.stack: 以C++为主，依赖 ceres-solver 进行优化、poselib 处理位姿、sift-gpu 与 vlfeat 提取特征，并提供 CUDA 加速版本和 Python 绑定。
zh.hot: 作为3D视觉领域最成熟的开源SfM/MVS工具之一，COLMAP在学术界和工业界被广泛引用；其12.2k Star和本月新增310星的热度，也反映了摄影测量、三维重建与具身智能数据准备需求的持续增长。
uses: 计算机视觉研究者 —— 用于多视图几何、SfM 与 MVS 算法基准测试
三维重建工程师 —— 快速从照片生成点云、网格和纹理模型
具身智能/机器人团队 —— 构建大规模场景三维数据集，用于训练与仿真
摄影测量爱好者 —— 利用图形界面一键完成自动重建

en.tag: General-purpose SfM & Multi-View Stereo 3D reconstruction pipeline
en.what: COLMAP is a general-purpose Structure-from-Motion (SfM) and Multi-View Stereo (MVS) pipeline for 3D reconstruction. It provides both graphical and command-line interfaces to estimate camera poses and generate dense point clouds or meshes from ordered and unordered image collections.
en.content: The repository contains the core C++ reconstruction library, automatic reconstruction modules, GUI and CLI frontends, and comprehensive documentation. It also includes PyCOLMAP Python bindings, Docker images, Conda packages, and pre-built binaries for multiple platforms.
en.stack: Primarily written in C++, it depends on ceres-solver for optimization, poselib for pose estimation, and sift-gpu/vlfeat for feature extraction, with optional CUDA acceleration and Python bindings.
en.hot: As one of the most mature open-source SfM/MVS tools, COLMAP is widely cited in academia and industry; its 12.2k stars and 310 new stars this month reflect growing demand for photogrammetry, 3D reconstruction, and embodied-AI data preparation.
uses: Computer vision researchers — for benchmarking multi-view geometry, SfM, and MVS algorithms
3D reconstruction engineers — to quickly generate point clouds, meshes, and textured models from photos
Embodied AI / robotics teams — to build large-scale scene 3D datasets for training and simulation
Photogrammetry enthusiasts — to perform automatic reconstruction with a one-click GUI

zh.tag: 跨平台 C++ 异步网络与底层 I/O 基础设施库
zh.what: Asio 是一个跨平台的 C++ 库，专注于提供异步网络与底层 I/O 编程能力，统一封装了各操作系统的复杂原生 API。开发者可用它高效构建 TCP/UDP 套接字、串口通信及定时器等组件，广泛应用于高并发服务器、实时系统和嵌入式通信场景。
zh.content: 仓库包含头文件-only 与源码编译两种形态的完整实现，以及示例程序、单元测试和离线 HTML 文档。根目录按 src、include、doc、example 组织，便于直接集成或打包构建。
zh.stack: 核心为现代 C++（C++11 起），零依赖或可选衔接 Boost，支持 Linux、Windows、macOS 及嵌入式平台。编译系统覆盖 Autotools、CMake 和纯 Makefile，适配多种工具链。
zh.hot: 作为 C++ 异步网络编程的事实标准之一，Asio 凭借稳定 API 与卓越性能持续吸引开发者，目前获星 6.1k，本周新增 175 星并跻身 C++ 周榜第 8。最新 1.38.1 版本的发布进一步印证了社区对高性能底层 I/O 基础设施的旺盛需求。
uses: 需要构建高并发网络服务或实时通信系统的后端 C++ 开发者
追求跨平台一致 API、不想直接编写操作系统原生 I/O 代码的嵌入式/工具链团队
希望基于成熟异步模型开发游戏服务器、金融行情网关或物联网网关的工程团队

en.tag: Cross-platform C++ library for asynchronous networking and low-level I/O
en.what: Asio is a cross-platform C++ library for network and low-level I/O programming, offering a consistent asynchronous model across operating systems. It abstracts complex native APIs into composable components like TCP/UDP sockets, serial ports, and timers, making it ideal for high-concurrency servers and real-time systems.
en.content: The repository ships the library in both header-only and compiled source forms, alongside examples, unit tests, and offline HTML documentation. It is organized under src, include, doc, and example directories for easy integration or packaging.
en.stack: Written in modern C++ (C++11 and up) with zero mandatory dependencies—optionally interoperable with Boost—and supports Linux, Windows, macOS, and embedded targets. Build systems include Autotools, CMake, and plain Makefiles for broad toolchain compatibility.
en.hot: A de-facto standard for C++ asynchronous networking, Asio maintains strong momentum with 6.1k stars and 175 added this week, ranking 8th on the GitHub C++ Trending list. The recent 1.38.1 release underscores continued community demand for robust, high-performance low-level I/O infrastructure.
uses: Backend C++ developers building high-concurrency network services or real-time communication systems
Embedded and tooling teams seeking a cross-platform, consistent API without managing native OS I/O directly
Engineering teams developing game servers, financial market gateways, or IoT hubs on a proven asynchronous model

zh.tag: Google官方C++单元测试与Mock框架，38K+ Star的行业标准
zh.what: GoogleTest是Google开源的C++测试框架，集单元测试与Mock能力于一体。它支持自动测试发现、丰富的断言、参数化测试和死亡测试等特性，帮助开发者高效验证C++代码的正确性。
zh.content: 仓库合并了原GoogleTest与GoogleMock项目，包含测试框架源码、头文件、详细文档及示例代码。
zh.stack: 基于C++17标准构建，使用CMake/Bazel编译，计划引入Abseil作为底层依赖库。
zh.hot: 作为C++生态的事实标准测试框架，GoogleTest已积累38.8K Star，本月新增173星并持续发布1.17.x版本，保持高度活跃。
uses: C++开发者 —— 为项目编写单元测试和集成测试，确保代码质量
需要Mock测试的工程项目 —— 模拟依赖对象，隔离测试复杂系统
开源/企业级C++项目 —— 建立标准化测试流程与CI/CD质量门禁

en.tag: Google's official C++ unit testing and mocking framework, the industry standard
en.what: GoogleTest is Google's open-source C++ testing framework that combines unit testing and mocking capabilities. It supports automatic test discovery, rich assertions, parameterized tests, and death tests to help developers efficiently verify C++ code correctness.
en.content: The repository merges the formerly separate GoogleTest and GoogleMock projects, containing framework source code, headers, comprehensive documentation, and sample code.
en.stack: Built on C++17, compiled with CMake/Bazel, and planning to adopt Abseil as a foundational dependency.
en.hot: With 38.8K stars and 173 new stars this month, GoogleTest remains the de facto standard C++ testing framework, actively maintained with recent 1.17.x releases requiring C++17.
uses: C++ developers —— writing unit and integration tests to ensure code quality
Projects requiring mocking —— simulating dependencies and isolating complex systems for testing
Open-source and enterprise C++ projects —— establishing standardized testing pipelines and CI/CD quality gates

zh.tag: Google 边缘端 ML/GenAI 高性能推理运行时
zh.what: LiteRT 是 TensorFlow Lite 的继任者，提供在边缘设备上部署机器学习与生成式 AI 的高性能运行时。它支持 GPU/NPU 加速，并集成了 LLM 推理、Web 推理、C++ 张量操作和 CLI 工具链。
zh.content: 仓库包含 LiteRT 运行时核心、构建状态徽章、文档链接以及多个子项目（LiteRT-LM、LiteRT.js、Tensor API、LiteRT CLI）的入口。
zh.stack: 主语言 C++，依赖 Python 3.13 构建环境，支持 Linux/macOS/Windows 多平台，集成 GPU/NPU 加速与 WebGPU/WASM。
zh.hot: 作为 TensorFlow Lite 的官方继任者，LiteRT 在边缘 AI 领域具有重大影响力，本月新增 586 星，总星数 3157，位列 C++ 月榜第 24 名。
uses: 移动端和嵌入式设备上的 ML/GenAI 推理部署
浏览器中通过 WebGPU/WASM 运行客户端 AI
AI 编码代理工作流加速（通过 LiteRT CLI）
边缘端 LLM 部署（通过 LiteRT-LM）

en.tag: Google's on-device runtime for high-performance ML & GenAI deployment on edge platforms
en.what: LiteRT, the successor to TensorFlow Lite, is Google's on-device runtime for deploying ML and GenAI on edge platforms with high performance. It features GPU/NPU acceleration, LLM inference, Web inference via WebGPU/WASM, C++ tensor API, and a CLI toolkit.
en.content: The repo contains the LiteRT runtime core, build status badges, documentation links, and entry points to subprojects like LiteRT-LM, LiteRT.js, Tensor API, and LiteRT CLI.
en.stack: Primary language is C++, with Python 3.13 build environment, multi-platform support (Linux/macOS/Windows), GPU/NPU acceleration, and WebGPU/WASM integration.
en.hot: As the official successor to TensorFlow Lite, LiteRT has significant impact in edge AI, gaining 586 stars this month (total 3157) and ranking #24 on the C++ monthly trending list.
uses: ML/GenAI inference deployment on mobile and embedded devices
Running client-side AI in browsers via WebGPU/WASM
Accelerating AI coding agent workflows via LiteRT CLI
On-device LLM deployment via LiteRT-LM

zh.tag: 跨平台 C++ YAML 解析与生成库
zh.what: yaml-cpp 是一个符合 YAML 1.2 规范的 C++ 解析与生成库，支持将 YAML 文件转换为 C++ 对象模型，也能将数据结构反向序列化为 YAML 格式。它广泛应用于游戏配置、系统工具及任何需要人类可读配置文件的 C++ 项目中。
zh.content: 仓库包含头文件与源码、CMake 构建脚本、单元测试及 Wiki 教程文档，支持通过 FetchContent 或源码方式集成到现有 CMake 项目中。
zh.stack: 基于标准 C++ 编写，使用 CMake 进行跨平台构建，测试依赖 GoogleTest，无运行时外部依赖，可编译为静态或动态库。
zh.hot: 作为 C++ 生态最主流的 YAML 库之一，它本周新增 78 Star 并冲入 C++ 周榜第 9，凭借零依赖、稳定 API 和持续维护，成为游戏引擎与基础设施项目的首选配置方案。
uses: C++ 后端/系统开发者 —— 需要为服务端或工具链引入人类可读的配置文件支持
游戏引擎开发者 —— 用于关卡配置、资源清单或引擎参数等 YAML 格式数据的解析与生成
嵌入式与跨平台工具开发者 —— 寻求无繁重运行时依赖的轻量级配置解析方案

en.tag: Cross-platform C++ YAML parser and emitter library
en.what: yaml-cpp is a YAML 1.2 spec-compliant C++ parser and emitter that converts YAML files into C++ object models and serializes data structures back into YAML. It is widely used in game configurations, system tools, and any C++ project requiring human-readable config files.
en.content: The repository includes headers and source code, CMake build scripts, unit tests, and Wiki tutorials, supporting integration into existing CMake projects via FetchContent or source inclusion.
en.stack: Written in standard C++ with CMake for cross-platform builds, uses GoogleTest for unit testing, has no runtime dependencies, and can be compiled as a static or shared library.
en.hot: As one of the most popular YAML libraries in the C++ ecosystem, it gained 78 stars this week and ranked 9th on the GitHub C++ Trending list. Its zero runtime dependencies, stable API, and long-term maintenance make it a top choice for game engines and infrastructure projects.
uses: C++ backend/system developers —— adding human-readable config file support to servers or toolchains
Game engine developers —— parsing and emitting level configs, asset manifests, or engine parameters in YAML
Embedded and cross-platform tool builders —— seeking a lightweight config parser with zero heavy runtime dependencies

zh.tag: Facebook开源的高性能C++20基础组件库
zh.what: Folly 是 Facebook 开发并广泛使用的开源 C++20 组件库，专注于提供实用且高效的基础工具。它承载了 Meta 内部大量 C++ 项目的共享代码，并针对大规模场景下的极致性能进行了深度优化。
zh.content: 仓库采用扁平的 folly/ 目录结构，存放各类相对独立的头文件与实现模块；同时包含 experimental、test 与 docs 子目录，分别存放内部实验性组件、单元测试及项目文档。
zh.stack: 基于 C++20 标准构建，与 Boost 及标准库互补而非竞争，仅在既有方案无法满足性能或功能需求时才提供替代实现。
zh.hot: 作为 Facebook C++ 生态的基石项目，Folly 已累计获得 30.4k+ Stars，本月新增 87 Stars 并跻身 GitHub C++ 月榜第 21 位，是高性能系统开发领域广泛认可的基础设施库。
uses: 大规模后端 C++ 开发者 —— 需要高性能基础组件来替代标准库或 Boost 的不足之处
基础设施/中间件团队 —— 构建高并发、低延迟系统时可复用其锁、字符串与内存工具
开源 C++ 项目维护者 —— 希望引入经过 Meta 生产环境长期验证的工业级基础库

en.tag: Facebook's open-source high-performance C++20 core components library
en.what: Folly is an open-source C++20 components library developed and widely used at Meta, designed for practicality and efficiency. It serves as foundational shared code for many of Facebook's C++ projects, with deep performance optimizations targeting large-scale infrastructure.
en.content: The repository follows a flat folly/ directory layout containing relatively independent headers and implementation modules, alongside experimental, test, and docs subdirectories for internal prototypes, unit tests, and project documentation.
en.stack: Built on C++20, it complements rather than competes with Boost and the standard library, providing alternative implementations only when existing solutions fail to meet required performance or functionality profiles.
en.hot: As a cornerstone of Facebook's C++ ecosystem, Folly has accumulated over 30.4k stars, gaining 87 this month and ranking 21st on GitHub's C++ monthly trending list, making it a widely recognized infrastructure library for high-performance systems.
uses: Large-scale backend C++ developers who need high-performance primitives to fill gaps left by the standard library or Boost
Infrastructure and middleware teams building high-concurrency, low-latency systems and reusing its locks, strings, and memory utilities
Open-source C++ maintainers seeking to adopt production-hardened, industrial-grade foundational libraries validated at Meta

zh.tag: 1-bit/三值超压缩大模型 Bonsai 的本地运行 demo
zh.what: PrismML 的 Bonsai 系列语言模型官方演示仓库，主打极致量化：1-bit 版每权重约 1.125 bit，27B 模型能塞进现代 iPhone；三值（Ternary）版约 1.7 bit，是质量更高的默认选项。最新 27B 是视觉语言模型，支持看图、tool calling、MCP、256k+ 长上下文和推理努力度调节。
zh.content: 纯 Shell 脚本工程：setup.sh / setup.ps1 一键装依赖下模型，scripts/ 放运行和下载脚本，另有三份白皮书 PDF、AGENTS.md（写给 AI agent 看的配置指南）、VISION/TOOLS 等专题文档与社区 benchmark。
zh.stack: Shell + llama.cpp 服务端，模型托管在 HuggingFace；支持 Mac Metal、CUDA/Vulkan/ROCm 和纯 CPU，Apache-2.0。
zh.hot: 视觉语言模型与 iPhone 端侧演示把技术卖点变得直观，配套脚本也降低了上手与复现实验的门槛。
uses: 手机 / 边缘设备开发者 —— 在 iPhone 上离线跑 27B 视觉语言模型
隐私敏感场景 —— 医疗、法律等数据不出本地的本地 AI 助手
硬件玩家 —— 在树莓派等低功耗设备上体验大模型

en.tag: Local-run demo of Bonsai, the 1-bit / ternary ultra-compressed LLMs
en.what: The official demo repo for PrismML's Bonsai model family, built around extreme quantization: the 1-bit version uses ~1.125 bits per weight so a 27B model fits a modern iPhone; the ternary version (~1.7 bits) is the higher-quality default. The newest 27B is a vision-language model with image input, tool calling, MCP, 256k+ context and adjustable reasoning effort.
en.content: A pure Shell project: setup.sh / setup.ps1 one-liners install dependencies and pull models, scripts/ holds run/download scripts, plus three whitepaper PDFs, an AGENTS.md (a config guide written for AI agents), topical docs (VISION/TOOLS/…) and community benchmarks.
en.stack: Shell + a llama.cpp server, models hosted on HuggingFace; runs on Mac Metal, CUDA/Vulkan/ROCm or plain CPU; Apache-2.0.
en.hot: The vision-language model and on-device iPhone demo make a technically ambitious claim concrete, while the included scripts reduce trial friction.
uses: Mobile / edge developers — run a 27B vision-language model offline on an iPhone
Privacy-sensitive settings — local AI assistants for medical or legal data that can't leave the device
Hardware tinkerers — run LLMs on low-power boards like a Raspberry Pi

zh.tag: 教你从零重写各种技术的教程大合集
zh.what: CodeCrafters 维护的著名教程索引仓库，理念是费曼那句「我不能创造的东西，我就不理解」。收录大量「从零重写某技术」的 step-by-step 教程链接，覆盖数据库、操作系统、Git、Docker、编程语言、神经网络、Web 浏览器等约 30 个类别。
zh.content: 主体是一个巨大的 README 列表，按「Build your own X」分类组织，每条标注所用编程语言和链接（如用 Python 写 LLM、用 C++ 写光线追踪）；无代码本体。
zh.stack: 纯 Markdown 文档；收录的教程本身横跨 C/C++/Python/Go/Rust 等各种语言。
zh.hot: 它用「亲手实现一遍」把抽象的计算机科学原理变成具体项目，学习路径清晰，因此长期具有传播力。
uses: 在校生 / 转行者 —— 按「造一遍」路线真正理解数据库、操作系统原理
资深工程师 —— 面试前用手写 Git / Docker 项目补底层功底
技术布道者 —— 按分类找写作和分享素材

en.tag: The giant collection of 'rebuild your favorite tech from scratch' tutorials
en.what: CodeCrafters' famous tutorial index, founded on Feynman's 'What I cannot create, I do not understand'. It collects step-by-step 'build your own X' tutorial links across ~30 categories: databases, operating systems, Git, Docker, programming languages, neural networks, web browsers and more.
en.content: Essentially one huge README list organized by 'Build your own X' categories, each entry tagged with its language and link (e.g. write an LLM in Python, a raytracer in C++); no code of its own.
en.stack: Pure Markdown; the tutorials themselves span C/C++/Python/Go/Rust and more.
en.hot: Its learn-by-building catalog remains useful because it turns abstract computer-science concepts into concrete implementation projects.
uses: Students & career switchers — truly understand databases and OS internals by building them
Senior engineers — shore up fundamentals before interviews by hand-rolling Git / Docker
Tech writers — find writing and talk material by category

zh.tag: 把 GitHub Copilot 智能体嵌进你自己应用的官方 SDK
zh.what: GitHub 官方出的多语言 SDK：在自己的应用或服务里直接调用 Copilot Agent 的能力。它暴露的是 Copilot CLI 背后同一套经过生产验证的 agent 运行时 —— 你不用自己搭编排层，定义好 agent 行为，规划、工具调用、文件编辑都交给 Copilot 处理。
zh.content: 单仓库 6 套 SDK，按目录分：nodejs/、python/、go/、dotnet/、java/、rust/，另有 docs/、test/ 和 cookbook 示例；各语言经 npm / PyPI / NuGet / Maven Central / crates.io 分发。
zh.stack: 多语言 monorepo（TS/Python/Go/.NET/Java/Rust 六个 SDK），MIT；2026 年 1 月创建，推送非常活跃。
zh.hot: 「Copilot agent 能力开放给第三方应用」的定位自带关注度，GitHub 官方背书。
uses: SaaS 厂商 —— 在产品里内嵌 Copilot 级 AI 助手（IDE、低代码平台等）
企业内部工具 —— 快速给内部系统加 agent 能力，不用自研编排
多语言团队 —— JS / Python / Go / .NET / Java / Rust 任选

en.tag: GitHub's official SDK for embedding the Copilot agent in your own apps
en.what: GitHub's official multi-language SDK: call the Copilot Agent's capabilities directly from your own apps and services. It exposes the same production-proven agent runtime behind the Copilot CLI — no need to build your own orchestration layer: define the agent's behavior and let Copilot handle planning, tool calls and file edits.
en.content: Six SDKs in one repo, by directory: nodejs/, python/, go/, dotnet/, java/, rust/, plus docs/, test/ and cookbook examples; distributed via npm / PyPI / NuGet / Maven Central / crates.io.
en.stack: A multi-language monorepo (TS/Python/Go/.NET/Java/Rust), MIT; created January 2026, committing very actively.
en.hot: 'Copilot agent capabilities opened to third-party apps' draws attention by itself — with GitHub's official stamp on it.
uses: SaaS vendors — embed Copilot-grade AI assistance into products (IDEs, low-code platforms)
Internal tooling — add agent capabilities to internal systems without building orchestration
Polyglot teams — pick from JS / Python / Go / .NET / Java / Rust
